authors_text: Jingyao Wang,Naigong Yu
title: SSD-Faster Net: A Hybrid Network for Industrial Defect Inspection
title_zh: SSD-Faster Net：用于工业缺陷检测的混合网络
abstract: The quality of industrial components is critical to the production of special equipment such as robots. Defect inspection of these components is an efficient way to ensure quality. In this paper, we propose a hybrid network, SSD-Faster Net, for industrial defect inspection of rails, insulators, commutators etc. SSD-Faster Net is a two-stage network, including SSD for quickly locating defective blocks, and an improved Faster R-CNN for defect segmentation. For the former, we propose a novel slice localization mechanism to help SSD scan quickly. The second stage is based on improved Faster R-CNN, using FPN, deformable kernel(DK) to enhance representation ability. It fuses multi-scale information, and self-adapts the receptive field. We also propose a novel loss function and use ROI Align to improve accuracy. Experiments show that our SSD-Faster Net achieves an average accuracy of 84.03%, which is 13.42% higher than the nearest competitor based on Faster R-CNN, 4.14% better than GAN-based methods, more than 10% higher than that of DNN-based detectors. And the computing speed is improved by nearly 7%, which proves its robustness and superior performance.
summary: The quality of industrial components is critical to the production of special equipment such as robots. Defect inspection of these components is an efficient way to ensure quality. In this paper, we propose a hybrid network, SSD-Faster Net, for industrial defect inspection of rails, insulators, commutators etc. SSD-Faster Net is a two-stage network, including SSD for quickly locating defective blocks, and an improved Faster R-CNN for defect segmentation. For the former, we propose a novel slice localization mechanism to help SSD scan quickly. The second stage is based on improved Faster R-CNN, using FPN, deformable kernel(DK) to enhance representation ability. It fuses multi-scale information, and self-adapts the receptive field. We also propose a novel loss function and use ROI Align to improve accuracy. Experiments show that our SSD-Faster Net achieves an average accuracy of 84.03%, which is 13.42% higher than the nearest competitor based on Faster R-CNN, 4.14% better than GAN-based methods, more than 10% higher than that of DNN-based detectors. And the computing speed is improved by nearly 7%, which proves its robustness and superior performance.
abstract_zh: 工业零部件的质量对于机器人等专用设备的生产至关重要。对这些组件进行缺陷检查是确保质量的有效方法。在本文中，我们提出了一种混合网络SSD-Faster Net，用于铁轨、绝缘子、换向器等的工业缺陷检测。SSD-Faster Net是一个两级网络，包括用于快速定位缺陷块的SSD和用于缺陷分割的改进的Faster R-CNN。对于前者，我们提出了一种新颖的切片定位机制来帮助 SSD 快速扫描。第二阶段基于改进的Faster R-CNN，利用FPN、可变形核（DK）增强表示能力。它融合多尺度信息，自适应感受野。我们还提出了一种新颖的损失函数，并使用 ROI Align 来提高准确性。实验表明，我们的 SSD-Faster Net 的平均准确率达到 84.03%，比基于 Faster R-CNN 的最接近竞争对手高 13.42%，比基于 GAN 的方法高 4.14%，比基于 DNN 的检测器高 10% 以上。并且计算速度提升了近7%，证明了其稳健性和优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合网络SSD-Faster Net，用于工业部件缺陷检测，结合SSD快速定位与改进的Faster R-CNN进行缺陷分割。
AI.motivation: 工业部件质量对特种设备生产至关重要，传统缺陷检测方法存在效率与精度不足的问题，需开发更高效的检测方案。
AI.method: 设计两阶段混合网络：第一阶段采用改进SSD通过切片定位机制快速定位缺陷区域；第二阶段基于改进Faster R-CNN，融合FPN与可变形卷积核，结合新型损失函数与ROI Align提升分割精度。
AI.result: 在实验中达到84.03%平均准确率，较基于Faster R-CNN的最近竞争者提升13.42%，优于GAN方法4.14%，超过DNN检测器10%以上，计算速度提升近7%。
AI.conclusion: SSD-Faster Net在工业缺陷检测中展现出优越的精度与效率，验证了其鲁棒性和先进性，为工业质检提供有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jinwoo Hwang,Minsu Kim,Daeun Kim,Seungho Nam,Yoonsung Kim,Dohee Kim,Hardik Sharma,Jongse Park
title: CoVA: Exploiting Compressed-Domain Analysis to Accelerate Video Analytics
title_zh: CoVA：利用压缩域分析加速视频分析
abstract: Modern retrospective analytics systems leverage cascade architecture to mitigate bottleneck for computing deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the existing cascades suffer two limitations: (1) decoding bottleneck is either neglected or circumvented, paying significant compute and storage cost for pre-processing; and (2) the systems are specialized for temporal queries and lack spatial query support. This paper presents CoVA, a novel cascade architecture that splits the cascade computation between compressed domain and pixel domain to address the decoding bottleneck, supporting both temporal and spatial queries. CoVA cascades analysis into three major stages where the first two stages are performed in compressed domain while the last one in pixel domain. First, CoVA detects occurrences of moving objects (called blobs) over a set of compressed frames (called tracks). Then, using the track results, CoVA prudently selects a minimal set of frames to obtain the label information and only decode them to compute the full DNNs, alleviating the decoding bottleneck. Lastly, CoVA associates tracks with labels to produce the final analysis results on which users can process both temporal and spatial queries. Our experiments demonstrate that CoVA offers 4.8x throughput improvement over modern cascade systems, while imposing modest accuracy loss.
summary: Modern retrospective analytics systems leverage cascade architecture to mitigate bottleneck for computing deep neural networks (DNNs). However, the existing cascades suffer two limitations: (1) decoding bottleneck is either neglected or circumvented, paying significant compute and storage cost for pre-processing; and (2) the systems are specialized for temporal queries and lack spatial query support. This paper presents CoVA, a novel cascade architecture that splits the cascade computation between compressed domain and pixel domain to address the decoding bottleneck, supporting both temporal and spatial queries. CoVA cascades analysis into three major stages where the first two stages are performed in compressed domain while the last one in pixel domain. First, CoVA detects occurrences of moving objects (called blobs) over a set of compressed frames (called tracks). Then, using the track results, CoVA prudently selects a minimal set of frames to obtain the label information and only decode them to compute the full DNNs, alleviating the decoding bottleneck. Lastly, CoVA associates tracks with labels to produce the final analysis results on which users can process both temporal and spatial queries. Our experiments demonstrate that CoVA offers 4.8x throughput improvement over modern cascade systems, while imposing modest accuracy loss.
abstract_zh: 现代回顾性分析系统利用级联架构来缓解计算深度神经网络 (DNN) 的瓶颈。然而，现有的级联有两个局限性：（1）解码瓶颈要么被忽略，要么被规避，为预处理付出了大量的计算和存储成本； (2)系统专门用于时间查询，缺乏空间查询支持。本文提出了 CoVA，一种新颖的级联架构，它将压缩域和像素域之间的级联计算分开，以解决解码瓶颈，支持时间和空间查询。 CoVA 将分析分为三个主要阶段，其中前两个阶段在压缩域中执行，最后一个阶段在像素域中执行。首先，CoVA 检测一组压缩帧（称为轨迹）上移动对象（称为斑点）的出现。然后，利用跟踪结果，CoVA 谨慎地选择最小的帧集来获取标签信息，并仅对它们进行解码以计算完整的 DNN，从而缓解解码瓶颈。最后，CoVA 将轨迹与标签相关联以生成最终分析结果，用户可以在该结果上处理时间和空间查询。我们的实验表明，与现代级联系统相比，CoVA 的吞吐量提高了 4.8 倍，同时带来了适度的精度损失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CoVA架构，通过在压缩域和像素域之间分割计算，加速视频分析并支持时空查询。
AI.motivation: 现有级联系统存在解码瓶颈和缺乏空间查询支持的局限性，导致计算和存储成本高且功能受限。
AI.method: CoVA将分析分为三阶段：压缩域检测运动对象（blob）、选择性解码最小帧集获取标签、关联轨迹与标签生成结果，减少解码负担。
AI.result: 实验表明，CoVA相比现代级联系统吞吐量提升4.8倍，且精度损失较小。
AI.conclusion: CoVA通过压缩域分析有效缓解解码瓶颈，支持时空查询，为视频分析系统提供高效解决方案。

authors_text: Yanming Zhu,Xuefei Yin,Xiuping Jia,Jiankun Hu
title: Pair-Relationship Modeling for Latent Fingerprint Recognition
title_zh: 潜在指纹识别的配对关系建模
abstract: Latent fingerprints are important for identifying criminal suspects. However, recognizing a latent fingerprint in a collection of reference fingerprints remains a challenge. Most, if not all, of existing methods would extract representation features of each fingerprint independently and then compare the similarity of these representation features for recognition in a different process. Without the supervision of similarity for the feature extraction process, the extracted representation features are hard to optimally reflect the similarity of the two compared fingerprints which is the base for matching decision making. In this paper, we propose a new scheme that can model the pair-relationship of two fingerprints directly as the similarity feature for recognition. The pair-relationship is modeled by a hybrid deep network which can handle the difficulties of random sizes and corrupted areas of latent fingerprints. Experimental results on two databases show that the proposed method outperforms the state of the art.
summary: Latent fingerprints are important for identifying criminal suspects. However, recognizing a latent fingerprint in a collection of reference fingerprints remains a challenge. Most, if not all, of existing methods would extract representation features of each fingerprint independently and then compare the similarity of these representation features for recognition in a different process. Without the supervision of similarity for the feature extraction process, the extracted representation features are hard to optimally reflect the similarity of the two compared fingerprints which is the base for matching decision making. In this paper, we propose a new scheme that can model the pair-relationship of two fingerprints directly as the similarity feature for recognition. The pair-relationship is modeled by a hybrid deep network which can handle the difficulties of random sizes and corrupted areas of latent fingerprints. Experimental results on two databases show that the proposed method outperforms the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 潜指纹对于识别犯罪嫌疑人具有重要意义。然而，识别参考指纹集合中的潜在指纹仍然是一个挑战。大多数（如果不是全部）现有方法都会独立提取每个指纹的表示特征，然后比较这些表示特征的相似性，以便在不同的过程中进行识别。如果没有对特征提取过程的相似性进行监督，提取的表示特征很难最优地反映两个比较指纹的相似性，而这是匹配决策的基础。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方案，可以直接对两个指纹的配对关系进行建模作为识别的相似特征。配对关系由混合深度网络建模，可以处理随机大小和潜在指纹损坏区域的困难。两个数据库的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有技术。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过直接建模指纹对关系来提升潜指纹识别性能的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法独立提取指纹特征再比较相似性，缺乏对相似性的监督，导致特征无法最优反映匹配关系。
AI.method: 设计混合深度网络直接建模指纹对关系，处理潜指纹尺寸随机性和区域损坏问题。
AI.result: 在两个数据库实验中，该方法优于现有最先进算法。
AI.conclusion: 直接建模指纹对关系能有效提升潜指纹识别准确率，克服传统方法局限性。

search_text: Pair-Relationship Modeling for Latent Fingerprint Recognition 潜在指纹识别的配对关系建模 Latent fingerprints are important for identifying criminal suspects. However, recognizing a latent fingerprint in a collection of reference fingerprints remains a challenge. Most, if not all, of existing methods would extract representation features of each fingerprint independently and then compare the similarity of these representation features for recognition in a different process. Without the supervision of similarity for the feature extraction process, the extracted representation features are hard to optimally reflect the similarity of the two compared fingerprints which is the base for matching decision making. In this paper, we propose a new scheme that can model the pair-relationship of two fingerprints directly as the similarity feature for recognition. The pair-relationship is modeled by a hybrid deep network which can handle the difficulties of random sizes and corrupted areas of latent fingerprints. Experimental results on two databases show that the proposed method outperforms the state of the art. 潜指纹对于识别犯罪嫌疑人具有重要意义。然而，识别参考指纹集合中的潜在指纹仍然是一个挑战。大多数（如果不是全部）现有方法都会独立提取每个指纹的表示特征，然后比较这些表示特征的相似性，以便在不同的过程中进行识别。如果没有对特征提取过程的相似性进行监督，提取的表示特征很难最优地反映两个比较指纹的相似性，而这是匹配决策的基础。在本文中，我们提出了一种新方案，可以直接对两个指纹的配对关系进行建模作为识别的相似特征。配对关系由混合深度网络建模，可以处理随机大小和潜在指纹损坏区域的困难。两个数据库的实验结果表明，所提出的方法优于现有技术。 本文提出一种通过直接建模指纹对关系来提升潜指纹识别性能的新方法。 Yanming Zhu,Xuefei Yin,Xiuping Jia,Jiankun Hu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shaopu Wang,Xiaojun Chen,Mengzhen Kou,Jinqiao Shi
title: PrUE: Distilling Knowledge from Sparse Teacher Networks
title_zh: PrUE：从稀疏的教师网络中提取知识
abstract: Although deep neural networks have enjoyed remarkable success across a wide variety of tasks, their ever-increasing size also imposes significant overhead on deployment. To compress these models, knowledge distillation was proposed to transfer knowledge from a cumbersome (teacher) network into a lightweight (student) network. However, guidance from a teacher does not always improve the generalization of students, especially when the size gap between student and teacher is large. Previous works argued that it was due to the high certainty of the teacher, resulting in harder labels that were difficult to fit. To soften these labels, we present a pruning method termed Prediction Uncertainty Enlargement (PrUE) to simplify the teacher. Specifically, our method aims to decrease the teacher's certainty about data, thereby generating soft predictions for students. We empirically investigate the effectiveness of the proposed method with experiments on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and ImageNet. Results indicate that student networks trained with sparse teachers achieve better performance. Besides, our method allows researchers to distill knowledge from deeper networks to improve students further. Our code is made public at: \url{https://github.com/wangshaopu/prue}.
summary: Although deep neural networks have enjoyed remarkable success across a wide variety of tasks, their ever-increasing size also imposes significant overhead on deployment. To compress these models, knowledge distillation was proposed to transfer knowledge from a cumbersome (teacher) network into a lightweight (student) network. However, guidance from a teacher does not always improve the generalization of students, especially when the size gap between student and teacher is large. Previous works argued that it was due to the high certainty of the teacher, resulting in harder labels that were difficult to fit. To soften these labels, we present a pruning method termed Prediction Uncertainty Enlargement (PrUE) to simplify the teacher. Specifically, our method aims to decrease the teacher's certainty about data, thereby generating soft predictions for students. We empirically investigate the effectiveness of the proposed method with experiments on CIFAR-10/100, Tiny-ImageNet, and ImageNet. Results indicate that student networks trained with sparse teachers achieve better performance. Besides, our method allows researchers to distill knowledge from deeper networks to improve students further. Our code is made public at: \url{https://github.com/wangshaopu/prue}.
abstract_zh: 尽管深度神经网络在各种任务中取得了显着的成功，但其不断增加的规模也给部署带来了巨大的开销。为了压缩这些模型，提出了知识蒸馏，将知识从繁琐的（教师）网络转移到轻量级（学生）网络中。然而，老师的指导并不总能提高学生的泛化能力，尤其是当学生和老师之间的体型差距很大时。之前的作品认为，这是由于老师的高度确定性，导致了难以贴合的较硬的标签。为了软化这些标签，我们提出了一种称为预测不确定性放大（PrUE）的修剪方法来简化教师。具体来说，我们的方法旨在降低教师对数据的确定性，从而为学生生成软预测。我们通过在 CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet 和 ImageNet 上的实验来实证研究所提出方法的有效性。结果表明，由稀疏教师训练的学生网络取得了更好的性能。此外，我们的方法允许研究人员从更深层次的网络中提取知识，以进一步提高学生的水平。我们的代码公开于：\url{https://github.com/wangshaopu/prue}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PrUE方法，通过降低教师网络的确定性生成软标签，以提升知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 当学生与教师网络规模差异较大时，教师网络的高确定性会导致硬标签，难以被学生网络适配。
AI.method: 提出预测不确定性增强（PrUE）方法，通过剪枝降低教师网络的确定性，生成更易适应的软预测标签。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10/100、Tiny-ImageNet和ImageNet数据集上，使用稀疏教师网络训练的学生模型性能更优，并可进一步从更深网络中蒸馏知识。
AI.conclusion: PrUE通过软化教师标签有效提升了知识蒸馏效果，为模型压缩提供了新思路。

authors_text: Changwei Gong,Changhong Jing,Junren Pan,Shuqiang Wang
title: Feature-selected Graph Spatial Attention Network for Addictive Brain-Networks Identification
title_zh: 用于成瘾大脑网络识别的特征选择图空间注意网络
abstract: Functional alterations in the relevant neural circuits occur from drug addiction over a certain period. And these significant alterations are also revealed by analyzing fMRI. However, because of fMRI's high dimensionality and poor signal-to-noise ratio, it is challenging to encode efficient and robust brain regional embeddings for both graph-level identification and region-level biomarkers detection tasks between nicotine addiction (NA) and healthy control (HC) groups. In this work, we represent the fMRI of the rat brain as a graph with biological attributes and propose a novel feature-selected graph spatial attention network(FGSAN) to extract the biomarkers of addiction and identify from these brain networks. Specially, a graph spatial attention encoder is employed to capture the features of spatiotemporal brain networks with spatial information. The method simultaneously adopts a Bayesian feature selection strategy to optimize the model and improve classification task by constraining features. Experiments on an addiction-related neural imaging dataset show that the proposed model can obtain superior performance and detect interpretable biomarkers associated with addiction-relevant neural circuits.
summary: Functional alterations in the relevant neural circuits occur from drug addiction over a certain period. And these significant alterations are also revealed by analyzing fMRI. However, because of fMRI's high dimensionality and poor signal-to-noise ratio, it is challenging to encode efficient and robust brain regional embeddings for both graph-level identification and region-level biomarkers detection tasks between nicotine addiction (NA) and healthy control (HC) groups. In this work, we represent the fMRI of the rat brain as a graph with biological attributes and propose a novel feature-selected graph spatial attention network(FGSAN) to extract the biomarkers of addiction and identify from these brain networks. Specially, a graph spatial attention encoder is employed to capture the features of spatiotemporal brain networks with spatial information. The method simultaneously adopts a Bayesian feature selection strategy to optimize the model and improve classification task by constraining features. Experiments on an addiction-related neural imaging dataset show that the proposed model can obtain superior performance and detect interpretable biomarkers associated with addiction-relevant neural circuits.
abstract_zh: 药物成瘾在一定时期内会导致相关神经回路的功能改变。这些显着的变化也可以通过分析功能磁共振成像来揭示。然而，由于功能磁共振成像的高维性和较差的信噪比，为尼古丁成瘾（NA）和健康对照（HC）组之间的图级识别和区域级生物标志物检测任务编码高效且鲁棒的大脑区域嵌入具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们将大鼠大脑的功能磁共振成像表示为具有生物属性的图，并提出了一种新颖的特征选择图空间注意网络（FGSAN）来提取成瘾的生物标志物并从这些大脑网络中进行识别。特别地，采用图空间注意力编码器来捕获具有空间信息的时空大脑网络的特征。该方法同时采用贝叶斯特征选择策略来优化模型并通过约束特征来改进分类任务。对成瘾相关神经成像数据集的实验表明，所提出的模型可以获得卓越的性能并检测与成瘾相关神经回路相关的可解释的生物标志物。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于特征选择的图空间注意力网络（FGSAN），用于识别成瘾相关脑网络并检测与尼古丁成瘾相关的生物标志物。
AI.motivation: fMRI数据存在高维性和信噪比低的问题，导致难以高效编码脑区嵌入以区分成瘾组与健康对照组的脑网络特征。
AI.method: 将大鼠fMRI表示为带生物属性的图，设计图空间注意力编码器捕捉时空脑网络特征，并结合贝叶斯特征选择策略优化模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明FGSAN在成瘾相关神经影像数据集上取得优越性能，可检测到与成瘾相关神经回路显著关联的可解释生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: FGSAN通过融合图空间注意力机制与贝叶斯特征选择，有效解决了fMRI分析中的挑战，为成瘾研究提供了新的脑网络识别方法。

Experiments on an addiction-related neural imaging dataset show that the proposed model can obtain superior performance and detect interpretable biomarkers associated with addiction-relevant neural circuits. 药物成瘾在一定时期内会导致相关神经回路的功能改变。这些显着的变化也可以通过分析功能磁共振成像来揭示。然而，由于功能磁共振成像的高维性和较差的信噪比，为尼古丁成瘾（NA）和健康对照（HC）组之间的图级识别和区域级生物标志物检测任务编码高效且鲁棒的大脑区域嵌入具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们将大鼠大脑的功能磁共振成像表示为具有生物属性的图，并提出了一种新颖的特征选择图空间注意网络（FGSAN）来提取成瘾的生物标志物并从这些大脑网络中进行识别。特别地，采用图空间注意力编码器来捕获具有空间信息的时空大脑网络的特征。该方法同时采用贝叶斯特征选择策略来优化模型并通过约束特征来改进分类任务。对成瘾相关神经成像数据集的实验表明，所提出的模型可以获得卓越的性能并检测与成瘾相关神经回路相关的可解释的生物标志物。 本文提出一种基于特征选择的图空间注意力网络（FGSAN），用于识别成瘾相关脑网络并检测与尼古丁成瘾相关的生物标志物。 Changwei Gong,Changhong Jing,Junren Pan,Shuqiang Wang eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.NC

authors_text: Srijan Das,Michael S. Ryoo
title: Video + CLIP Baseline for Ego4D Long-term Action Anticipation
title_zh: Ego4D 长期行动预期的视频 + CLIP 基线
comment: Secured second position in the Ego4D Challenge for Long-Term Action Anticipation track at CVPR 2022
comments: Secured second position in the Ego4D Challenge for Long-Term Action Anticipation track at CVPR 2022
abstract: In this report, we introduce our adaptation of image-text models for long-term action anticipation. Our Video + CLIP framework makes use of a large-scale pre-trained paired image-text model: CLIP and a video encoder Slowfast network. The CLIP embedding provides fine-grained understanding of objects relevant for an action whereas the slowfast network is responsible for modeling temporal information within a video clip of few frames. We show that the features obtained from both encoders are complementary to each other, thus outperforming the baseline on Ego4D for the task of long-term action anticipation. Our code is available at github.com/srijandas07/clip_baseline_LTA_Ego4d.
summary: In this report, we introduce our adaptation of image-text models for long-term action anticipation. Our Video + CLIP framework makes use of a large-scale pre-trained paired image-text model: CLIP and a video encoder Slowfast network. The CLIP embedding provides fine-grained understanding of objects relevant for an action whereas the slowfast network is responsible for modeling temporal information within a video clip of few frames. We show that the features obtained from both encoders are complementary to each other, thus outperforming the baseline on Ego4D for the task of long-term action anticipation. Our code is available at github.com/srijandas07/clip_baseline_LTA_Ego4d.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了针对长期行动预期的图像文本模型的调整。我们的 Video + CLIP 框架利用大规模预训练的图像-文本配对模型：CLIP 和视频编码器 Slowfast 网络。 CLIP 嵌入提供了对与动作相关的对象的细粒度理解，而 Slowfast 网络负责对几帧视频剪辑内的时间信息进行建模。我们表明，从两个编码器获得的特征是互补的，因此在长期动作预期任务中优于 Ego4D 的基线。我们的代码可在 github.com/srijandas07/clip_baseline_LTA_Ego4d 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视频编码器和CLIP模型的框架，用于Ego4D数据集上的长期动作预测任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在长期动作预测中未能有效结合图像-文本模型与视频时序建模能力，需探索特征互补性以提升性能。
AI.method: 融合CLIP的图像-文本嵌入（捕捉动作相关物体细粒度信息）与Slowfast网络的视频时序建模（处理短时序片段），通过特征互补性提升预测效果。
AI.result: 在Ego4D数据集上，该框架的长期动作预测性能优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 结合CLIP与Slowfast的特征互补性可有效提升长期动作预测效果，代码已开源。

authors_text: Justin Kottinger,Shaull Almagor,Morteza Lahijanian
title: Conflict-based Search for Multi-Robot Motion Planning with Kinodynamic Constraints
title_zh: 基于冲突的运动动力学约束多机器人运动规划搜索
comment: 7 pages, 6 figures, and 2 algorithms. To be presented at International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) in October 2022
comments: 7 pages, 6 figures, and 2 algorithms. To be presented at International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) in October 2022
abstract: Multi-robot motion planning (MRMP) is the fundamental problem of finding non-colliding trajectories for multiple robots acting in an environment, under kinodynamic constraints. Due to its complexity, existing algorithms either utilize simplifying assumptions or are incomplete. This work introduces kinodynamic conflict-based search (K-CBS), a decentralized (decoupled) MRMP algorithm that is general, scalable, and probabilistically complete. The algorithm takes inspiration from successful solutions to the discrete analogue of MRMP over finite graphs, known as multi-agent path finding (MAPF). Specifically, we adapt ideas from conflict-based search (CBS) - a popular decentralized MAPF algorithm - to the MRMP setting. The novelty in this adaptation is that we work directly in the continuous domain, without the need for discretization. In particular, the kinodynamic constraints are treated natively. K-CBS plans for each robot individually using a low-level planner and and grows a conflict tree to resolve collisions between robots by defining constraints for individual robots. The low-level planner can be any sampling-based, tree-search algorithm for kinodynamic robots, thus lifting existing planners for single robots to the multi-robot settings. We show that K-CBS inherits the (probabilistic) completeness of the low-level planner. We illustrate the generality and performance of K-CBS in several case studies and benchmarks.
summary: Multi-robot motion planning (MRMP) is the fundamental problem of finding non-colliding trajectories for multiple robots acting in an environment, under kinodynamic constraints. Due to its complexity, existing algorithms either utilize simplifying assumptions or are incomplete. This work introduces kinodynamic conflict-based search (K-CBS), a decentralized (decoupled) MRMP algorithm that is general, scalable, and probabilistically complete. The algorithm takes inspiration from successful solutions to the discrete analogue of MRMP over finite graphs, known as multi-agent path finding (MAPF). Specifically, we adapt ideas from conflict-based search (CBS) - a popular decentralized MAPF algorithm - to the MRMP setting. The novelty in this adaptation is that we work directly in the continuous domain, without the need for discretization. In particular, the kinodynamic constraints are treated natively. K-CBS plans for each robot individually using a low-level planner and and grows a conflict tree to resolve collisions between robots by defining constraints for individual robots. The low-level planner can be any sampling-based, tree-search algorithm for kinodynamic robots, thus lifting existing planners for single robots to the multi-robot settings. We show that K-CBS inherits the (probabilistic) completeness of the low-level planner. We illustrate the generality and performance of K-CBS in several case studies and benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 多机器人运动规划（MRMP）是在运动动力学约束下为在环境中运行的多个机器人寻找非碰撞轨迹的基本问题。由于其复杂性，现有算法要么利用简化假设，要么不完整。这项工作介绍了基于运动动力学冲突的搜索 (K-CBS)，这是一种通用、可扩展且概率完整的分散式（解耦）MRMP 算法。该算法的灵感来自于有限图上 MRMP 离散模拟的成功解决方案，即多代理路径查找 (MAPF)。具体来说，我们将基于冲突的搜索 (CBS)（一种流行的去中心化 MAPF 算法）的思想应用于 MRMP 设置。这种改编的新颖之处在于我们直接在连续域中工作，而不需要离散化。特别是，运动动力学约束被本地处理。 K-CBS 使用低级规划器单独规划每个机器人，并通过定义各个机器人的约束来生成冲突树来解决机器人之间的碰撞。低级规划器可以是用于运动动力学机器人的任何基于采样的树搜索算法，从而将单个机器人的现有规划器提升到多机器人设置。我们证明 K-CBS 继承了低级规划器的（概率）完整性。我们通过几个案例研究和基准说明了 K-CBS 的通用性和性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为K-CBS的多机器人运动规划算法，用于处理具有运动学和动力学约束的连续空间中的碰撞避免问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在处理多机器人运动规划时要么依赖简化假设，要么无法保证完备性，因此需要一种通用且概率完备的解决方案。
AI.method: K-CBS基于冲突搜索（CBS）算法，直接在连续空间中处理运动学动力学约束，通过独立规划每个机器人路径并构建冲突树解决碰撞问题。
AI.result: K-CBS继承了底层规划器的概率完备性，在多个案例研究和基准测试中展示了其通用性和性能优势。
AI.conclusion: K-CBS为多机器人运动规划提供了可扩展且通用的解决方案，适用于复杂连续空间中的碰撞避免问题。

authors_text: Tobias Goodwin-Allcock,Jason McEwen,Robert Gray,Parashkev Nachev,Hui Zhang
title: How can spherical CNNs benefit ML-based diffusion MRI parameter estimation?
title_zh: 球形 CNN 如何使基于 ML 的扩散 MRI 参数估计受益？
abstract: This paper demonstrates spherical convolutional neural networks (S-CNN) offer distinct advantages over conventional fully-connected networks (FCN) at estimating scalar parameters of tissue microstructure from diffusion MRI (dMRI). Such microstructure parameters are valuable for identifying pathology and quantifying its extent. However, current clinical practice commonly acquires dMRI data consisting of only 6 diffusion weighted images (DWIs), limiting the accuracy and precision of estimated microstructure indices. Machine learning (ML) has been proposed to address this challenge. However, existing ML-based methods are not robust to differing dMRI gradient sampling schemes, nor are they rotation equivariant. Lack of robustness to sampling schemes requires a new network to be trained for each scheme, complicating the analysis of data from multiple sources. A possible consequence of the lack of rotational equivariance is that the training dataset must contain a diverse range of microstucture orientations. Here, we show spherical CNNs represent a compelling alternative that is robust to new sampling schemes as well as offering rotational equivariance. We show the latter can be leveraged to decrease the number of training datapoints required.
summary: This paper demonstrates spherical convolutional neural networks (S-CNN) offer distinct advantages over conventional fully-connected networks (FCN) at estimating scalar parameters of tissue microstructure from diffusion MRI (dMRI). Such microstructure parameters are valuable for identifying pathology and quantifying its extent. However, current clinical practice commonly acquires dMRI data consisting of only 6 diffusion weighted images (DWIs), limiting the accuracy and precision of estimated microstructure indices. Machine learning (ML) has been proposed to address this challenge. However, existing ML-based methods are not robust to differing dMRI gradient sampling schemes, nor are they rotation equivariant. Lack of robustness to sampling schemes requires a new network to be trained for each scheme, complicating the analysis of data from multiple sources. A possible consequence of the lack of rotational equivariance is that the training dataset must contain a diverse range of microstucture orientations. Here, we show spherical CNNs represent a compelling alternative that is robust to new sampling schemes as well as offering rotational equivariance. We show the latter can be leveraged to decrease the number of training datapoints required.
abstract_zh: 本文证明，在通过扩散 MRI (dMRI) 估计组织微观结构的标量参数方面，球形卷积神经网络 (S-CNN) 比传统的全连接网络 (FCN) 具有明显的优势。这些微观结构参数对于识别病理并量化其范围很有价值。然而，当前的临床实践通常获取仅由 6 个扩散加权图像 (DWI) 组成的 dMRI 数据，限制了估计微观结构指数的准确性和精确度。机器学习（ML）被提出来应对这一挑战。然而，现有的基于 ML 的方法对于不同的 dMRI 梯度采样方案并不稳健，也不是旋转等变的。采样方案缺乏鲁棒性，需要为每个方案训练一个新的网络，这使得对多个来源的数据的分析变得复杂。缺乏旋转等方差的一个可能后果是训练数据集必须包含各种微观结构方向。在这里，我们展示了球形 CNN 代表了一种引人注目的替代方案，它对新的采样方案具有鲁棒性，并且提供旋转等方差。我们表明可以利用后者来减少所需的训练数据点的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了球面卷积神经网络（S-CNN）在基于机器学习的扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）微结构参数估计中的优势。
AI.motivation: 传统全连接网络（FCN）在估计微结构参数时存在对dMRI梯度采样方案不鲁棒及缺乏旋转等变性的问题，导致需为不同方案重新训练模型且依赖大量多样化训练数据。
AI.method: 采用球面卷积神经网络（S-CNN）替代传统全连接网络，利用其对新采样方案的鲁棒性及旋转等变性特性，减少训练数据需求。
AI.result: S-CNN在参数估计精度和鲁棒性上优于FCN，且通过旋转等变性降低了训练数据量需求。
AI.conclusion: 球面卷积神经网络为dMRI微结构参数估计提供了更高效、通用的解决方案，适用于临床多源数据的分析。

search_text: How can spherical CNNs benefit ML-based diffusion MRI parameter estimation? 球形 CNN 如何使基于 ML 的扩散 MRI 参数估计受益？ This paper demonstrates spherical convolutional neural networks (S-CNN) offer distinct advantages over conventional fully-connected networks (FCN) at estimating scalar parameters of tissue microstructure from diffusion MRI (dMRI). Such microstructure parameters are valuable for identifying pathology and quantifying its extent. However, current clinical practice commonly acquires dMRI data consisting of only 6 diffusion weighted images (DWIs), limiting the accuracy and precision of estimated microstructure indices. Machine learning (ML) has been proposed to address this challenge. However, existing ML-based methods are not robust to differing dMRI gradient sampling schemes, nor are they rotation equivariant. Lack of robustness to sampling schemes requires a new network to be trained for each scheme, complicating the analysis of data from multiple sources. A possible consequence of the lack of rotational equivariance is that the training dataset must contain a diverse range of microstucture orientations. Here, we show spherical CNNs represent a compelling alternative that is robust to new sampling schemes as well as offering rotational equivariance. We show the latter can be leveraged to decrease the number of training datapoints required. 本文证明，在通过扩散 MRI (dMRI) 估计组织微观结构的标量参数方面，球形卷积神经网络 (S-CNN) 比传统的全连接网络 (FCN) 具有明显的优势。这些微观结构参数对于识别病理并量化其范围很有价值。然而，当前的临床实践通常获取仅由 6 个扩散加权图像 (DWI) 组成的 dMRI 数据，限制了估计微观结构指数的准确性和精确度。机器学习（ML）被提出来应对这一挑战。然而，现有的基于 ML 的方法对于不同的 dMRI 梯度采样方案并不稳健，也不是旋转等变的。采样方案缺乏鲁棒性，需要为每个方案训练一个新的网络，这使得对多个来源的数据的分析变得复杂。缺乏旋转等方差的一个可能后果是训练数据集必须包含各种微观结构方向。在这里，我们展示了球形 CNN 代表了一种引人注目的替代方案，它对新的采样方案具有鲁棒性，并且提供旋转等方差。我们表明可以利用后者来减少所需的训练数据点的数量。 本文探讨了球面卷积神经网络（S-CNN）在基于机器学习的扩散磁共振成像（dMRI）微结构参数估计中的优势。 Tobias Goodwin-Allcock,Jason McEwen,Robert Gray,Parashkev Nachev,Hui Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Katharine Patterson,Kevin Wilson,Scott Wisdom,John R. Hershey
title: Distance-Based Sound Separation
title_zh: 基于距离的声音分离
abstract: We propose the novel task of distance-based sound separation, where sounds are separated based only on their distance from a single microphone. In the context of assisted listening devices, proximity provides a simple criterion for sound selection in noisy environments that would allow the user to focus on sounds relevant to a local conversation. We demonstrate the feasibility of this approach by training a neural network to separate near sounds from far sounds in single channel synthetic reverberant mixtures, relative to a threshold distance defining the boundary between near and far. With a single nearby speaker and four distant speakers, the model improves scale-invariant signal to noise ratio by 4.4 dB for near sounds and 6.8 dB for far sounds.
summary: We propose the novel task of distance-based sound separation, where sounds are separated based only on their distance from a single microphone. In the context of assisted listening devices, proximity provides a simple criterion for sound selection in noisy environments that would allow the user to focus on sounds relevant to a local conversation. We demonstrate the feasibility of this approach by training a neural network to separate near sounds from far sounds in single channel synthetic reverberant mixtures, relative to a threshold distance defining the boundary between near and far. With a single nearby speaker and four distant speakers, the model improves scale-invariant signal to noise ratio by 4.4 dB for near sounds and 6.8 dB for far sounds.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了基于距离的声音分离的新任务，其中仅根据声音与单个麦克风的距离来分离声音。在助听设备的背景下，接近度为嘈杂环境中的声音选择提供了一个简单的标准，这将允许用户专注于与本地对话相关的声音。我们通过训练神经网络来将单通道合成混响混合物中的近声音与远声音分开，相对于定义近和远之间边界的阈值距离来证明这种方法的可行性。通过一个附近的扬声器和四个远处的扬声器，该模型将近距离声音的尺度不变信噪比提高了 4.4 dB，将远距离声音的尺度不变信噪比提高了 6.8 dB。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于距离的声音分离方法，通过单个麦克风捕捉的声音距离信息，将近场与远场声音分离。
AI.motivation: 在嘈杂环境中，助听设备需要简单有效的声音选择标准，使用户能聚焦于本地对话，而距离信息可作为此类场景的直观判据。
AI.method: 训练神经网络处理单通道混响混合信号，通过设定距离阈值区分近场与远场声音，实现两者的分离。
AI.result: 在单近场说话人与四远场说话人的测试中，模型使近场声音的SNR提升4.4dB，远场提升6.8dB。
AI.conclusion: 基于距离的声音分离方法在助听设备等场景中具有可行性，能有效增强目标声音的清晰度。

authors_text: Yeonghyeon Lee,Kangwook Jang,Jahyun Goo,Youngmoon Jung,Hoirin Kim
title: FitHuBERT: Going Thinner and Deeper for Knowledge Distillation of Speech Self-Supervised Learning
title_zh: FitHuBERT：更细更深入地进行语音自监督学习的知识蒸馏
abstract: Large-scale speech self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged to the main field of speech processing, however, the problem of computational cost arising from its vast size makes a high entry barrier to academia. In addition, existing distillation techniques of speech SSL models compress the model by reducing layers, which induces performance degradation in linguistic pattern recognition tasks such as phoneme recognition (PR). In this paper, we propose FitHuBERT, which makes thinner in dimension throughout almost all model components and deeper in layer compared to prior speech SSL distillation works. Moreover, we employ a time-reduction layer to speed up inference time and propose a method of hint-based distillation for less performance degradation. Our method reduces the model to 23.8% in size and 35.9% in inference time compared to HuBERT. Also, we achieve 12.1% word error rate and 13.3% phoneme error rate on the SUPERB benchmark which is superior than prior work.
summary: Large-scale speech self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged to the main field of speech processing, however, the problem of computational cost arising from its vast size makes a high entry barrier to academia. In addition, existing distillation techniques of speech SSL models compress the model by reducing layers, which induces performance degradation in linguistic pattern recognition tasks such as phoneme recognition (PR). In this paper, we propose FitHuBERT, which makes thinner in dimension throughout almost all model components and deeper in layer compared to prior speech SSL distillation works. Moreover, we employ a time-reduction layer to speed up inference time and propose a method of hint-based distillation for less performance degradation. Our method reduces the model to 23.8% in size and 35.9% in inference time compared to HuBERT. Also, we achieve 12.1% word error rate and 13.3% phoneme error rate on the SUPERB benchmark which is superior than prior work.
abstract_zh: 大规模语音自监督学习（SSL）已经成为语音处理的主要领域，然而其庞大的规模所带来的计算成本问题给学术界带来了很高的进入门槛。此外，现有的语音 SSL 模型蒸馏技术通过减少层数来压缩模型，这会导致音素识别 (PR) 等语言模式识别任务的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 FitHuBERT，与之前的语音 SSL 蒸馏工作相比，它使几乎所有模型组件的维度更薄，层更深。此外，我们采用时间减少层来加快推理时间，并提出一种基于提示的蒸馏方法以减少性能下降。与 HuBERT 相比，我们的方法将模型大小减少了 23.8%，推理时间减少了 35.9%。此外，我们在 SUPERB 基准测试中实现了 12.1% 的单词错误率和 13.3% 的音素错误率，这优于之前的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FitHuBERT方法，通过减少模型维度并加深层数，结合时间减少层和提示蒸馏技术，实现语音自监督学习模型的高效知识蒸馏。
AI.motivation: 现有语音SSL模型蒸馏方法因简单减少层数导致性能下降，且模型计算成本高，需更高效的压缩方案以平衡效率与性能。
AI.method: 在几乎所有模型组件中减少维度并加深层数，引入时间减少层加速推理，提出基于提示的知识蒸馏方法以减少性能损失。
AI.result: 模型规模缩小至原大小23.8%，推理时间减少35.9%，在SUPERB基准上达到12.1%词错误率和13.3%音素错误率，优于先前工作。
AI.conclusion: FitHuBERT通过维度压缩与深度增强结合，有效降低计算成本且保持高性能，为语音SSL模型蒸馏提供了新方向。

conclusion: FitHuBERT通过维度压缩与深度增强结合，有效降低计算成本且保持高性能，为语音SSL模型蒸馏提供了新方向。
search_text: FitHuBERT: Going Thinner and Deeper for Knowledge Distillation of Speech Self-Supervised Learning FitHuBERT：更细更深入地进行语音自监督学习的知识蒸馏 Large-scale speech self-supervised learning (SSL) has emerged to the main field of speech processing, however, the problem of computational cost arising from its vast size makes a high entry barrier to academia. In addition, existing distillation techniques of speech SSL models compress the model by reducing layers, which induces performance degradation in linguistic pattern recognition tasks such as phoneme recognition (PR). In this paper, we propose FitHuBERT, which makes thinner in dimension throughout almost all model components and deeper in layer compared to prior speech SSL distillation works. Moreover, we employ a time-reduction layer to speed up inference time and propose a method of hint-based distillation for less performance degradation. Our method reduces the model to 23.8% in size and 35.9% in inference time compared to HuBERT. Also, we achieve 12.1% word error rate and 13.3% phoneme error rate on the SUPERB benchmark which is superior than prior work. 大规模语音自监督学习（SSL）已经成为语音处理的主要领域，然而其庞大的规模所带来的计算成本问题给学术界带来了很高的进入门槛。此外，现有的语音 SSL 模型蒸馏技术通过减少层数来压缩模型，这会导致音素识别 (PR) 等语言模式识别任务的性能下降。在本文中，我们提出了 FitHuBERT，与之前的语音 SSL 蒸馏工作相比，它使几乎所有模型组件的维度更薄，层更深。此外，我们采用时间减少层来加快推理时间，并提出一种基于提示的蒸馏方法以减少性能下降。与 HuBERT 相比，我们的方法将模型大小减少了 23.8%，推理时间减少了 35.9%。此外，我们在 SUPERB 基准测试中实现了 12.1% 的单词错误率和 13.3% 的音素错误率，这优于之前的工作。 本文提出FitHuBERT方法，通过减少模型维度并加深层数，结合时间减少层和提示蒸馏技术，实现语音自监督学习模型的高效知识蒸馏。 Yeonghyeon Lee,Kangwook Jang,Jahyun Goo,Youngmoon Jung,Hoirin Kim eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Renato Sortino,Simone Palazzo,Concetto Spampinato
title: Transforming Image Generation from Scene Graphs
title_zh: 改变场景图的图像生成
abstract: Generating images from semantic visual knowledge is a challenging task, that can be useful to condition the synthesis process in complex, subtle, and unambiguous ways, compared to alternatives such as class labels or text descriptions. Although generative methods conditioned by semantic representations exist, they do not provide a way to control the generation process aside from the specification of constraints between objects. As an example, the possibility to iteratively generate or modify images by manually adding specific items is a desired property that, to our knowledge, has not been fully investigated in the literature. In this work we propose a transformer-based approach conditioned by scene graphs that, conversely to recent transformer-based methods, also employs a decoder to autoregressively compose images, making the synthesis process more effective and controllable. The proposed architecture is composed by three modules: 1) a graph convolutional network, to encode the relationships of the input graph; 2) an encoder-decoder transformer, which autoregressively composes the output image; 3) an auto-encoder, employed to generate representations used as input/output of each generation step by the transformer. Results obtained on CIFAR10 and MNIST images show that our model is able to satisfy semantic constraints defined by a scene graph and to model relations between visual objects in the scene by taking into account a user-provided partial rendering of the desired target.
summary: Generating images from semantic visual knowledge is a challenging task, that can be useful to condition the synthesis process in complex, subtle, and unambiguous ways, compared to alternatives such as class labels or text descriptions. Although generative methods conditioned by semantic representations exist, they do not provide a way to control the generation process aside from the specification of constraints between objects. As an example, the possibility to iteratively generate or modify images by manually adding specific items is a desired property that, to our knowledge, has not been fully investigated in the literature. In this work we propose a transformer-based approach conditioned by scene graphs that, conversely to recent transformer-based methods, also employs a decoder to autoregressively compose images, making the synthesis process more effective and controllable. The proposed architecture is composed by three modules: 1) a graph convolutional network, to encode the relationships of the input graph; 2) an encoder-decoder transformer, which autoregressively composes the output image; 3) an auto-encoder, employed to generate representations used as input/output of each generation step by the transformer. Results obtained on CIFAR10 and MNIST images show that our model is able to satisfy semantic constraints defined by a scene graph and to model relations between visual objects in the scene by taking into account a user-provided partial rendering of the desired target.
abstract_zh: 从语义视觉知识生成图像是一项具有挑战性的任务，与类标签或文本描述等替代方案相比，它有助于以复杂、微妙和明确的方式调节合成过程。尽管存在以语义表示为条件的生成方法，但除了对象之间的约束规范之外，它们没有提供控制生成过程的方法。例如，通过手动添加特定项目来迭代生成或修改图像的可能性是一个理想的属性，据我们所知，该属性尚未在文献中得到充分研究。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种以场景图为条件的基于变压器的方法，与最近的基于变压器的方法相反，它还采用解码器来自回归合成图像，使合成过程更加有效和可控。所提出的架构由三个模块组成：1）图卷积网络，对输入图的关系进行编码； 2）编码器-解码器变换器，它自回归地组成输出图像； 3）自动编码器，用于生成表示形式，用作变压器每个生成步骤的输入/输出。在 CIFAR10 和 MNIST 图像上获得的结果表明，我们的模型能够满足场景图定义的语义约束，并通过考虑用户提供的所需目标的部分渲染来对场景中视觉对象之间的关系进行建模。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于场景图的图像生成方法，利用变压器架构实现更有效的图像合成与控制。
AI.motivation: 现有生成方法难以通过语义表示精确控制生成过程，缺乏手动迭代修改图像的能力。
AI.method: 采用包含图卷积网络、编码器-解码器变压器和自编码器的三模块架构，通过场景图条件生成图像。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10和MNIST数据集上验证了模型能满足场景图定义的语义约束并处理视觉对象关系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自回归解码提升了图像生成的可控性，为基于场景图的生成任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Georg Hess,Johan Jaxing,Elias Svensson,David Hagerman,Christoffer Petersson,Lennart Svensson
title: Masked Autoencoder for Self-Supervised Pre-training on Lidar Point Clouds
title_zh: 用于激光雷达点云自监督预训练的掩码自动编码器
abstract: Masked autoencoding has become a successful pretraining paradigm for Transformer models for text, images, and, recently, point clouds. Raw automotive datasets are suitable candidates for self-supervised pre-training as they generally are cheap to collect compared to annotations for tasks like 3D object detection (OD). However, the development of masked autoencoders for point clouds has focused solely on synthetic and indoor data. Consequently, existing methods have tailored their representations and models toward small and dense point clouds with homogeneous point densities. In this work, we study masked autoencoding for point clouds in an automotive setting, which are sparse and for which the point density can vary drastically among objects in the same scene. To this end, we propose Voxel-MAE, a simple masked autoencoding pre-training scheme designed for voxel representations. We pre-train the backbone of a Transformer-based 3D object detector to reconstruct masked voxels and to distinguish between empty and non-empty voxels. Our method improves the 3D OD performance by 1.75 mAP points and 1.05 NDS on the challenging nuScenes dataset. Further, we show that by pre-training with Voxel-MAE, we require only 40% of the annotated data to outperform a randomly initialized equivalent. Code available at https://github.com/georghess/voxel-mae
summary: Masked autoencoding has become a successful pretraining paradigm for Transformer models for text, images, and, recently, point clouds. Raw automotive datasets are suitable candidates for self-supervised pre-training as they generally are cheap to collect compared to annotations for tasks like 3D object detection (OD). However, the development of masked autoencoders for point clouds has focused solely on synthetic and indoor data. Consequently, existing methods have tailored their representations and models toward small and dense point clouds with homogeneous point densities. In this work, we study masked autoencoding for point clouds in an automotive setting, which are sparse and for which the point density can vary drastically among objects in the same scene. To this end, we propose Voxel-MAE, a simple masked autoencoding pre-training scheme designed for voxel representations. We pre-train the backbone of a Transformer-based 3D object detector to reconstruct masked voxels and to distinguish between empty and non-empty voxels. Our method improves the 3D OD performance by 1.75 mAP points and 1.05 NDS on the challenging nuScenes dataset. Further, we show that by pre-training with Voxel-MAE, we require only 40% of the annotated data to outperform a randomly initialized equivalent. Code available at https://github.com/georghess/voxel-mae
abstract_zh: 屏蔽自动编码已成为文本、图像以及最近的点云 Transformer 模型的成功预训练范例。原始汽车数据集是自监督预训练的合适候选者，因为与 3D 对象检测 (OD) 等任务的注释相比，它们的收集成本通常较低。然而，点云屏蔽自动编码器的开发仅集中于合成数据和室内数据。因此，现有方法已针对具有均匀点密度的小而密的点云定制了其表示和模型。在这项工作中，我们研究了汽车环境中点云的掩码自动编码，这些点云是稀疏的，并且同一场景中的对象之间的点密度可能会发生巨大变化。为此，我们提出了 Voxel-MAE，一种专为体素表示设计的简单掩码自动编码预训练方案。我们对基于 Transformer 的 3D 对象检测器的主干进行预训练，以重建屏蔽体素并区分空体素和非空体素。我们的方法在具有挑战性的 nuScenes 数据集上将 3D OD 性能提高了 1.75 mAP 点和 1.05 NDS。此外，我们表明，通过使用 Voxel-MAE 进行预训练，我们只需要 40% 的注释数据就可以优于随机初始化的等效数据。代码可在 https://github.com/georghess/voxel-mae 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种针对LiDAR点云的自监督预训练方法Voxel-MAE，用于提升自动驾驶场景下的3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云掩码自编码器多基于合成/室内数据，难以处理汽车场景中稀疏且密度变化大的真实点云数据，限制了3D目标检测的性能提升。
AI.method: 设计面向体素表示的Voxel-MAE框架，通过掩码重建损失和空/非空体素分类损失预训练Transformer骨干网络，适应稀疏点云特性。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上实现3D目标检测性能提升1.75 mAP和1.05 NDS，且仅需40%标注数据即可超越随机初始化模型。
AI.conclusion: Voxel-MAE有效解决了真实场景点云稀疏性问题，为自动驾驶3D检测提供了高效的自监督预训练方案。

authors_text: Arman Dehpanah,Muheeb Faizan Ghori,Jonathan Gemmell,Bamshad Mobasher
title: Behavioral Player Rating in Competitive Online Shooter Games
title_zh: 竞技在线射击游戏中的玩家行为评分
comment: Accepted in The 20th International Conference on Scientific Computing (CSC'22)
comments: Accepted in The 20th International Conference on Scientific Computing (CSC'22)
abstract: Competitive online games use rating systems for matchmaking; progression-based algorithms that estimate the skill level of players with interpretable ratings in terms of the outcome of the games they played. However, the overall experience of players is shaped by factors beyond the sole outcome of their games. In this paper, we engineer several features from in-game statistics to model players and create ratings that accurately represent their behavior and true performance level. We then compare the estimating power of our behavioral ratings against ratings created with three mainstream rating systems by predicting rank of players in four popular game modes from the competitive shooter genre. Our results show that the behavioral ratings present more accurate performance estimations while maintaining the interpretability of the created representations. Considering different aspects of the playing behavior of players and using behavioral ratings for matchmaking can lead to match-ups that are more aligned with players' goals and interests, consequently resulting in a more enjoyable gaming experience.
summary: Competitive online games use rating systems for matchmaking; progression-based algorithms that estimate the skill level of players with interpretable ratings in terms of the outcome of the games they played. However, the overall experience of players is shaped by factors beyond the sole outcome of their games. In this paper, we engineer several features from in-game statistics to model players and create ratings that accurately represent their behavior and true performance level. We then compare the estimating power of our behavioral ratings against ratings created with three mainstream rating systems by predicting rank of players in four popular game modes from the competitive shooter genre. Our results show that the behavioral ratings present more accurate performance estimations while maintaining the interpretability of the created representations. Considering different aspects of the playing behavior of players and using behavioral ratings for matchmaking can lead to match-ups that are more aligned with players' goals and interests, consequently resulting in a more enjoyable gaming experience.
abstract_zh: 竞技类网络游戏采用评级系统进行匹配；基于进展的算法，根据玩家所玩游戏的结果来评估玩家的技能水平，并提供可解释的评级。然而，玩家的整体体验是由游戏的唯一结果之外的因素决定的。在本文中，我们设计了从游戏统计数据到模型玩家的多个功能，并创建准确代表他们的行为和真实表现水平的评级。然后，我们通过预测竞技射击游戏类型的四种流行游戏模式中的玩家排名，将行为评分的估计能力与三种主流评分系统创建的评分进行比较。我们的结果表明，行为评级提供了更准确的绩效评估，同时保持了所创建表示的可解释性。考虑玩家游戏行为的不同方面并使用行为评分进行匹配可以使匹配更符合玩家的目标和兴趣，从而带来更愉快的游戏体验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于玩家行为数据的评分系统，以更准确地反映竞技射击游戏玩家的真实水平并提升匹配质量。
AI.motivation: 现有评分系统仅依赖游戏胜负结果，忽视了影响玩家体验的其他行为因素，导致匹配可能偏离玩家实际需求。
AI.method: 从游戏内行为统计特征构建模型生成行为评分，与三种主流评分系统在四种射击游戏模式中进行预测效果对比。
AI.result: 行为评分在保持可解释性的同时，比主流系统更准确地预测了玩家排名。
AI.conclusion: 纳入行为特征的评分系统可提升匹配相关性，从而改善玩家的游戏体验。

authors_text: Thuc Nguyen Huu,Vinh Van Duong,Jonghoon Yim,Byeungwoo Jeon
title: Ray-Space Motion Compensation for Lenslet Plenoptic Video Coding
title_zh: 用于小透镜全光视频编码的光线空间运动补偿
abstract: Plenoptic images and videos bearing rich information demand a tremendous amount of data storage and high transmission cost. While there has been much study on plenoptic image coding, investigations into plenoptic video coding have been very limited. We investigate the motion compensation for plenoptic video coding from a slightly different perspective by looking at the problem in the ray-space domain instead of in the conventional pixel domain. Here, we develop a novel motion compensation scheme for lenslet video under two sub-cases of ray-space motion, that is, integer ray-space motion and fractional ray-space motion. The proposed new scheme of light field motion-compensated prediction is designed such that it can be easily integrated into well-known video coding techniques such as HEVC. Experimental results compared to relevant existing methods have shown remarkable compression efficiency with an average gain of 19.63% and a peak gain of 29.1%.
summary: Plenoptic images and videos bearing rich information demand a tremendous amount of data storage and high transmission cost. While there has been much study on plenoptic image coding, investigations into plenoptic video coding have been very limited. We investigate the motion compensation for plenoptic video coding from a slightly different perspective by looking at the problem in the ray-space domain instead of in the conventional pixel domain. Here, we develop a novel motion compensation scheme for lenslet video under two sub-cases of ray-space motion, that is, integer ray-space motion and fractional ray-space motion. The proposed new scheme of light field motion-compensated prediction is designed such that it can be easily integrated into well-known video coding techniques such as HEVC. Experimental results compared to relevant existing methods have shown remarkable compression efficiency with an average gain of 19.63% and a peak gain of 29.1%.
abstract_zh: 全光图像和视频承载着丰富的信息，需要海量的数据存储和高昂的传输成本。尽管对全光图像编码进行了大量研究，但对全光视频编码的研究非常有限。我们从稍微不同的角度研究全光视频编码的运动补偿，通过查看光线空间域而不是传统像素域中的问题。在这里，我们在光线空间运动的两种子情况下，即整数光线空间运动和分数光线空间运动，为小透镜视频开发了一种新颖的运动补偿方案。所提出的光场运动补偿预测新方案的设计使其可以轻松集成到众所周知的视频编码技术（例如 HEVC）中。与现有相关方法相比，实验结果显示出显着的压缩效率，平均增益为19.63%，峰值增益为29.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于射线空间的光场视频运动补偿方法，以提高plenoptic视频编码的压缩效率。
AI.motivation: 光场图像和视频包含大量信息，导致存储和传输成本高昂，而现有研究主要集中在图像编码，视频编码方法研究不足。
AI.method: 在射线空间域而非传统像素域中，开发了针对整数和分数射线空间运动的新型运动补偿方案，并设计可集成到HEVC等编码标准中的光场运动补偿预测方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，与现有方法相比，平均压缩效率提升19.63%，峰值提升达29.1%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了光场视频编码的高数据需求问题，且兼容主流编码标准。

authors_text: Ashwin Ganesan
title: The Structure of Hypergraphs Arising in Cellular Mobile Communication Systems
title_zh: 蜂窝移动通信系统中出现的超图的结构
comment: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
comments: To appear in IEEE Transactions on Mobile Computing
abstract: An assumption that researchers have often used to model interference in a wireless network is the unit disk graph model. While many theoretical results and performance guarantees have been obtained under this model, an open research direction is to extend these results to hypergraph interference models. Motivated by recent results that the worst-case performance of the distributed maximal scheduling algorithm is characterized by the interference degree of the hypergraph, in the present work we investigate properties of the interference degree of the hypergraph and the structure of hypergraphs arising from physical constraints. We show that the problem of computing the interference degree of a hypergraph is NP-hard and we prove some properties and results concerning this hypergraph invariant. We investigate which hypergraphs are realizable, i.e. which hypergraphs arise in practice, based on physical constraints, as the interference model of a wireless network. In particular, a question that arises naturally is: what is the maximal value of $r$ such that the hypergraph $K_{1,r}$ is realizable? We determine this quantity for various integral and nonintegral values of the path loss exponent of signal propagation. We also investigate hypergraphs generated by line networks.
summary: An assumption that researchers have often used to model interference in a wireless network is the unit disk graph model. While many theoretical results and performance guarantees have been obtained under this model, an open research direction is to extend these results to hypergraph interference models. Motivated by recent results that the worst-case performance of the distributed maximal scheduling algorithm is characterized by the interference degree of the hypergraph, in the present work we investigate properties of the interference degree of the hypergraph and the structure of hypergraphs arising from physical constraints. We show that the problem of computing the interference degree of a hypergraph is NP-hard and we prove some properties and results concerning this hypergraph invariant. We investigate which hypergraphs are realizable, i.e. which hypergraphs arise in practice, based on physical constraints, as the interference model of a wireless network. In particular, a question that arises naturally is: what is the maximal value of $r$ such that the hypergraph $K_{1,r}$ is realizable? We determine this quantity for various integral and nonintegral values of the path loss exponent of signal propagation. We also investigate hypergraphs generated by line networks.
abstract_zh: 研究人员经常用来对无线网络中的干扰进行建模的假设是单位圆盘图模型。虽然在该模型下获得了许多理论结果和性能保证，但一个开放的研究方向是将这些结果扩展到超图干扰模型。最近的结果表明，分布式最大调度算法的最坏情况性能由超图的干扰度来表征，在本工作中，我们研究了超图的干扰度的性质以及由物理约束引起的超图的结构。我们证明了计算超图干扰度的问题是NP困难的，并证明了有关该超图不变量的一些性质和结果。我们研究哪些超图是可实现的，即哪些超图在实践中根据物理约束出现，作为无线网络的干扰模型。特别是，自然出现的一个问题是：使得超图$K_{1,r}$可实现的$r$的最大值是多少？我们针对信号传播的路径损耗指数的各种积分和非积分值确定该量。我们还研究了由线网络生成的超图。

AI.tldr: 研究蜂窝移动通信系统中由物理约束产生的超图的结构特性，特别是干扰度的计算与超图的可实现性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有无线网络干扰建模多采用单位圆盘图模型，但需要将其扩展到超图干扰模型；分布式最大调度算法的性能由超图的干扰度刻画，因此需要研究干扰度的性质和可实现超图的结构。
AI.method: 通过理论分析证明干扰度计算问题的NP难性；基于物理约束（信号传播路径损耗指数）研究超图的可实现性，分析不同路径损耗指数下超图K_{1,r}可实现的最大r值，并研究线型网络生成的超图。
AI.result: 证明了计算超图干扰度是NP难问题；确定了不同路径损耗指数（整数值和非整数值）下可实现超图K_{1,r}的最大r值；给出了线型网络超图的相关性质。
AI.conclusion: 超图干扰度的计算具有计算复杂性，物理约束限制了可实现超图的结构，路径损耗指数对超图可实现性有重要影响。

tldr: 研究蜂窝移动通信系统中由物理约束产生的超图的结构特性，特别是干扰度的计算与超图的可实现性问题。
motivation: 现有无线网络干扰建模多采用单位圆盘图模型，但需要将其扩展到超图干扰模型；分布式最大调度算法的性能由超图的干扰度刻画，因此需要研究干扰度的性质和可实现超图的结构。
method: 通过理论分析证明干扰度计算问题的NP难性；基于物理约束（信号传播路径损耗指数）研究超图的可实现性，分析不同路径损耗指数下超图K_{1,r}可实现的最大r值，并研究线型网络生成的超图。
result: 证明了计算超图干扰度是NP难问题；确定了不同路径损耗指数（整数值和非整数值）下可实现超图K_{1,r}的最大r值；给出了线型网络超图的相关性质。
conclusion: 超图干扰度的计算具有计算复杂性，物理约束限制了可实现超图的结构，路径损耗指数对超图可实现性有重要影响。
search_text: The Structure of Hypergraphs Arising in Cellular Mobile Communication Systems 蜂窝移动通信系统中出现的超图的结构 An assumption that researchers have often used to model interference in a wireless network is the unit disk graph model. While many theoretical results and performance guarantees have been obtained under this model, an open research direction is to extend these results to hypergraph interference models. Motivated by recent results that the worst-case performance of the distributed maximal scheduling algorithm is characterized by the interference degree of the hypergraph, in the present work we investigate properties of the interference degree of the hypergraph and the structure of hypergraphs arising from physical constraints. We show that the problem of computing the interference degree of a hypergraph is NP-hard and we prove some properties and results concerning this hypergraph invariant. We investigate which hypergraphs are realizable, i.e. which hypergraphs arise in practice, based on physical constraints, as the interference model of a wireless network. In particular, a question that arises naturally is: what is the maximal value of $r$ such that the hypergraph $K_{1,r}$ is realizable? We determine this quantity for various integral and nonintegral values of the path loss exponent of signal propagation. We also investigate hypergraphs generated by line networks. 研究人员经常用来对无线网络中的干扰进行建模的假设是单位圆盘图模型。虽然在该模型下获得了许多理论结果和性能保证，但一个开放的研究方向是将这些结果扩展到超图干扰模型。最近的结果表明，分布式最大调度算法的最坏情况性能由超图的干扰度来表征，在本工作中，我们研究了超图的干扰度的性质以及由物理约束引起的超图的结构。我们证明了计算超图干扰度的问题是NP困难的，并证明了有关该超图不变量的一些性质和结果。我们研究哪些超图是可实现的，即哪些超图在实践中根据物理约束出现，作为无线网络的干扰模型。特别是，自然出现的一个问题是：使得超图$K_{1,r}$可实现的$r$的最大值是多少？我们针对信号传播的路径损耗指数的各种积分和非积分值确定该量。我们还研究了由线网络生成的超图。 研究蜂窝移动通信系统中由物理约束产生的超图的结构特性，特别是干扰度的计算与超图的可实现性问题。 Ashwin Ganesan cs.NI,cs.CC,cs.DM,cs.DS

authors_text: Sauradip Nag,Nisarg Shah,Anran Qi,Raghavendra Ramachandra
title: How Far Can I Go ? : A Self-Supervised Approach for Deterministic Video Depth Forecasting
title_zh: 我能走多远？ ：确定性视频深度预测的自监督方法
abstract: In this paper we present a novel self-supervised method to anticipate the depth estimate for a future, unobserved real-world urban scene. This work is the first to explore self-supervised learning for estimation of monocular depth of future unobserved frames of a video. Existing works rely on a large number of annotated samples to generate the probabilistic prediction of depth for unseen frames. However, this makes it unrealistic due to its requirement for large amount of annotated depth samples of video. In addition, the probabilistic nature of the case, where one past can have multiple future outcomes often leads to incorrect depth estimates. Unlike previous methods, we model the depth estimation of the unobserved frame as a view-synthesis problem, which treats the depth estimate of the unseen video frame as an auxiliary task while synthesizing back the views using learned pose. This approach is not only cost effective - we do not use any ground truth depth for training (hence practical) but also deterministic (a sequence of past frames map to an immediate future). To address this task we first develop a novel depth forecasting network DeFNet which estimates depth of unobserved future by forecasting latent features. Second, we develop a channel-attention based pose estimation network that estimates the pose of the unobserved frame. Using this learned pose, estimated depth map is reconstructed back into the image domain, thus forming a self-supervised solution. Our proposed approach shows significant improvements in Abs Rel metric compared to state-of-the-art alternatives on both short and mid-term forecasting setting, benchmarked on KITTI and Cityscapes. Code is available at https://github.com/sauradip/depthForecasting
summary: In this paper we present a novel self-supervised method to anticipate the depth estimate for a future, unobserved real-world urban scene. This work is the first to explore self-supervised learning for estimation of monocular depth of future unobserved frames of a video. Existing works rely on a large number of annotated samples to generate the probabilistic prediction of depth for unseen frames. However, this makes it unrealistic due to its requirement for large amount of annotated depth samples of video. In addition, the probabilistic nature of the case, where one past can have multiple future outcomes often leads to incorrect depth estimates. Unlike previous methods, we model the depth estimation of the unobserved frame as a view-synthesis problem, which treats the depth estimate of the unseen video frame as an auxiliary task while synthesizing back the views using learned pose. This approach is not only cost effective - we do not use any ground truth depth for training (hence practical) but also deterministic (a sequence of past frames map to an immediate future). To address this task we first develop a novel depth forecasting network DeFNet which estimates depth of unobserved future by forecasting latent features. Second, we develop a channel-attention based pose estimation network that estimates the pose of the unobserved frame. Using this learned pose, estimated depth map is reconstructed back into the image domain, thus forming a self-supervised solution. Our proposed approach shows significant improvements in Abs Rel metric compared to state-of-the-art alternatives on both short and mid-term forecasting setting, benchmarked on KITTI and Cityscapes. Code is available at https://github.com/sauradip/depthForecasting
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的自监督方法来预测未来未观察到的现实世界城市场景的深度估计。这项工作是第一个探索自我监督学习来估计未来未观察到的视频帧的单眼深度的工作。现有的工作依赖于大量带注释的样本来生成未见过的帧的深度概率预测。然而，由于它需要大量带注释的视频深度样本，这使得它不现实。此外，案件的概率性质（一个过去可能有多个未来结果）通常会导致错误的深度估计。与以前的方法不同，我们将未观察到的帧的深度估计建模为视图合成问题，它将未看到的视频帧的深度估计视为辅助任务，同时使用学习的姿势合成回视图。这种方法不仅具有成本效益 - 我们不使用任何地面真实深度进行训练（因此实用），而且具有确定性（过去帧的序列映射到不久的将来）。为了解决这个任务，我们首先开发了一种新颖的深度预测网络 DefNet，它通过预测潜在特征来估计未观察到的未来的深度。其次，我们开发了一个基于通道注意的姿态估计网络，用于估计未观察到的帧的姿态。使用这种学习的姿势，估计的深度图被重建回图像域，从而形成自监督解决方案。我们提出的方法显示，与短期和中期预测设置上最先进的替代方案相比，Abs Rel 指标有了显着改进，以 KITTI 和 Cityscapes 为基准。代码可在 https://github.com/sauradip/depthForecasting 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自监督方法，用于预测未观测到的现实城市场景中未来视频帧的深度估计。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖大量标注样本生成概率预测，但实际中难以获取足够标注数据，且概率预测可能导致深度估计错误。本文旨在开发一种无需标注数据、确定性的视频深度预测方法。
AI.method: 将未观测帧的深度估计建模为视图合成问题，通过自监督学习联合优化深度预测网络（DeFNet）和基于通道注意力的位姿估计网络，利用学习到的位姿重建深度图。
AI.result: 在KITTI和Cityscapes数据集上，本文方法在短期和中期预测任务中均显著优于现有方法，Abs Rel指标提升明显。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过自监督学习实现无需标注数据的确定性深度预测，有效解决了现有方法的局限性，在实际应用中更具可行性。

authors_text: Raheleh Salehi,Ario Sadafi,Armin Gruber,Peter Lienemann,Nassir Navab,Shadi Albarqouni,Carsten Marr
title: Unsupervised Cross-Domain Feature Extraction for Single Blood Cell Image Classification
title_zh: 用于单血细胞图像分类的无监督跨域特征提取
comment: Accepted for publication at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022
abstract: Diagnosing hematological malignancies requires identification and classification of white blood cells in peripheral blood smears. Domain shifts caused by different lab procedures, staining, illumination, and microscope settings hamper the re-usability of recently developed machine learning methods on data collected from different sites. Here, we propose a cross-domain adapted autoencoder to extract features in an unsupervised manner on three different datasets of single white blood cells scanned from peripheral blood smears. The autoencoder is based on an R-CNN architecture allowing it to focus on the relevant white blood cell and eliminate artifacts in the image. To evaluate the quality of the extracted features we use a simple random forest to classify single cells. We show that thanks to the rich features extracted by the autoencoder trained on only one of the datasets, the random forest classifier performs satisfactorily on the unseen datasets, and outperforms published oracle networks in the cross-domain task. Our results suggest the possibility of employing this unsupervised approach in more complicated diagnosis and prognosis tasks without the need to add expensive expert labels to unseen data.
summary: Diagnosing hematological malignancies requires identification and classification of white blood cells in peripheral blood smears. Domain shifts caused by different lab procedures, staining, illumination, and microscope settings hamper the re-usability of recently developed machine learning methods on data collected from different sites. Here, we propose a cross-domain adapted autoencoder to extract features in an unsupervised manner on three different datasets of single white blood cells scanned from peripheral blood smears. The autoencoder is based on an R-CNN architecture allowing it to focus on the relevant white blood cell and eliminate artifacts in the image. To evaluate the quality of the extracted features we use a simple random forest to classify single cells. We show that thanks to the rich features extracted by the autoencoder trained on only one of the datasets, the random forest classifier performs satisfactorily on the unseen datasets, and outperforms published oracle networks in the cross-domain task. Our results suggest the possibility of employing this unsupervised approach in more complicated diagnosis and prognosis tasks without the need to add expensive expert labels to unseen data.
abstract_zh: 诊断血液恶性肿瘤需要对外周血涂片中的白细胞进行识别和分类。由不同的实验室程序、染色、照明和显微镜设置引起的领域转移阻碍了最近开发的机器学习方法对从不同站点收集的数据的可重用性。在这里，我们提出了一种跨域自适应自动编码器，以无监督的方式在从外周血涂片扫描的单个白细胞的三个不同数据集上提取特征。自动编码器基于 R-CNN 架构，使其能够专注于相关的白细胞并消除图像中的伪影。为了评估提取特征的质量，我们使用简单的随机森林对单个细胞进行分类。我们表明，由于仅在一个数据集上训练的自动编码器提取了丰富的特征，随机森林分类器在未见过的数据集上表现令人满意，并且在跨域任务中优于已发布的预言机网络。我们的结果表明，可以在更复杂的诊断和预后任务中采用这种无监督方法，而无需为看不见的数据添加昂贵的专家标签。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督跨领域特征提取方法，用于解决单个血细胞图像分类中的领域偏移问题。
AI.motivation: 不同实验室条件导致的领域偏移限制了机器学习模型在跨数据集任务中的复用性，且专家标注成本高昂。
AI.method: 基于R-CNN架构设计跨领域自适应自编码器，在无监督条件下提取血细胞特征，并用随机森林分类器验证特征有效性。
AI.result: 模型在未见过的数据集上达到满意分类效果，优于现有跨领域方法，证明特征提取的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 无监督跨领域特征提取方法可有效应用于复杂诊断任务，降低对专家标注的依赖。

tldr: 本文提出一种无监督跨领域特征提取方法，用于解决单个血细胞图像分类中的领域偏移问题。
motivation: 不同实验室条件导致的领域偏移限制了机器学习模型在跨数据集任务中的复用性，且专家标注成本高昂。
method: 基于R-CNN架构设计跨领域自适应自编码器，在无监督条件下提取血细胞特征，并用随机森林分类器验证特征有效性。
result: 模型在未见过的数据集上达到满意分类效果，优于现有跨领域方法，证明特征提取的有效性。
conclusion: 无监督跨领域特征提取方法可有效应用于复杂诊断任务，降低对专家标注的依赖。
search_text: Unsupervised Cross-Domain Feature Extraction for Single Blood Cell Image Classification 用于单血细胞图像分类的无监督跨域特征提取 Diagnosing hematological malignancies requires identification and classification of white blood cells in peripheral blood smears. Domain shifts caused by different lab procedures, staining, illumination, and microscope settings hamper the re-usability of recently developed machine learning methods on data collected from different sites. Here, we propose a cross-domain adapted autoencoder to extract features in an unsupervised manner on three different datasets of single white blood cells scanned from peripheral blood smears. The autoencoder is based on an R-CNN architecture allowing it to focus on the relevant white blood cell and eliminate artifacts in the image. To evaluate the quality of the extracted features we use a simple random forest to classify single cells. We show that thanks to the rich features extracted by the autoencoder trained on only one of the datasets, the random forest classifier performs satisfactorily on the unseen datasets, and outperforms published oracle networks in the cross-domain task. Our results suggest the possibility of employing this unsupervised approach in more complicated diagnosis and prognosis tasks without the need to add expensive expert labels to unseen data. 诊断血液恶性肿瘤需要对外周血涂片中的白细胞进行识别和分类。由不同的实验室程序、染色、照明和显微镜设置引起的领域转移阻碍了最近开发的机器学习方法对从不同站点收集的数据的可重用性。在这里，我们提出了一种跨域自适应自动编码器，以无监督的方式在从外周血涂片扫描的单个白细胞的三个不同数据集上提取特征。自动编码器基于 R-CNN 架构，使其能够专注于相关的白细胞并消除图像中的伪影。为了评估提取特征的质量，我们使用简单的随机森林对单个细胞进行分类。我们表明，由于仅在一个数据集上训练的自动编码器提取了丰富的特征，随机森林分类器在未见过的数据集上表现令人满意，并且在跨域任务中优于已发布的预言机网络。我们的结果表明，可以在更复杂的诊断和预后任务中采用这种无监督方法，而无需为看不见的数据添加昂贵的专家标签。 本文提出一种无监督跨领域特征提取方法，用于解决单个血细胞图像分类中的领域偏移问题。 Raheleh Salehi,Ario Sadafi,Armin Gruber,Peter Lienemann,Nassir Navab,Shadi Albarqouni,Carsten Marr cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Arij Bouazizi,Adrian Holzbock,Ulrich Kressel,Klaus Dietmayer,Vasileios Belagiannis
title: MotionMixer: MLP-based 3D Human Body Pose Forecasting
title_zh: MotionMixer：基于 MLP 的 3D 人体姿势预测
abstract: In this work, we present MotionMixer, an efficient 3D human body pose forecasting model based solely on multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). MotionMixer learns the spatial-temporal 3D body pose dependencies by sequentially mixing both modalities. Given a stacked sequence of 3D body poses, a spatial-MLP extracts fine grained spatial dependencies of the body joints. The interaction of the body joints over time is then modelled by a temporal MLP. The spatial-temporal mixed features are finally aggregated and decoded to obtain the future motion. To calibrate the influence of each time step in the pose sequence, we make use of squeeze-and-excitation (SE) blocks. We evaluate our approach on Human3.6M, AMASS, and 3DPW datasets using the standard evaluation protocols. For all evaluations, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, while having a model with a smaller number of parameters. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MotionMLP/MotionMixer
summary: In this work, we present MotionMixer, an efficient 3D human body pose forecasting model based solely on multi-layer perceptrons (MLPs). MotionMixer learns the spatial-temporal 3D body pose dependencies by sequentially mixing both modalities. Given a stacked sequence of 3D body poses, a spatial-MLP extracts fine grained spatial dependencies of the body joints. The interaction of the body joints over time is then modelled by a temporal MLP. The spatial-temporal mixed features are finally aggregated and decoded to obtain the future motion. To calibrate the influence of each time step in the pose sequence, we make use of squeeze-and-excitation (SE) blocks. We evaluate our approach on Human3.6M, AMASS, and 3DPW datasets using the standard evaluation protocols. For all evaluations, we demonstrate state-of-the-art performance, while having a model with a smaller number of parameters. Our code is available at: https://github.com/MotionMLP/MotionMixer
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了 MotionMixer，这是一种仅基于多层感知器 (MLP) 的高效 3D 人体姿势预测模型。 MotionMixer 通过顺序混合两种模态来学习时空 3D 身体姿势依赖性。给定 3D 身体姿势的堆叠序列，空间 MLP 提取身体关节的细粒度空间依赖性。然后通过时间 MLP 对身体关节随时间的相互作用进行建模。时空混合特征最终被聚合和解码以获得未来的运动。为了校准姿势序列中每个时间步的影响，我们使用挤压和激励（SE）块。我们使用标准评估协议在 Human3.6M、AMASS 和 3DPW 数据集上评估我们的方法。对于所有评估，我们都展示了最先进的性能，同时拥有参数较少的模型。我们的代码位于：https://github.com/MotionMLP/MotionMixer

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于多层感知机（MLP）的3D人体姿态预测模型MotionMixer。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通常依赖复杂结构或大量参数，而MotionMixer旨在通过高效MLP实现更轻量的3D姿态预测。
AI.method: 通过空间MLP提取关节空间依赖，时间MLP建模时间交互，并结合SE模块校准时间步影响。
AI.result: 在Human3.6M、AMASS、3DPW数据集上达到SOTA性能，参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: MotionMixer验证了MLP在3D姿态预测中的有效性，兼顾效率与精度。

authors_text: Philipp Spitzer,Niklas Kühl,Marc Goutier
title: Training Novices: The Role of Human-AI Collaboration and Knowledge Transfer
title_zh: 培训新手：人机协作和知识转移的作用
comment: This is a workshop paper: Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming (HM-CaT 2022). The 39th International Conference on Machine Learning. Link to the workshop: https://icml.cc/Conferences/2022/Schedule?showEvent=13478
comments: This is a workshop paper: Workshop on Human-Machine Collaboration and Teaming (HM-CaT 2022). The 39th International Conference on Machine Learning. Link to the workshop: https://icml.cc/Conferences/2022/Schedule?showEvent=13478
abstract: Across a multitude of work environments, expert knowledge is imperative for humans to conduct tasks with high performance and ensure business success. These humans possess task-specific expert knowledge (TSEK) and hence, represent subject matter experts (SMEs). However, not only demographic changes but also personnel downsizing strategies lead and will continue to lead to departures of SMEs within organizations, which constitutes the challenge of how to retain that expert knowledge and train novices to keep the competitive advantage elicited by that expert knowledge. SMEs training novices is time- and cost-intensive, which intensifies the need for alternatives. Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) poses a way out of this dilemma, facilitating alternatives to preserve expert knowledge and teach it to novices for tasks conducted by SMEs beforehand. In this workshop paper, we (1) propose a framework on how HAIC can be utilized to train novices on particular tasks, (2) illustrate the role of explicit and tacit knowledge in this training process via HAIC, and (3) outline a preliminary experiment design to assess the ability of AI systems in HAIC to act as a trainer to transfer TSEK to novices who do not possess prior TSEK.
summary: Across a multitude of work environments, expert knowledge is imperative for humans to conduct tasks with high performance and ensure business success. These humans possess task-specific expert knowledge (TSEK) and hence, represent subject matter experts (SMEs). However, not only demographic changes but also personnel downsizing strategies lead and will continue to lead to departures of SMEs within organizations, which constitutes the challenge of how to retain that expert knowledge and train novices to keep the competitive advantage elicited by that expert knowledge. SMEs training novices is time- and cost-intensive, which intensifies the need for alternatives. Human-AI collaboration (HAIC) poses a way out of this dilemma, facilitating alternatives to preserve expert knowledge and teach it to novices for tasks conducted by SMEs beforehand. In this workshop paper, we (1) propose a framework on how HAIC can be utilized to train novices on particular tasks, (2) illustrate the role of explicit and tacit knowledge in this training process via HAIC, and (3) outline a preliminary experiment design to assess the ability of AI systems in HAIC to act as a trainer to transfer TSEK to novices who do not possess prior TSEK.
abstract_zh: 在多种工作环境中，专业知识对于人类执行高性能任务并确保业务成功至关重要。这些人拥有特定任务的专家知识（TSEK），因此代表主题专家（SME）。然而，不仅是人口结构的变化，人员精简战略也会导致并将继续导致组织内中小企业的离职，这构成了如何保留专业知识并培训新手以保持专业知识带来的竞争优势的挑战。中小企业培训新手需要大量时间和成本，这加剧了对替代方案的需求。人机协作（HAIC）为摆脱这一困境提供了一条出路，它促进了保留专家知识的替代方案，并将其传授给新手以完成中小企业预先执行的任务。在这篇研讨会论文中，我们（1）提出了一个关于如何利用 HAIC 来培训特定任务新手的框架，（2）通过 HAIC 说明了显性知识和隐性知识在此培训过程中的作用，以及（3）概述了初步实验设计，以评估 HAIC 中的人工智能系统作为培训师将 TSEK 转移给不具备 TSEK 的新手的能力。

AI.tldr: 探讨人机协作（HAIC）在培训新手中的应用及知识转移机制
AI.motivation: 专家知识流失与传统培训成本高，亟需高效替代方案保留知识并培训新手
AI.method: 提出HAIC培训框架，分析显性/隐性知识作用，并设计实验评估AI训练效果
AI.result: 初步实验设计用于评估AI在HAIC中转移专家知识的能力
AI.conclusion: HAIC为知识保留与培训提供可行框架，需进一步验证

authors_text: Han Huang,Yijie Dong,Xiaohong Jia,Jianqiao Zhou,Dong Ni,Jun Cheng,Ruobing Huang
title: Personalized Diagnostic Tool for Thyroid Cancer Classification using Multi-view Ultrasound
title_zh: 使用多视图超声进行甲状腺癌分类的个性化诊断工具
abstract: Over the past decades, the incidence of thyroid cancer has been increasing globally. Accurate and early diagnosis allows timely treatment and helps to avoid over-diagnosis. Clinically, a nodule is commonly evaluated from both transverse and longitudinal views using thyroid ultrasound. However, the appearance of the thyroid gland and lesions can vary dramatically across individuals. Identifying key diagnostic information from both views requires specialized expertise. Furthermore, finding an optimal way to integrate multi-view information also relies on the experience of clinicians and adds further difficulty to accurate diagnosis. To address these, we propose a personalized diagnostic tool that can customize its decision-making process for different patients. It consists of a multi-view classification module for feature extraction and a personalized weighting allocation network that generates optimal weighting for different views. It is also equipped with a self-supervised view-aware contrastive loss to further improve the model robustness towards different patient groups. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can better utilize multi-view information and outperform the competing methods.
summary: Over the past decades, the incidence of thyroid cancer has been increasing globally. Accurate and early diagnosis allows timely treatment and helps to avoid over-diagnosis. Clinically, a nodule is commonly evaluated from both transverse and longitudinal views using thyroid ultrasound. However, the appearance of the thyroid gland and lesions can vary dramatically across individuals. Identifying key diagnostic information from both views requires specialized expertise. Furthermore, finding an optimal way to integrate multi-view information also relies on the experience of clinicians and adds further difficulty to accurate diagnosis. To address these, we propose a personalized diagnostic tool that can customize its decision-making process for different patients. It consists of a multi-view classification module for feature extraction and a personalized weighting allocation network that generates optimal weighting for different views. It is also equipped with a self-supervised view-aware contrastive loss to further improve the model robustness towards different patient groups. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can better utilize multi-view information and outperform the competing methods.
abstract_zh: 过去几十年来，全球甲状腺癌的发病率一直在上升。准确、早期诊断可以及时治疗，有助于避免过度诊断。临床上，通常使用甲状腺超声从横向和纵向视图评估结节。然而，甲状腺和病变的外观因人而异。从两个视图中识别关键诊断信息需要专业知识。此外，寻找整合多视图信息的最佳方式也依赖于临床医生的经验，这进一步增加了准确诊断的难度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种个性化的诊断工具，可以为不同的患者定制决策过程。它由用于特征提取的多视图分类模块和为不同视图生成最佳权重的个性化权重分配网络组成。它还配备了自我监督的视图感知对比损失，以进一步提高模型针对不同患者群体的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以更好地利用多视图信息并优于竞争方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多视角超声的个性化甲状腺癌分类诊断工具，旨在通过优化多视角信息整合提升诊断准确性。
AI.motivation: 甲状腺癌发病率上升，传统依赖横纵视角超声检查的方法因个体差异大、多视角信息整合困难，导致诊断效率受限，需个性化解决方案。
AI.method: 构建包含多视角分类模块的特征提取网络，结合个性化权重分配网络动态优化视角权重，并引入自监督视角感知对比损失以增强模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能更有效利用多视角信息，在分类性能上优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 所提出的个性化诊断工具通过自适应视角权重分配和对比学习，显著提升了甲状腺癌分类的准确性和鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于多视角超声的个性化甲状腺癌分类诊断工具，旨在通过优化多视角信息整合提升诊断准确性。
