search_text: Personalized Diagnostic Tool for Thyroid Cancer Classification using Multi-view Ultrasound 使用多视图超声进行甲状腺癌分类的个性化诊断工具 Over the past decades, the incidence of thyroid cancer has been increasing globally. Accurate and early diagnosis allows timely treatment and helps to avoid over-diagnosis. Clinically, a nodule is commonly evaluated from both transverse and longitudinal views using thyroid ultrasound. However, the appearance of the thyroid gland and lesions can vary dramatically across individuals. Identifying key diagnostic information from both views requires specialized expertise. Furthermore, finding an optimal way to integrate multi-view information also relies on the experience of clinicians and adds further difficulty to accurate diagnosis. To address these, we propose a personalized diagnostic tool that can customize its decision-making process for different patients. It consists of a multi-view classification module for feature extraction and a personalized weighting allocation network that generates optimal weighting for different views. It is also equipped with a self-supervised view-aware contrastive loss to further improve the model robustness towards different patient groups. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can better utilize multi-view information and outperform the competing methods. 过去几十年来，全球甲状腺癌的发病率一直在上升。准确、早期诊断可以及时治疗，有助于避免过度诊断。临床上，通常使用甲状腺超声从横向和纵向视图评估结节。然而，甲状腺和病变的外观因人而异。从两个视图中识别关键诊断信息需要专业知识。此外，寻找整合多视图信息的最佳方式也依赖于临床医生的经验，这进一步增加了准确诊断的难度。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种个性化的诊断工具，可以为不同的患者定制决策过程。它由用于特征提取的多视图分类模块和为不同视图生成最佳权重的个性化权重分配网络组成。它还配备了自我监督的视图感知对比损失，以进一步提高模型针对不同患者群体的鲁棒性。实验结果表明，所提出的框架可以更好地利用多视图信息并优于竞争方法。 本文提出了一种基于多视角超声的个性化甲状腺癌分类诊断工具，旨在通过优化多视角信息整合提升诊断准确性。 Han Huang,Yijie Dong,Xiaohong Jia,Jianqiao Zhou,Dong Ni,Jun Cheng,Ruobing Huang cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rabih Zbib,Lucas Alvarez Lacasa,Federico Retyk,Rus Poves,Juan Aizpuru,Hermenegildo Fabregat,Vaidotas Simkus,Emilia García-Casademont
title: Learning Job Titles Similarity from Noisy Skill Labels
title_zh: 从嘈杂的技能标签中学习职位的相似性
comment: Accepted to the International workshop on Fair, Effective And Sustainable Talent management using data science (FEAST) as part of ECML-PKDD 2022
comments: Accepted to the International workshop on Fair, Effective And Sustainable Talent management using data science (FEAST) as part of ECML-PKDD 2022
abstract: Measuring semantic similarity between job titles is an essential functionality for automatic job recommendations. This task is usually approached using supervised learning techniques, which requires training data in the form of equivalent job title pairs. In this paper, we instead propose an unsupervised representation learning method for training a job title similarity model using noisy skill labels. We show that it is highly effective for tasks such as text ranking and job normalization.
summary: Measuring semantic similarity between job titles is an essential functionality for automatic job recommendations. This task is usually approached using supervised learning techniques, which requires training data in the form of equivalent job title pairs. In this paper, we instead propose an unsupervised representation learning method for training a job title similarity model using noisy skill labels. We show that it is highly effective for tasks such as text ranking and job normalization.
abstract_zh: 测量职位之间的语义相似度是自动职位推荐的一项基本功能。该任务通常使用监督学习技术来完成，这需要等效职称对形式的训练数据。在本文中，我们提出了一种无监督表示学习方法，用于使用噪声技能标签训练职位相似度模型。我们证明它对于文本排名和作业规范化等任务非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于嘈杂技能标签的无监督学习方法，用于训练职位标题相似性模型，以替代传统监督学习方法。
AI.motivation: 传统监督学习方法依赖大量标注的等价职位对数据，获取成本高，而嘈杂技能标签更易获得，且能有效提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用无监督表示学习方法，通过处理 noisy skill labels 来训练职位标题的相似性模型。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在文本排序和职位归一化任务中表现出色，效果优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 无需依赖大量标注数据，利用嘈杂技能标签即可有效训练职位标题相似性模型，具有较高的实用价值。

authors_text: Yang Xing,Wenbo Li,Xiaoyu Mo,Chen Lv
title: Multi-task Driver Steering Behaviour Modeling Using Time-Series Transformer
title_zh: 使用时间序列变压器的多任务驾驶员转向行为建模
abstract: Human intention prediction provides an augmented solution for the design of assistants and collaboration between the human driver and intelligent vehicles. In this study, a multi-task sequential learning framework is developed to predict future steering torques and steering postures based on the upper limb neuromuscular Electromyography (EMG) signals. A single-right-hand driving mode is particularly studied. For this driving mode, three different driving postures are also evaluated. Then, a multi-task time-series transformer network (MTS-Trans) is developed to predict the steering torques and driving postures. To evaluate the multi-task learning performance, four different frameworks are assessed. Twenty-one participants are involved in the driving simulator-based experiment. The proposed model achieved accurate prediction results on the future steering torque prediction and driving postures recognition for single-hand driving modes. The proposed system can contribute to the development of advanced driver steering assistant systems and ensure mutual understanding between human drivers and intelligent vehicles.
summary: Human intention prediction provides an augmented solution for the design of assistants and collaboration between the human driver and intelligent vehicles. In this study, a multi-task sequential learning framework is developed to predict future steering torques and steering postures based on the upper limb neuromuscular Electromyography (EMG) signals. A single-right-hand driving mode is particularly studied. For this driving mode, three different driving postures are also evaluated. Then, a multi-task time-series transformer network (MTS-Trans) is developed to predict the steering torques and driving postures. To evaluate the multi-task learning performance, four different frameworks are assessed. Twenty-one participants are involved in the driving simulator-based experiment. The proposed model achieved accurate prediction results on the future steering torque prediction and driving postures recognition for single-hand driving modes. The proposed system can contribute to the development of advanced driver steering assistant systems and ensure mutual understanding between human drivers and intelligent vehicles.
abstract_zh: 人类意图预测为助手的设计以及人类驾驶员与智能车辆之间的协作提供了增强的解决方案。在这项研究中，开发了一个多任务顺序学习框架，用于根据上肢神经肌肉肌电图（EMG）信号预测未来的转向扭矩和转向姿势。特别研究了单右手驾驶模式。对于这种驾驶模式，还评估了三种不同的驾驶姿势。然后，开发了多任务时间序列变压器网络（MTS-Trans）来预测转向扭矩和驾驶姿势。为了评估多任务学习表现，评估了四种不同的框架。二十一名参与者参与了基于驾驶模拟器的实验。该模型对单手驾驶模式下的未来转向扭矩预测和驾驶姿势识别取得了准确的预测结果。所提出的系统可以有助于先进驾驶员转向辅助系统的开发，并确保人类驾驶员和智能车辆之间的相互理解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间序列Transformer的多任务框架，通过分析驾驶员上肢肌电信号预测单手驾驶模式下的转向扭矩及姿势。
AI.motivation: 为提升人车协作安全性与效率，需准确预测驾驶员意图，现有方法在复杂驾驶场景下存在预测精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 构建多任务时间序列Transformer网络（MTS-Trans），融合EMG信号特征，通过对比四种框架验证模型有效性，并基于21名受试者的驾驶模拟实验进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在单手驾驶模式下实现高精度的转向扭矩预测及姿势识别，验证了多任务学习在驾驶行为建模中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可为智能驾驶辅助系统开发提供技术支持，增强人车交互的互理解能力与安全性。

authors_text: Karan Kheta,Claire Delgove,Ruolin Liu,Adeola Aderogba,Marc-Olivier Pokam,Muhammed Mehmet Unal,Yang Xing,Weisi Guo
title: Vision-based Conflict Detection within Crowds based on High-Resolution Human Pose Estimation for Smart and Safe Airport
title_zh: 基于高分辨率人体姿势估计的人群内基于视觉的冲突检测，实现智能安全机场
comment: One of the authors has expressed privacy concerns and made a related request
comments: One of the authors has expressed privacy concerns and made a related request
abstract: Future airports are becoming more complex and congested with the increasing number of travellers. While the airports are more likely to become hotspots for potential conflicts to break out which can cause serious delays to flights and several safety issues. An intelligent algorithm which renders security surveillance more effective in detecting conflicts would bring many benefits to the passengers in terms of their safety, finance, and travelling efficiency. This paper details the development of a machine learning model to classify conflicting behaviour in a crowd. HRNet is used to segment the images and then two approaches are taken to classify the poses of people in the frame via multiple classifiers. Among them, it was found that the support vector machine (SVM) achieved the most performant achieving precision of 94.37%. Where the model falls short is against ambiguous behaviour such as a hug or losing track of a subject in the frame. The resulting model has potential for deployment within an airport if improvements are made to cope with the vast number of potential passengers in view as well as training against further ambiguous behaviours which will arise in an airport setting. In turn, will provide the capability to enhance security surveillance and improve airport safety.
summary: Future airports are becoming more complex and congested with the increasing number of travellers. While the airports are more likely to become hotspots for potential conflicts to break out which can cause serious delays to flights and several safety issues. An intelligent algorithm which renders security surveillance more effective in detecting conflicts would bring many benefits to the passengers in terms of their safety, finance, and travelling efficiency. This paper details the development of a machine learning model to classify conflicting behaviour in a crowd. HRNet is used to segment the images and then two approaches are taken to classify the poses of people in the frame via multiple classifiers. Among them, it was found that the support vector machine (SVM) achieved the most performant achieving precision of 94.37%. Where the model falls short is against ambiguous behaviour such as a hug or losing track of a subject in the frame. The resulting model has potential for deployment within an airport if improvements are made to cope with the vast number of potential passengers in view as well as training against further ambiguous behaviours which will arise in an airport setting. In turn, will provide the capability to enhance security surveillance and improve airport safety.
abstract_zh: 随着旅客人数的增加，未来的机场将变得更加复杂和拥挤。而机场更有可能成为潜在冲突爆发的热点，这可能导致航班严重延误和一些安全问题。智能算法可以使安全监控更有效地发现冲突，这将为乘客的安全、财务和旅行效率带来许多好处。本文详细介绍了用于对人群中的冲突行为进行分类的机器学习模型的开发。 HRNet 用于分割图像，然后采用两种方法通过多个分类器对帧中人物的姿势进行分类。其中，支持向量机（SVM）的性能最高，达到 94.37% 的精度。该模型的不足之处在于对抗模糊行为，例如拥抱或失去对画面中主体的追踪。如果进行改进以应对大量潜在乘客，并针对机场环境中出现的进一步模糊行为进行培训，所得模型就有可能在机场内部署。反过来，将提供加强安全监控和提高机场安全的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于高分辨率人体姿态估计的机器学习模型，用于在机场人群中检测冲突行为，以提升安全性和效率。
AI.motivation: 随着机场客流增加，潜在冲突可能导致航班延误和安全问题，需通过智能算法增强安防监控，保障乘客安全与出行效率。
AI.method: 采用HRNet进行图像分割，结合多种分类器（以支持向量机SVM效果最佳）分析人群姿态，识别冲突行为。
AI.result: SVM分类器达到94.37%的精确率，但对拥抱等模糊行为及遮挡场景检测效果不足。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在机场部署需进一步优化以应对大规模客流及复杂行为场景，从而提升安防监控能力。

authors_text: Yuhao Huang,Xin Yang,Xiaoqiong Huang,Jiamin Liang,Xinrui Zhou,Cheng Chen,Haoran Dou,Xindi Hu,Yan Cao,Dong Ni
title: Online Reflective Learning for Robust Medical Image Segmentation
title_zh: 用于稳健医学图像分割的在线反思学习
abstract: Deep segmentation models often face the failure risks when the testing image presents unseen distributions. Improving model robustness against these risks is crucial for the large-scale clinical application of deep models. In this study, inspired by human learning cycle, we propose a novel online reflective learning framework (RefSeg) to improve segmentation robustness. Based on the reflection-on-action conception, our RefSeg firstly drives the deep model to take action to obtain semantic segmentation. Then, RefSeg triggers the model to reflect itself. Because making deep models realize their segmentation failures during testing is challenging, RefSeg synthesizes a realistic proxy image from the semantic mask to help deep models build intuitive and effective reflections. This proxy translates and emphasizes the segmentation flaws. By maximizing the structural similarity between the raw input and the proxy, the reflection-on-action loop is closed with segmentation robustness improved. RefSeg runs in the testing phase and is general for segmentation models. Extensive validation on three medical image segmentation tasks with a public cardiac MR dataset and two in-house large ultrasound datasets show that our RefSeg remarkably improves model robustness and reports state-of-the-art performance over strong competitors.
summary: Deep segmentation models often face the failure risks when the testing image presents unseen distributions. Improving model robustness against these risks is crucial for the large-scale clinical application of deep models. In this study, inspired by human learning cycle, we propose a novel online reflective learning framework (RefSeg) to improve segmentation robustness. Based on the reflection-on-action conception, our RefSeg firstly drives the deep model to take action to obtain semantic segmentation. Then, RefSeg triggers the model to reflect itself. Because making deep models realize their segmentation failures during testing is challenging, RefSeg synthesizes a realistic proxy image from the semantic mask to help deep models build intuitive and effective reflections. This proxy translates and emphasizes the segmentation flaws. By maximizing the structural similarity between the raw input and the proxy, the reflection-on-action loop is closed with segmentation robustness improved. RefSeg runs in the testing phase and is general for segmentation models. Extensive validation on three medical image segmentation tasks with a public cardiac MR dataset and two in-house large ultrasound datasets show that our RefSeg remarkably improves model robustness and reports state-of-the-art performance over strong competitors.
abstract_zh: 当测试图像呈现不可见的分布时，深度分割模型常常面临失败的风险。提高模型针对这些风险的鲁棒性对于深度模型的大规模临床应用至关重要。在这项研究中，受人类学习周期的启发，我们提出了一种新颖的在线反思学习框架（RefSeg）来提高分割的鲁棒性。基于动作反射的概念，我们的RefSeg首先驱动深层模型采取动作以获得语义分割。然后，RefSeg 触发模型反映自身。由于让深度模型在测试过程中意识到其分割失败具有挑战性，因此 RefSeg 从语义掩模合成真实的代理图像，以帮助深度模型构建直观且有效的反射。该代理翻译并强调了分段缺陷。通过最大化原始输入和代理之间的结构相似性，动作反射循环被闭合，分段鲁棒性得到提高。 RefSeg 在测试阶段运行，适用于分割模型。使用公共心脏 MR 数据集和两个内部大型超声数据集对三个医学图像分割任务进行的广泛验证表明，我们的 RefSeg 显着提高了模型的稳健性，并报告了超越强大竞争对手的最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在线反思学习框架RefSeg，用于提升医学图像分割模型在面对未知分布测试数据时的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 深度分割模型在临床应用中面临测试图像分布未知时的失效风险，亟需提升模型鲁棒性以保障大规模应用可靠性。
AI.method: 基于人类学习循环的反思机制，RefSeg通过分割-反思闭环流程：先进行分割操作，再合成语义掩码的代理图像以凸显分割缺陷，通过最大化输入与代理图像的结构相似性完成反思过程。
AI.result: 在三个医学图像分割任务（含公开心脏MRI数据集和两个内部超声数据集）中，RefSeg显著提升模型鲁棒性，性能优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: RefSeg通过在线反思学习有效增强分割模型的分布外适应能力，为医学图像分析提供了一种通用且高效的鲁棒性提升方案。

authors_text: Yuxin Zou,Haoran Dou,Yuhao Huang,Xin Yang,Jikuan Qian,Chaojiong Zhen,Xiaodan Ji,Nishant Ravikumar,Guoqiang Chen,Weijun Huang,Alejandro F. Frangi,Dong Ni
title: Agent with Tangent-based Formulation and Anatomical Perception for Standard Plane Localization in 3D Ultrasound
title_zh: 具有基于切线的公式和解剖感知的代理，用于 3D 超声中的标准平面定位
abstract: Standard plane (SP) localization is essential in routine clinical ultrasound (US) diagnosis. Compared to 2D US, 3D US can acquire multiple view planes in one scan and provide complete anatomy with the addition of coronal plane. However, manually navigating SPs in 3D US is laborious and biased due to the orientation variability and huge search space. In this study, we introduce a novel reinforcement learning (RL) framework for automatic SP localization in 3D US. Our contribution is three-fold. First, we formulate SP localization in 3D US as a tangent-point-based problem in RL to restructure the action space and significantly reduce the search space. Second, we design an auxiliary task learning strategy to enhance the model's ability to recognize subtle differences crossing Non-SPs and SPs in plane search. Finally, we propose a spatial-anatomical reward to effectively guide learning trajectories by exploiting spatial and anatomical information simultaneously. We explore the efficacy of our approach on localizing four SPs on uterus and fetal brain datasets. The experiments indicate that our approach achieves a high localization accuracy as well as robust performance.
summary: Standard plane (SP) localization is essential in routine clinical ultrasound (US) diagnosis. Compared to 2D US, 3D US can acquire multiple view planes in one scan and provide complete anatomy with the addition of coronal plane. However, manually navigating SPs in 3D US is laborious and biased due to the orientation variability and huge search space. In this study, we introduce a novel reinforcement learning (RL) framework for automatic SP localization in 3D US. Our contribution is three-fold. First, we formulate SP localization in 3D US as a tangent-point-based problem in RL to restructure the action space and significantly reduce the search space. Second, we design an auxiliary task learning strategy to enhance the model's ability to recognize subtle differences crossing Non-SPs and SPs in plane search. Finally, we propose a spatial-anatomical reward to effectively guide learning trajectories by exploiting spatial and anatomical information simultaneously. We explore the efficacy of our approach on localizing four SPs on uterus and fetal brain datasets. The experiments indicate that our approach achieves a high localization accuracy as well as robust performance.
abstract_zh: 标准平面 (SP) 定位对于常规临床超声 (US) 诊断至关重要。与 2D US 相比，3D US 可以在一次扫描中获取多个视图平面，并通过添加冠状平面提供完整的解剖结构。然而，由于方向可变性和巨大的搜索空间，在 3D US 中手动导航 SP 非常费力且存在偏差。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新颖的强化学习 (RL) 框架，用于 3D US 中的自动 SP 定位。我们的贡献是三方面的。首先，我们将 3D US 中的 SP 定位制定为 RL 中基于切点的问题，以重构动作空间并显着减少搜索空间。其次，我们设计了一种辅助任务学习策略，以增强模型识别平面搜索中非 SP 和 SP 之间细微差异的能力。最后，我们提出了一种空间解剖奖励，通过同时利用空间和解剖信息来有效指导学习轨迹。我们探索了我们的方法在子宫和胎儿大脑数据集上定位四个 SP 的有效性。实验表明我们的方法实现了较高的定位精度和鲁棒的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于在3D超声中自动定位标准平面（SP），通过切线点公式和解剖感知提高定位精度。
AI.motivation: 手动在3D超声中导航标准平面耗时且易受偏差影响，需开发自动化方法以减少搜索空间并提升鲁棒性。
AI.method: 将SP定位建模为基于切线点的强化学习问题，设计辅助任务学习策略，并引入结合空间与解剖信息的奖励函数。
AI.result: 在子宫和胎儿大脑数据集上实现了高定位准确率和鲁棒性，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过切线点公式、辅助任务和解剖奖励机制，显著提升了3D超声中SP自动定位的性能。

search_text: Agent with Tangent-based Formulation and Anatomical Perception for Standard Plane Localization in 3D Ultrasound 具有基于切线的公式和解剖感知的代理，用于 3D 超声中的标准平面定位 Standard plane (SP) localization is essential in routine clinical ultrasound (US) diagnosis. Compared to 2D US, 3D US can acquire multiple view planes in one scan and provide complete anatomy with the addition of coronal plane. However, manually navigating SPs in 3D US is laborious and biased due to the orientation variability and huge search space. In this study, we introduce a novel reinforcement learning (RL) framework for automatic SP localization in 3D US. Our contribution is three-fold. First, we formulate SP localization in 3D US as a tangent-point-based problem in RL to restructure the action space and significantly reduce the search space. Second, we design an auxiliary task learning strategy to enhance the model's ability to recognize subtle differences crossing Non-SPs and SPs in plane search. Finally, we propose a spatial-anatomical reward to effectively guide learning trajectories by exploiting spatial and anatomical information simultaneously. We explore the efficacy of our approach on localizing four SPs on uterus and fetal brain datasets. The experiments indicate that our approach achieves a high localization accuracy as well as robust performance. 标准平面 (SP) 定位对于常规临床超声 (US) 诊断至关重要。与 2D US 相比，3D US 可以在一次扫描中获取多个视图平面，并通过添加冠状平面提供完整的解剖结构。然而，由于方向可变性和巨大的搜索空间，在 3D US 中手动导航 SP 非常费力且存在偏差。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新颖的强化学习 (RL) 框架，用于 3D US 中的自动 SP 定位。我们的贡献是三方面的。首先，我们将 3D US 中的 SP 定位制定为 RL 中基于切点的问题，以重构动作空间并显着减少搜索空间。其次，我们设计了一种辅助任务学习策略，以增强模型识别平面搜索中非 SP 和 SP 之间细微差异的能力。最后，我们提出了一种空间解剖奖励，通过同时利用空间和解剖信息来有效指导学习轨迹。我们探索了我们的方法在子宫和胎儿大脑数据集上定位四个 SP 的有效性。实验表明我们的方法实现了较高的定位精度和鲁棒的性能。 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的框架，用于在3D超声中自动定位标准平面（SP），通过切线点公式和解剖感知提高定位精度。 Yuxin Zou,Haoran Dou,Yuhao Huang,Xin Yang,Jikuan Qian,Chaojiong Zhen,Xiaodan Ji,Nishant Ravikumar,Guoqiang Chen,Weijun Huang,Alejandro F. Frangi,Dong Ni cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Jiamin Liang,Xin Yang,Yuhao Huang,Kai Liu,Xinrui Zhou,Xindi Hu,Zehui Lin,Huanjia Luo,Yuanji Zhang,Yi Xiong,Dong Ni
title: Weakly-supervised High-fidelity Ultrasound Video Synthesis with Feature Decoupling
title_zh: 具有特征解耦的弱监督高保真超声视频合成
abstract: Ultrasound (US) is widely used for its advantages of real-time imaging, radiation-free and portability. In clinical practice, analysis and diagnosis often rely on US sequences rather than a single image to obtain dynamic anatomical information. This is challenging for novices to learn because practicing with adequate videos from patients is clinically unpractical. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to synthesize high-fidelity US videos. Specifically, the synthesis videos are generated by animating source content images based on the motion of given driving videos. Our highlights are three-fold. First, leveraging the advantages of self- and fully-supervised learning, our proposed system is trained in weakly-supervised manner for keypoint detection. These keypoints then provide vital information for handling complex high dynamic motions in US videos. Second, we decouple content and texture learning using the dual decoders to effectively reduce the model learning difficulty. Last, we adopt the adversarial training strategy with GAN losses for further improving the sharpness of the generated videos, narrowing the gap between real and synthesis videos. We validate our method on a large in-house pelvic dataset with high dynamic motion. Extensive evaluation metrics and user study prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: Ultrasound (US) is widely used for its advantages of real-time imaging, radiation-free and portability. In clinical practice, analysis and diagnosis often rely on US sequences rather than a single image to obtain dynamic anatomical information. This is challenging for novices to learn because practicing with adequate videos from patients is clinically unpractical. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to synthesize high-fidelity US videos. Specifically, the synthesis videos are generated by animating source content images based on the motion of given driving videos. Our highlights are three-fold. First, leveraging the advantages of self- and fully-supervised learning, our proposed system is trained in weakly-supervised manner for keypoint detection. These keypoints then provide vital information for handling complex high dynamic motions in US videos. Second, we decouple content and texture learning using the dual decoders to effectively reduce the model learning difficulty. Last, we adopt the adversarial training strategy with GAN losses for further improving the sharpness of the generated videos, narrowing the gap between real and synthesis videos. We validate our method on a large in-house pelvic dataset with high dynamic motion. Extensive evaluation metrics and user study prove the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 超声（US）以其实时成像、无辐射、便携等优点而被广泛应用。在临床实践中，分析和诊断通常依靠超声序列而不是单个图像来获取动态解剖信息。这对于新手来说是一个挑战，因为使用来自患者的足够视频进行练习在临床上是不切实际的。在本文中，我们提出了一种合成高保真美国视频的新颖框架。具体来说，合成视频是通过基于给定驾驶视频的运动对源内容图像进行动画处理来生成的。我们的亮点有三个。首先，利用自监督学习和全监督学习的优势，我们提出的系统以弱监督方式进行训练以进行关键点检测。这些关键点为处理美国视频中复杂的高动态运动提供了重要信息。其次，我们使用双解码器将内容和纹理学习解耦，有效降低模型学习难度。最后，我们采用带有 GAN 损失的对抗性训练策略，进一步提高生成视频的清晰度，缩小真实视频和合成视频之间的差距。我们在具有高动态运动的大型内部骨盆数据集上验证了我们的方法。广泛的评估指标和用户研究证明了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种弱监督高保真超声视频合成框架，通过解耦特征学习与运动驱动生成动态超声视频。
AI.motivation: 临床实践中超声视频分析依赖动态信息，但缺乏足够的患者视频数据供学习，传统方法难以处理复杂运动且需大量标注。
AI.method: 1. 弱监督关键点检测结合自监督与全监督学习；2. 双解码器解耦内容与纹理特征；3. 对抗训练策略提升视频锐度。
AI.result: 在内部高动态盆腔数据集上验证，定量指标与用户研究均表明合成视频质量优越。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决超声视频合成难题，为临床教学与训练提供高质量数据支持。

authors_text: Oliver Lloyd,Yi Liu,Tom Gaunt
title: Assessing the Effects of Hyperparameters on Knowledge Graph Embedding Quality
title_zh: 评估超参数对知识图嵌入质量的影响
abstract: Embedding knowledge graphs into low-dimensional spaces is a popular method for applying approaches, such as link prediction or node classification, to these databases. This embedding process is very costly in terms of both computational time and space. Part of the reason for this is the optimisation of hyperparameters, which involves repeatedly sampling, by random, guided, or brute-force selection, from a large hyperparameter space and testing the resulting embeddings for their quality. However, not all hyperparameters in this search space will be equally important. In fact, with prior knowledge of the relative importance of the hyperparameters, some could be eliminated from the search altogether without significantly impacting the overall quality of the outputted embeddings. To this end, we ran a Sobol sensitivity analysis to evaluate the effects of tuning different hyperparameters on the variance of embedding quality. This was achieved by performing thousands of embedding trials, each time measuring the quality of embeddings produced by different hyperparameter configurations. We regressed the embedding quality on those hyperparameter configurations, using this model to generate Sobol sensitivity indices for each of the hyperparameters. By evaluating the correlation between Sobol indices, we find substantial variability in the hyperparameter sensitivities between knowledge graphs, with differing dataset characteristics being the probable cause of these inconsistencies. As an additional contribution of this work we identify several relations in the UMLS knowledge graph that may cause data leakage via inverse relations, and derive and present UMLS-43, a leakage-robust variant of that graph.
summary: Embedding knowledge graphs into low-dimensional spaces is a popular method for applying approaches, such as link prediction or node classification, to these databases. This embedding process is very costly in terms of both computational time and space. Part of the reason for this is the optimisation of hyperparameters, which involves repeatedly sampling, by random, guided, or brute-force selection, from a large hyperparameter space and testing the resulting embeddings for their quality. However, not all hyperparameters in this search space will be equally important. In fact, with prior knowledge of the relative importance of the hyperparameters, some could be eliminated from the search altogether without significantly impacting the overall quality of the outputted embeddings. To this end, we ran a Sobol sensitivity analysis to evaluate the effects of tuning different hyperparameters on the variance of embedding quality. This was achieved by performing thousands of embedding trials, each time measuring the quality of embeddings produced by different hyperparameter configurations. We regressed the embedding quality on those hyperparameter configurations, using this model to generate Sobol sensitivity indices for each of the hyperparameters. By evaluating the correlation between Sobol indices, we find substantial variability in the hyperparameter sensitivities between knowledge graphs, with differing dataset characteristics being the probable cause of these inconsistencies. As an additional contribution of this work we identify several relations in the UMLS knowledge graph that may cause data leakage via inverse relations, and derive and present UMLS-43, a leakage-robust variant of that graph.
abstract_zh: 将知识图嵌入低维空间是将链接预测或节点分类等方法应用于这些数据库的流行方法。这种嵌入过程在计算时间和空间方面都非常昂贵。造成这种情况的部分原因是超参数的优化，其中涉及通过随机、引导或强力选择从大型超参数空间中重复采样，并测试所得嵌入的质量。然而，并非该搜索空间中的所有超参数都同样重要。事实上，通过预先了解超参数的相对重要性，可以从搜索中完全消除一些超参数，而不会显着影响输出嵌入的整体质量。为此，我们进行了 Sobol 敏感性分析，以评估调整不同超参数对嵌入质量方差的影响。这是通过执行数千次嵌入试验来实现的，每次都测量不同超参数配置生成的嵌入的质量。我们对这些超参数配置的嵌入质量进行了回归，使用该模型为每个超参数生成 Sobol 敏感度指数。通过评估 Sobol 指数之间的相关性，我们发现知识图之间的超参数敏感性存在很大差异，不同的数据集特征可能是造成这些不一致的原因。作为这项工作的额外贡献，我们确定了 UMLS 知识图中可能通过逆关系导致数据泄漏的几种关系，并推导并提出了 UMLS-43，即该图的泄漏鲁棒变体。

AI.tldr: 本文通过Sobol敏感性分析评估超参数对知识图谱嵌入质量的影响，并提出一个减少数据泄漏的UMLS-43变体。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱嵌入的超参数优化过程计算成本高且并非所有超参数同等重要，需识别关键参数以提升效率。
AI.method: 采用Sobol敏感性分析法，通过数千次嵌入实验回归超参数配置与嵌入质量的关系，并分析UMLS中的逆向关系导致的数据泄漏。
AI.result: 不同知识图谱的超参数敏感性存在显著差异，数据集特性是主因；识别出UMLS中的泄漏关系并构建泄漏鲁棒的UMLS-43。
AI.conclusion: 超参数影响因图谱而异，需针对性优化；UMLS-43通过消除逆向关系提高了数据鲁棒性。

motivation: 知识图谱嵌入的超参数优化过程计算成本高且并非所有超参数同等重要，需识别关键参数以提升效率。
method: 采用Sobol敏感性分析法，通过数千次嵌入实验回归超参数配置与嵌入质量的关系，并分析UMLS中的逆向关系导致的数据泄漏。
result: 不同知识图谱的超参数敏感性存在显著差异，数据集特性是主因；识别出UMLS中的泄漏关系并构建泄漏鲁棒的UMLS-43。
conclusion: 超参数影响因图谱而异，需针对性优化；UMLS-43通过消除逆向关系提高了数据鲁棒性。
search_text: Assessing the Effects of Hyperparameters on Knowledge Graph Embedding Quality 评估超参数对知识图嵌入质量的影响 Embedding knowledge graphs into low-dimensional spaces is a popular method for applying approaches, such as link prediction or node classification, to these databases. This embedding process is very costly in terms of both computational time and space. Part of the reason for this is the optimisation of hyperparameters, which involves repeatedly sampling, by random, guided, or brute-force selection, from a large hyperparameter space and testing the resulting embeddings for their quality. However, not all hyperparameters in this search space will be equally important. In fact, with prior knowledge of the relative importance of the hyperparameters, some could be eliminated from the search altogether without significantly impacting the overall quality of the outputted embeddings. To this end, we ran a Sobol sensitivity analysis to evaluate the effects of tuning different hyperparameters on the variance of embedding quality. This was achieved by performing thousands of embedding trials, each time measuring the quality of embeddings produced by different hyperparameter configurations. We regressed the embedding quality on those hyperparameter configurations, using this model to generate Sobol sensitivity indices for each of the hyperparameters. By evaluating the correlation between Sobol indices, we find substantial variability in the hyperparameter sensitivities between knowledge graphs, with differing dataset characteristics being the probable cause of these inconsistencies. As an additional contribution of this work we identify several relations in the UMLS knowledge graph that may cause data leakage via inverse relations, and derive and present UMLS-43, a leakage-robust variant of that graph. 将知识图嵌入低维空间是将链接预测或节点分类等方法应用于这些数据库的流行方法。这种嵌入过程在计算时间和空间方面都非常昂贵。造成这种情况的部分原因是超参数的优化，其中涉及通过随机、引导或强力选择从大型超参数空间中重复采样，并测试所得嵌入的质量。然而，并非该搜索空间中的所有超参数都同样重要。事实上，通过预先了解超参数的相对重要性，可以从搜索中完全消除一些超参数，而不会显着影响输出嵌入的整体质量。为此，我们进行了 Sobol 敏感性分析，以评估调整不同超参数对嵌入质量方差的影响。这是通过执行数千次嵌入试验来实现的，每次都测量不同超参数配置生成的嵌入的质量。我们对这些超参数配置的嵌入质量进行了回归，使用该模型为每个超参数生成 Sobol 敏感度指数。通过评估 Sobol 指数之间的相关性，我们发现知识图之间的超参数敏感性存在很大差异，不同的数据集特征可能是造成这些不一致的原因。作为这项工作的额外贡献，我们确定了 UMLS 知识图中可能通过逆关系导致数据泄漏的几种关系，并推导并提出了 UMLS-43，即该图的泄漏鲁棒变体。 本文通过Sobol敏感性分析评估超参数对知识图谱嵌入质量的影响，并提出一个减少数据泄漏的UMLS-43变体。 Oliver Lloyd,Yi Liu,Tom Gaunt cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.SI

authors_text: Antonio Montanaro,Diego Valsesia,Enrico Magli
title: Exploring the solution space of linear inverse problems with GAN latent geometry
title_zh: 利用 GAN 潜在几何探索线性反问题的解空间
abstract: Inverse problems consist in reconstructing signals from incomplete sets of measurements and their performance is highly dependent on the quality of the prior knowledge encoded via regularization. While traditional approaches focus on obtaining a unique solution, an emerging trend considers exploring multiple feasibile solutions. In this paper, we propose a method to generate multiple reconstructions that fit both the measurements and a data-driven prior learned by a generative adversarial network. In particular, we show that, starting from an initial solution, it is possible to find directions in the latent space of the generative model that are null to the forward operator, and thus keep consistency with the measurements, while inducing significant perceptual change. Our exploration approach allows to generate multiple solutions to the inverse problem an order of magnitude faster than existing approaches; we show results on image super-resolution and inpainting problems.
summary: Inverse problems consist in reconstructing signals from incomplete sets of measurements and their performance is highly dependent on the quality of the prior knowledge encoded via regularization. While traditional approaches focus on obtaining a unique solution, an emerging trend considers exploring multiple feasibile solutions. In this paper, we propose a method to generate multiple reconstructions that fit both the measurements and a data-driven prior learned by a generative adversarial network. In particular, we show that, starting from an initial solution, it is possible to find directions in the latent space of the generative model that are null to the forward operator, and thus keep consistency with the measurements, while inducing significant perceptual change. Our exploration approach allows to generate multiple solutions to the inverse problem an order of magnitude faster than existing approaches; we show results on image super-resolution and inpainting problems.
abstract_zh: 逆问题在于从不完整的测量集中重建信号，其性能高度依赖于通过正则化编码的先验知识的质量。传统方法侧重于获得独特的解决方案，而新兴趋势则考虑探索多种可行的解决方案。在本文中，我们提出了一种生成多重重建的方法，该重建既适合测量结果，又适合生成对抗网络学习的数据驱动先验。特别是，我们表明，从初始解决方案开始，可以在生成模型的潜在空间中找到对前向算子无效的方向，从而与测量保持一致，同时引起显着的感知变化。我们的探索方法可以比现有方法更快地生成逆问题的多个解决方案；我们展示了图像超分辨率和修复问题的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）潜在空间几何特性的方法，用于探索线性逆问题的解空间，生成符合测量数据和数据驱动先验的多个可行解。
AI.motivation: 传统逆问题求解方法依赖单一解，难以反映数据的复杂先验信息。通过探索多解空间可提升重建灵活性和感知质量，而现有方法效率较低。
AI.method: 利用GAN学习数据驱动先验，在潜在空间中寻找对正向算子零空间的方向，沿该方向扰动初始解可生成满足测量约束且感知差异显著的多组解。
AI.result: 在图像超分辨率和修复任务中，该方法较现有技术快一个数量级，生成的多解在保持测量一致性的同时具有显著感知差异。
AI.conclusion: 基于GAN潜在空间的解探索方法为逆问题提供了高效且灵活的求解框架，验证了数据驱动先验在多解生成中的有效性。

authors_text: Botond Fazekas,Guilherme Aresta,Dmitrii Lachinov,Sophie Riedl,Julia Mai,Ursula Schmidt-Erfurth,Hrvoje Bogunovic
title: SD-LayerNet: Semi-supervised retinal layer segmentation in OCT using disentangled representation with anatomical priors
title_zh: SD-LayerNet：使用具有解剖先验的解缠结表示在 OCT 中进行半监督视网膜层分割
abstract: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is a non-invasive 3D modality widely used in ophthalmology for imaging the retina. Achieving automated, anatomically coherent retinal layer segmentation on OCT is important for the detection and monitoring of different retinal diseases, like Age-related Macular Disease (AMD) or Diabetic Retinopathy. However, the majority of state-of-the-art layer segmentation methods are based on purely supervised deep-learning, requiring a large amount of pixel-level annotated data that is expensive and hard to obtain. With this in mind, we introduce a semi-supervised paradigm into the retinal layer segmentation task that makes use of the information present in large-scale unlabeled datasets as well as anatomical priors. In particular, a novel fully differentiable approach is used for converting surface position regression into a pixel-wise structured segmentation, allowing to use both 1D surface and 2D layer representations in a coupled fashion to train the model. In particular, these 2D segmentations are used as anatomical factors that, together with learned style factors, compose disentangled representations used for reconstructing the input image. In parallel, we propose a set of anatomical priors to improve network training when a limited amount of labeled data is available. We demonstrate on the real-world dataset of scans with intermediate and wet-AMD that our method outperforms state-of-the-art when using our full training set, but more importantly largely exceeds state-of-the-art when it is trained with a fraction of the labeled data.
summary: Optical coherence tomography (OCT) is a non-invasive 3D modality widely used in ophthalmology for imaging the retina. Achieving automated, anatomically coherent retinal layer segmentation on OCT is important for the detection and monitoring of different retinal diseases, like Age-related Macular Disease (AMD) or Diabetic Retinopathy. However, the majority of state-of-the-art layer segmentation methods are based on purely supervised deep-learning, requiring a large amount of pixel-level annotated data that is expensive and hard to obtain. With this in mind, we introduce a semi-supervised paradigm into the retinal layer segmentation task that makes use of the information present in large-scale unlabeled datasets as well as anatomical priors. In particular, a novel fully differentiable approach is used for converting surface position regression into a pixel-wise structured segmentation, allowing to use both 1D surface and 2D layer representations in a coupled fashion to train the model. In particular, these 2D segmentations are used as anatomical factors that, together with learned style factors, compose disentangled representations used for reconstructing the input image. In parallel, we propose a set of anatomical priors to improve network training when a limited amount of labeled data is available. We demonstrate on the real-world dataset of scans with intermediate and wet-AMD that our method outperforms state-of-the-art when using our full training set, but more importantly largely exceeds state-of-the-art when it is trained with a fraction of the labeled data.
abstract_zh: 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种广泛应用于眼科的非侵入性 3D 成像技术，用于对视网膜进行成像。在 OCT 上实现自动化、解剖学上一致的视网膜层分割对于检测和监测不同的视网膜疾病（如年龄相关性黄斑病 (AMD) 或糖尿病视网膜病变）非常重要。然而，大多数最先进的层分割方法都是基于纯粹的监督深度学习，需要大量昂贵且难以获得的像素级注释数据。考虑到这一点，我们在视网膜层分割任务中引入了半监督范例，该范例利用大规模未标记数据集中存在的信息以及解剖先验。特别是，一种新颖的完全可微分方法用于将表面位置回归转换为像素级结构化分割，允许以耦合方式使用一维表面和二维层表示来训练模型。特别是，这些 2D 分割用作解剖因素，与学习的风格因素一起组成用于重建输入图像的解缠结表示。与此同时，我们提出了一组解剖先验，以在可用的标记数据数量有限时改进网络训练。我们在使用中间和湿 AMD 的真实扫描数据集上证明，我们的方法在使用完整训练集时优于最先进的方法，但更重要的是，当使用一小部分标记数据进行训练时，它在很大程度上超过了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种半监督方法SD-LayerNet，利用解耦表示与解剖学先验进行OCT视网膜层分割。
AI.motivation: 现有分割方法依赖大量标注数据，而获取像素级标注成本高昂且困难，需利用未标注数据和解剖学知识降低标注依赖。
AI.method: 设计全微分框架将表面回归转化为像素分割，结合1D表面与2D层表示生成解耦表示，并引入解剖学先验辅助训练。
AI.result: 在包含中间期和湿性AMD的OCT数据集上，使用完整训练集时优于现有方法，且在标注数据减少时性能显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 半监督框架结合解剖先验与解耦表示能有效提升视网膜分割性能，尤其适用于标注数据有限的场景。

In particular, these 2D segmentations are used as anatomical factors that, together with learned style factors, compose disentangled representations used for reconstructing the input image. In parallel, we propose a set of anatomical priors to improve network training when a limited amount of labeled data is available. We demonstrate on the real-world dataset of scans with intermediate and wet-AMD that our method outperforms state-of-the-art when using our full training set, but more importantly largely exceeds state-of-the-art when it is trained with a fraction of the labeled data. 光学相干断层扫描 (OCT) 是一种广泛应用于眼科的非侵入性 3D 成像技术，用于对视网膜进行成像。在 OCT 上实现自动化、解剖学上一致的视网膜层分割对于检测和监测不同的视网膜疾病（如年龄相关性黄斑病 (AMD) 或糖尿病视网膜病变）非常重要。然而，大多数最先进的层分割方法都是基于纯粹的监督深度学习，需要大量昂贵且难以获得的像素级注释数据。考虑到这一点，我们在视网膜层分割任务中引入了半监督范例，该范例利用大规模未标记数据集中存在的信息以及解剖先验。特别是，一种新颖的完全可微分方法用于将表面位置回归转换为像素级结构化分割，允许以耦合方式使用一维表面和二维层表示来训练模型。特别是，这些 2D 分割用作解剖因素，与学习的风格因素一起组成用于重建输入图像的解缠结表示。与此同时，我们提出了一组解剖先验，以在可用的标记数据数量有限时改进网络训练。我们在使用中间和湿 AMD 的真实扫描数据集上证明，我们的方法在使用完整训练集时优于最先进的方法，但更重要的是，当使用一小部分标记数据进行训练时，它在很大程度上超过了最先进的方法。 本文提出一种半监督方法SD-LayerNet，利用解耦表示与解剖学先验进行OCT视网膜层分割。 Botond Fazekas,Guilherme Aresta,Dmitrii Lachinov,Sophie Riedl,Julia Mai,Ursula Schmidt-Erfurth,Hrvoje Bogunovic eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Niklas Schlomberg,Hanjo Thiele,Jens Vygen
title: Packing cycles in planar and bounded-genus graphs
title_zh: 平面和有界格图中的堆积循环
abstract: We devise constant-factor approximation algorithms for finding as many disjoint cycles as possible from a certain family of cycles in a given planar or bounded-genus graph. Here disjoint can mean vertex-disjoint or edge-disjoint, and the graph can be undirected or directed. The family of cycles under consideration must satisfy two properties: it must be uncrossable and allow for an oracle access that finds a weight-minimal cycle in that family for given nonnegative edge weights or (in planar graphs) the union of all remaining cycles in that family after deleting a given subset of edges. Our setting generalizes many problems that were studied separately in the past. For example, three families that satisfy the above properties are (i) all cycles in a directed or undirected graph, (ii) all odd cycles in an undirected graph, and (iii) all cycles in an undirected graph that contain precisely one demand edge, where the demand edges form a subset of the edge set. The latter family (iii) corresponds to the classical disjoint paths problem in fully planar and bounded-genus instances. While constant-factor approximation algorithms were known for edge-disjoint paths in such instances, we improve the constant in the planar case and obtain the first such algorithms for vertex-disjoint paths. We also obtain approximate min-max theorems of the Erdős--Pósa type. For example, the minimum feedback vertex set in a planar digraph is at most 12 times the maximum number of vertex-disjoint cycles.
summary: We devise constant-factor approximation algorithms for finding as many disjoint cycles as possible from a certain family of cycles in a given planar or bounded-genus graph. Here disjoint can mean vertex-disjoint or edge-disjoint, and the graph can be undirected or directed. The family of cycles under consideration must satisfy two properties: it must be uncrossable and allow for an oracle access that finds a weight-minimal cycle in that family for given nonnegative edge weights or (in planar graphs) the union of all remaining cycles in that family after deleting a given subset of edges. Our setting generalizes many problems that were studied separately in the past. For example, three families that satisfy the above properties are (i) all cycles in a directed or undirected graph, (ii) all odd cycles in an undirected graph, and (iii) all cycles in an undirected graph that contain precisely one demand edge, where the demand edges form a subset of the edge set. The latter family (iii) corresponds to the classical disjoint paths problem in fully planar and bounded-genus instances. While constant-factor approximation algorithms were known for edge-disjoint paths in such instances, we improve the constant in the planar case and obtain the first such algorithms for vertex-disjoint paths. We also obtain approximate min-max theorems of the Erdős--Pósa type. For example, the minimum feedback vertex set in a planar digraph is at most 12 times the maximum number of vertex-disjoint cycles.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了常数因子近似算法，用于从给定平面或有界格图中的特定循环族中找到尽可能多的不相交循环。这里的不相交可以指顶点不相交或边不相交，并且图可以是无向的或有向的。所考虑的循环族必须满足两个属性：它必须是不可交叉的，并且允许预言机访问，在给定的非负边权重的情况下在该族中找到权重最小的循环，或者（在平面图中）删除给定的边子集后该族中所有剩余循环的并集。我们的设置概括了过去单独研究的许多问题。例如，满足上述属性的三个族是（i）有向或无向图中的所有循环，（ii）无向图中的所有奇数循环，以及（iii）无向图中恰好包含一个需求边的所有循环，其中需求边形成边集的子集。后一族 (iii) 对应于完全平面和有界属实例中的经典不相交路径问题。虽然在这种情况下对于边不相交路径已知常数因子近似算法，但我们改进了平面情况下的常数，并获得了第一个用于顶点不相交路径的此类算法。我们还获得了 Erdős--Pósa 型的近似最小-最大定理。例如，平面有向图中的最小反馈顶点集最多是顶点不相交循环的最大数量的 12 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在平面图和有界属图中寻找尽可能多的不相交循环的常数因子近似算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多针对特定循环家族分别处理，本文旨在通过统一框架解决更广泛的问题，如奇数循环、需求边相关循环等。
AI.method: 提出基于循环家族的无交叉性及权重最小循环查询的近似算法，并结合平面图与有界属图的结构特性进行优化。
AI.result: 改进了平面图边不相交路径的常数因子，首次实现顶点不相交路径的近似算法，并证明了类似Erdős–Pósa的近似极值定理。
AI.conclusion: 本文为平面及有界属图中的循环打包问题提供了高效算法，并拓展了经典极值理论的应用范围。

authors_text: Sanat Ramesh,Vinkle Srivastav,Deepak Alapatt,Tong Yu,Aditya Murali,Luca Sestini,Chinedu Innocent Nwoye,Idris Hamoud,Saurav Sharma,Antoine Fleurentin,Georgios Exarchakis,Alexandros Karargyris,Nicolas Padoy
title: Dissecting Self-Supervised Learning Methods for Surgical Computer Vision
title_zh: 剖析外科计算机视觉的自监督学习方法
abstract: The field of surgical computer vision has undergone considerable breakthroughs in recent years with the rising popularity of deep neural network-based methods. However, standard fully-supervised approaches for training such models require vast amounts of annotated data, imposing a prohibitively high cost; especially in the clinical domain. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods, which have begun to gain traction in the general computer vision community, represent a potential solution to these annotation costs, allowing to learn useful representations from only unlabeled data. Still, the effectiveness of SSL methods in more complex and impactful domains, such as medicine and surgery, remains limited and unexplored. In this work, we address this critical need by investigating four state-of-the-art SSL methods (MoCo v2, SimCLR, DINO, SwAV) in the context of surgical computer vision. We present an extensive analysis of the performance of these methods on the Cholec80 dataset for two fundamental and popular tasks in surgical context understanding, phase recognition and tool presence detection. We examine their parameterization, then their behavior with respect to training data quantities in semi-supervised settings. Correct transfer of these methods to surgery, as described and conducted in this work, leads to substantial performance gains over generic uses of SSL - up to 7.4% on phase recognition and 20% on tool presence detection - as well as state-of-the-art semi-supervised phase recognition approaches by up to 14%. Further results obtained on a highly diverse selection of surgical datasets exhibit strong generalization properties. The code is available at https://github.com/CAMMA-public/SelfSupSurg.
summary: The field of surgical computer vision has undergone considerable breakthroughs in recent years with the rising popularity of deep neural network-based methods. However, standard fully-supervised approaches for training such models require vast amounts of annotated data, imposing a prohibitively high cost; especially in the clinical domain. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) methods, which have begun to gain traction in the general computer vision community, represent a potential solution to these annotation costs, allowing to learn useful representations from only unlabeled data. Still, the effectiveness of SSL methods in more complex and impactful domains, such as medicine and surgery, remains limited and unexplored. In this work, we address this critical need by investigating four state-of-the-art SSL methods (MoCo v2, SimCLR, DINO, SwAV) in the context of surgical computer vision. We present an extensive analysis of the performance of these methods on the Cholec80 dataset for two fundamental and popular tasks in surgical context understanding, phase recognition and tool presence detection. We examine their parameterization, then their behavior with respect to training data quantities in semi-supervised settings. Correct transfer of these methods to surgery, as described and conducted in this work, leads to substantial performance gains over generic uses of SSL - up to 7.4% on phase recognition and 20% on tool presence detection - as well as state-of-the-art semi-supervised phase recognition approaches by up to 14%. Further results obtained on a highly diverse selection of surgical datasets exhibit strong generalization properties. The code is available at https://github.com/CAMMA-public/SelfSupSurg.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着基于深度神经网络的方法的日益普及，外科计算机视觉领域取得了相当大的突破。然而，训练此类模型的标准完全监督方法需要大量带注释的数据，从而导致成本过高；尤其是在临床领域。自监督学习（SSL）方法已经开始在一般计算机视觉社区中受到关注，它代表了这些注释成本的潜在解决方案，允许仅从未标记的数据中学习有用的表示。尽管如此，SSL 方法在医学和外科等更复杂和有影响力的领域中的有效性仍然有限且未经探索。在这项工作中，我们通过研究外科计算机视觉背景下的四种最先进的 SSL 方法（MoCo v2、SimCLR、DINO、SwAV）来满足这一关键需求。我们对这些方法在 Cholec80 数据集上的性能进行了广泛的分析，以实现手术背景理解、相位识别和工具存在检测这两个基本和流行的任务。我们检查它们的参数化，然后检查它们在半监督设置中训练数据量的行为。正如本工作中所描述和进行的那样，将这些方法正确转移到手术中，与 SSL 的一般使用相比，可带来显着的性能提升 - 相位识别高达 7.4%，工具存在检测高达 20% - 以及最先进的半监督相位识别方法高达 14%。在高度多样化的手术数据集选择上获得的进一步结果表现出很强的泛化特性。该代码可在 https://github.com/CAMMA-public/SelfSupSurg 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了四种自监督学习方法在手术计算机视觉中的应用，通过分析其在手术阶段识别和工具检测任务中的性能，验证其在减少标注数据需求方面的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统全监督方法依赖大量标注数据，而医学领域标注成本极高。自监督学习（SSL）可利用未标注数据学习表示，但其在手术等复杂领域的有效性尚未充分探索。
AI.method: 在Cholec80数据集上测试MoCo v2、SimCLR、DINO和SwAV四种SSL方法，分析其参数设置及半监督场景下训练数据量对性能的影响，并评估其在多个手术数据集上的泛化能力。
AI.result: 手术场景下SSL方法相较通用应用提升7.4%（阶段识别）和20%（工具检测），优于现有半监督方法达14%，并在多样化数据集上展现强泛化性。
AI.conclusion: 自监督学习方法可有效迁移至手术领域，在减少标注依赖的同时显著提升性能，为医学计算机视觉提供可行解决方案。

Correct transfer of these methods to surgery, as described and conducted in this work, leads to substantial performance gains over generic uses of SSL - up to 7.4% on phase recognition and 20% on tool presence detection - as well as state-of-the-art semi-supervised phase recognition approaches by up to 14%. Further results obtained on a highly diverse selection of surgical datasets exhibit strong generalization properties. The code is available at https://github.com/CAMMA-public/SelfSupSurg. 近年来，随着基于深度神经网络的方法的日益普及，外科计算机视觉领域取得了相当大的突破。然而，训练此类模型的标准完全监督方法需要大量带注释的数据，从而导致成本过高；尤其是在临床领域。自监督学习（SSL）方法已经开始在一般计算机视觉社区中受到关注，它代表了这些注释成本的潜在解决方案，允许仅从未标记的数据中学习有用的表示。尽管如此，SSL 方法在医学和外科等更复杂和有影响力的领域中的有效性仍然有限且未经探索。在这项工作中，我们通过研究外科计算机视觉背景下的四种最先进的 SSL 方法（MoCo v2、SimCLR、DINO、SwAV）来满足这一关键需求。我们对这些方法在 Cholec80 数据集上的性能进行了广泛的分析，以实现手术背景理解、相位识别和工具存在检测这两个基本和流行的任务。我们检查它们的参数化，然后检查它们在半监督设置中训练数据量的行为。正如本工作中所描述和进行的那样，将这些方法正确转移到手术中，与 SSL 的一般使用相比，可带来显着的性能提升 - 相位识别高达 7.4%，工具存在检测高达 20% - 以及最先进的半监督相位识别方法高达 14%。在高度多样化的手术数据集选择上获得的进一步结果表现出很强的泛化特性。该代码可在 https://github.com/CAMMA-public/SelfSupSurg 获取。 本文研究了四种自监督学习方法在手术计算机视觉中的应用，通过分析其在手术阶段识别和工具检测任务中的性能，验证其在减少标注数据需求方面的有效性。 Sanat Ramesh,Vinkle Srivastav,Deepak Alapatt,Tong Yu,Aditya Murali,Luca Sestini,Chinedu Innocent Nwoye,Idris Hamoud,Saurav Sharma,Antoine Fleurentin,Georgios Exarchakis,Alexandros Karargyris,Nicolas Padoy cs.CV

authors_text: Jingda Wu,Wenhui Huang,Niels de Boer,Yanghui Mo,Xiangkun He,Chen Lv
title: Safe Decision-making for Lane-change of Autonomous Vehicles via Human Demonstration-aided Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: 通过人体演示辅助强化学习实现自动驾驶车辆变道的安全决策
abstract: Decision-making is critical for lane change in autonomous driving. Reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms aim to identify the values of behaviors in various situations and thus they become a promising pathway to address the decision-making problem. However, poor runtime safety hinders RL-based decision-making strategies from complex driving tasks in practice. To address this problem, human demonstrations are incorporated into the RL-based decision-making strategy in this paper. Decisions made by human subjects in a driving simulator are treated as safe demonstrations, which are stored into the replay buffer and then utilized to enhance the training process of RL. A complex lane change task in an off-ramp scenario is established to examine the performance of the developed strategy. Simulation results suggest that human demonstrations can effectively improve the safety of decisions of RL. And the proposed strategy surpasses other existing learning-based decision-making strategies with respect to multiple driving performances.
summary: Decision-making is critical for lane change in autonomous driving. Reinforcement learning (RL) algorithms aim to identify the values of behaviors in various situations and thus they become a promising pathway to address the decision-making problem. However, poor runtime safety hinders RL-based decision-making strategies from complex driving tasks in practice. To address this problem, human demonstrations are incorporated into the RL-based decision-making strategy in this paper. Decisions made by human subjects in a driving simulator are treated as safe demonstrations, which are stored into the replay buffer and then utilized to enhance the training process of RL. A complex lane change task in an off-ramp scenario is established to examine the performance of the developed strategy. Simulation results suggest that human demonstrations can effectively improve the safety of decisions of RL. And the proposed strategy surpasses other existing learning-based decision-making strategies with respect to multiple driving performances.
abstract_zh: 决策对于自动驾驶中的变道至关重要。强化学习（RL）算法旨在识别各种情况下行为的价值，因此它们成为解决决策问题的有前途的途径。然而，较差的运行时安全性阻碍了实践中复杂驾驶任务中基于强化学习的决策策略。为了解决这个问题，本文将人类演示纳入基于强化学习的决策策略中。人类受试者在驾驶模拟器中做出的决定被视为安全演示，这些决策被存储到重放缓冲区中，然后用于增强强化学习的训练过程。建立了出口匝道场景中的复杂变道任务，以检查所开发策略的性能。仿真结果表明，人类演示可以有效提高强化学习决策的安全性。并且所提出的策略在多种驾驶性能方面超越了其他现有的基于学习的决策策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合人类示范的强化学习方法，以提升自动驾驶车辆变道决策的安全性。
AI.motivation: 传统强化学习在复杂驾驶任务中存在运行时安全性不足的问题，需通过人类示范增强决策安全性。
AI.method: 利用驾驶模拟器收集人类安全示范数据，将其存入经验回放缓冲区，辅助强化学习训练过程。
AI.result: 实验表明，该策略有效提升决策安全性，并在多维度驾驶性能上优于现有学习型方法。
AI.conclusion: 人类示范与强化学习结合可显著增强自动驾驶变道决策的安全性与实用性。

authors_text: Tiancheng Zhao,Tianqi Zhang,Mingwei Zhu,Haozhan Shen,Kyusong Lee,Xiaopeng Lu,Jianwei Yin
title: VL-CheckList: Evaluating Pre-trained Vision-Language Models with Objects, Attributes and Relations
title_zh: VL-CheckList：使用对象、属性和关系评估预训练的视觉语言模型
abstract: Vision-Language Pretraining (VLP) models have recently successfully facilitated many cross-modal downstream tasks. Most existing works evaluated their systems by comparing the fine-tuned downstream task performance. However, only average downstream task accuracy provides little information about the pros and cons of each VLP method, let alone provides insights on how the community can improve the systems in the future. Inspired by the CheckList for testing natural language processing, we exploit VL-CheckList, a novel framework to understand the capabilities of VLP models. The proposed method divides the image-texting ability of a VLP model into three categories: objects, attributes, and relations, and uses a novel taxonomy to further break down these three aspects. We conduct comprehensive studies to analyze seven recently popular VLP models via the proposed framework. Results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed method by revealing fine-grained differences among the compared models that were not visible from downstream task-only evaluation. Further results show promising research direction in building better VLP models. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/om-ai-lab/VL-CheckList.
summary: Vision-Language Pretraining (VLP) models have recently successfully facilitated many cross-modal downstream tasks. Most existing works evaluated their systems by comparing the fine-tuned downstream task performance. However, only average downstream task accuracy provides little information about the pros and cons of each VLP method, let alone provides insights on how the community can improve the systems in the future. Inspired by the CheckList for testing natural language processing, we exploit VL-CheckList, a novel framework to understand the capabilities of VLP models. The proposed method divides the image-texting ability of a VLP model into three categories: objects, attributes, and relations, and uses a novel taxonomy to further break down these three aspects. We conduct comprehensive studies to analyze seven recently popular VLP models via the proposed framework. Results confirm the effectiveness of the proposed method by revealing fine-grained differences among the compared models that were not visible from downstream task-only evaluation. Further results show promising research direction in building better VLP models. Our data and code are available at: https://github.com/om-ai-lab/VL-CheckList.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型最近成功促进了许多跨模式下游任务。大多数现有工作通过比较微调的下游任务性能来评估他们的系统。然而，只有平均下游任务准确率无法提供有关每种 VLP 方法优缺点的信息，更不用说提供有关社区未来如何改进系统的见解了。受到用于测试自然语言处理的 CheckList 的启发，我们利用了 VL-CheckList，这是一个了解 VLP 模型功能的新颖框架。该方法将 VLP 模型的图像文本能力分为三类：对象、属性和关系，并使用一种新颖的分类法进一步分解这三个方面。我们进行了全面的研究，通过所提出的框架来分析七种最近流行的 VLP 模型。结果通过揭示比较模型之间的细粒度差异（这些差异在下游仅任务评估中看不到），证实了所提出方法的有效性。进一步的结果显示了构建更好的 VLP 模型的有前途的研究方向。我们的数据和代码可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/om-ai-lab/VL-CheckList。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VL-CheckList框架，通过分析对象、属性和关系来评估预训练视觉-语言模型的能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅通过下游任务准确率评估模型，无法揭示不同模型的优缺点及改进方向。
AI.method: 将模型能力分为对象、属性、关系三类，并构建分类体系进行细粒度分析。
AI.result: 揭示了七种主流模型间的细微差异，验证了框架有效性，并指出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: VL-CheckList为评估和改进视觉-语言模型提供了有效工具与洞察。

authors_text: Zhuoxiao Li,Haiyang Jiang,Yinqiang Zheng
title: Polarized Color Image Denoising using Pocoformer
title_zh: 使用 Pocoformer 进行偏振彩色图像去噪
comment: New version is accpeted by CVPR 2023 and great modifications are taken
comments: New version is accpeted by CVPR 2023 and great modifications are taken
abstract: Polarized color photography provides both visual textures and object surficial information in one single snapshot. However, the use of the directional polarizing filter array causes extremely lower photon count and SNR compared to conventional color imaging. Thus, the feature essentially leads to unpleasant noisy images and destroys polarization analysis performance. It is a challenge for traditional image processing pipelines owing to the fact that the physical constraints exerted implicitly in the channels are excessively complicated. To address this issue, we propose a learning-based approach to simultaneously restore clean signals and precise polarization information. A real-world polarized color image dataset of paired raw short-exposed noisy and long-exposed reference images are captured to support the learning-based pipeline. Moreover, we embrace the development of vision Transformer and propose a hybrid transformer model for the Polarized Color image denoising, namely PoCoformer, for a better restoration performance. Abundant experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed method and key factors that affect results are analyzed.
summary: Polarized color photography provides both visual textures and object surficial information in one single snapshot. However, the use of the directional polarizing filter array causes extremely lower photon count and SNR compared to conventional color imaging. Thus, the feature essentially leads to unpleasant noisy images and destroys polarization analysis performance. It is a challenge for traditional image processing pipelines owing to the fact that the physical constraints exerted implicitly in the channels are excessively complicated. To address this issue, we propose a learning-based approach to simultaneously restore clean signals and precise polarization information. A real-world polarized color image dataset of paired raw short-exposed noisy and long-exposed reference images are captured to support the learning-based pipeline. Moreover, we embrace the development of vision Transformer and propose a hybrid transformer model for the Polarized Color image denoising, namely PoCoformer, for a better restoration performance. Abundant experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed method and key factors that affect results are analyzed.
abstract_zh: 偏光彩色摄影在一张快照中提供视觉纹理和物体表面信息。然而，与传统彩色成像相比，使用定向偏振滤光片阵列会导致光子计数和信噪比极低。因此，该特征本质上会导致令人不快的噪声图像并破坏偏振分析性能。由于通道中隐含的物理约束过于复杂，这对传统图像处理管道来说是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法来同时恢复干净的信号和精确的偏振信息。捕获配对的原始短曝光噪声和长曝光参考图像的真实世界偏振彩色图像数据集，以支持基于学习的管道。此外，我们拥抱视觉 Transformer 的发展，并提出了一种用于偏振彩色图像去噪的混合 Transformer 模型，即 PoCoformer，以实现更好的恢复性能。大量实验证明了该方法的有效性，并分析了影响结果的关键因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的混合Transformer模型PoCoformer，用于同时恢复干净的图像信号和精确的偏振信息，以解决偏振彩色图像去噪问题。
AI.motivation: 偏振彩色摄影虽能捕捉纹理和表面信息，但因方向性偏振滤光阵列导致光子计数和信噪比极低，传统图像处理方法难以应对复杂的物理约束。
AI.method: 构建包含真实世界配对短曝光噪声图像和长曝光参考图像的数据集，结合视觉Transformer开发混合模型PoCoformer，实现信号恢复与偏振信息精准提取。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法的有效性，分析了影响结果的关键因素，表明PoCoformer在去噪和偏振分析性能上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的PoCoformer通过学习复杂物理约束下的多通道信息，显著提升了偏振彩色图像的去噪效果和偏振分析准确性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于学习的混合Transformer模型PoCoformer，用于同时恢复干净的图像信号和精确的偏振信息，以解决偏振彩色图像去噪问题。

search_text: Polarized Color Image Denoising using Pocoformer 使用 Pocoformer 进行偏振彩色图像去噪 Polarized color photography provides both visual textures and object surficial information in one single snapshot. However, the use of the directional polarizing filter array causes extremely lower photon count and SNR compared to conventional color imaging. Thus, the feature essentially leads to unpleasant noisy images and destroys polarization analysis performance. It is a challenge for traditional image processing pipelines owing to the fact that the physical constraints exerted implicitly in the channels are excessively complicated. To address this issue, we propose a learning-based approach to simultaneously restore clean signals and precise polarization information. A real-world polarized color image dataset of paired raw short-exposed noisy and long-exposed reference images are captured to support the learning-based pipeline. Moreover, we embrace the development of vision Transformer and propose a hybrid transformer model for the Polarized Color image denoising, namely PoCoformer, for a better restoration performance. Abundant experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of proposed method and key factors that affect results are analyzed. 偏光彩色摄影在一张快照中提供视觉纹理和物体表面信息。然而，与传统彩色成像相比，使用定向偏振滤光片阵列会导致光子计数和信噪比极低。因此，该特征本质上会导致令人不快的噪声图像并破坏偏振分析性能。由于通道中隐含的物理约束过于复杂，这对传统图像处理管道来说是一个挑战。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种基于学习的方法来同时恢复干净的信号和精确的偏振信息。捕获配对的原始短曝光噪声和长曝光参考图像的真实世界偏振彩色图像数据集，以支持基于学习的管道。此外，我们拥抱视觉 Transformer 的发展，并提出了一种用于偏振彩色图像去噪的混合 Transformer 模型，即 PoCoformer，以实现更好的恢复性能。大量实验证明了该方法的有效性，并分析了影响结果的关键因素。 本文提出了一种基于学习的混合Transformer模型PoCoformer，用于同时恢复干净的图像信号和精确的偏振信息，以解决偏振彩色图像去噪问题。 Zhuoxiao Li,Haiyang Jiang,Yinqiang Zheng eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Li Ma,Xiaoyu Li,Jing Liao,Xuan Wang,Qi Zhang,Jue Wang,Pedro Sander
title: Neural Parameterization for Dynamic Human Head Editing
title_zh: 动态人体头部编辑的神经参数化
abstract: Implicit radiance functions emerged as a powerful scene representation for reconstructing and rendering photo-realistic views of a 3D scene. These representations, however, suffer from poor editability. On the other hand, explicit representations such as polygonal meshes allow easy editing but are not as suitable for reconstructing accurate details in dynamic human heads, such as fine facial features, hair, teeth, and eyes. In this work, we present Neural Parameterization (NeP), a hybrid representation that provides the advantages of both implicit and explicit methods. NeP is capable of photo-realistic rendering while allowing fine-grained editing of the scene geometry and appearance. We first disentangle the geometry and appearance by parameterizing the 3D geometry into 2D texture space. We enable geometric editability by introducing an explicit linear deformation blending layer. The deformation is controlled by a set of sparse key points, which can be explicitly and intuitively displaced to edit the geometry. For appearance, we develop a hybrid 2D texture consisting of an explicit texture map for easy editing and implicit view and time-dependent residuals to model temporal and view variations. We compare our method to several reconstruction and editing baselines. The results show that the NeP achieves almost the same level of rendering accuracy while maintaining high editability.
summary: Implicit radiance functions emerged as a powerful scene representation for reconstructing and rendering photo-realistic views of a 3D scene. These representations, however, suffer from poor editability. On the other hand, explicit representations such as polygonal meshes allow easy editing but are not as suitable for reconstructing accurate details in dynamic human heads, such as fine facial features, hair, teeth, and eyes. In this work, we present Neural Parameterization (NeP), a hybrid representation that provides the advantages of both implicit and explicit methods. NeP is capable of photo-realistic rendering while allowing fine-grained editing of the scene geometry and appearance. We first disentangle the geometry and appearance by parameterizing the 3D geometry into 2D texture space. We enable geometric editability by introducing an explicit linear deformation blending layer. The deformation is controlled by a set of sparse key points, which can be explicitly and intuitively displaced to edit the geometry. For appearance, we develop a hybrid 2D texture consisting of an explicit texture map for easy editing and implicit view and time-dependent residuals to model temporal and view variations. We compare our method to several reconstruction and editing baselines. The results show that the NeP achieves almost the same level of rendering accuracy while maintaining high editability.
abstract_zh: 隐式辐射函数作为一种强大的场景表示出现，用于重建和渲染 3D 场景的照片级真实感视图。然而，这些表示的可编辑性较差。另一方面，诸如多边形网格之类的显式表示允许轻松编辑，但不太适合重建动态人体头部中的准确细节，例如精细的面部特征、头发、牙齿和眼睛。在这项工作中，我们提出了神经参数化（NeP），这是一种混合表示，提供了隐式和显式方法的优点。 NeP 能够进行照片级真实感渲染，同时允许对场景几何形状和外观进行细粒度编辑。我们首先通过将 3D 几何参数化到 2D 纹理空间来理清几何和外观。我们通过引入显式线性变形混合层来实现几何可编辑性。变形由一组稀疏关键点控制，可以显式直观地位移这些关键点以编辑几何图形。对于外观，我们开发了一种混合 2D 纹理，其中包含用于轻松编辑的显式纹理贴图和用于对时间和视图变化进行建模的隐式视图和时间相关残差。我们将我们的方法与几个重建和编辑基线进行比较。结果表明，NeP 实现了几乎相同水平的渲染精度，同时保持了较高的可编辑性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NeP的混合表示方法，用于动态人头的高质量渲染和细粒度编辑。
AI.motivation: 隐式辐射函数虽能生成逼真图像但难以编辑，显式表示如网格虽易编辑却无法准确重建动态人头的细节。现有方法存在渲染精度与编辑性之间的权衡问题。
AI.method: 通过将3D几何参数化为2D纹理空间，结合显式线性变形层（由稀疏关键点控制）实现几何编辑；外观采用显式纹理图与隐式时序/视角残差的混合表示。
AI.result: 实验表明NeP在保持高渲染精度的同时，相比基线方法实现了更优的编辑能力，能够有效处理动态人头的细部特征变化。
AI.conclusion: NeP通过融合隐式与显式表示的优势，为动态人头的重建与编辑提供了兼顾精度与可操作性的新解决方案。

authors_text: Wonyoung Shin,Jonghun Park,Taekang Woo,Yongwoo Cho,Kwangjin Oh,Hwanjun Song
title: e-CLIP: Large-Scale Vision-Language Representation Learning in E-commerce
title_zh: e-CLIP：电子商务中的大规模视觉语言表示学习
abstract: Understanding vision and language representations of product content is vital for search and recommendation applications in e-commerce. As a backbone for online shopping platforms and inspired by the recent success in representation learning research, we propose a contrastive learning framework that aligns language and visual models using unlabeled raw product text and images. We present techniques we used to train large-scale representation learning models and share solutions that address domain-specific challenges. We study the performance using our pre-trained model as backbones for diverse downstream tasks, including category classification, attribute extraction, product matching, product clustering, and adult product recognition. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline in each downstream task regarding both single modality and multiple modalities.
summary: Understanding vision and language representations of product content is vital for search and recommendation applications in e-commerce. As a backbone for online shopping platforms and inspired by the recent success in representation learning research, we propose a contrastive learning framework that aligns language and visual models using unlabeled raw product text and images. We present techniques we used to train large-scale representation learning models and share solutions that address domain-specific challenges. We study the performance using our pre-trained model as backbones for diverse downstream tasks, including category classification, attribute extraction, product matching, product clustering, and adult product recognition. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline in each downstream task regarding both single modality and multiple modalities.
abstract_zh: 了解产品内容的视觉和语言表示对于电子商务中的搜索和推荐应用程序至关重要。作为在线购物平台的支柱，并受到最近表征学习研究成功的启发，我们提出了一种对比学习框架，该框架使用未标记的原始产品文本和图像来对齐语言和视觉模型。我们介绍用于训练大规模表示学习模型的技术，并分享解决特定领域挑战的解决方案。我们使用预先训练的模型作为各种下游任务的骨干来研究性能，包括类别分类、属性提取、产品匹配、产品聚类和成人产品识别。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在单模态和多模态方面都优于每个下游任务的基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出e-CLIP框架，通过对比学习对齐视觉与语言模型，解决电商场景下的多模态表征学习问题。
AI.motivation: 电商应用需要精准理解产品多模态信息，但现有方法难以有效利用未标注数据且存在领域适配挑战。
AI.method: 构建基于对比学习的视觉-语言对齐框架，利用未标注产品图文数据训练大规模表征模型，并针对性解决领域特定问题。
AI.result: 预训练模型在分类、属性提取、产品匹配等6个下游任务中均超越基线方法，单模态与多模态任务均有提升。
AI.conclusion: e-CLIP框架有效提升了电商场景的多模态表征能力，验证了对比学习在未标注数据上的有效性与跨任务泛化性。

We present techniques we used to train large-scale representation learning models and share solutions that address domain-specific challenges. We study the performance using our pre-trained model as backbones for diverse downstream tasks, including category classification, attribute extraction, product matching, product clustering, and adult product recognition. Experimental results show that our proposed method outperforms the baseline in each downstream task regarding both single modality and multiple modalities. 了解产品内容的视觉和语言表示对于电子商务中的搜索和推荐应用程序至关重要。作为在线购物平台的支柱，并受到最近表征学习研究成功的启发，我们提出了一种对比学习框架，该框架使用未标记的原始产品文本和图像来对齐语言和视觉模型。我们介绍用于训练大规模表示学习模型的技术，并分享解决特定领域挑战的解决方案。我们使用预先训练的模型作为各种下游任务的骨干来研究性能，包括类别分类、属性提取、产品匹配、产品聚类和成人产品识别。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法在单模态和多模态方面都优于每个下游任务的基线。 本文提出e-CLIP框架，通过对比学习对齐视觉与语言模型，解决电商场景下的多模态表征学习问题。 Wonyoung Shin,Jonghun Park,Taekang Woo,Yongwoo Cho,Kwangjin Oh,Hwanjun Song cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Kevin Tracy,Taylor A. Howell,Zachary Manchester
title: DiffPills: Differentiable Collision Detection for Capsules and Padded Polygons
title_zh: DiffPills：胶囊和填充多边形的可微碰撞检测
abstract: Collision detection plays an important role in simulation, control, and learning for robotic systems. However, no existing method is differentiable with respect to the configurations of the objects, greatly limiting the sort of algorithms that can be built on top of collision detection. In this work, we propose a set of differentiable collision detection algorithms between capsules and padded polygons by formulating these problems as differentiable convex quadratic programs. The resulting algorithms are able to return a proximity value indicating if a collision has taken place, as well as the closest points between objects, all of which are differentiable. As a result, they can be used reliably within other gradient-based optimization methods, including trajectory optimization, state estimation, and reinforcement learning methods.
summary: Collision detection plays an important role in simulation, control, and learning for robotic systems. However, no existing method is differentiable with respect to the configurations of the objects, greatly limiting the sort of algorithms that can be built on top of collision detection. In this work, we propose a set of differentiable collision detection algorithms between capsules and padded polygons by formulating these problems as differentiable convex quadratic programs. The resulting algorithms are able to return a proximity value indicating if a collision has taken place, as well as the closest points between objects, all of which are differentiable. As a result, they can be used reliably within other gradient-based optimization methods, including trajectory optimization, state estimation, and reinforcement learning methods.
abstract_zh: 碰撞检测在机器人系统的仿真、控制和学习中发挥着重要作用。然而，现有的方法对于对象的配置来说是可微分的，这极大地限制了可以在碰撞检测之上构建的算法的种类。在这项工作中，我们通过将这些问题表述为可微凸二次程序，提出了一组胶囊和填充多边形之间的可微碰撞检测算法。由此产生的算法能够返回一个接近值，指示是否发生了碰撞，以及物体之间的最近点，所有这些都是可微分的。因此，它们可以在其他基于梯度的优化方法中可靠地使用，包括轨迹优化、状态估计和强化学习方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对胶囊体和填充多边形的可微碰撞检测算法，通过可微凸二次规划实现碰撞判断与最近点计算。
AI.motivation: 现有碰撞检测方法无法对物体配置进行可微处理，限制了其在梯度优化算法中的应用，如轨迹优化和强化学习。
AI.method: 将碰撞检测问题建模为可微凸二次规划问题，通过数学优化求解碰撞值和最近点，确保输出结果的可微性。
AI.result: 算法能够输出可微的碰撞接近值及最近点信息，支持在梯度下降等优化方法中直接使用，提升机器人系统控制与学习性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法解决了碰撞检测的可微性难题，为机器人系统的优化控制与智能学习提供了新的技术基础。

authors_text: Francesco Corti,Rahim Entezari,Sara Hooker,Davide Bacciu,Olga Saukh
title: Studying the impact of magnitude pruning on contrastive learning methods
title_zh: 研究幅度剪枝对对比学习方法的影响
abstract: We study the impact of different pruning techniques on the representation learned by deep neural networks trained with contrastive loss functions. Our work finds that at high sparsity levels, contrastive learning results in a higher number of misclassified examples relative to models trained with traditional cross-entropy loss. To understand this pronounced difference, we use metrics such as the number of PIEs (Hooker et al., 2019), Q-Score (Kalibhat et al., 2022), and PD-Score (Baldock et al., 2021) to measure the impact of pruning on the learned representation quality. Our analysis suggests the schedule of the pruning method implementation matters. We find that the negative impact of sparsity on the quality of the learned representation is the highest when pruning is introduced early on in the training phase.
summary: We study the impact of different pruning techniques on the representation learned by deep neural networks trained with contrastive loss functions. Our work finds that at high sparsity levels, contrastive learning results in a higher number of misclassified examples relative to models trained with traditional cross-entropy loss. To understand this pronounced difference, we use metrics such as the number of PIEs (Hooker et al., 2019), Q-Score (Kalibhat et al., 2022), and PD-Score (Baldock et al., 2021) to measure the impact of pruning on the learned representation quality. Our analysis suggests the schedule of the pruning method implementation matters. We find that the negative impact of sparsity on the quality of the learned representation is the highest when pruning is introduced early on in the training phase.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了不同剪枝技术对使用对比损失函数训练的深度神经网络学习到的表示的影响。我们的工作发现，在高稀疏性水平下，相对于使用传统交叉熵损失训练的模型，对比学习会导致更多的错误分类示例。为了理解这种明显的差异，我们使用 PIE 数量（Hooker et al., 2019）、Q-Score（Kalibhat et al., 2022）和 PD-Score（Baldock et al., 2021）等指标来衡量剪枝对学习表示质量的影响。我们的分析表明修剪方法实施的时间表很重要。我们发现，在训练阶段早期引入剪枝时，稀疏性对学习表示质量的负面影响最大。

AI.tldr: 研究不同剪枝技术对使用对比损失函数训练的深度神经网络表示的影响，发现高稀疏度下对比学习模型误分类率更高。
AI.motivation: 对比学习在模型压缩中广泛应用，但剪枝对表示质量的影响机制尚不明确，尤其在高稀疏度下的性能差异需要深入分析。
AI.method: 通过PIEs、Q-Score和PD-Score等指标量化剪枝对表示质量的影响，对比不同剪枝时间表（如训练初期/后期引入）的效果差异。
AI.result: 高稀疏度下对比学习模型误分类率显著高于交叉熵损失模型，且训练初期引入剪枝时表示质量下降最明显。
AI.conclusion: 剪枝策略的时间安排对对比学习模型的表示质量有显著影响，应避免在训练早期过早引入高稀疏度剪枝。

authors_text: Fang Da
title: Comprehensive Reactive Safety: No Need For A Trajectory If You Have A Strategy
title_zh: 全面的反应安全：如果有策略，就不需要轨迹
comment: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Accepted to IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: Safety guarantees in motion planning for autonomous driving typically involve certifying the trajectory to be collision-free under any motion of the uncontrollable participants in the environment, such as the human-driven vehicles on the road. As a result they usually employ a conservative bound on the behavior of such participants, such as reachability analysis. We point out that planning trajectories to rigorously avoid the entirety of the reachable regions is unnecessary and too restrictive, because observing the environment in the future will allow us to prune away most of them; disregarding this ability to react to future updates could prohibit solutions to scenarios that are easily navigated by human drivers. We propose to account for the autonomous vehicle's reactions to future environment changes by a novel safety framework, Comprehensive Reactive Safety. Validated in simulations in several urban driving scenarios such as unprotected left turns and lane merging, the resulting planning algorithm called Reactive ILQR demonstrates strong negotiation capabilities and better safety at the same time.
summary: Safety guarantees in motion planning for autonomous driving typically involve certifying the trajectory to be collision-free under any motion of the uncontrollable participants in the environment, such as the human-driven vehicles on the road. As a result they usually employ a conservative bound on the behavior of such participants, such as reachability analysis. We point out that planning trajectories to rigorously avoid the entirety of the reachable regions is unnecessary and too restrictive, because observing the environment in the future will allow us to prune away most of them; disregarding this ability to react to future updates could prohibit solutions to scenarios that are easily navigated by human drivers. We propose to account for the autonomous vehicle's reactions to future environment changes by a novel safety framework, Comprehensive Reactive Safety. Validated in simulations in several urban driving scenarios such as unprotected left turns and lane merging, the resulting planning algorithm called Reactive ILQR demonstrates strong negotiation capabilities and better safety at the same time.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶运动规划中的安全保证通常涉及证明在环境中无法控制的参与者（例如道路上的人类驾驶车辆）的任何运动下，轨迹不会发生碰撞。因此，他们通常对此类参与者的行为采用保守的限制，例如可达性分析。我们指出，规划轨迹来严格避开整个可到达区域是不必要的，而且限制性太大，因为未来观察环境将使我们能够修剪掉其中的大部分；忽视这种对未来更新做出反应的能力可能会阻碍人类驾驶员轻松导航的场景的解决方案。我们建议通过一种新颖的安全框架“综合反应安全”来解释自动驾驶汽车对未来环境变化的反应。由此产生的名为 Reactive ILQR 的规划算法在多种城市驾驶场景（例如无保护的左转和车道合并）的模拟中得到验证，同时展示了强大的协商能力和更好的安全性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'全面反应式安全'的新框架，通过考虑自动驾驶车辆对未来环境变化的反应能力，替代传统保守的轨迹规划方法，提升安全性和导航效率。
AI.motivation: 传统安全保证方法通过保守的可达性分析验证轨迹安全性，但过度限制了解决方案，忽视了人类司机通过实时反应处理复杂场景的能力。
AI.method: 设计'全面反应式安全'框架，结合未来环境信息动态调整策略，开发Reactive ILQR算法实现反应式轨迹优化。
AI.result: 在无保护左转和车道合并等城市驾驶场景的仿真中，Reactive ILQR展现出优异的场景协商能力和安全性。
AI.conclusion: 传统轨迹规划的保守性限制了自动驾驶潜力，基于反应式安全策略的新方法能更高效地处理复杂动态环境。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种名为'全面反应式安全'的新框架，通过考虑自动驾驶车辆对未来环境变化的反应能力，替代传统保守的轨迹规划方法，提升安全性和导航效率。
