search_text: Comprehensive Reactive Safety: No Need For A Trajectory If You Have A Strategy 全面的反应安全：如果有策略，就不需要轨迹 Safety guarantees in motion planning for autonomous driving typically involve certifying the trajectory to be collision-free under any motion of the uncontrollable participants in the environment, such as the human-driven vehicles on the road. As a result they usually employ a conservative bound on the behavior of such participants, such as reachability analysis. We point out that planning trajectories to rigorously avoid the entirety of the reachable regions is unnecessary and too restrictive, because observing the environment in the future will allow us to prune away most of them; disregarding this ability to react to future updates could prohibit solutions to scenarios that are easily navigated by human drivers. We propose to account for the autonomous vehicle's reactions to future environment changes by a novel safety framework, Comprehensive Reactive Safety. Validated in simulations in several urban driving scenarios such as unprotected left turns and lane merging, the resulting planning algorithm called Reactive ILQR demonstrates strong negotiation capabilities and better safety at the same time. 自动驾驶运动规划中的安全保证通常涉及证明在环境中无法控制的参与者（例如道路上的人类驾驶车辆）的任何运动下，轨迹不会发生碰撞。因此，他们通常对此类参与者的行为采用保守的限制，例如可达性分析。我们指出，规划轨迹来严格避开整个可到达区域是不必要的，而且限制性太大，因为未来观察环境将使我们能够修剪掉其中的大部分；忽视这种对未来更新做出反应的能力可能会阻碍人类驾驶员轻松导航的场景的解决方案。我们建议通过一种新颖的安全框架“综合反应安全”来解释自动驾驶汽车对未来环境变化的反应。由此产生的名为 Reactive ILQR 的规划算法在多种城市驾驶场景（例如无保护的左转和车道合并）的模拟中得到验证，同时展示了强大的协商能力和更好的安全性。 本文提出一种名为'全面反应式安全'的新框架，通过考虑自动驾驶车辆对未来环境变化的反应能力，替代传统保守的轨迹规划方法，提升安全性和导航效率。 Fang Da cs.RO,cs.MA

authors_text: Albert Wu,Michelle Guo,C. Karen Liu
title: Learning Diverse and Physically Feasible Dexterous Grasps with Generative Model and Bilevel Optimization
title_zh: 通过生成模型和双层优化学习多样化且物理上可行的灵巧抓握
abstract: To fully utilize the versatility of a multi-fingered dexterous robotic hand for executing diverse object grasps, one must consider the rich physical constraints introduced by hand-object interaction and object geometry. We propose an integrative approach of combining a generative model and a bilevel optimization (BO) to plan diverse grasp configurations on novel objects. First, a conditional variational autoencoder trained on merely six YCB objects predicts the finger placement directly from the object point cloud. The prediction is then used to seed a nonconvex BO that solves for a grasp configuration under collision, reachability, wrench closure, and friction constraints. Our method achieved an 86.7% success over 120 real world grasping trials on 20 household objects, including unseen and challenging geometries. Through quantitative empirical evaluations, we confirm that grasp configurations produced by our pipeline are indeed guaranteed to satisfy kinematic and dynamic constraints. A video summary of our results is available at youtu.be/9DTrImbN99I.
summary: To fully utilize the versatility of a multi-fingered dexterous robotic hand for executing diverse object grasps, one must consider the rich physical constraints introduced by hand-object interaction and object geometry. We propose an integrative approach of combining a generative model and a bilevel optimization (BO) to plan diverse grasp configurations on novel objects. First, a conditional variational autoencoder trained on merely six YCB objects predicts the finger placement directly from the object point cloud. The prediction is then used to seed a nonconvex BO that solves for a grasp configuration under collision, reachability, wrench closure, and friction constraints. Our method achieved an 86.7% success over 120 real world grasping trials on 20 household objects, including unseen and challenging geometries. Through quantitative empirical evaluations, we confirm that grasp configurations produced by our pipeline are indeed guaranteed to satisfy kinematic and dynamic constraints. A video summary of our results is available at youtu.be/9DTrImbN99I.
abstract_zh: 为了充分利用多指灵巧机器人手的多功能性来执行不同的物体抓取，必须考虑手与物体交互和物体几何形状引入的丰富物理约束。我们提出了一种将生成模型和双层优化（BO）相结合的综合方法，以规划新物体上的各种抓取配置。首先，仅在六个 YCB 对象上训练的条件变分自动编码器直接从对象点云预测手指位置。然后使用该预测来生成非凸 BO，求解碰撞、可达性、扳手闭合和摩擦约束下的抓取配置。我们的方法对 20 种家用物品（包括看不见的和具有挑战性的几何形状）进行了 120 次现实世界抓取试验，取得了 86.7% 的成功。通过定量的实证评估，我们确认我们的管道产生的抓取配置确实保证满足运动学和动态约束。我们的结果的视频摘要请访问 youtu.be/9DTrImbN99I。

AI.tldr: 本文提出结合生成模型与双层优化方法，为多指灵巧机械手生成多样且物理可行的抓取配置。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以在考虑手-物交互物理约束和物体几何形状的前提下，生成多样化的抓取配置。
AI.method: 基于仅6种YCB物体训练的条件变分自编码器（CVAE）从物体点云直接预测手指位置，并以此作为种子输入非凸双层优化求解器，满足碰撞、可达性、力矩闭合和摩擦约束。
AI.result: 在20种家庭物品的120次真实抓取实验中成功率达86.7%，包括未见过的复杂几何物体，且抓取配置满足运动学与动力学约束。
AI.conclusion: 生成模型与双层优化的结合有效解决了多样化物体抓取的物理约束问题，验证了方法在实际场景中的可行性。

authors_text: Mingkun Yang,Minghui Liao,Pu Lu,Jing Wang,Shenggao Zhu,Hualin Luo,Qi Tian,Xiang Bai
title: Reading and Writing: Discriminative and Generative Modeling for Self-Supervised Text Recognition
title_zh: 阅读和写作：自监督文本识别的判别和生成模型
comment: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG
comments: Accepted by ACM MM 2022. The code is available at https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG
abstract: Existing text recognition methods usually need large-scale training data. Most of them rely on synthetic training data due to the lack of annotated real images. However, there is a domain gap between the synthetic data and real data, which limits the performance of the text recognition models. Recent self-supervised text recognition methods attempted to utilize unlabeled real images by introducing contrastive learning, which mainly learns the discrimination of the text images. Inspired by the observation that humans learn to recognize the texts through both reading and writing, we propose to learn discrimination and generation by integrating contrastive learning and masked image modeling in our self-supervised method. The contrastive learning branch is adopted to learn the discrimination of text images, which imitates the reading behavior of humans. Meanwhile, masked image modeling is firstly introduced for text recognition to learn the context generation of the text images, which is similar to the writing behavior. The experimental results show that our method outperforms previous self-supervised text recognition methods by 10.2%-20.2% on irregular scene text recognition datasets. Moreover, our proposed text recognizer exceeds previous state-of-the-art text recognition methods by averagely 5.3% on 11 benchmarks, with similar model size. We also demonstrate that our pre-trained model can be easily applied to other text-related tasks with obvious performance gain. The code is available at https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG.
summary: Existing text recognition methods usually need large-scale training data. Most of them rely on synthetic training data due to the lack of annotated real images. However, there is a domain gap between the synthetic data and real data, which limits the performance of the text recognition models. Recent self-supervised text recognition methods attempted to utilize unlabeled real images by introducing contrastive learning, which mainly learns the discrimination of the text images. Inspired by the observation that humans learn to recognize the texts through both reading and writing, we propose to learn discrimination and generation by integrating contrastive learning and masked image modeling in our self-supervised method. The contrastive learning branch is adopted to learn the discrimination of text images, which imitates the reading behavior of humans. Meanwhile, masked image modeling is firstly introduced for text recognition to learn the context generation of the text images, which is similar to the writing behavior. The experimental results show that our method outperforms previous self-supervised text recognition methods by 10.2%-20.2% on irregular scene text recognition datasets. Moreover, our proposed text recognizer exceeds previous state-of-the-art text recognition methods by averagely 5.3% on 11 benchmarks, with similar model size. We also demonstrate that our pre-trained model can be easily applied to other text-related tasks with obvious performance gain. The code is available at https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG.
abstract_zh: 现有的文本识别方法通常需要大规模的训练数据。由于缺乏带注释的真实图像，它们中的大多数依赖于合成训练数据。然而，合成数据和真实数据之间存在域差距，这限制了文本识别模型的性能。最近的自监督文本识别方法试图通过引入对比学习来利用未标记的真实图像，对比学习主要学习文本图像的区分。受到人类通过阅读和写作学习识别文本的观察的启发，我们建议通过在自我监督方法中整合对比学习和蒙版图像建模来学习辨别和生成。采用对比学习分支来学习文本图像的判别，模仿人类的阅读行为。同时，首先将蒙版图像建模引入文本识别中，以学习文本图像的上下文生成，这与书写行为类似。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不规则场景文本识别数据集上优于之前的自监督文本识别方法 10.2%-20.2%。此外，我们提出的文本识别器在 11 个基准测试中平均比之前最先进的文本识别方法高出 5.3%，并且模型大小相似。我们还证明，我们的预训练模型可以轻松应用于其他与文本相关的任务，并具有明显的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合判别与生成建模的自监督文本识别方法，通过融合对比学习和掩码图像建模来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有文本识别方法依赖合成数据导致领域差距，而人类通过阅读和书写同时学习文本识别，启发了该方法的提出。
AI.method: 整合对比学习（模仿阅读行为）和掩码图像建模（模仿书写行为），分别学习文本图像的判别与上下文生成能力。
AI.result: 在不规则场景文本数据集上优于先前自监督方法10.2%-20.2%，在11个基准测试中平均超越现有最佳方法5.3%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缩小了合成与真实数据的领域差距，且预训练模型可迁移至其他文本相关任务并取得显著性能提升。

Moreover, our proposed text recognizer exceeds previous state-of-the-art text recognition methods by averagely 5.3% on 11 benchmarks, with similar model size. We also demonstrate that our pre-trained model can be easily applied to other text-related tasks with obvious performance gain. The code is available at https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG. 现有的文本识别方法通常需要大规模的训练数据。由于缺乏带注释的真实图像，它们中的大多数依赖于合成训练数据。然而，合成数据和真实数据之间存在域差距，这限制了文本识别模型的性能。最近的自监督文本识别方法试图通过引入对比学习来利用未标记的真实图像，对比学习主要学习文本图像的区分。受到人类通过阅读和写作学习识别文本的观察的启发，我们建议通过在自我监督方法中整合对比学习和蒙版图像建模来学习辨别和生成。采用对比学习分支来学习文本图像的判别，模仿人类的阅读行为。同时，首先将蒙版图像建模引入文本识别中，以学习文本图像的上下文生成，这与书写行为类似。实验结果表明，我们的方法在不规则场景文本识别数据集上优于之前的自监督文本识别方法 10.2%-20.2%。此外，我们提出的文本识别器在 11 个基准测试中平均比之前最先进的文本识别方法高出 5.3%，并且模型大小相似。我们还证明，我们的预训练模型可以轻松应用于其他与文本相关的任务，并具有明显的性能提升。代码可在 https://github.com/ayumiymk/DiG 获取。 本文提出一种结合判别与生成建模的自监督文本识别方法，通过融合对比学习和掩码图像建模来提升模型性能。 Mingkun Yang,Minghui Liao,Pu Lu,Jing Wang,Shenggao Zhu,Hualin Luo,Qi Tian,Xiang Bai cs.CV

authors_text: Minh Cao,Ramin Ramezani
title: Data generation using simulation technology to improve perception mechanism of autonomous vehicles
title_zh: 利用仿真技术生成数据来改善自动驾驶汽车的感知机制
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, submitted to CONF-CDS 2022
comments: 16 pages, 7 figures, 2 tables, submitted to CONF-CDS 2022
abstract: Recent advancements in computer graphics technology allow more realistic ren-dering of car driving environments. They have enabled self-driving car simulators such as DeepGTA-V and CARLA (Car Learning to Act) to generate large amounts of synthetic data that can complement the existing real-world dataset in training autonomous car perception. Furthermore, since self-driving car simulators allow full control of the environment, they can generate dangerous driving scenarios that the real-world dataset lacks such as bad weather and accident scenarios. In this paper, we will demonstrate the effectiveness of combining data gathered from the real world with data generated in the simulated world to train perception systems on object detection and localization task. We will also propose a multi-level deep learning perception framework that aims to emulate a human learning experience in which a series of tasks from the simple to more difficult ones are learned in a certain domain. The autonomous car perceptron can learn from easy-to-drive scenarios to more challenging ones customized by simulation software.
summary: Recent advancements in computer graphics technology allow more realistic ren-dering of car driving environments. They have enabled self-driving car simulators such as DeepGTA-V and CARLA (Car Learning to Act) to generate large amounts of synthetic data that can complement the existing real-world dataset in training autonomous car perception. Furthermore, since self-driving car simulators allow full control of the environment, they can generate dangerous driving scenarios that the real-world dataset lacks such as bad weather and accident scenarios. In this paper, we will demonstrate the effectiveness of combining data gathered from the real world with data generated in the simulated world to train perception systems on object detection and localization task. We will also propose a multi-level deep learning perception framework that aims to emulate a human learning experience in which a series of tasks from the simple to more difficult ones are learned in a certain domain. The autonomous car perceptron can learn from easy-to-drive scenarios to more challenging ones customized by simulation software.
abstract_zh: 计算机图形技术的最新进展使得汽车驾驶环境的渲染更加真实。他们使 DeepGTA-V 和 CARLA（汽车学习行动）等自动驾驶汽车模拟器能够生成大量合成数据，这些数据可以补充训练自动驾驶汽车感知时现有的现实世界数据集。此外，由于自动驾驶汽车模拟器可以完全控制环境，因此它们可以生成现实世界数据集所缺乏的危险驾驶场景，例如恶劣天气和事故场景。在本文中，我们将展示将从现实世界收集的数据与模拟世界中生成的数据相结合来训练感知系统进行物体检测和定位任务的有效性。我们还将提出一个多层次的深度学习感知框架，旨在模拟人类的学习体验，在特定领域学习一系列从简单到更困难的任务。自动驾驶汽车感知器可以从易于驾驶的场景到通过模拟软件定制的更具挑战性的场景进行学习。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过结合真实世界数据与模拟生成数据，提升自动驾驶车辆在目标检测和定位任务中的感知性能。
AI.motivation: 真实世界数据采集成本高且难以覆盖危险场景（如恶劣天气、事故），而模拟技术可生成多样化合成数据以补充训练集。
AI.method: 提出多层次深度学习感知框架，分阶段从简单到复杂任务训练模型，结合真实数据与模拟器（如CARLA）生成的数据进行联合训练。
AI.result: 实验验证了融合数据训练的感知系统在目标检测和定位任务中的有效性，模型在复杂场景下的鲁棒性显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 模拟数据与真实数据结合可有效增强自动驾驶感知机制，未来需进一步优化多任务学习框架以适应更多复杂场景。

authors_text: Rishab Mitra,Arpit Narechania,Alex Endert,John Stasko
title: Facilitating Conversational Interaction in Natural Language Interfaces for Visualization
title_zh: 促进可视化自然语言界面中的对话交互
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 3 listings, to appear in IEEE VIS 2022 (Short Paper Track)
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, 3 listings, to appear in IEEE VIS 2022 (Short Paper Track)
abstract: Natural language (NL) toolkits enable visualization developers, who may not have a background in natural language processing (NLP), to create natural language interfaces (NLIs) for end-users to flexibly specify and interact with visualizations. However, these toolkits currently only support one-off utterances, with minimal capability to facilitate a multi-turn dialog between the user and the system. Developing NLIs with such conversational interaction capabilities remains a challenging task, requiring implementations of low-level NLP techniques to process a new query as an intent to follow-up on an older query. We extend an existing Python-based toolkit, NL4DV, that processes an NL query about a tabular dataset and returns an analytic specification containing data attributes, analytic tasks, and relevant visualizations, modeled as a JSON object. Specifically, NL4DV now enables developers to facilitate multiple simultaneous conversations about a dataset and resolve associated ambiguities, augmenting new conversational information into the output JSON object. We demonstrate these capabilities through three examples: (1) an NLI to learn aspects of the Vega-Lite grammar, (2) a mind mapping application to create free-flowing conversations, and (3) a chatbot to answer questions and resolve ambiguities.
summary: Natural language (NL) toolkits enable visualization developers, who may not have a background in natural language processing (NLP), to create natural language interfaces (NLIs) for end-users to flexibly specify and interact with visualizations. However, these toolkits currently only support one-off utterances, with minimal capability to facilitate a multi-turn dialog between the user and the system. Developing NLIs with such conversational interaction capabilities remains a challenging task, requiring implementations of low-level NLP techniques to process a new query as an intent to follow-up on an older query. We extend an existing Python-based toolkit, NL4DV, that processes an NL query about a tabular dataset and returns an analytic specification containing data attributes, analytic tasks, and relevant visualizations, modeled as a JSON object. Specifically, NL4DV now enables developers to facilitate multiple simultaneous conversations about a dataset and resolve associated ambiguities, augmenting new conversational information into the output JSON object. We demonstrate these capabilities through three examples: (1) an NLI to learn aspects of the Vega-Lite grammar, (2) a mind mapping application to create free-flowing conversations, and (3) a chatbot to answer questions and resolve ambiguities.
abstract_zh: 自然语言 (NL) 工具包使可能没有自然语言处理 (NLP) 背景的可视化开发人员能够为最终用户创建自然语言界面 (NLI)，以便灵活地指定可视化并与可视化交互。然而，这些工具包目前仅支持一次性话语，促进用户和系统之间多轮对话的能力极低。开发具有此类对话交互功能的 NLI 仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，需要实现低级 NLP 技术来处理新查询，以跟踪旧查询。我们扩展了现有的基于 Python 的工具包 NL4DV，它处理有关表格数据集的 NL 查询，并返回包含数据属性、分析任务和相关可视化的分析规范，建模为 JSON 对象。具体来说，NL4DV 现在使开发人员能够促进有关数据集的多个同时对话并解决相关的歧义，将新的对话信息添加到输出 JSON 对象中。我们通过三个示例演示这些功能：(1) 用于学习 Vega-Lite 语法各个方面的 NLI，(2) 用于创建自由对话的思维导图应用程序，以及 (3) 用于回答问题和解决歧义的聊天机器人。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在增强自然语言接口（NLI）的对话交互能力，使开发者能处理多轮对话并解决可视化任务中的歧义。
AI.motivation: 现有NLI工具包仅支持单次查询，难以处理用户与系统的多轮对话交互，而实现这一功能需复杂的NLP技术。
AI.method: 扩展Python工具包NL4DV，使其支持多对话并整合新信息到输出JSON中，通过三个案例验证效果。
AI.result: 成功实现多对话支持，案例包括Vega-Lite语法学习、思维导图应用及聊天机器人，展示了解决歧义的能力。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的NL4DV提升了可视化系统的交互性，为未来NLI设计提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Cheng Li,Yangxin Liu
title: Rethinking Query-Key Pairwise Interactions in Vision Transformers
title_zh: 重新思考视觉 Transformer 中的查询键成对交互
abstract: Vision Transformers have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many visual tasks. Due to the quadratic computational and memory complexities of self-attention, recent works either apply attention only to low-resolution inputs or restrict the receptive field to a small local region. To overcome these limitations, we propose key-only attention, which excludes query-key pairwise interactions and uses a compute-efficient saliency-gate to obtain attention weights, modeling local-global interactions in all stages. Key-only attention has linear computational and memory complexities w.r.t input size. We use alternate layout to hybridize convolution and attention layers instead of grafting which is suggested by previous works, so that all stages can benefit from both spatial attentions and convolutions. We leverage these improvements to develop a new self-attention model family, LinGlos, which reach state-of-the-art accuracies on the parameter-limited setting of ImageNet classification benchmark, and outperform baselines significantly in downstream tasks, e.g., COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation.
summary: Vision Transformers have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many visual tasks. Due to the quadratic computational and memory complexities of self-attention, recent works either apply attention only to low-resolution inputs or restrict the receptive field to a small local region. To overcome these limitations, we propose key-only attention, which excludes query-key pairwise interactions and uses a compute-efficient saliency-gate to obtain attention weights, modeling local-global interactions in all stages. Key-only attention has linear computational and memory complexities w.r.t input size. We use alternate layout to hybridize convolution and attention layers instead of grafting which is suggested by previous works, so that all stages can benefit from both spatial attentions and convolutions. We leverage these improvements to develop a new self-attention model family, LinGlos, which reach state-of-the-art accuracies on the parameter-limited setting of ImageNet classification benchmark, and outperform baselines significantly in downstream tasks, e.g., COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers 在许多视觉任务中都取得了最先进的性能。由于自注意力的二次计算和记忆复杂性，最近的工作要么仅将注意力应用于低分辨率输入，要么将感受野限制在较小的局部区域。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了仅键注意力，它排除了查询键成对交互，并使用计算高效的显着性门来获取注意力权重，对所有阶段的局部全局交互进行建模。仅键注意力对于输入大小具有线性计算和内存复杂性。我们使用替代布局来混合卷积层和注意力层，而不是先前作品建议的嫁接，以便所有阶段都可以从空间注意力和卷积中受益。我们利用这些改进开发了一个新的自注意力模型系列 LinGlos，它在 ImageNet 分类基准的参数限制设置上达到了最先进的精度，并且在下游任务（例如 COCO 对象检测和 ADE20K 语义分割）中显着优于基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的视觉Transformer模型LinGlos，通过重新设计查询-键对交互机制以降低计算复杂度并提升性能。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉Transformer的自注意力机制存在计算和内存复杂度平方级增长的问题，现有方法通过限制输入分辨率或感受野来缓解，但牺牲了模型表现。
AI.method: 提出键-only注意力机制，移除查询-键对交互并采用高效显著性门控；通过交替布局融合卷积与注意力层，构建LinGlos模型家族。
AI.result: LinGlos在ImageNet参数受限设置下达到SOTA精度，在COCO目标检测和ADE20K语义分割等下游任务中显著优于基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 键-only注意力与混合架构设计有效平衡了计算效率与模型性能，为视觉Transformer的优化提供了新思路。

search_text: Rethinking Query-Key Pairwise Interactions in Vision Transformers 重新思考视觉 Transformer 中的查询键成对交互 Vision Transformers have achieved state-of-the-art performance in many visual tasks. Due to the quadratic computational and memory complexities of self-attention, recent works either apply attention only to low-resolution inputs or restrict the receptive field to a small local region. To overcome these limitations, we propose key-only attention, which excludes query-key pairwise interactions and uses a compute-efficient saliency-gate to obtain attention weights, modeling local-global interactions in all stages. Key-only attention has linear computational and memory complexities w.r.t input size. We use alternate layout to hybridize convolution and attention layers instead of grafting which is suggested by previous works, so that all stages can benefit from both spatial attentions and convolutions. We leverage these improvements to develop a new self-attention model family, LinGlos, which reach state-of-the-art accuracies on the parameter-limited setting of ImageNet classification benchmark, and outperform baselines significantly in downstream tasks, e.g., COCO object detection and ADE20K semantic segmentation. Vision Transformers 在许多视觉任务中都取得了最先进的性能。由于自注意力的二次计算和记忆复杂性，最近的工作要么仅将注意力应用于低分辨率输入，要么将感受野限制在较小的局部区域。为了克服这些限制，我们提出了仅键注意力，它排除了查询键成对交互，并使用计算高效的显着性门来获取注意力权重，对所有阶段的局部全局交互进行建模。仅键注意力对于输入大小具有线性计算和内存复杂性。我们使用替代布局来混合卷积层和注意力层，而不是先前作品建议的嫁接，以便所有阶段都可以从空间注意力和卷积中受益。我们利用这些改进开发了一个新的自注意力模型系列 LinGlos，它在 ImageNet 分类基准的参数限制设置上达到了最先进的精度，并且在下游任务（例如 COCO 对象检测和 ADE20K 语义分割）中显着优于基线。 本文提出一种改进的视觉Transformer模型LinGlos，通过重新设计查询-键对交互机制以降低计算复杂度并提升性能。 Cheng Li,Yangxin Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Feiliang Ren,Yongkang Liu,Bochao Li,Shilei Liu,Bingchao Wang,Jiaqi Wang,Chunchao Liu,Qi Ma
title: An Understanding-Oriented Robust Machine Reading Comprehension Model
title_zh: 面向理解的鲁棒机器阅读理解模型
abstract: Although existing machine reading comprehension models are making rapid progress on many datasets, they are far from robust. In this paper, we propose an understanding-oriented machine reading comprehension model to address three kinds of robustness issues, which are over sensitivity, over stability and generalization. Specifically, we first use a natural language inference module to help the model understand the accurate semantic meanings of input questions so as to address the issues of over sensitivity and over stability. Then in the machine reading comprehension module, we propose a memory-guided multi-head attention method that can further well understand the semantic meanings of input questions and passages. Third, we propose a multilanguage learning mechanism to address the issue of generalization. Finally, these modules are integrated with a multi-task learning based method. We evaluate our model on three benchmark datasets that are designed to measure models robustness, including DuReader (robust) and two SQuAD-related datasets. Extensive experiments show that our model can well address the mentioned three kinds of robustness issues. And it achieves much better results than the compared state-of-the-art models on all these datasets under different evaluation metrics, even under some extreme and unfair evaluations. The source code of our work is available at: https://github.com/neukg/RobustMRC.
summary: Although existing machine reading comprehension models are making rapid progress on many datasets, they are far from robust. In this paper, we propose an understanding-oriented machine reading comprehension model to address three kinds of robustness issues, which are over sensitivity, over stability and generalization. Specifically, we first use a natural language inference module to help the model understand the accurate semantic meanings of input questions so as to address the issues of over sensitivity and over stability. Then in the machine reading comprehension module, we propose a memory-guided multi-head attention method that can further well understand the semantic meanings of input questions and passages. Third, we propose a multilanguage learning mechanism to address the issue of generalization. Finally, these modules are integrated with a multi-task learning based method. We evaluate our model on three benchmark datasets that are designed to measure models robustness, including DuReader (robust) and two SQuAD-related datasets. Extensive experiments show that our model can well address the mentioned three kinds of robustness issues. And it achieves much better results than the compared state-of-the-art models on all these datasets under different evaluation metrics, even under some extreme and unfair evaluations. The source code of our work is available at: https://github.com/neukg/RobustMRC.
abstract_zh: 尽管现有的机器阅读理解模型在许多数据集上取得了快速进展，但它们还远远不够稳健。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向理解的机器阅读理解模型，以解决过度敏感、过度稳定性和泛化三种鲁棒性问题。具体来说，我们首先使用自然语言推理模块来帮助模型理解输入问题的准确语义，从而解决过度敏感和过度稳定的问题。然后在机器阅读理解模块中，我们提出了一种记忆引导的多头注意力方法，可以进一步很好地理解输入问题和段落的语义。第三，我们提出了一种多语言学习机制来解决泛化问题。最后，这些模块与基于多任务学习的方法集成。我们在三个旨在衡量模型稳健性的基准数据集上评估我们的模型，包括 DuReader（稳健）和两个与 SQuAD 相关的数据集。大量的实验表明，我们的模型可以很好地解决上述三种鲁棒性问题。在不同的评估指标下，即使在一些极端和不公平的评估下，它也比所有这些数据集上的最先进模型取得了更好的结果。我们工作的源代码位于：https://github.com/neukg/RobustMRC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种面向理解的鲁棒机器阅读理解模型，以解决现有模型在鲁棒性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有机器阅读理解模型在多个数据集上表现良好，但存在过度敏感、过度稳定和泛化能力不足等鲁棒性问题。
AI.method: 采用自然语言推理模块解决语义理解问题，结合记忆引导的多头注意力机制增强语义理解，并引入多语言学习机制提升泛化能力，最终通过多任务学习整合各模块。
AI.result: 在DuReader（鲁棒）及两个SQuAD相关数据集上，模型在多种评估指标下均优于现有最先进模型，即使在极端和不公平评估下表现仍优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型有效解决了过度敏感、过度稳定和泛化问题，显著提升了机器阅读理解的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Qingwen Zhang,Mingkai Tang,Ruoyu Geng,Feiyi Chen,Ren Xin,Lujia Wang
title: MMFN: Multi-Modal-Fusion-Net for End-to-End Driving
title_zh: MMFN：用于端到端驾驶的多模态融合网络
abstract: Inspired by the fact that humans use diverse sensory organs to perceive the world, sensors with different modalities are deployed in end-to-end driving to obtain the global context of the 3D scene. In previous works, camera and LiDAR inputs are fused through transformers for better driving performance. These inputs are normally further interpreted as high-level map information to assist navigation tasks. Nevertheless, extracting useful information from the complex map input is challenging, for redundant information may mislead the agent and negatively affect driving performance. We propose a novel approach to efficiently extract features from vectorized High-Definition (HD) maps and utilize them in the end-to-end driving tasks. In addition, we design a new expert to further enhance the model performance by considering multi-road rules. Experimental results prove that both of the proposed improvements enable our agent to achieve superior performance compared with other methods.
summary: Inspired by the fact that humans use diverse sensory organs to perceive the world, sensors with different modalities are deployed in end-to-end driving to obtain the global context of the 3D scene. In previous works, camera and LiDAR inputs are fused through transformers for better driving performance. These inputs are normally further interpreted as high-level map information to assist navigation tasks. Nevertheless, extracting useful information from the complex map input is challenging, for redundant information may mislead the agent and negatively affect driving performance. We propose a novel approach to efficiently extract features from vectorized High-Definition (HD) maps and utilize them in the end-to-end driving tasks. In addition, we design a new expert to further enhance the model performance by considering multi-road rules. Experimental results prove that both of the proposed improvements enable our agent to achieve superior performance compared with other methods.
abstract_zh: 受人类使用多种感觉器官感知世界这一事实的启发，在端到端驾驶中部署不同模态的传感器以获得 3D 场景的全局背景。在之前的作品中，相机和激光雷达输入​​通过变压器融合，以获得更好的驾驶性能。这些输入通常被进一步解释为高级地图信息以协助导航任务。然而，从复杂的地图输入中提取有用的信息具有挑战性，因为冗余信息可能会误导智能体并对驾驶性能产生负面影响。我们提出了一种新颖的方法来有效地从矢量化高清（HD）地图中提取特征并将其用于端到端驾驶任务。此外，我们设计了一个新的专家，通过考虑多道路规则来进一步增强模型性能。实验结果证明，与其他方法相比，所提出的两项改进都使我们的代理取得了优越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MMFN模型，通过融合多模态传感器数据与向量化高清地图特征，提升端到端驾驶任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在融合摄像头和LiDAR数据时，因冗余地图信息可能导致模型误判，影响驾驶效果。
AI.method: 设计高效提取向量化HD地图特征的模块，并引入多道路规则专家模块增强模型决策能力。
AI.result: 实验表明，MMFN在驾驶任务中优于现有方法，验证了多模态融合与规则增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MMFN通过有效整合多模态感知与规则知识，为端到端自动驾驶提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。

tldr: 本文提出MMFN模型，通过融合多模态传感器数据与向量化高清地图特征，提升端到端驾驶任务的性能。
motivation: 传统方法在融合摄像头和LiDAR数据时，因冗余地图信息可能导致模型误判，影响驾驶效果。
method: 设计高效提取向量化HD地图特征的模块，并引入多道路规则专家模块增强模型决策能力。
result: 实验表明，MMFN在驾驶任务中优于现有方法，验证了多模态融合与规则增强的有效性。
conclusion: MMFN通过有效整合多模态感知与规则知识，为端到端自动驾驶提供了更鲁棒的解决方案。
search_text: MMFN: Multi-Modal-Fusion-Net for End-to-End Driving MMFN：用于端到端驾驶的多模态融合网络 Inspired by the fact that humans use diverse sensory organs to perceive the world, sensors with different modalities are deployed in end-to-end driving to obtain the global context of the 3D scene. In previous works, camera and LiDAR inputs are fused through transformers for better driving performance. These inputs are normally further interpreted as high-level map information to assist navigation tasks. Nevertheless, extracting useful information from the complex map input is challenging, for redundant information may mislead the agent and negatively affect driving performance. We propose a novel approach to efficiently extract features from vectorized High-Definition (HD) maps and utilize them in the end-to-end driving tasks. In addition, we design a new expert to further enhance the model performance by considering multi-road rules. Experimental results prove that both of the proposed improvements enable our agent to achieve superior performance compared with other methods. 受人类使用多种感觉器官感知世界这一事实的启发，在端到端驾驶中部署不同模态的传感器以获得 3D 场景的全局背景。在之前的作品中，相机和激光雷达输入​​通过变压器融合，以获得更好的驾驶性能。这些输入通常被进一步解释为高级地图信息以协助导航任务。然而，从复杂的地图输入中提取有用的信息具有挑战性，因为冗余信息可能会误导智能体并对驾驶性能产生负面影响。我们提出了一种新颖的方法来有效地从矢量化高清（HD）地图中提取特征并将其用于端到端驾驶任务。此外，我们设计了一个新的专家，通过考虑多道路规则来进一步增强模型性能。实验结果证明，与其他方法相比，所提出的两项改进都使我们的代理取得了优越的性能。 本文提出MMFN模型，通过融合多模态传感器数据与向量化高清地图特征，提升端到端驾驶任务的性能。 Qingwen Zhang,Mingkai Tang,Ruoyu Geng,Feiyi Chen,Ren Xin,Lujia Wang cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Marissa Ramirez de Chanlatte,Matheus Gadelha,Thibault Groueix,Radomir Mech
title: Recovering Detail in 3D Shapes Using Disparity Maps
title_zh: 使用视差图恢复 3D 形状的细节
abstract: We present a fine-tuning method to improve the appearance of 3D geometries reconstructed from single images. We leverage advances in monocular depth estimation to obtain disparity maps and present a novel approach to transforming 2D normalized disparity maps into 3D point clouds by using shape priors to solve an optimization on the relevant camera parameters. After creating a 3D point cloud from disparity, we introduce a method to combine the new point cloud with existing information to form a more faithful and detailed final geometry. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach with multiple experiments on both synthetic and real images.
summary: We present a fine-tuning method to improve the appearance of 3D geometries reconstructed from single images. We leverage advances in monocular depth estimation to obtain disparity maps and present a novel approach to transforming 2D normalized disparity maps into 3D point clouds by using shape priors to solve an optimization on the relevant camera parameters. After creating a 3D point cloud from disparity, we introduce a method to combine the new point cloud with existing information to form a more faithful and detailed final geometry. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach with multiple experiments on both synthetic and real images.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种微调方法来改善从单个图像重建的 3D 几何形状的外观。我们利用单目深度估计的进步来获取视差图，并提出了一种新颖的方法，通过使用形状先验来解决相关相机参数的优化问题，将 2D 归一化视差图转换为 3D 点云。根据视差创建 3D 点云后，我们引入了一种将新点云与现有信息相结合的方法，以形成更忠实和详细的最终几何形状。我们通过对合成图像和真实图像进行多次实验来证明我们的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过视差图优化单目图像重建的3D几何细节的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有单目图像重建的3D几何体存在细节缺失问题，需提升重建精度与真实感。
AI.method: 利用单目深度估计生成视差图，结合形状先验优化相机参数生成点云，并融合原有信息完善几何结构。
AI.result: 在合成与真实图像实验中，方法有效提升了3D重建的细节保真度与几何准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过视差图与形状先验优化，显著改善了单目图像重建的3D几何质量。

authors_text: Mingyuan Luo,Xin Yang,Hongzhang Wang,Liwei Du,Dong Ni
title: Deep Motion Network for Freehand 3D Ultrasound Reconstruction
title_zh: 用于徒手 3D 超声重建的深度运动网络
abstract: Freehand 3D ultrasound (US) has important clinical value due to its low cost and unrestricted field of view. Recently deep learning algorithms have removed its dependence on bulky and expensive external positioning devices. However, improving reconstruction accuracy is still hampered by difficult elevational displacement estimation and large cumulative drift. In this context, we propose a novel deep motion network (MoNet) that integrates images and a lightweight sensor known as the inertial measurement unit (IMU) from a velocity perspective to alleviate the obstacles mentioned above. Our contribution is two-fold. First, we introduce IMU acceleration for the first time to estimate elevational displacements outside the plane. We propose a temporal and multi-branch structure to mine the valuable information of low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) acceleration. Second, we propose a multi-modal online self-supervised strategy that leverages IMU information as weak labels for adaptive optimization to reduce drift errors and further ameliorate the impacts of acceleration noise. Experiments show that our proposed method achieves the superior reconstruction performance, exceeding state-of-the-art methods across the board.
summary: Freehand 3D ultrasound (US) has important clinical value due to its low cost and unrestricted field of view. Recently deep learning algorithms have removed its dependence on bulky and expensive external positioning devices. However, improving reconstruction accuracy is still hampered by difficult elevational displacement estimation and large cumulative drift. In this context, we propose a novel deep motion network (MoNet) that integrates images and a lightweight sensor known as the inertial measurement unit (IMU) from a velocity perspective to alleviate the obstacles mentioned above. Our contribution is two-fold. First, we introduce IMU acceleration for the first time to estimate elevational displacements outside the plane. We propose a temporal and multi-branch structure to mine the valuable information of low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) acceleration. Second, we propose a multi-modal online self-supervised strategy that leverages IMU information as weak labels for adaptive optimization to reduce drift errors and further ameliorate the impacts of acceleration noise. Experiments show that our proposed method achieves the superior reconstruction performance, exceeding state-of-the-art methods across the board.
abstract_zh: 徒手 3D 超声（US）因其低成本和不受视野限制而具有重要的临床价值。最近，深度学习算法已经消除了对笨重且昂贵的外部定位设备的依赖。然而，高程位移估计困难和累积漂移大仍然阻碍了重建精度的提高。在此背景下，我们提出了一种新颖的深度运动网络（MoNet），从速度角度将图像和称为惯性测量单元（IMU）的轻量级传感器集成在一起，以减轻上述障碍。我们的贡献是双重的。首先，我们首次引入 IMU 加速度来估计平面外的高程位移。我们提出了一种时间和多分支结构来挖掘低信噪比（SNR）加速的有价值的信息。其次，我们提出了一种多模态在线自监督策略，利用 IMU 信息作为弱标签进行自适应优化，以减少漂移误差并进一步改善加速噪声的影响。实验表明，我们提出的方法实现了卓越的重建性能，全面超越了最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种深度运动网络（MoNet），通过整合图像和惯性测量单元（IMU）数据，提升自由手3D超声重建的准确性。
AI.motivation: 自由手3D超声虽成本低且视野无限制，但现有方法因难以估计垂直位移和累积漂移误差，导致重建精度不足，需依赖昂贵外部设备。
AI.method: 首次引入IMU加速度估计垂直位移，设计时序多分支结构处理低信噪比信号；提出多模态在线自监督策略，利用IMU数据作为弱标签优化模型，减少漂移误差。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在重建性能上全面超越现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合IMU数据与自监督策略，本文方法有效解决了自由手3D超声重建中的精度瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Zhongyi Shui,Shichuan Zhang,Chenglu Zhu,Bingchuan Wang,Pingyi Chen,Sunyi Zheng,Lin Yang
title: End-to-end cell recognition by point annotation
title_zh: 通过点注释进行端到端细胞识别
abstract: Reliable quantitative analysis of immunohistochemical staining images requires accurate and robust cell detection and classification. Recent weakly-supervised methods usually estimate probability density maps for cell recognition. However, in dense cell scenarios, their performance can be limited by pre- and post-processing as it is impossible to find a universal parameter setting. In this paper, we introduce an end-to-end framework that applies direct regression and classification for preset anchor points. Specifically, we propose a pyramidal feature aggregation strategy to combine low-level features and high-level semantics simultaneously, which provides accurate cell recognition for our purely point-based model. In addition, an optimized cost function is designed to adapt our multi-task learning framework by matching ground truth and predicted points. The experimental results demonstrate the superior accuracy and efficiency of the proposed method, which reveals the high potentiality in assisting pathologist assessments.
summary: Reliable quantitative analysis of immunohistochemical staining images requires accurate and robust cell detection and classification. Recent weakly-supervised methods usually estimate probability density maps for cell recognition. However, in dense cell scenarios, their performance can be limited by pre- and post-processing as it is impossible to find a universal parameter setting. In this paper, we introduce an end-to-end framework that applies direct regression and classification for preset anchor points. Specifically, we propose a pyramidal feature aggregation strategy to combine low-level features and high-level semantics simultaneously, which provides accurate cell recognition for our purely point-based model. In addition, an optimized cost function is designed to adapt our multi-task learning framework by matching ground truth and predicted points. The experimental results demonstrate the superior accuracy and efficiency of the proposed method, which reveals the high potentiality in assisting pathologist assessments.
abstract_zh: 免疫组织化学染色图像的可靠定量分析需要准确、稳健的细胞检测和分类。最近的弱监督方法通常估计细胞识别的概率密度图。然而，在密集小区场景中，它们的性能可能会受到预处理和后处理的限制，因为不可能找到通用的参数设置。在本文中，我们介绍了一种端到端框架，该框架对预设锚点应用直接回归和分类。具体来说，我们提出了一种金字塔特征聚合策略，同时结合低级特征和高级语义，为我们的纯基于点的模型提供准确的细胞识别。此外，还设计了优化的成本函数，通过匹配地面事实和预测点来适应我们的多任务学习框架。实验结果证明了该方法的卓越准确性和效率，揭示了协助病理学家评估的巨大潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于点注释的端到端细胞识别方法，用于免疫组化染色图像的准确检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 现有弱监督方法在密集细胞场景中因预处理和后处理参数难以统一而性能受限，需更鲁棒的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计端到端框架，结合金字塔特征聚合策略与优化成本函数，直接回归分类预设锚点实现多任务学习。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确性和效率上优于现有技术，展现出辅助病理学家评估的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的点注释端到端模型有效解决了密集细胞场景下的细胞识别难题，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: End-to-end cell recognition by point annotation 通过点注释进行端到端细胞识别 Reliable quantitative analysis of immunohistochemical staining images requires accurate and robust cell detection and classification. Recent weakly-supervised methods usually estimate probability density maps for cell recognition. However, in dense cell scenarios, their performance can be limited by pre- and post-processing as it is impossible to find a universal parameter setting. In this paper, we introduce an end-to-end framework that applies direct regression and classification for preset anchor points. Specifically, we propose a pyramidal feature aggregation strategy to combine low-level features and high-level semantics simultaneously, which provides accurate cell recognition for our purely point-based model. In addition, an optimized cost function is designed to adapt our multi-task learning framework by matching ground truth and predicted points. The experimental results demonstrate the superior accuracy and efficiency of the proposed method, which reveals the high potentiality in assisting pathologist assessments. 免疫组织化学染色图像的可靠定量分析需要准确、稳健的细胞检测和分类。最近的弱监督方法通常估计细胞识别的概率密度图。然而，在密集小区场景中，它们的性能可能会受到预处理和后处理的限制，因为不可能找到通用的参数设置。在本文中，我们介绍了一种端到端框架，该框架对预设锚点应用直接回归和分类。具体来说，我们提出了一种金字塔特征聚合策略，同时结合低级特征和高级语义，为我们的纯基于点的模型提供准确的细胞识别。此外，还设计了优化的成本函数，通过匹配地面事实和预测点来适应我们的多任务学习框架。实验结果证明了该方法的卓越准确性和效率，揭示了协助病理学家评估的巨大潜力。 本文提出了一种基于点注释的端到端细胞识别方法，用于免疫组化染色图像的准确检测与分类。 Zhongyi Shui,Shichuan Zhang,Chenglu Zhu,Bingchuan Wang,Pingyi Chen,Sunyi Zheng,Lin Yang cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Yan Lu,Shiqi Jiang,Ting Cao,Yuanchao Shu
title: Turbo: Opportunistic Enhancement for Edge Video Analytics
title_zh: Turbo：边缘视频分析的机会增强
abstract: Edge computing is being widely used for video analytics. To alleviate the inherent tension between accuracy and cost, various video analytics pipelines have been proposed to optimize the usage of GPU on edge nodes. Nonetheless, we find that GPU compute resources provisioned for edge nodes are commonly under-utilized due to video content variations, subsampling and filtering at different places of a pipeline. As opposed to model and pipeline optimization, in this work, we study the problem of opportunistic data enhancement using the non-deterministic and fragmented idle GPU resources. In specific, we propose a task-specific discrimination and enhancement module and a model-aware adversarial training mechanism, providing a way to identify and transform low-quality images that are specific to a video pipeline in an accurate and efficient manner. A multi-exit model structure and a resource-aware scheduler is further developed to make online enhancement decisions and fine-grained inference execution under latency and GPU resource constraints. Experiments across multiple video analytics pipelines and datasets reveal that by judiciously allocating a small amount of idle resources on frames that tend to yield greater marginal benefits from enhancement, our system boosts DNN object detection accuracy by $7.3-11.3\%$ without incurring any latency costs.
summary: Edge computing is being widely used for video analytics. To alleviate the inherent tension between accuracy and cost, various video analytics pipelines have been proposed to optimize the usage of GPU on edge nodes. Nonetheless, we find that GPU compute resources provisioned for edge nodes are commonly under-utilized due to video content variations, subsampling and filtering at different places of a pipeline. As opposed to model and pipeline optimization, in this work, we study the problem of opportunistic data enhancement using the non-deterministic and fragmented idle GPU resources. In specific, we propose a task-specific discrimination and enhancement module and a model-aware adversarial training mechanism, providing a way to identify and transform low-quality images that are specific to a video pipeline in an accurate and efficient manner. A multi-exit model structure and a resource-aware scheduler is further developed to make online enhancement decisions and fine-grained inference execution under latency and GPU resource constraints. Experiments across multiple video analytics pipelines and datasets reveal that by judiciously allocating a small amount of idle resources on frames that tend to yield greater marginal benefits from enhancement, our system boosts DNN object detection accuracy by $7.3-11.3\%$ without incurring any latency costs.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算正在广泛用于视频分析。为了缓解准确性和成本之间的固有矛盾，人们提出了各种视频分析管道来优化边缘节点上 GPU 的使用。尽管如此，我们发现，由于视频内容变化、管道不同位置的二次采样和过滤，为边缘节点配置的 GPU 计算资源通常未得到充分利用。与模型和管道优化相反，在这项工作中，我们研究使用非确定性和碎片化空闲 GPU 资源进行机会性数据增强的问题。具体来说，我们提出了一个特定于任务的区分和增强模块以及一个模型感知的对抗训练机制，提供了一种以准确有效的方式识别和转换特定于视频管道的低质量图像的方法。进一步开发了多出口模型结构和资源感知调度器，以在延迟和 GPU 资源限制下做出在线增强决策和细粒度推理执行。跨多个视频分析管道和数据集的实验表明，通过明智地在帧上分配少量空闲资源，这些帧往往会通过增强产生更大的边际效益，我们的系统将 DNN 对象检测精度提高了 7.3-11.3\%$，而不会产生任何延迟成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种利用边缘节点闲置GPU资源进行视频分析数据增强的方法，以提升检测精度而不增加延迟。
AI.motivation: 边缘计算中GPU资源常因视频内容变化和流水线过滤导致利用率低下，现有优化方法多聚焦模型或流水线改进，未充分利用碎片化闲置算力。
AI.method: 设计任务特定的图像判别增强模块与模型感知的对抗训练机制，并结合多出口网络结构和资源感知调度器，在保证延迟约束下动态分配闲置资源进行在线增强。
AI.result: 在多个视频分析流水线和数据集上，通过合理分配少量闲置资源使目标检测精度提升7.3-11.3%，且无额外延迟开销。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过智能利用边缘设备碎片化GPU资源进行数据增强，为在不改变模型架构的前提下提升视频分析精度提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yuting Wang,Hangning Zhou,Zhigang Zhang,Chen Feng,Huadong Lin,Chaofei Gao,Yizhi Tang,Zhenting Zhao,Shiyu Zhang,Jie Guo,Xuefeng Wang,Ziyao Xu,Chi Zhang
title: TENET: Transformer Encoding Network for Effective Temporal Flow on Motion Prediction
title_zh: TENET：用于运动预测的有效时间流的变压器编码网络
abstract: This technical report presents an effective method for motion prediction in autonomous driving. We develop a Transformer-based method for input encoding and trajectory prediction. Besides, we propose the Temporal Flow Header to enhance the trajectory encoding. In the end, an efficient K-means ensemble method is used. Using our Transformer network and ensemble method, we win the first place of Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Challenge with the state-of-the-art brier-minFDE score of 1.90.
summary: This technical report presents an effective method for motion prediction in autonomous driving. We develop a Transformer-based method for input encoding and trajectory prediction. Besides, we propose the Temporal Flow Header to enhance the trajectory encoding. In the end, an efficient K-means ensemble method is used. Using our Transformer network and ensemble method, we win the first place of Argoverse 2 Motion Forecasting Challenge with the state-of-the-art brier-minFDE score of 1.90.
abstract_zh: 该技术报告提出了自动驾驶中运动预测的有效方法。我们开发了一种基于 Transformer 的输入编码和轨迹预测方法。此外，我们提出了时间流标头来增强轨迹编码。最后，采用了一种高效的K-means集成方法。使用我们的 Transformer 网络和集成方法，我们以 1.90 的最先进的 brier-minFDE 分数赢得了 Argoverse 2 运动预测挑战赛的第一名。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的运动预测方法TENET，用于自动驾驶场景中的轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理复杂交通场景中的时间依赖性和多智能体交互时存在局限性，需更有效的编码机制提升预测精度。
AI.method: 设计Transformer编码网络处理输入数据，引入时间流头增强轨迹编码，并结合K-means集成方法优化预测结果。
AI.result: 在Argoverse 2运动预测挑战赛中取得第一名，brier-minFDE得分为1.90，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: TENET通过Transformer架构与时间流机制的有效结合，显著提升了运动预测性能，验证了方法在复杂场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Wei-Chang Yeh
title: Novel Recursive Inclusion-Exclusion Technology Based on BAT and MPs for Heterogeneous-Arc Binary-State Network Reliability Problems
title_zh: 基于BAT和MP的新型递归包含排除技术解决异构弧二元状态网络可靠性问题
abstract: Current network applications, such as utility networks (gas, water, electricity, and 4G/5G), the Internet of Things (IoT), social networks, and supply chains, are all based on binary state networks. Reliability is one of the most commonly used tools for evaluating network performance, and the minimal path (MP) is a basic algorithm for calculating reliability. However, almost all existing algorithms assume that all undirected arcs are homogeneous; that is, the probability of an arc from nodes a to b is equal to that from nodes b to a. Therefore, based on MPs, the binary-addition-tree algorithm (BAT), and the inclusion-exclusion technique (IET), a novel recursive inclusion-exclusion technology algorithm known as recursive BAT-based IET (RIE) is proposed to solve the heterogeneous-arc binary-state network reliability problem to overcome the above obstacles in applications. The computational complexity of the proposed RIE is analyzed using an illustrative example. Finally, 11 benchmark problems are used to verify the performance of RIE.
summary: Current network applications, such as utility networks (gas, water, electricity, and 4G/5G), the Internet of Things (IoT), social networks, and supply chains, are all based on binary state networks. Reliability is one of the most commonly used tools for evaluating network performance, and the minimal path (MP) is a basic algorithm for calculating reliability. However, almost all existing algorithms assume that all undirected arcs are homogeneous; that is, the probability of an arc from nodes a to b is equal to that from nodes b to a. Therefore, based on MPs, the binary-addition-tree algorithm (BAT), and the inclusion-exclusion technique (IET), a novel recursive inclusion-exclusion technology algorithm known as recursive BAT-based IET (RIE) is proposed to solve the heterogeneous-arc binary-state network reliability problem to overcome the above obstacles in applications. The computational complexity of the proposed RIE is analyzed using an illustrative example. Finally, 11 benchmark problems are used to verify the performance of RIE.
abstract_zh: 当前的网络应用，例如公用事业网络（天然气、水、电力和4G/5G）、物联网（IoT）、社交网络和供应链，都是基于二元状态网络。可靠性是评估网络性能最常用的工具之一，最小路径（MP）是计算可靠性的基本算法。然而，几乎所有现有算法都假设所有无向弧都是齐次的；即从节点a到b形成弧的概率等于从节点b到a形成弧的概率。因此，基于MP、二叉加法树算法（BAT）和包含排除技术（IET），提出了一种基于递归BAT的IET（RIE）的新型递归包含排除技术算法来解决异构弧二元状态网络可靠性问题，以克服上述应用中的障碍。使用说明性示例分析了所提出的 RIE 的计算复杂性。最后，使用11个基准问题来验证RIE的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于BAT和MPs的递归包含-排除技术（RIE），用于解决异构弧二进制状态网络的可靠性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有算法假设所有弧为同质性，无法准确评估实际网络中异构弧的可靠性，导致应用受限。
AI.method: 结合最小路径（MP）、二进制加法树算法（BAT）与包含-排除技术，设计递归算法RIE以处理异构弧网络可靠性计算。
AI.result: 通过11个基准问题验证，RIE在计算复杂度和准确性上优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: RIE有效解决了异构弧网络可靠性问题，为实际网络评估提供了更精确的工具。

search_text: Novel Recursive Inclusion-Exclusion Technology Based on BAT and MPs for Heterogeneous-Arc Binary-State Network Reliability Problems 基于BAT和MP的新型递归包含排除技术解决异构弧二元状态网络可靠性问题 Current network applications, such as utility networks (gas, water, electricity, and 4G/5G), the Internet of Things (IoT), social networks, and supply chains, are all based on binary state networks. Reliability is one of the most commonly used tools for evaluating network performance, and the minimal path (MP) is a basic algorithm for calculating reliability. However, almost all existing algorithms assume that all undirected arcs are homogeneous; that is, the probability of an arc from nodes a to b is equal to that from nodes b to a. Therefore, based on MPs, the binary-addition-tree algorithm (BAT), and the inclusion-exclusion technique (IET), a novel recursive inclusion-exclusion technology algorithm known as recursive BAT-based IET (RIE) is proposed to solve the heterogeneous-arc binary-state network reliability problem to overcome the above obstacles in applications. The computational complexity of the proposed RIE is analyzed using an illustrative example. Finally, 11 benchmark problems are used to verify the performance of RIE. 当前的网络应用，例如公用事业网络（天然气、水、电力和4G/5G）、物联网（IoT）、社交网络和供应链，都是基于二元状态网络。可靠性是评估网络性能最常用的工具之一，最小路径（MP）是计算可靠性的基本算法。然而，几乎所有现有算法都假设所有无向弧都是齐次的；即从节点a到b形成弧的概率等于从节点b到a形成弧的概率。因此，基于MP、二叉加法树算法（BAT）和包含排除技术（IET），提出了一种基于递归BAT的IET（RIE）的新型递归包含排除技术算法来解决异构弧二元状态网络可靠性问题，以克服上述应用中的障碍。使用说明性示例分析了所提出的 RIE 的计算复杂性。最后，使用11个基准问题来验证RIE的性能。 本文提出一种基于BAT和MPs的递归包含-排除技术（RIE），用于解决异构弧二进制状态网络的可靠性问题。 Wei-Chang Yeh cs.NI,cs.DS

authors_text: Zhongxiang Chang,Abraham P. Punnen,Zhongbao Zhou
title: An adaptive bi-objective optimization algorithm for the satellite image data downlink scheduling problem considering request split
title_zh: 考虑请求分裂的卫星图像数据下行调度问题自适应双目标优化算法
abstract: The satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (SIDSP) is well studied in literature for traditional satellites. With recent developments in satellite technology, SIDSP for modern satellites became more complicated, adding new dimensions of complexities and additional opportunities for the effective use of the satellite. In this paper, we introduce the dynamic two-phase satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (D-SIDSP) which combines two interlinked operations of image data segmentation and image data downlink, in a dynamic way, and thereby offering additional modelling flexibility and renewed capabilities. D-SIDSP is formulated as a bi-objective problem of optimizing the image data transmission rate and the service-balance degree. Harnessing the power of an adaptive large neighborhood search algorithm (ALNS) with a nondominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II), an adaptive bi-objective memetic algorithm, ALNS+NSGA-II, is developed to solve D-SIDSP. Results of extensive computational experiments carried out using benchmark instances are also presented. Our experimental results disclose that the algorithm ALNS+NSGA-II is a viable alternative to solve D-SIDSP more efficiently and demonstrates superior outcomes based on various performance metrics. The paper also offers new benchmark instances for D-SIDSP that can be used in future research works on the topic.
summary: The satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (SIDSP) is well studied in literature for traditional satellites. With recent developments in satellite technology, SIDSP for modern satellites became more complicated, adding new dimensions of complexities and additional opportunities for the effective use of the satellite. In this paper, we introduce the dynamic two-phase satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (D-SIDSP) which combines two interlinked operations of image data segmentation and image data downlink, in a dynamic way, and thereby offering additional modelling flexibility and renewed capabilities. D-SIDSP is formulated as a bi-objective problem of optimizing the image data transmission rate and the service-balance degree. Harnessing the power of an adaptive large neighborhood search algorithm (ALNS) with a nondominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II), an adaptive bi-objective memetic algorithm, ALNS+NSGA-II, is developed to solve D-SIDSP. Results of extensive computational experiments carried out using benchmark instances are also presented. Our experimental results disclose that the algorithm ALNS+NSGA-II is a viable alternative to solve D-SIDSP more efficiently and demonstrates superior outcomes based on various performance metrics. The paper also offers new benchmark instances for D-SIDSP that can be used in future research works on the topic.
abstract_zh: 传统卫星的文献中对卫星图像数据下行链路调度问题（SIDSP）进行了深入研究。随着卫星技术的最新发展，现代卫星的 SIDSP 变得更加复杂，为有效利用卫星增加了新的复杂性和更多机会。在本文中，我们介绍了动态两阶段卫星图像数据下行链路调度问题（D-SIDSP），它以动态方式结合了图像数据分割和图像数据下行链路这两个相互关联的操作，从而提供了额外的建模灵活性和更新的功能。 D-SIDSP被表述为优化图像数据传输速率和服务平衡度的双目标问题。利用自适应大邻域搜索算法 (ALNS) 和非支配排序遗传算法 II (NSGA-II) 的强大功能，开发了一种自适应双目标模因算法 ALNS+NSGA-II 来求解 D-SIDSP。还提供了使用基准实例进行的广泛计算实验的结果。我们的实验结果表明，算法 ALNS+NSGA-II 是更有效地解决 D-SIDSP 的可行替代方案，并根据各种性能指标展示了优异的结果。本文还提供了 D-SIDSP 的新基准实例，可用于该主题的未来研究工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合图像数据分割与下传的动态双目标优化算法，用于解决现代卫星图像数据下传调度问题（D-SIDSP），旨在优化传输速率和服务平衡度。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星图像数据下传调度问题（SIDSP）难以应对现代卫星技术带来的复杂性，需引入动态模型和更灵活的优化方法以提升资源利用效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种自适应混合算法ALNS+NSGA-II，结合自适应大邻域搜索（ALNS）与非支配排序遗传算法II（NSGA-II），解决D-SIDSP的双目标优化问题。
AI.result: 实验表明ALNS+NSGA-II在多个性能指标上优于现有方法，且提供了新的D-SIDSP基准实例以支持未来研究。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合算法能有效解决动态双阶段卫星数据调度问题，为现代卫星资源优化提供了新思路和工具。

authors_text: Rika Antonova,Jingyun Yang,Krishna Murthy Jatavallabhula,Jeannette Bohg
title: Rethinking Optimization with Differentiable Simulation from a Global Perspective
title_zh: 从全局角度重新思考可微仿真的优化
abstract: Differentiable simulation is a promising toolkit for fast gradient-based policy optimization and system identification. However, existing approaches to differentiable simulation have largely tackled scenarios where obtaining smooth gradients has been relatively easy, such as systems with mostly smooth dynamics. In this work, we study the challenges that differentiable simulation presents when it is not feasible to expect that a single descent reaches a global optimum, which is often a problem in contact-rich scenarios. We analyze the optimization landscapes of diverse scenarios that contain both rigid bodies and deformable objects. In dynamic environments with highly deformable objects and fluids, differentiable simulators produce rugged landscapes with nonetheless useful gradients in some parts of the space. We propose a method that combines Bayesian optimization with semi-local 'leaps' to obtain a global search method that can use gradients effectively, while also maintaining robust performance in regions with noisy gradients. We show that our approach outperforms several gradient-based and gradient-free baselines on an extensive set of experiments in simulation, and also validate the method using experiments with a real robot and deformables. Videos and supplementary materials are available at https://tinyurl.com/globdiff
summary: Differentiable simulation is a promising toolkit for fast gradient-based policy optimization and system identification. However, existing approaches to differentiable simulation have largely tackled scenarios where obtaining smooth gradients has been relatively easy, such as systems with mostly smooth dynamics. In this work, we study the challenges that differentiable simulation presents when it is not feasible to expect that a single descent reaches a global optimum, which is often a problem in contact-rich scenarios. We analyze the optimization landscapes of diverse scenarios that contain both rigid bodies and deformable objects. In dynamic environments with highly deformable objects and fluids, differentiable simulators produce rugged landscapes with nonetheless useful gradients in some parts of the space. We propose a method that combines Bayesian optimization with semi-local 'leaps' to obtain a global search method that can use gradients effectively, while also maintaining robust performance in regions with noisy gradients. We show that our approach outperforms several gradient-based and gradient-free baselines on an extensive set of experiments in simulation, and also validate the method using experiments with a real robot and deformables. Videos and supplementary materials are available at https://tinyurl.com/globdiff
abstract_zh: 可微仿真是一种很有前途的工具包，用于基于梯度的快速策略优化和系统识别。然而，现有的可微分模拟方法在很大程度上解决了获得平滑梯度相对容易的场景，例如具有大部分平滑动态的系统。在这项工作中，我们研究了当不可能期望单次下降达到全局最优时可微仿真所带来的挑战，这在接触丰富的场景中通常是一个问题。我们分析了包含刚体和可变形物体的不同场景的优化景观。在具有高度可变形物体和流体的动态环境中，可微分模拟器会产生崎岖的景观，但在空间的某些部分仍具有有用的梯度。我们提出了一种将贝叶斯优化与半局部“跳跃”相结合的方法，以获得可以有效使用梯度的全局搜索方法，同时在具有噪声梯度的区域中保持鲁棒的性能。我们表明，我们的方法在大量模拟实验中优于几种基于梯度和无梯度的基线，并且还使用真实机器人和可变形物体的实验验证了该方法。视频和补充材料可在 https://tinyurl.com/globdiff 获取

AI.tldr: 本文从全局视角重新思考可微分模拟优化问题，提出适用于复杂接触场景和非凸优化景观的新型优化方法。
AI.motivation: 现有可微分模拟方法在处理光滑动力学系统时效果良好，但在涉及复杂接触和可变形物体的非凸优化场景中存在梯度噪声大、难以找到全局最优解的问题。
AI.method: 结合贝叶斯优化与半局部'跳跃'策略，设计全局搜索框架，在梯度可用区域利用梯度信息，同时通过跳跃机制应对梯度噪声区域。
AI.result: 在多个仿真环境和真实机器人实验中，该方法优于多种基于梯度和无梯度的基线方法，验证了其在可变形物体交互任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的混合优化方法为复杂物理模拟中的全局优化提供了新思路，可有效提升机器人与可变形物体交互任务的性能。

search_text: Rethinking Optimization with Differentiable Simulation from a Global Perspective 从全局角度重新思考可微仿真的优化 Differentiable simulation is a promising toolkit for fast gradient-based policy optimization and system identification. However, existing approaches to differentiable simulation have largely tackled scenarios where obtaining smooth gradients has been relatively easy, such as systems with mostly smooth dynamics. In this work, we study the challenges that differentiable simulation presents when it is not feasible to expect that a single descent reaches a global optimum, which is often a problem in contact-rich scenarios. We analyze the optimization landscapes of diverse scenarios that contain both rigid bodies and deformable objects. In dynamic environments with highly deformable objects and fluids, differentiable simulators produce rugged landscapes with nonetheless useful gradients in some parts of the space. We propose a method that combines Bayesian optimization with semi-local 'leaps' to obtain a global search method that can use gradients effectively, while also maintaining robust performance in regions with noisy gradients. We show that our approach outperforms several gradient-based and gradient-free baselines on an extensive set of experiments in simulation, and also validate the method using experiments with a real robot and deformables. Videos and supplementary materials are available at https://tinyurl.com/globdiff 可微仿真是一种很有前途的工具包，用于基于梯度的快速策略优化和系统识别。然而，现有的可微分模拟方法在很大程度上解决了获得平滑梯度相对容易的场景，例如具有大部分平滑动态的系统。在这项工作中，我们研究了当不可能期望单次下降达到全局最优时可微仿真所带来的挑战，这在接触丰富的场景中通常是一个问题。我们分析了包含刚体和可变形物体的不同场景的优化景观。在具有高度可变形物体和流体的动态环境中，可微分模拟器会产生崎岖的景观，但在空间的某些部分仍具有有用的梯度。我们提出了一种将贝叶斯优化与半局部“跳跃”相结合的方法，以获得可以有效使用梯度的全局搜索方法，同时在具有噪声梯度的区域中保持鲁棒的性能。我们表明，我们的方法在大量模拟实验中优于几种基于梯度和无梯度的基线，并且还使用真实机器人和可变形物体的实验验证了该方法。视频和补充材料可在 https://tinyurl.com/globdiff 获取 本文从全局视角重新思考可微分模拟优化问题，提出适用于复杂接触场景和非凸优化景观的新型优化方法。 Rika Antonova,Jingyun Yang,Krishna Murthy Jatavallabhula,Jeannette Bohg stat.ML,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Shuowei Cai,Di Chai,Liu Yang,Junxue Zhang,Yilun Jin,Leye Wang,Kun Guo,Kai Chen
title: Secure Forward Aggregation for Vertical Federated Neural Networks
title_zh: 垂直联合神经网络的安全前向聚合
abstract: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is attracting much attention because it enables cross-silo data cooperation in a privacy-preserving manner. While most research works in VFL focus on linear and tree models, deep models (e.g., neural networks) are not well studied in VFL. In this paper, we focus on SplitNN, a well-known neural network framework in VFL, and identify a trade-off between data security and model performance in SplitNN. Briefly, SplitNN trains the model by exchanging gradients and transformed data. On the one hand, SplitNN suffers from the loss of model performance since multiply parties jointly train the model using transformed data instead of raw data, and a large amount of low-level feature information is discarded. On the other hand, a naive solution of increasing the model performance through aggregating at lower layers in SplitNN (i.e., the data is less transformed and more low-level feature is preserved) makes raw data vulnerable to inference attacks. To mitigate the above trade-off, we propose a new neural network protocol in VFL called Security Forward Aggregation (SFA). It changes the way of aggregating the transformed data and adopts removable masks to protect the raw data. Experiment results show that networks with SFA achieve both data security and high model performance.
summary: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is attracting much attention because it enables cross-silo data cooperation in a privacy-preserving manner. While most research works in VFL focus on linear and tree models, deep models (e.g., neural networks) are not well studied in VFL. In this paper, we focus on SplitNN, a well-known neural network framework in VFL, and identify a trade-off between data security and model performance in SplitNN. Briefly, SplitNN trains the model by exchanging gradients and transformed data. On the one hand, SplitNN suffers from the loss of model performance since multiply parties jointly train the model using transformed data instead of raw data, and a large amount of low-level feature information is discarded. On the other hand, a naive solution of increasing the model performance through aggregating at lower layers in SplitNN (i.e., the data is less transformed and more low-level feature is preserved) makes raw data vulnerable to inference attacks. To mitigate the above trade-off, we propose a new neural network protocol in VFL called Security Forward Aggregation (SFA). It changes the way of aggregating the transformed data and adopts removable masks to protect the raw data. Experiment results show that networks with SFA achieve both data security and high model performance.
abstract_zh: 垂直联邦学习（VFL）因其以保护隐私的方式实现跨孤岛数据合作而备受关注。虽然 VFL 的大多数研究工作都集中在线性和树模型上，但 VFL 中的深层模型（例如神经网络）并未得到很好的研究。在本文中，我们重点关注 VFL 中著名的神经网络框架 SplitNN，并确定 SplitNN 中数据安全性和模型性能之间的权衡。简而言之，SplitNN 通过交换梯度和转换后的数据来训练模型。一方面，SplitNN 遭受模型性能损失，因为多方使用变换后的数据而不是原始数据联合训练模型，并且丢弃大量低级特征信息。另一方面，通过在 SplitNN 中的较低层聚合来提高模型性能的简单解决方案（即，数据转换较少并保留更多低级特征）使原始数据容易受到推理攻击。为了减轻上述权衡，我们在 VFL 中提出了一种新的神经网络协议，称为安全前向聚合（SFA）。它改变了聚合转换数据的方式，并采用可移动掩码来保护原始数据。实验结果表明，具有SFA的网络实现了数据安全和高模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为安全前向聚合（SFA）的新型垂直联邦神经网络协议，以解决SplitNN框架中数据安全与模型性能之间的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有垂直联邦学习（VFL）研究多集中于线性模型，而对深度模型（如神经网络）的研究不足。SplitNN框架在提升模型性能时需牺牲数据安全性，且直接聚合低层数据易导致原始数据泄露风险。
AI.method: 通过改进SplitNN中变换数据的聚合方式，并引入可移除的掩码技术，保护原始数据不被直接暴露，从而在保证模型性能的同时增强数据安全性。
AI.result: 实验表明，采用SFA的神经网络在保持高模型性能的同时，有效抵御了原始数据的推理攻击，实现了数据安全与性能的平衡。
AI.conclusion: SFA协议成功解决了垂直联邦神经网络中数据安全与模型性能的矛盾，为深度模型在VFL场景下的应用提供了新的解决方案。

authors_text: Henry Arguello,Jorge Bacca,Hasindu Kariyawasam,Edwin Vargas,Miguel Marquez,Ramith Hettiarachchi,Hans Garcia,Kithmini Herath,Udith Haputhanthri,Balpreet Singh Ahluwalia,Peter So,Dushan N. Wadduwage,Chamira U. S. Edussooriya
title: Deep Optical Coding Design in Computational Imaging
title_zh: 计算成像中的深度光学编码设计
abstract: Computational optical imaging (COI) systems leverage optical coding elements (CE) in their setups to encode a high-dimensional scene in a single or multiple snapshots and decode it by using computational algorithms. The performance of COI systems highly depends on the design of its main components: the CE pattern and the computational method used to perform a given task. Conventional approaches rely on random patterns or analytical designs to set the distribution of the CE. However, the available data and algorithm capabilities of deep neural networks (DNNs) have opened a new horizon in CE data-driven designs that jointly consider the optical encoder and computational decoder. Specifically, by modeling the COI measurements through a fully differentiable image formation model that considers the physics-based propagation of light and its interaction with the CEs, the parameters that define the CE and the computational decoder can be optimized in an end-to-end (E2E) manner. Moreover, by optimizing just CEs in the same framework, inference tasks can be performed from pure optics. This work surveys the recent advances on CE data-driven design and provides guidelines on how to parametrize different optical elements to include them in the E2E framework. Since the E2E framework can handle different inference applications by changing the loss function and the DNN, we present low-level tasks such as spectral imaging reconstruction or high-level tasks such as pose estimation with privacy preserving enhanced by using optimal task-based optical architectures. Finally, we illustrate classification and 3D object recognition applications performed at the speed of the light using all-optics DNN.
summary: Computational optical imaging (COI) systems leverage optical coding elements (CE) in their setups to encode a high-dimensional scene in a single or multiple snapshots and decode it by using computational algorithms. The performance of COI systems highly depends on the design of its main components: the CE pattern and the computational method used to perform a given task. Conventional approaches rely on random patterns or analytical designs to set the distribution of the CE. However, the available data and algorithm capabilities of deep neural networks (DNNs) have opened a new horizon in CE data-driven designs that jointly consider the optical encoder and computational decoder. Specifically, by modeling the COI measurements through a fully differentiable image formation model that considers the physics-based propagation of light and its interaction with the CEs, the parameters that define the CE and the computational decoder can be optimized in an end-to-end (E2E) manner. Moreover, by optimizing just CEs in the same framework, inference tasks can be performed from pure optics. This work surveys the recent advances on CE data-driven design and provides guidelines on how to parametrize different optical elements to include them in the E2E framework. Since the E2E framework can handle different inference applications by changing the loss function and the DNN, we present low-level tasks such as spectral imaging reconstruction or high-level tasks such as pose estimation with privacy preserving enhanced by using optimal task-based optical architectures. Finally, we illustrate classification and 3D object recognition applications performed at the speed of the light using all-optics DNN.
abstract_zh: 计算光学成像 (COI) 系统在其设置中利用光学编码元件 (CE) 对单个或多个快照中的高维场景进行编码，并使用计算算法对其进行解码。 COI 系统的性能很大程度上取决于其主要组件的设计：CE 模式和用于执行给定任务的计算方法。传统方法依靠随机模式或分析设计来设置 CE 的分布。然而，深度神经网络 (DNN) 的可用数据和算法功能为共同考虑光学编码器和计算解码器的 CE 数据驱动设计开辟了新视野。具体来说，通过完全可微的图像形成模型对 COI 测量进行建模，该模型考虑了基于物理的光传播及其与 CE 的相互作用，可以以端到端 (E2E) 方式优化定义 CE 和计算解码器的参数。此外，通过在同一框架中优化 CE，可以从纯光学执行推理任务。这项工作调查了 CE 数据驱动设计的最新进展，并提供了有关如何参数化不同光学元件以将其纳入 E2E 框架的指南。由于 E2E 框架可以通过改变损失函数和 DNN 来处理不同的推理应用，因此我们提出了低级任务（例如光谱成像重建）或高级任务（例如通过使用基于最佳任务的光学架构增强隐私保护的姿势估计）。最后，我们展示了使用全光学 DNN 以光速执行的分类和 3D 对象识别应用。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了计算成像中基于深度学习的光学编码元件（CE）数据驱动设计方法，并提供了将其纳入端到端框架的参数化指南。
AI.motivation: 传统光学编码设计依赖随机模式或分析方法，难以充分利用数据与算法潜力，而深度神经网络（DNN）为联合优化光学编码器和解码器提供了新途径。
AI.method: 通过构建考虑光物理传播与CE相互作用的全可微分图像形成模型，在端到端框架中联合优化CE参数与计算解码器，同时支持仅优化CE实现纯光学推理。
AI.result: 展示了光谱成像重建、隐私增强姿态估计及全光DNN驱动的分类与3D物体识别等应用，验证了方法在低级到高级任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 端到端框架通过调整损失函数与DNN结构可适配多类任务，未来需进一步探索光学设计与算法的协同优化潜力。

search_text: Deep Optical Coding Design in Computational Imaging 计算成像中的深度光学编码设计 Computational optical imaging (COI) systems leverage optical coding elements (CE) in their setups to encode a high-dimensional scene in a single or multiple snapshots and decode it by using computational algorithms. The performance of COI systems highly depends on the design of its main components: the CE pattern and the computational method used to perform a given task. Conventional approaches rely on random patterns or analytical designs to set the distribution of the CE. However, the available data and algorithm capabilities of deep neural networks (DNNs) have opened a new horizon in CE data-driven designs that jointly consider the optical encoder and computational decoder. Specifically, by modeling the COI measurements through a fully differentiable image formation model that considers the physics-based propagation of light and its interaction with the CEs, the parameters that define the CE and the computational decoder can be optimized in an end-to-end (E2E) manner. Moreover, by optimizing just CEs in the same framework, inference tasks can be performed from pure optics. This work surveys the recent advances on CE data-driven design and provides guidelines on how to parametrize different optical elements to include them in the E2E framework. Since the E2E framework can handle different inference applications by changing the loss function and the DNN, we present low-level tasks such as spectral imaging reconstruction or high-level tasks such as pose estimation with privacy preserving enhanced by using optimal task-based optical architectures. Finally, we illustrate classification and 3D object recognition applications performed at the speed of the light using all-optics DNN. 计算光学成像 (COI) 系统在其设置中利用光学编码元件 (CE) 对单个或多个快照中的高维场景进行编码，并使用计算算法对其进行解码。 COI 系统的性能很大程度上取决于其主要组件的设计：CE 模式和用于执行给定任务的计算方法。传统方法依靠随机模式或分析设计来设置 CE 的分布。然而，深度神经网络 (DNN) 的可用数据和算法功能为共同考虑光学编码器和计算解码器的 CE 数据驱动设计开辟了新视野。具体来说，通过完全可微的图像形成模型对 COI 测量进行建模，该模型考虑了基于物理的光传播及其与 CE 的相互作用，可以以端到端 (E2E) 方式优化定义 CE 和计算解码器的参数。此外，通过在同一框架中优化 CE，可以从纯光学执行推理任务。这项工作调查了 CE 数据驱动设计的最新进展，并提供了有关如何参数化不同光学元件以将其纳入 E2E 框架的指南。由于 E2E 框架可以通过改变损失函数和 DNN 来处理不同的推理应用，因此我们提出了低级任务（例如光谱成像重建）或高级任务（例如通过使用基于最佳任务的光学架构增强隐私保护的姿势估计）。最后，我们展示了使用全光学 DNN 以光速执行的分类和 3D 对象识别应用。 本文综述了计算成像中基于深度学习的光学编码元件（CE）数据驱动设计方法，并提供了将其纳入端到端框架的参数化指南。 Henry Arguello,Jorge Bacca,Hasindu Kariyawasam,Edwin Vargas,Miguel Marquez,Ramith Hettiarachchi,Hans Garcia,Kithmini Herath,Udith Haputhanthri,Balpreet Singh Ahluwalia,Peter So,Dushan N. Wadduwage,Chamira U. S. Edussooriya cs.CV

authors_text: Ragib Ahsan,Zahra Fatemi,David Arbour,Elena Zheleva
title: Non-Parametric Inference of Relational Dependence
title_zh: 关系依赖的非参数推理
abstract: Independence testing plays a central role in statistical and causal inference from observational data. Standard independence tests assume that the data samples are independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) but that assumption is violated in many real-world datasets and applications centered on relational systems. This work examines the problem of estimating independence in data drawn from relational systems by defining sufficient representations for the sets of observations influencing individual instances. Specifically, we define marginal and conditional independence tests for relational data by considering the kernel mean embedding as a flexible aggregation function for relational variables. We propose a consistent, non-parametric, scalable kernel test to operationalize the relational independence test for non-i.i.d. observational data under a set of structural assumptions. We empirically evaluate our proposed method on a variety of synthetic and semi-synthetic networks and demonstrate its effectiveness compared to state-of-the-art kernel-based independence tests.
summary: Independence testing plays a central role in statistical and causal inference from observational data. Standard independence tests assume that the data samples are independent and identically distributed (i.i.d.) but that assumption is violated in many real-world datasets and applications centered on relational systems. This work examines the problem of estimating independence in data drawn from relational systems by defining sufficient representations for the sets of observations influencing individual instances. Specifically, we define marginal and conditional independence tests for relational data by considering the kernel mean embedding as a flexible aggregation function for relational variables. We propose a consistent, non-parametric, scalable kernel test to operationalize the relational independence test for non-i.i.d. observational data under a set of structural assumptions. We empirically evaluate our proposed method on a variety of synthetic and semi-synthetic networks and demonstrate its effectiveness compared to state-of-the-art kernel-based independence tests.
abstract_zh: 独立性检验在观察数据的统计和因果推断中发挥着核心作用。标准独立性测试假设数据样本是独立且同分布（i.i.d.）的，但在许多以关系系统为中心的现实数据集和应用程序中违反了该假设。这项工作通过为影响个体实例的观察集定义足够的表示来研究估计从关系系统中提取的数据的独立性的问题。具体来说，我们通过将核均值嵌入视为关系变量的灵活聚合函数来定义关系数据的边际独立性和条件独立性测试。我们提出了一个一致的、非参数的、可扩展的内核测试来操作非独立同分布的关系独立性测试。一组结构假设下的观测数据。我们在各种合成和半合成网络上对我们提出的方法进行了实证评估，并与最先进的基于内核的独立性测试相比证明了其有效性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种非参数方法用于关系数据中的独立性检验，以处理非独立同分布的观测数据。
AI.motivation: 传统独立性检验假设数据独立同分布，但在关系系统中这一假设常被违反，需新方法处理非i.i.d.数据。
AI.method: 通过核均值嵌入作为聚合函数，定义边缘和条件独立性检验，提出一致的非参数核检验方法。
AI.result: 在多种合成和半合成网络上验证，证明方法有效且优于现有核方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效处理关系数据中的非i.i.d.独立性检验，优于现有方法，适用于实际应用。

authors_text: Nyle Siddiqui,Rushit Dave
title: Mitigating Presentation Attack using DCGAN and Deep CNN
title_zh: 使用 DCGAN 和 Deep CNN 缓解演示攻击
abstract: Biometric based authentication is currently playing an essential role over conventional authentication system; however, the risk of presentation attacks subsequently rising. Our research aims at identifying the areas where presentation attack can be prevented even though adequate biometric image samples of users are limited. Our work focusses on generating photorealistic synthetic images from the real image sets by implementing Deep Convolution Generative Adversarial Net (DCGAN). We have implemented the temporal and spatial augmentation during the fake image generation. Our work detects the presentation attacks on facial and iris images using our deep CNN, inspired by VGGNet [1]. We applied the deep neural net techniques on three different biometric image datasets, namely MICHE I [2], VISOB [3], and UBIPr [4]. The datasets, used in this research, contain images that are captured both in controlled and uncontrolled environment along with different resolutions and sizes. We obtained the best test accuracy of 97% on UBI-Pr [4] Iris datasets. For MICHE-I [2] and VISOB [3] datasets, we achieved the test accuracies of 95% and 96% respectively.
summary: Biometric based authentication is currently playing an essential role over conventional authentication system; however, the risk of presentation attacks subsequently rising. Our research aims at identifying the areas where presentation attack can be prevented even though adequate biometric image samples of users are limited. Our work focusses on generating photorealistic synthetic images from the real image sets by implementing Deep Convolution Generative Adversarial Net (DCGAN). We have implemented the temporal and spatial augmentation during the fake image generation. Our work detects the presentation attacks on facial and iris images using our deep CNN, inspired by VGGNet [1]. We applied the deep neural net techniques on three different biometric image datasets, namely MICHE I [2], VISOB [3], and UBIPr [4]. The datasets, used in this research, contain images that are captured both in controlled and uncontrolled environment along with different resolutions and sizes. We obtained the best test accuracy of 97% on UBI-Pr [4] Iris datasets. For MICHE-I [2] and VISOB [3] datasets, we achieved the test accuracies of 95% and 96% respectively.
abstract_zh: 基于生物识别的身份验证目前比传统身份验证系统发挥着重要作用；然而，演示攻击的风险随后上升。我们的研究旨在确定即使用户的生物特征图像样本有限，也可以防止演示攻击的领域。我们的工作重点是通过实施深度卷积生成对抗网络（DCGAN）从真实图像集中生成逼真的合成图像。我们在假图像生成过程中实现了时间和空间增强。受 VGGNet [1] 的启发，我们的工作使用深度 CNN 检测对面部和虹膜图像的呈现攻击。我们将深度神经网络技术应用于三个不同的生物识别图像数据集，即 MICHE I [2]、VISOB [3] 和 UBIPr [4]。本研究中使用的数据集包含在受控和非受控环境中捕获的图像，以及不同的分辨率和大小。我们在 UBI-Pr [4] Iris 数据集上获得了 97% 的最佳测试准确率。对于 MICHE-I [2] 和 VISOB [3] 数据集，我们分别实现了 95% 和 96% 的测试准确率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用DCGAN生成合成图像并结合深度CNN检测面部和虹膜的呈现攻击，以提升生物特征认证安全性。
AI.motivation: 生物特征认证面临呈现攻击风险上升的问题，且受限于用户生物特征样本不足，需探索有效防御方法。
AI.method: 基于DCGAN生成逼真合成图像，结合时空增强技术，并采用VGGNet启发的深度CNN对MICHE-I、VISOB和UBIPr三类数据集进行攻击检测。
AI.result: 在UBIPr虹膜数据集上达到97%测试准确率，在MICHE-I和VISOB数据集上分别达到95%和96%。
AI.conclusion: 生成对抗网络与深度CNN结合的方法能有效检测多场景下的呈现攻击，验证了模型在不同数据集上的鲁棒性。

authors_text: Akino Watanabe,Sara Ketabi,Khashayar,Namdar,Farzad Khalvati
title: Improving Disease Classification Performance and Explainability of Deep Learning Models in Radiology with Heatmap Generators
title_zh: 使用热图生成器提高放射学深度学习模型的疾病分类性能和可解释性
abstract: As deep learning is widely used in the radiology field, the explainability of such models is increasingly becoming essential to gain clinicians' trust when using the models for diagnosis. In this research, three experiment sets were conducted with a U-Net architecture to improve the classification performance while enhancing the heatmaps corresponding to the model's focus through incorporating heatmap generators during training. All of the experiments used the dataset that contained chest radiographs, associated labels from one of the three conditions ("normal", "congestive heart failure (CHF)", and "pneumonia"), and numerical information regarding a radiologist's eye-gaze coordinates on the images. The paper (A. Karargyris and Moradi, 2021) that introduced this dataset developed a U-Net model, which was treated as the baseline model for this research, to show how the eye-gaze data can be used in multi-modal training for explainability improvement. To compare the classification performances, the 95% confidence intervals (CI) of the area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) were measured. The best method achieved an AUC of 0.913 (CI: 0.860-0.966). The greatest improvements were for the "pneumonia" and "CHF" classes, which the baseline model struggled most to classify, resulting in AUCs of 0.859 (CI: 0.732-0.957) and 0.962 (CI: 0.933-0.989), respectively. The proposed method's decoder was also able to produce probability masks that highlight the determining image parts in model classifications, similarly as the radiologist's eye-gaze data. Hence, this work showed that incorporating heatmap generators and eye-gaze information into training can simultaneously improve disease classification and provide explainable visuals that align well with how the radiologist viewed the chest radiographs when making diagnosis.

abstract_zh: 随着深度学习在放射学领域的广泛应用，此类模型的可解释性对于在使用模型进行诊断时获得临床医生的信任变得越来越重要。在这项研究中，使用 U-Net 架构进行了三个实验集，以提高分类性能，同时通过在训练期间结合热图生成器来增强与模型焦点相对应的热图。所有实验都使用包含胸部X光照片、三种情况之一（“正常”、“充血性心力衰竭（CHF）”和“肺炎”）的相关标签以及有关放射科医生在图像上的眼睛注视坐标的数字信息的数据集。介绍该数据集的论文（A. Karargyris 和 Moradi，2021）开发了一个 U-Net 模型，该模型被视为本研究的基线模型，以展示如何将眼睛注视数据用于多模态训练以提高可解释性。为了比较分类性能，测量了受试者工作特征曲线 (AUC) 下面积的 95% 置信区间 (CI)。最佳方法的 AUC 为 0.913（CI：0.860-0.966）。最大的改进是“肺炎”和“CHF”类别，这是基线模型最难以分类的类别，AUC 分别为 0.859 (CI: 0.732-0.957) 和 0.962 (CI: 0.933-0.989)。所提出的方法的解码器还能够生成概率掩模，突出显示模型分类中的确定图像部分，类似于放射科医生的眼睛注视数据。因此，这项工作表明，将热图生成器和眼睛注视信息纳入训练可以同时改善疾病分类，并提供可解释的视觉效果，与放射科医生在诊断时查看胸部X光片的方式非常一致。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过引入热图生成器和放射科医生的注视数据，提高深度学习模型在放射学中的疾病分类性能和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习在放射学中的广泛应用，模型的可解释性对于获得临床医生的信任至关重要。本文希望通过结合热图生成器和放射科医生的注视数据，提升模型的分类性能和可解释性。
AI.method: 本文使用U-Net架构进行实验，通过在训练过程中引入热图生成器和放射科医生的注视数据，以提高模型的分类性能和热图质量。使用包含胸部X光图像、标签和放射科医生注视坐标的多模态数据集进行训练和评估。
AI.result: 实验表明，最佳方法在AUC指标上达到了0.913（置信区间：0.860-0.966），特别是在肺炎和心力衰竭（CHF）分类任务上取得了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 本文证明了在训练过程中结合热图生成器和放射科医生注视数据，可以同时提高疾病分类的性能并提供与放射科医生诊断时视觉关注区域相符的可解释热图。
