authors_text: Yizhe Zhang,Suraj Mishra,Peixian Liang,Hao Zheng,Danny Z. Chen
title: Usable Region Estimate for Assessing Practical Usability of Medical Image Segmentation Models
title_zh: 用于评估医学图像分割模型实际可用性的可用区域估计
abstract: We aim to quantitatively measure the practical usability of medical image segmentation models: to what extent, how often, and on which samples a model's predictions can be used/trusted. We first propose a measure, Correctness-Confidence Rank Correlation (CCRC), to capture how predictions' confidence estimates correlate with their correctness scores in rank. A model with a high value of CCRC means its prediction confidences reliably suggest which samples' predictions are more likely to be correct. Since CCRC does not capture the actual prediction correctness, it alone is insufficient to indicate whether a prediction model is both accurate and reliable to use in practice. Therefore, we further propose another method, Usable Region Estimate (URE), which simultaneously quantifies predictions' correctness and reliability of confidence assessments in one estimate. URE provides concrete information on to what extent a model's predictions are usable. In addition, the sizes of usable regions (UR) can be utilized to compare models: A model with a larger UR can be taken as a more usable and hence better model. Experiments on six datasets validate that the proposed evaluation methods perform well, providing a concrete and concise measure for the practical usability of medical image segmentation models. Code is made available at https://github.com/yizhezhang2000/ure.
summary: We aim to quantitatively measure the practical usability of medical image segmentation models: to what extent, how often, and on which samples a model's predictions can be used/trusted. We first propose a measure, Correctness-Confidence Rank Correlation (CCRC), to capture how predictions' confidence estimates correlate with their correctness scores in rank. A model with a high value of CCRC means its prediction confidences reliably suggest which samples' predictions are more likely to be correct. Since CCRC does not capture the actual prediction correctness, it alone is insufficient to indicate whether a prediction model is both accurate and reliable to use in practice. Therefore, we further propose another method, Usable Region Estimate (URE), which simultaneously quantifies predictions' correctness and reliability of confidence assessments in one estimate. URE provides concrete information on to what extent a model's predictions are usable. In addition, the sizes of usable regions (UR) can be utilized to compare models: A model with a larger UR can be taken as a more usable and hence better model. Experiments on six datasets validate that the proposed evaluation methods perform well, providing a concrete and concise measure for the practical usability of medical image segmentation models. Code is made available at https://github.com/yizhezhang2000/ure.
abstract_zh: 我们的目标是定量测量医学图像分割模型的实际可用性：模型的预测可以使用/可信的程度、频率以及样本。我们首先提出了一种测量方法，即正确性-置信等级相关性（CCRC），以捕获预测的置信估计与其等级正确性得分之间的关​​联。 CCRC 值较高的模型意味着其预测置信度可靠地表明哪些样本的预测更有可能是正确的。由于 CCRC 无法捕获实际的预测正确性，因此仅凭它不足以表明预测模型在实践中使用是否准确且可靠。因此，我们进一步提出了另一种方法，可用区域估计（URE），它在一个估计中同时量化预测的正确性和置信度评估的可靠性。 URE 提供了有关模型预测的可用程度的具体信息。此外，可用区域（UR）的大小可以用来比较模型：具有较大UR的模型可以被视为更可用，因此更好的模型。在六个数据集上的实验验证了所提出的评估方法表现良好，为医学图像分割模型的实际可用性提供了具体而简洁的衡量标准。代码可在 https://github.com/yizezhang2000/ure 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种方法（CCRC和URE）以量化评估医学图像分割模型的实际可用性，衡量模型预测的准确性与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有指标无法全面评估医学图像分割模型在实际应用中的可用性，需同时考虑预测正确性与置信度可靠性。
AI.method: 提出Correctness-Confidence Rank Correlation（CCRC）衡量置信度与正确性的相关性，并进一步提出Usable Region Estimate（URE）综合量化预测正确性与置信度可靠性。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上的实验验证了所提方法的有效性，URE能提供具体可用性指标并支持模型比较。
AI.conclusion: CCRC与URE为医学图像分割模型的实际可用性评估提供了有效工具，有助于选择更可靠且实用的模型。

authors_text: Yiming Huo
title: Space Broadband Access: The Race Has Just Begun
title_zh: 太空宽带接入：竞赛才刚刚开始
comment: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Accepted by IEEE Magazine (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=2)
comments: 8 pages, 3 figures, 2 tables. Accepted by IEEE Magazine (https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=2)
abstract: Recent years have witnessed an exponential growth of the commercial space industry, including rocket launch, satellite network deployment, private space travel, and even extraterrestrial colonization. Several trends are predicted in this unprecedented transition to an era of space-enabled broadband access.
summary: Recent years have witnessed an exponential growth of the commercial space industry, including rocket launch, satellite network deployment, private space travel, and even extraterrestrial colonization. Several trends are predicted in this unprecedented transition to an era of space-enabled broadband access.
abstract_zh: 近年来，商业航天产业呈指数级增长，包括火箭发射、卫星网络部署、私人太空旅行，甚至外星殖民。在向太空宽带接入时代的前所未有的转变中，预计会出现一些趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了商业航天产业快速发展背景下，空间宽带接入技术的现状与未来趋势。
AI.motivation: 随着火箭发射、卫星网络部署等技术进步，全球对空间宽带接入的需求激增，推动相关领域竞争加剧。
AI.method: 通过分析商业航天产业增长数据、卫星网络部署案例及技术演进路径，预测空间宽带接入的发展趋势。
AI.result: 预测未来将出现更多低轨卫星星座、天地一体化网络架构及新型应用场景，如太空旅游与深空探测的通信需求。
AI.conclusion: 空间宽带接入的竞争才刚刚开始，技术突破与政策支持将是决定行业格局的关键因素。

Several trends are predicted in this unprecedented transition to an era of space-enabled broadband access. 近年来，商业航天产业呈指数级增长，包括火箭发射、卫星网络部署、私人太空旅行，甚至外星殖民。在向太空宽带接入时代的前所未有的转变中，预计会出现一些趋势。 本文探讨了商业航天产业快速发展背景下，空间宽带接入技术的现状与未来趋势。 Yiming Huo cs.NI,cs.ET,eess.SP,eess.SY

authors_text: Haoran Yang,Hongxu Chen,Sixiao Zhang,Xiangguo Sun,Qian Li,Xiangyu Zhao,Guandong Xu
title: Generating Counterfactual Hard Negative Samples for Graph Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 为图对比学习生成反事实硬负样本
abstract: Graph contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful tool for unsupervised graph representation learning. The key to the success of graph contrastive learning is to acquire high-quality positive and negative samples as contrasting pairs for the purpose of learning underlying structural semantics of the input graph. Recent works usually sample negative samples from the same training batch with the positive samples, or from an external irrelevant graph. However, a significant limitation lies in such strategies, which is the unavoidable problem of sampling false negative samples. In this paper, we propose a novel method to utilize \textbf{C}ounterfactual mechanism to generate artificial hard negative samples for \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}ontrastive learning, namely \textbf{CGC}, which has a different perspective compared to those sampling-based strategies. We utilize counterfactual mechanism to produce hard negative samples, which ensures that the generated samples are similar to, but have labels that different from the positive sample. The proposed method achieves satisfying results on several datasets compared to some traditional unsupervised graph learning methods and some SOTA graph contrastive learning methods. We also conduct some supplementary experiments to give an extensive illustration of the proposed method, including the performances of CGC with different hard negative samples and evaluations for hard negative samples generated with different similarity measurements.
summary: Graph contrastive learning has emerged as a powerful tool for unsupervised graph representation learning. The key to the success of graph contrastive learning is to acquire high-quality positive and negative samples as contrasting pairs for the purpose of learning underlying structural semantics of the input graph. Recent works usually sample negative samples from the same training batch with the positive samples, or from an external irrelevant graph. However, a significant limitation lies in such strategies, which is the unavoidable problem of sampling false negative samples. In this paper, we propose a novel method to utilize \textbf{C}ounterfactual mechanism to generate artificial hard negative samples for \textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}ontrastive learning, namely \textbf{CGC}, which has a different perspective compared to those sampling-based strategies. We utilize counterfactual mechanism to produce hard negative samples, which ensures that the generated samples are similar to, but have labels that different from the positive sample. The proposed method achieves satisfying results on several datasets compared to some traditional unsupervised graph learning methods and some SOTA graph contrastive learning methods. We also conduct some supplementary experiments to give an extensive illustration of the proposed method, including the performances of CGC with different hard negative samples and evaluations for hard negative samples generated with different similarity measurements.
abstract_zh: 图对比学习已成为无监督图表示学习的强大工具。图对比学习成功的关键是获取高质量的正负样本作为对比对，以学习输入图的底层结构语义。最近的工作通常从与正样本相同的训练批次中采样负样本，或者从外部不相关的图中采样。然而，这种策略存在一个显着的局限性，那就是不可避免的假阴性样本采样问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种利用\textbf{C}反事实机制为\textbf{G}raph \textbf{C}对比学习生成人工硬负样本的新方法，即\textbf{CGC}，与基于采样的策略相比，它具有不同的视角。我们利用反事实机制来生成硬负样本，这确保生成的样本与正样本相似，但具有不同的标签。与一些传统的无监督图学习方法和一些SOTA图对比学习方法相比，该方法在多个数据集上取得了令人满意的结果。我们还进行了一些补充实验来广泛说明所提出的方法，包括使用不同硬负样本的 CGC 性能以及对使用不同相似性测量生成的硬负样本的评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于反事实机制生成硬负样本的方法CGC，用于改进图对比学习中的负样本质量。
AI.motivation: 现有图对比学习方法在负样本采样时存在生成伪负样本的问题，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 通过反事实机制生成与正样本结构相似但标签不同的硬负样本，替代传统采样策略。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于传统无监督图学习方法及当前SOTA图对比学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 反事实生成的硬负样本能有效提升图对比学习的表示能力，为负样本生成提供新视角。

authors_text: Sunyi Zheng,Jingxiong Li,Zhongyi Shui,Chenglu Zhu,Yunlong Zhang,Pingyi Chen,Lin Yang
title: ChrSNet: Chromosome Straightening using Self-attention Guided Networks
title_zh: ChrSNet：使用自注意力引导网络进行染色体矫直
abstract: Karyotyping is an important procedure to assess the possible existence of chromosomal abnormalities. However, because of the non-rigid nature, chromosomes are usually heavily curved in microscopic images and such deformed shapes hinder the chromosome analysis for cytogeneticists. In this paper, we present a self-attention guided framework to erase the curvature of chromosomes. The proposed framework extracts spatial information and local textures to preserve banding patterns in a regression module. With complementary information from the bent chromosome, a refinement module is designed to further improve fine details. In addition, we propose two dedicated geometric constraints to maintain the length and restore the distortion of chromosomes. To train our framework, we create a synthetic dataset where curved chromosomes are generated from the real-world straight chromosomes by grid-deformation. Quantitative and qualitative experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data. Experimental results show that our proposed method can effectively straighten bent chromosomes while keeping banding details and length.
summary: Karyotyping is an important procedure to assess the possible existence of chromosomal abnormalities. However, because of the non-rigid nature, chromosomes are usually heavily curved in microscopic images and such deformed shapes hinder the chromosome analysis for cytogeneticists. In this paper, we present a self-attention guided framework to erase the curvature of chromosomes. The proposed framework extracts spatial information and local textures to preserve banding patterns in a regression module. With complementary information from the bent chromosome, a refinement module is designed to further improve fine details. In addition, we propose two dedicated geometric constraints to maintain the length and restore the distortion of chromosomes. To train our framework, we create a synthetic dataset where curved chromosomes are generated from the real-world straight chromosomes by grid-deformation. Quantitative and qualitative experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data. Experimental results show that our proposed method can effectively straighten bent chromosomes while keeping banding details and length.
abstract_zh: 核型分析是评估是否存在染色体异常的重要程序。然而，由于染色体的非刚性性质，在显微镜图像中通常会严重弯曲，这种变形的形状阻碍了细胞遗传学家的染色体分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种自注意力引导框架来消除染色体的曲率。所提出的框架提取空间信息和局部纹理以在回归模块中保留带状图案。利用来自弯曲染色体的补充信息，设计了细化模块以进一步改善精细细节。此外，我们提出了两个专用的几何约束来保持长度并恢复染色体的扭曲。为了训练我们的框架，我们创建了一个合成数据集，其中通过网格变形从现实世界的直染色体生成弯曲染色体。对合成数据和真实数据进行定量和定性实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以有效地拉直弯曲的染色体，同时保持条带细节和长度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自注意力引导网络的染色体直化方法ChrSNet，用于解决显微图像中染色体弯曲形态影响分析的问题。
AI.motivation: 染色体在显微图像中常因非刚性形变而弯曲，这种变形会阻碍细胞遗传学家的分析，需开发有效方法消除曲率同时保留染色带特征。
AI.method: 框架包含空间信息提取模块、局部纹理保留回归模块和细节优化模块，结合长度保持与形变恢复的几何约束，并通过网格变形生成合成数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 在合成与真实数据集上实验表明，该方法能有效直化弯曲染色体，同时保持染色带细节和长度，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: ChrSNet通过自注意力机制与几何约束有效解决了染色体直化问题，为染色体分析提供了新工具。

To train our framework, we create a synthetic dataset where curved chromosomes are generated from the real-world straight chromosomes by grid-deformation. Quantitative and qualitative experiments are conducted on synthetic and real-world data. Experimental results show that our proposed method can effectively straighten bent chromosomes while keeping banding details and length. 核型分析是评估是否存在染色体异常的重要程序。然而，由于染色体的非刚性性质，在显微镜图像中通常会严重弯曲，这种变形的形状阻碍了细胞遗传学家的染色体分析。在本文中，我们提出了一种自注意力引导框架来消除染色体的曲率。所提出的框架提取空间信息和局部纹理以在回归模块中保留带状图案。利用来自弯曲染色体的补充信息，设计了细化模块以进一步改善精细细节。此外，我们提出了两个专用的几何约束来保持长度并恢复染色体的扭曲。为了训练我们的框架，我们创建了一个合成数据集，其中通过网格变形从现实世界的直染色体生成弯曲染色体。对合成数据和真实数据进行定量和定性实验。实验结果表明，我们提出的方法可以有效地拉直弯曲的染色体，同时保持条带细节和长度。 本文提出一种基于自注意力引导网络的染色体直化方法ChrSNet，用于解决显微图像中染色体弯曲形态影响分析的问题。 Sunyi Zheng,Jingxiong Li,Zhongyi Shui,Chenglu Zhu,Yunlong Zhang,Pingyi Chen,Lin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Bohui Zhang,Filip Ilievski,Pedro Szekely
title: Enriching Wikidata with Linked Open Data
title_zh: 用链接的开放数据丰富维基数据
abstract: Large public knowledge graphs, like Wikidata, contain billions of statements about tens of millions of entities, thus inspiring various use cases to exploit such knowledge graphs. However, practice shows that much of the relevant information that fits users' needs is still missing in Wikidata, while current linked open data (LOD) tools are not suitable to enrich large graphs like Wikidata. In this paper, we investigate the potential of enriching Wikidata with structured data sources from the LOD cloud. We present a novel workflow that includes gap detection, source selection, schema alignment, and semantic validation. We evaluate our enrichment method with two complementary LOD sources: a noisy source with broad coverage, DBpedia, and a manually curated source with a narrow focus on the art domain, Getty. Our experiments show that our workflow can enrich Wikidata with millions of novel statements from external LOD sources with high quality. Property alignment and data quality are key challenges, whereas entity alignment and source selection are well-supported by existing Wikidata mechanisms. We make our code and data available to support future work.
summary: Large public knowledge graphs, like Wikidata, contain billions of statements about tens of millions of entities, thus inspiring various use cases to exploit such knowledge graphs. However, practice shows that much of the relevant information that fits users' needs is still missing in Wikidata, while current linked open data (LOD) tools are not suitable to enrich large graphs like Wikidata. In this paper, we investigate the potential of enriching Wikidata with structured data sources from the LOD cloud. We present a novel workflow that includes gap detection, source selection, schema alignment, and semantic validation. We evaluate our enrichment method with two complementary LOD sources: a noisy source with broad coverage, DBpedia, and a manually curated source with a narrow focus on the art domain, Getty. Our experiments show that our workflow can enrich Wikidata with millions of novel statements from external LOD sources with high quality. Property alignment and data quality are key challenges, whereas entity alignment and source selection are well-supported by existing Wikidata mechanisms. We make our code and data available to support future work.
abstract_zh: 大型公共知识图谱（例如维基数据）包含有关数千万个实体的数十亿条语句，从而激发了各种用例来利用此类知识图谱。然而实践表明，维基数据中仍然缺少许多符合用户需求的相关信息，而当前的链接开放数据（LOD）工具不适合丰富维基数据这样的大型图。在本文中，我们研究了利用 LOD 云中的结构化数据源丰富维基数据的潜力。我们提出了一种新颖的工作流程，包括间隙检测、源选择、模式对齐和语义验证。我们使用两个互补的 LOD 源来评估我们的富集方法：覆盖范围广泛的噪声源 DBpedia，以及专注于艺术领域的手动策划源 Getty。我们的实验表明，我们的工作流程可以通过来自外部 LOD 源的数百万条高质量的新颖语句来丰富维基数据。属性对齐和数据质量是关键挑战，而实体对齐和源选择得到现有维基数据机制的良好支持。我们提供代码和数据以支持未来的工作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何利用链接开放数据（LOD）丰富Wikidata知识图谱，提出了一种包含缺口检测、源选择、模式对齐和语义验证的新型工作流程。
AI.motivation: Wikidata等大型知识图谱存在信息缺失问题，现有LOD工具难以有效扩展此类大规模图谱，需探索新的数据丰富方法。
AI.method: 设计包含四步骤的工作流程：识别数据缺口、选择LOD数据源、进行模式对齐以及执行语义验证，并采用DBpedia和Getty数据源进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法可从外部LOD源向Wikidata添加数百万条高质量新陈述，但属性对齐和数据质量是主要挑战，而实体对齐和源选择可依赖现有机制。
AI.conclusion: 提出的流程能有效丰富Wikidata，但需进一步解决属性对齐与数据质量问题，研究代码和数据已开源以支持后续工作。

authors_text: Zhi Lin,Junhao Lin,Lei Zhu,Huazhu Fu,Jing Qin,Liansheng Wang
title: A New Dataset and A Baseline Model for Breast Lesion Detection in Ultrasound Videos
title_zh: 超声视频中乳腺病变检测的新数据集和基线模型
abstract: Breast lesion detection in ultrasound is critical for breast cancer diagnosis. Existing methods mainly rely on individual 2D ultrasound images or combine unlabeled video and labeled 2D images to train models for breast lesion detection. In this paper, we first collect and annotate an ultrasound video dataset (188 videos) for breast lesion detection. Moreover, we propose a clip-level and video-level feature aggregated network (CVA-Net) for addressing breast lesion detection in ultrasound videos by aggregating video-level lesion classification features and clip-level temporal features. The clip-level temporal features encode local temporal information of ordered video frames and global temporal information of shuffled video frames. In our CVA-Net, an inter-video fusion module is devised to fuse local features from original video frames and global features from shuffled video frames, and an intra-video fusion module is devised to learn the temporal information among adjacent video frames. Moreover, we learn video-level features to classify the breast lesions of the original video as benign or malignant lesions to further enhance the final breast lesion detection performance in ultrasound videos. Experimental results on our annotated dataset demonstrate that our CVA-Net clearly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The corresponding code and dataset are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jhl-Det/CVA-Net}.
summary: Breast lesion detection in ultrasound is critical for breast cancer diagnosis. Existing methods mainly rely on individual 2D ultrasound images or combine unlabeled video and labeled 2D images to train models for breast lesion detection. In this paper, we first collect and annotate an ultrasound video dataset (188 videos) for breast lesion detection. Moreover, we propose a clip-level and video-level feature aggregated network (CVA-Net) for addressing breast lesion detection in ultrasound videos by aggregating video-level lesion classification features and clip-level temporal features. The clip-level temporal features encode local temporal information of ordered video frames and global temporal information of shuffled video frames. In our CVA-Net, an inter-video fusion module is devised to fuse local features from original video frames and global features from shuffled video frames, and an intra-video fusion module is devised to learn the temporal information among adjacent video frames. Moreover, we learn video-level features to classify the breast lesions of the original video as benign or malignant lesions to further enhance the final breast lesion detection performance in ultrasound videos. Experimental results on our annotated dataset demonstrate that our CVA-Net clearly outperforms state-of-the-art methods. The corresponding code and dataset are publicly available at \url{https://github.com/jhl-Det/CVA-Net}.
abstract_zh: 超声乳腺病变检测对于乳腺癌诊断至关重要。现有的方法主要依靠单独的2D超声图像或结合未标记的视频和标记的2D图像来训练乳腺病变检测模型。在本文中，我们首先收集并注释用于乳腺病变检测的超声视频数据集（188 个视频）。此外，我们提出了一种剪辑级和视频级特征聚合网络（CVA-Net），用于通过聚合视频级病变分类特征和剪辑级时间特征来解决超声视频中的乳腺病变检测问题。剪辑级时间特征对有序视频帧的局部时间信息和打乱视频帧的全局时间信息进行编码。在我们的 CVA-Net 中，设计了一个视频间融合模块来融合原始视频帧的局部特征和混洗视频帧的全局特征，并且设计了一个视频内融合模块来学习相邻视频帧之间的时间信息。此外，我们学习视频级特征，将原始视频的乳腺病变分类为良性或恶性病变，以进一步增强超声视频中最终乳腺病变的检测性能。我们带注释的数据集的实验结果表明，我们的 CVA-Net 明显优于最先进的方法。相应的代码和数据集可在 \url{https://github.com/jhl-Det/CVA-Net} 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个新的超声视频数据集和一种基线模型CVA-Net，用于乳腺病变检测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖单张2D超声图像或结合未标注视频与标注图像，未能充分利用视频的时序信息。
AI.method: 构建包含188个视频的标注数据集，设计CVA-Net网络，通过剪辑级时序特征与视频级特征聚合，结合跨视频融合模块和视频内时序学习模块进行检测。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上实验表明，CVA-Net显著优于现有最先进方法，代码和数据集已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为乳腺病变检测提供了新的视频数据基准和有效模型，推动了超声视频分析的发展。

authors_text: Pei-Yong Wang,Muhammad Usman,Udaya Parampalli,Lloyd C. L. Hollenberg,Casey R. Myers
title: Automated Quantum Circuit Design with Nested Monte Carlo Tree Search
title_zh: 具有嵌套蒙特卡罗树搜索的自动化量子电路设计
abstract: Quantum algorithms based on variational approaches are one of the most promising methods to construct quantum solutions and have found a myriad of applications in the last few years. Despite the adaptability and simplicity, their scalability and the selection of suitable ansätzs remain key challenges. In this work, we report an algorithmic framework based on nested Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) coupled with the combinatorial multi-armed bandit (CMAB) model for the automated design of quantum circuits. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrated our algorithm applied to various kinds of problems, including the ground energy problem in quantum chemistry, quantum optimisation on a graph, solving systems of linear equations, and finding encoding circuit for quantum error detection codes. Compared to the existing approaches, the results indicate that our circuit design algorithm can explore larger search spaces and optimise quantum circuits for larger systems, showing both versatility and scalability.
summary: Quantum algorithms based on variational approaches are one of the most promising methods to construct quantum solutions and have found a myriad of applications in the last few years. Despite the adaptability and simplicity, their scalability and the selection of suitable ansätzs remain key challenges. In this work, we report an algorithmic framework based on nested Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) coupled with the combinatorial multi-armed bandit (CMAB) model for the automated design of quantum circuits. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrated our algorithm applied to various kinds of problems, including the ground energy problem in quantum chemistry, quantum optimisation on a graph, solving systems of linear equations, and finding encoding circuit for quantum error detection codes. Compared to the existing approaches, the results indicate that our circuit design algorithm can explore larger search spaces and optimise quantum circuits for larger systems, showing both versatility and scalability.
abstract_zh: 基于变分方法的量子算法是构建量子解决方案最有前途的方法之一，并且在过去几年中已经找到了无数的应用。尽管具有适应性和简单性，但它们的可扩展性和选择合适的 ansätzs 仍然是关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们报告了一种基于嵌套蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）与组合多臂老虎机（CMAB）模型相结合的算法框架，用于量子电路的自动化设计。通过数值实验，我们演示了我们的算法适用于各种问题，包括量子化学中的地面能量问题、图上的量子优化、求解线性方程组以及寻找量子错误检测码的编码电路。与现有方法相比，结果表明我们的电路设计算法可以探索更大的搜索空间并优化更大系统的量子电路，显示出多功能性和可扩展性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合嵌套蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与组合多臂老虎机（CMAB）模型的算法框架，用于自动化设计量子电路。
AI.motivation: 变分量子算法虽具适应性，但其可扩展性与合适量子线路选择（ansatz）仍面临挑战，亟需高效自动化设计方法。
AI.method: 基于嵌套蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与组合多臂老虎机（CMAB）模型，构建量子电路自动化设计框架，通过多任务实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 算法在量子化学基态计算、图优化、线性方程求解及量子纠错编码等任务中表现优异，能探索更大搜索空间并优化更大规模系统。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在量子电路设计中展现多功能性与可扩展性，为复杂量子问题的自动化解决方案提供了新思路。

search_text: Automated Quantum Circuit Design with Nested Monte Carlo Tree Search 具有嵌套蒙特卡罗树搜索的自动化量子电路设计 Quantum algorithms based on variational approaches are one of the most promising methods to construct quantum solutions and have found a myriad of applications in the last few years. Despite the adaptability and simplicity, their scalability and the selection of suitable ansätzs remain key challenges. In this work, we report an algorithmic framework based on nested Monte-Carlo Tree Search (MCTS) coupled with the combinatorial multi-armed bandit (CMAB) model for the automated design of quantum circuits. Through numerical experiments, we demonstrated our algorithm applied to various kinds of problems, including the ground energy problem in quantum chemistry, quantum optimisation on a graph, solving systems of linear equations, and finding encoding circuit for quantum error detection codes. Compared to the existing approaches, the results indicate that our circuit design algorithm can explore larger search spaces and optimise quantum circuits for larger systems, showing both versatility and scalability. 基于变分方法的量子算法是构建量子解决方案最有前途的方法之一，并且在过去几年中已经找到了无数的应用。尽管具有适应性和简单性，但它们的可扩展性和选择合适的 ansätzs 仍然是关键挑战。在这项工作中，我们报告了一种基于嵌套蒙特卡罗树搜索（MCTS）与组合多臂老虎机（CMAB）模型相结合的算法框架，用于量子电路的自动化设计。通过数值实验，我们演示了我们的算法适用于各种问题，包括量子化学中的地面能量问题、图上的量子优化、求解线性方程组以及寻找量子错误检测码的编码电路。与现有方法相比，结果表明我们的电路设计算法可以探索更大的搜索空间并优化更大系统的量子电路，显示出多功能性和可扩展性。 本文提出一种结合嵌套蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）与组合多臂老虎机（CMAB）模型的算法框架，用于自动化设计量子电路。 Pei-Yong Wang,Muhammad Usman,Udaya Parampalli,Lloyd C. L. Hollenberg,Casey R. Myers quant-ph,cs.ET,cs.LG

authors_text: Alex Tong Lin,Stanley J. Osher
title: Multi-Agent Shape Control with Optimal Transport
title_zh: 具有最佳传输的多智能体形状控制
comment: Fixed expressions for g_shape and L_shape in section 4.1, 4.2, 5.2, and 5.3
comments: Fixed expressions for g_shape and L_shape in section 4.1, 4.2, 5.2, and 5.3
abstract: We introduce a method called MASCOT (Multi-Agent Shape Control with Optimal Transport) to compute optimal control solutions of agents with shape/formation/density constraints. For example, we might want to apply shape constraints on the agents -- perhaps we desire the agents to hold a particular shape along the path, or we want agents to spread out in order to minimize collisions. We might also want a proportion of agents to move to one destination, while the other agents move to another, and to do this in the optimal way, i.e. the source-destination assignments should be optimal. In order to achieve this, we utilize the Earth Mover's Distance from Optimal Transport to distribute the agents into their proper positions so that certain shapes can be satisfied. This cost is both introduced in the terminal cost and in the running cost of the optimal control problem.
summary: We introduce a method called MASCOT (Multi-Agent Shape Control with Optimal Transport) to compute optimal control solutions of agents with shape/formation/density constraints. For example, we might want to apply shape constraints on the agents -- perhaps we desire the agents to hold a particular shape along the path, or we want agents to spread out in order to minimize collisions. We might also want a proportion of agents to move to one destination, while the other agents move to another, and to do this in the optimal way, i.e. the source-destination assignments should be optimal. In order to achieve this, we utilize the Earth Mover's Distance from Optimal Transport to distribute the agents into their proper positions so that certain shapes can be satisfied. This cost is both introduced in the terminal cost and in the running cost of the optimal control problem.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了一种称为 MASCOT（具有最佳传输的多智能体形状控制）的方法来计算具有形状/编队/密度约束的智能体的最优控制解决方案。例如，我们可能希望对代理应用形状约束 - 也许我们希望代理沿路径保持特定形状，或者我们希望代理分散以尽量减少碰撞。我们可能还希望一部分智能体移动到一个目的地，而其他智能体移动到另一个目的地，并以最佳方式做到这一点，即源-目的地分配应该是最佳的。为了实现这一目标，我们利用推土机与最佳运输的距离将代理分配到适当的位置，以便满足某些形状。该成本既被引入到最优控制问题的终端成本中，也被引入到运行成本中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MASCOT的方法，用于在多智能体系统中实现形状/编队/密度约束下的最优控制。
AI.motivation: 需要对多智能体进行形状约束（如保持特定编队）或密度控制（如分散以减少碰撞），同时要求源-目的地分配最优。
AI.method: 利用最优传输中的地球移动距离（EMD）将智能体分配到目标位置，该成本被引入终端成本和运行成本中。
AI.result: 成功实现了满足形状约束的多智能体最优控制，并优化了源-目的地分配。
AI.conclusion: MASCOT通过结合最优传输理论，有效解决了多智能体形状控制与密度约束问题。

authors_text: Xinshao Wang,Yang Hua,Elyor Kodirov,Sankha Subhra Mukherjee,David A. Clifton,Neil M. Robertson
title: ProSelfLC: Progressive Self Label Correction Towards A Low-Temperature Entropy State
title_zh: ProSelfLC：针对低温熵状态的渐进式自标签校正
comment: To ease the reading, a summary of changes is put in the beginning. Our source code is available at https://github.com/XinshaoAmosWang/ProSelfLC-AT
comments: To ease the reading, a summary of changes is put in the beginning. Our source code is available at https://github.com/XinshaoAmosWang/ProSelfLC-AT
abstract: There is a family of label modification approaches including self and non-self label correction (LC), and output regularisation. They are widely used for training robust deep neural networks (DNNs), but have not been mathematically and thoroughly analysed together. We study them and discover three key issues: (1) We are more interested in adopting Self LC as it leverages its own knowledge and requires no auxiliary models. However, it is unclear how to adaptively trust a learner as the training proceeds. (2) Some methods penalise while the others reward low-entropy (i.e., high-confidence) predictions, prompting us to ask which one is better. (3) Using the standard training setting, a learned model becomes less confident when severe noise exists. Self LC using high-entropy knowledge would generate high-entropy targets. To resolve the issue (1), inspired by a well-accepted finding, i.e., deep neural networks learn meaningful patterns before fitting noise, we propose a novel end-to-end method named ProSelfLC, which is designed according to the learning time and prediction entropy. Concretely, for any data point, we progressively and adaptively trust its predicted probability distribution versus its annotated one if a network has been trained for a relatively long time and the prediction is of low entropy. For the issue (2), the effectiveness of ProSelfLC defends entropy minimisation. By ProSelfLC, we empirically prove that it is more effective to redefine a semantic low-entropy state and optimise the learner toward it. To address the issue (3), we decrease the entropy of self knowledge using a low temperature before exploiting it to correct labels, so that the revised labels redefine low-entropy target probability distributions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ProSelfLC through extensive experiments in both clean and noisy settings, and on both image and protein datasets.
summary: There is a family of label modification approaches including self and non-self label correction (LC), and output regularisation. They are widely used for training robust deep neural networks (DNNs), but have not been mathematically and thoroughly analysed together. We study them and discover three key issues: (1) We are more interested in adopting Self LC as it leverages its own knowledge and requires no auxiliary models. However, it is unclear how to adaptively trust a learner as the training proceeds. (2) Some methods penalise while the others reward low-entropy (i.e., high-confidence) predictions, prompting us to ask which one is better. (3) Using the standard training setting, a learned model becomes less confident when severe noise exists. Self LC using high-entropy knowledge would generate high-entropy targets. To resolve the issue (1), inspired by a well-accepted finding, i.e., deep neural networks learn meaningful patterns before fitting noise, we propose a novel end-to-end method named ProSelfLC, which is designed according to the learning time and prediction entropy. Concretely, for any data point, we progressively and adaptively trust its predicted probability distribution versus its annotated one if a network has been trained for a relatively long time and the prediction is of low entropy. For the issue (2), the effectiveness of ProSelfLC defends entropy minimisation. By ProSelfLC, we empirically prove that it is more effective to redefine a semantic low-entropy state and optimise the learner toward it. To address the issue (3), we decrease the entropy of self knowledge using a low temperature before exploiting it to correct labels, so that the revised labels redefine low-entropy target probability distributions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ProSelfLC through extensive experiments in both clean and noisy settings, and on both image and protein datasets.
abstract_zh: 有一系列标签修改方法，包括自标签修正和非自标签修正 (LC) 以及输出正则化。它们广泛用于训练强大的深度神经网络 (DNN)，但尚未一起进行数学和彻底的分析。我们研究它们并发现三个关键问题：（1）我们对采用自液相色谱更感兴趣，因为它利用自己的知识并且不需要辅助模型。然而，目前尚不清楚如何随着训练的进行而适应性地信任学习者。 （2）一些方法会惩罚低熵（即高置信度）预测，而另一些方法会奖励低熵（即高置信度）预测，这促使我们问哪一种更好。 (3) 使用标准训练设置，当存在严重噪声时，学习模型的置信度会降低。使用高熵知识的自液相色谱将生成高熵目标。为了解决问题（1），受到一个广为接受的发现的启发，即深度神经网络在拟合噪声之前学习有意义的模式，我们提出了一种名为 ProSelfLC 的新颖的端到端方法，该方法是根据学习时间和预测熵设计的。具体来说，对于任何数据点，如果网络已经训练了相对较长的时间并且预测具有低熵，那么我们会逐渐且自适应地信任其预测的概率分布及其注释的概率分布。对于问题（2），ProSelfLC 的有效性捍卫了熵最小化。通过 ProSelfLC，我们凭经验证明，重新定义语义低熵状态并针对它优化学习器会更有效。为了解决问题（3），我们使用低温来降低自知识的熵，然后利用它来校正标签，以便修改后的标签重新定义低熵目标概率分布。我们通过在干净和嘈杂的环境中以及图像和蛋白质数据集上进行的大量实验证明了 ProSelfLC 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式自标签校正方法ProSelfLC，通过控制熵状态提升深度神经网络在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有标签校正方法缺乏统一数学分析，且存在信任度动态调整、低熵预测奖惩机制选择及噪声下模型自信度下降等关键问题。
AI.method: 基于学习时长和预测熵动态调整信任度，通过熵最小化重构低熵目标状态，并采用低温处理降低自知识熵值以生成可靠标签。
AI.result: 在图像和蛋白质数据集的干净/噪声场景中，ProSelfLC均表现出优于现有方法的标签校正效果和模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: ProSelfLC通过时间驱动的熵控制机制有效解决了标签噪声问题，为自监督学习提供了新的理论视角和实践方案。

ai_content_json.result: 在图像和蛋白质数据集的干净/噪声场景中，ProSelfLC均表现出优于现有方法的标签校正效果和模型鲁棒性。
ai_content_json.conclusion: ProSelfLC通过时间驱动的熵控制机制有效解决了标签噪声问题，为自监督学习提供了新的理论视角和实践方案。

tldr: 本文提出一种渐进式自标签校正方法ProSelfLC，通过控制熵状态提升深度神经网络在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。
motivation: 现有标签校正方法缺乏统一数学分析，且存在信任度动态调整、低熵预测奖惩机制选择及噪声下模型自信度下降等关键问题。
method: 基于学习时长和预测熵动态调整信任度，通过熵最小化重构低熵目标状态，并采用低温处理降低自知识熵值以生成可靠标签。
result: 在图像和蛋白质数据集的干净/噪声场景中，ProSelfLC均表现出优于现有方法的标签校正效果和模型鲁棒性。
conclusion: ProSelfLC通过时间驱动的熵控制机制有效解决了标签噪声问题，为自监督学习提供了新的理论视角和实践方案。
search_text: ProSelfLC: Progressive Self Label Correction Towards A Low-Temperature Entropy State ProSelfLC：针对低温熵状态的渐进式自标签校正 There is a family of label modification approaches including self and non-self label correction (LC), and output regularisation. They are widely used for training robust deep neural networks (DNNs), but have not been mathematically and thoroughly analysed together. We study them and discover three key issues: (1) We are more interested in adopting Self LC as it leverages its own knowledge and requires no auxiliary models. However, it is unclear how to adaptively trust a learner as the training proceeds. (2) Some methods penalise while the others reward low-entropy (i.e., high-confidence) predictions, prompting us to ask which one is better. (3) Using the standard training setting, a learned model becomes less confident when severe noise exists. Self LC using high-entropy knowledge would generate high-entropy targets. To resolve the issue (1), inspired by a well-accepted finding, i.e., deep neural networks learn meaningful patterns before fitting noise, we propose a novel end-to-end method named ProSelfLC, which is designed according to the learning time and prediction entropy. Concretely, for any data point, we progressively and adaptively trust its predicted probability distribution versus its annotated one if a network has been trained for a relatively long time and the prediction is of low entropy. For the issue (2), the effectiveness of ProSelfLC defends entropy minimisation. By ProSelfLC, we empirically prove that it is more effective to redefine a semantic low-entropy state and optimise the learner toward it. To address the issue (3), we decrease the entropy of self knowledge using a low temperature before exploiting it to correct labels, so that the revised labels redefine low-entropy target probability distributions. We demonstrate the effectiveness of ProSelfLC through extensive experiments in both clean and noisy settings, and on both image and protein datasets. 有一系列标签修改方法，包括自标签修正和非自标签修正 (LC) 以及输出正则化。它们广泛用于训练强大的深度神经网络 (DNN)，但尚未一起进行数学和彻底的分析。我们研究它们并发现三个关键问题：（1）我们对采用自液相色谱更感兴趣，因为它利用自己的知识并且不需要辅助模型。然而，目前尚不清楚如何随着训练的进行而适应性地信任学习者。 （2）一些方法会惩罚低熵（即高置信度）预测，而另一些方法会奖励低熵（即高置信度）预测，这促使我们问哪一种更好。 (3) 使用标准训练设置，当存在严重噪声时，学习模型的置信度会降低。使用高熵知识的自液相色谱将生成高熵目标。为了解决问题（1），受到一个广为接受的发现的启发，即深度神经网络在拟合噪声之前学习有意义的模式，我们提出了一种名为 ProSelfLC 的新颖的端到端方法，该方法是根据学习时间和预测熵设计的。具体来说，对于任何数据点，如果网络已经训练了相对较长的时间并且预测具有低熵，那么我们会逐渐且自适应地信任其预测的概率分布及其注释的概率分布。对于问题（2），ProSelfLC 的有效性捍卫了熵最小化。通过 ProSelfLC，我们凭经验证明，重新定义语义低熵状态并针对它优化学习器会更有效。为了解决问题（3），我们使用低温来降低自知识的熵，然后利用它来校正标签，以便修改后的标签重新定义低熵目标概率分布。我们通过在干净和嘈杂的环境中以及图像和蛋白质数据集上进行的大量实验证明了 ProSelfLC 的有效性。 本文提出一种渐进式自标签校正方法ProSelfLC，通过控制熵状态提升深度神经网络在噪声环境下的鲁棒性。 Xinshao Wang,Yang Hua,Elyor Kodirov,Sankha Subhra Mukherjee,David A. Clifton,Neil M. Robertson cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Mengya Xu,Mobarakol Islam,Hongliang Ren
title: Rethinking Surgical Captioning: End-to-End Window-Based MLP Transformer Using Patches
title_zh: 重新思考手术字幕：使用补丁的基于端到端窗口的 MLP 转换器
abstract: Surgical captioning plays an important role in surgical instruction prediction and report generation. However, the majority of captioning models still rely on the heavy computational object detector or feature extractor to extract regional features. In addition, the detection model requires additional bounding box annotation which is costly and needs skilled annotators. These lead to inference delay and limit the captioning model to deploy in real-time robotic surgery. For this purpose, we design an end-to-end detector and feature extractor-free captioning model by utilizing the patch-based shifted window technique. We propose Shifted Window-Based Multi-Layer Perceptrons Transformer Captioning model (SwinMLP-TranCAP) with faster inference speed and less computation. SwinMLP-TranCAP replaces the multi-head attention module with window-based multi-head MLP. Such deployments primarily focus on image understanding tasks, but very few works investigate the caption generation task. SwinMLP-TranCAP is also extended into a video version for video captioning tasks using 3D patches and windows. Compared with previous detector-based or feature extractor-based models, our models greatly simplify the architecture design while maintaining performance on two surgical datasets. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/XuMengyaAmy/SwinMLP_TranCAP.
summary: Surgical captioning plays an important role in surgical instruction prediction and report generation. However, the majority of captioning models still rely on the heavy computational object detector or feature extractor to extract regional features. In addition, the detection model requires additional bounding box annotation which is costly and needs skilled annotators. These lead to inference delay and limit the captioning model to deploy in real-time robotic surgery. For this purpose, we design an end-to-end detector and feature extractor-free captioning model by utilizing the patch-based shifted window technique. We propose Shifted Window-Based Multi-Layer Perceptrons Transformer Captioning model (SwinMLP-TranCAP) with faster inference speed and less computation. SwinMLP-TranCAP replaces the multi-head attention module with window-based multi-head MLP. Such deployments primarily focus on image understanding tasks, but very few works investigate the caption generation task. SwinMLP-TranCAP is also extended into a video version for video captioning tasks using 3D patches and windows. Compared with previous detector-based or feature extractor-based models, our models greatly simplify the architecture design while maintaining performance on two surgical datasets. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/XuMengyaAmy/SwinMLP_TranCAP.
abstract_zh: 手术字幕在手术指导预测和报告生成中发挥着重要作用。然而，大多数字幕模型仍然依赖于大量计算的对象检测器或特征提取器来提取区域特征。此外，检测模型需要额外的边界框注释，这是昂贵的并且需要熟练的注释者。这些会导致推理延迟并限制字幕模型在实时机器人手术中的部署。为此，我们利用基于补丁的移位窗口技术设计了一种端到端检测器和无特征提取器的字幕模型。我们提出了基于移位窗口的多层感知器变压器字幕模型（SwinMLP-TranCAP），具有更快的推理速度和更少的计算量。 SwinMLP-TranCAP 用基于窗口的多头 MLP 取代了多头注意力模块。此类部署主要关注图像理解任务，但很少有研究研究标题生成任务。 SwinMLP-TranCAP 还扩展到视频版本，用于使用 3D 补丁和窗口的视频字幕任务。与之前基于检测器或基于特征提取器的模型相比，我们的模型极大地简化了架构设计，同时保持了两个手术数据集的性能。该代码可在 https://github.com/XuMengyaAmy/SwinMLP_TranCAP 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需目标检测器和特征提取器的端到端手术图像及视频描述生成模型SwinMLP-TranCAP，通过基于块的移位窗口多层感知机变换器实现高效推理。
AI.motivation: 现有手术描述生成模型依赖计算量大的目标检测器和特征提取器，需额外标注框导致成本高且难以实现实时手术场景应用。
AI.method: 设计基于块移位窗口技术的多层感知机变换器（SwinMLP-TranCAP），以窗口多头MLP替代传统多头注意力模块，并扩展为3D版本处理视频描述生成。
AI.result: 在两个手术数据集上保持性能的同时显著简化架构，推理速度更快且计算量更小，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该模型通过简化架构设计实现了高效实时的手术场景描述生成，为机器人手术应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yen-Chang Hsu,Ting Hua,Sungen Chang,Qian Lou,Yilin Shen,Hongxia Jin
title: Language model compression with weighted low-rank factorization
title_zh: 具有加权低阶分解的语言模型压缩
abstract: Factorizing a large matrix into small matrices is a popular strategy for model compression. Singular value decomposition (SVD) plays a vital role in this compression strategy, approximating a learned matrix with fewer parameters. However, SVD minimizes the squared error toward reconstructing the original matrix without gauging the importance of the parameters, potentially giving a larger reconstruction error for those who affect the task accuracy more. In other words, the optimization objective of SVD is not aligned with the trained model's task accuracy. We analyze this previously unexplored problem, make observations, and address it by introducing Fisher information to weigh the importance of parameters affecting the model prediction. This idea leads to our method: Fisher-Weighted SVD (FWSVD). Although the factorized matrices from our approach do not result in smaller reconstruction errors, we find that our resulting task accuracy is much closer to the original model's performance. We perform analysis with the transformer-based language models, showing our weighted SVD largely alleviates the mismatched optimization objectives and can maintain model performance with a higher compression rate. Our method can directly compress a task-specific model while achieving better performance than other compact model strategies requiring expensive model pre-training. Moreover, the evaluation of compressing an already compact model shows our method can further reduce 9% to 30% parameters with an insignificant impact on task accuracy.
summary: Factorizing a large matrix into small matrices is a popular strategy for model compression. Singular value decomposition (SVD) plays a vital role in this compression strategy, approximating a learned matrix with fewer parameters. However, SVD minimizes the squared error toward reconstructing the original matrix without gauging the importance of the parameters, potentially giving a larger reconstruction error for those who affect the task accuracy more. In other words, the optimization objective of SVD is not aligned with the trained model's task accuracy. We analyze this previously unexplored problem, make observations, and address it by introducing Fisher information to weigh the importance of parameters affecting the model prediction. This idea leads to our method: Fisher-Weighted SVD (FWSVD). Although the factorized matrices from our approach do not result in smaller reconstruction errors, we find that our resulting task accuracy is much closer to the original model's performance. We perform analysis with the transformer-based language models, showing our weighted SVD largely alleviates the mismatched optimization objectives and can maintain model performance with a higher compression rate. Our method can directly compress a task-specific model while achieving better performance than other compact model strategies requiring expensive model pre-training. Moreover, the evaluation of compressing an already compact model shows our method can further reduce 9% to 30% parameters with an insignificant impact on task accuracy.
abstract_zh: 将大矩阵分解为小矩阵是模型压缩的流行策略。奇异值分解（SVD）在这种压缩策略中发挥着至关重要的作用，用更少的参数来近似学习矩阵。然而，SVD 在不衡量参数重要性的情况下最小化了重建原始矩阵的平方误差，这可能会给那些影响任务准确性的人带来更大的重建误差。换句话说，SVD 的优化目标与训练模型的任务精度不一致。我们分析这个以前未探索过的问题，进行观察，并通过引入费舍尔信息来权衡影响模型预测的参数的重要性来解决它。这个想法引出了我们的方法：Fisher 加权 SVD (FWSVD)。尽管我们的方法的因式分解矩阵不会导致较小的重建误差，但我们发现最终的任务精度更接近原始模型的性能。我们使用基于 Transformer 的语言模型进行分析，结果表明我们的加权 SVD 很大程度上缓解了优化目标不匹配的问题，并且可以以更高的压缩率保持模型性能。我们的方法可以直接压缩特定于任务的模型，同时比其他需要昂贵的模型预训练的紧凑模型策略获得更好的性能。此外，对压缩已经紧凑的模型的评估表明，我们的方法可以进一步减少 9％ 至 30％ 的参数，而对任务准确性的影响微乎其微。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于加权低秩分解的语言模型压缩方法，通过引入Fisher信息优化SVD过程以保持模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统SVD压缩方法未考虑参数对任务准确性的影响，导致重建误差可能损害模型表现，需引入参数重要性权重解决优化目标不匹配问题。
AI.method: 提出Fisher-Weighted SVD（FWSVD）方法，利用Fisher信息为参数分配重要性权重，指导低秩矩阵分解过程。
AI.result: 在Transformer模型实验中，FWSVD在压缩率提升的同时保持接近原模型的性能，且可进一步压缩已有紧凑模型9%-30%参数。
AI.conclusion: FWSVD有效缓解了传统压缩方法的优化目标偏差问题，在保持性能的前提下实现更高效压缩，优于需昂贵预训练的其他压缩策略。

search_text: Language model compression with weighted low-rank factorization 具有加权低阶分解的语言模型压缩 Factorizing a large matrix into small matrices is a popular strategy for model compression. Singular value decomposition (SVD) plays a vital role in this compression strategy, approximating a learned matrix with fewer parameters. However, SVD minimizes the squared error toward reconstructing the original matrix without gauging the importance of the parameters, potentially giving a larger reconstruction error for those who affect the task accuracy more. In other words, the optimization objective of SVD is not aligned with the trained model's task accuracy. We analyze this previously unexplored problem, make observations, and address it by introducing Fisher information to weigh the importance of parameters affecting the model prediction. This idea leads to our method: Fisher-Weighted SVD (FWSVD). Although the factorized matrices from our approach do not result in smaller reconstruction errors, we find that our resulting task accuracy is much closer to the original model's performance. We perform analysis with the transformer-based language models, showing our weighted SVD largely alleviates the mismatched optimization objectives and can maintain model performance with a higher compression rate. Our method can directly compress a task-specific model while achieving better performance than other compact model strategies requiring expensive model pre-training. Moreover, the evaluation of compressing an already compact model shows our method can further reduce 9% to 30% parameters with an insignificant impact on task accuracy. 将大矩阵分解为小矩阵是模型压缩的流行策略。奇异值分解（SVD）在这种压缩策略中发挥着至关重要的作用，用更少的参数来近似学习矩阵。然而，SVD 在不衡量参数重要性的情况下最小化了重建原始矩阵的平方误差，这可能会给那些影响任务准确性的人带来更大的重建误差。换句话说，SVD 的优化目标与训练模型的任务精度不一致。我们分析这个以前未探索过的问题，进行观察，并通过引入费舍尔信息来权衡影响模型预测的参数的重要性来解决它。这个想法引出了我们的方法：Fisher 加权 SVD (FWSVD)。尽管我们的方法的因式分解矩阵不会导致较小的重建误差，但我们发现最终的任务精度更接近原始模型的性能。我们使用基于 Transformer 的语言模型进行分析，结果表明我们的加权 SVD 很大程度上缓解了优化目标不匹配的问题，并且可以以更高的压缩率保持模型性能。我们的方法可以直接压缩特定于任务的模型，同时比其他需要昂贵的模型预训练的紧凑模型策略获得更好的性能。此外，对压缩已经紧凑的模型的评估表明，我们的方法可以进一步减少 9％ 至 30％ 的参数，而对任务准确性的影响微乎其微。 本文提出一种基于加权低秩分解的语言模型压缩方法，通过引入Fisher信息优化SVD过程以保持模型性能。 Yen-Chang Hsu,Ting Hua,Sungen Chang,Qian Lou,Yilin Shen,Hongxia Jin cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Nuha Albadi,Maram Kurdi,Shivakant Mishra
title: Deradicalizing YouTube: Characterization, Detection, and Personalization of Religiously Intolerant Arabic Videos
title_zh: 去激进化 YouTube：宗教不宽容的阿拉伯视频的特征、检测和个性化
comment: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2: Article 505 (November 2022)
comments: ef:Proc. ACM Hum.-Comput. Interact. 6, CSCW2: Article 505 (November 2022)
abstract: Growing evidence suggests that YouTube's recommendation algorithm plays a role in online radicalization via surfacing extreme content. Radical Islamist groups, in particular, have been profiting from the global appeal of YouTube to disseminate hate and jihadist propaganda. In this quantitative, data-driven study, we investigate the prevalence of religiously intolerant Arabic YouTube videos, the tendency of the platform to recommend such videos, and how these recommendations are affected by demographics and watch history. Based on our deep learning classifier developed to detect hateful videos and a large-scale dataset of over 350K videos, we find that Arabic videos targeting religious minorities are particularly prevalent in search results (30%) and first-level recommendations (21%), and that 15% of overall captured recommendations point to hateful videos. Our personalized audit experiments suggest that gender and religious identity can substantially affect the extent of exposure to hateful content. Our results contribute vital insights into the phenomenon of online radicalization and facilitate curbing online harmful content.
summary: Growing evidence suggests that YouTube's recommendation algorithm plays a role in online radicalization via surfacing extreme content. Radical Islamist groups, in particular, have been profiting from the global appeal of YouTube to disseminate hate and jihadist propaganda. In this quantitative, data-driven study, we investigate the prevalence of religiously intolerant Arabic YouTube videos, the tendency of the platform to recommend such videos, and how these recommendations are affected by demographics and watch history. Based on our deep learning classifier developed to detect hateful videos and a large-scale dataset of over 350K videos, we find that Arabic videos targeting religious minorities are particularly prevalent in search results (30%) and first-level recommendations (21%), and that 15% of overall captured recommendations point to hateful videos. Our personalized audit experiments suggest that gender and religious identity can substantially affect the extent of exposure to hateful content. Our results contribute vital insights into the phenomenon of online radicalization and facilitate curbing online harmful content.
abstract_zh: 越来越多的证据表明，YouTube 的推荐算法通过呈现极端内容，在网络激进化中发挥了作用。尤其是激进伊斯兰组织，一直从 YouTube 的全球吸引力中获利，传播仇恨和圣战主义宣传。在这项数据驱动的定量研究中，我们调查了宗教不宽容的阿拉伯语 YouTube 视频的流行程度、该平台推荐此类视频的趋势，以及这些推荐如何受到人口统计和观看历史的影响。根据我们为检测仇恨视频而开发的深度学习分类器以及包含超过 35 万个视频的大规模数据集，我们发现针对宗教少数群体的阿拉伯视频在搜索结果 (30%) 和一级推荐 (21%) 中特别普遍，并且总体捕获的推荐中有 15% 指向仇恨视频。我们的个性化审计实验表明，性别和宗教身份可以极大地影响仇恨内容的暴露程度。我们的研究结果为了解网络激进化现象提供了重要见解，并有助于遏制网络有害内容。

AI.tldr: 本文研究YouTube平台上传播宗教仇恨内容的阿拉伯语视频的特征、检测方法及个性化推荐机制，旨在遏制极端内容传播。
AI.motivation: YouTube算法可能通过推荐极端内容促进网络极端主义，尤其是激进伊斯兰组织利用平台传播仇恨与极端主义宣传，需量化分析其传播机制。
AI.method: 基于深度学习分类器与35万视频数据集，分析宗教仇恨视频在搜索结果和推荐中的占比，并通过个性化实验探究人口统计学特征与观看历史对推荐的影响。
AI.result: 阿拉伯语针对宗教少数群体的视频在搜索结果中占比30%，首推结果21%，整体推荐中有15%指向仇恨内容；性别与宗教身份显著影响用户接触仇恨内容的程度。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了YouTube推荐机制与极端内容传播的关系，为理解网络极端化现象及制定内容治理策略提供了关键依据。

authors_text: Mark Endo,Kathleen L. Poston,Edith V. Sullivan,Li Fei-Fei,Kilian M. Pohl,Ehsan Adeli
title: GaitForeMer: Self-Supervised Pre-Training of Transformers via Human Motion Forecasting for Few-Shot Gait Impairment Severity Estimation
title_zh: GaitForeMer：通过人体运动预测对 Transformer 进行自我监督预训练，以进行少样本步态损伤严重程度估计
comment: Accepted as a conference paper at MICCAI (Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention) 2022
comments: Accepted as a conference paper at MICCAI (Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention) 2022
abstract: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a neurological disorder that has a variety of observable motor-related symptoms such as slow movement, tremor, muscular rigidity, and impaired posture. PD is typically diagnosed by evaluating the severity of motor impairments according to scoring systems such as the Movement Disorder Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale (MDS-UPDRS). Automated severity prediction using video recordings of individuals provides a promising route for non-intrusive monitoring of motor impairments. However, the limited size of PD gait data hinders model ability and clinical potential. Because of this clinical data scarcity and inspired by the recent advances in self-supervised large-scale language models like GPT-3, we use human motion forecasting as an effective self-supervised pre-training task for the estimation of motor impairment severity. We introduce GaitForeMer, Gait Forecasting and impairment estimation transforMer, which is first pre-trained on public datasets to forecast gait movements and then applied to clinical data to predict MDS-UPDRS gait impairment severity. Our method outperforms previous approaches that rely solely on clinical data by a large margin, achieving an F1 score of 0.76, precision of 0.79, and recall of 0.75. Using GaitForeMer, we show how public human movement data repositories can assist clinical use cases through learning universal motion representations. The code is available at https://github.com/markendo/GaitForeMer .
summary: Parkinson's disease (PD) is a neurological disorder that has a variety of observable motor-related symptoms such as slow movement, tremor, muscular rigidity, and impaired posture. PD is typically diagnosed by evaluating the severity of motor impairments according to scoring systems such as the Movement Disorder Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale (MDS-UPDRS). Automated severity prediction using video recordings of individuals provides a promising route for non-intrusive monitoring of motor impairments. However, the limited size of PD gait data hinders model ability and clinical potential. Because of this clinical data scarcity and inspired by the recent advances in self-supervised large-scale language models like GPT-3, we use human motion forecasting as an effective self-supervised pre-training task for the estimation of motor impairment severity. We introduce GaitForeMer, Gait Forecasting and impairment estimation transforMer, which is first pre-trained on public datasets to forecast gait movements and then applied to clinical data to predict MDS-UPDRS gait impairment severity. Our method outperforms previous approaches that rely solely on clinical data by a large margin, achieving an F1 score of 0.76, precision of 0.79, and recall of 0.75. Using GaitForeMer, we show how public human movement data repositories can assist clinical use cases through learning universal motion representations. The code is available at https://github.com/markendo/GaitForeMer .
abstract_zh: 帕金森病 (PD) 是一种神经系统疾病，具有多种可观察到的运动相关症状，例如运动缓慢、震颤、肌肉僵硬和姿势受损。 PD 通常通过根据运动障碍协会统一帕金森病评定量表 (MDS-UPDRS) 等评分系统评估运动障碍的严重程度来诊断。使用个人视频记录进行自动严重程度预测为非侵入式运动障碍监测提供了一条有前途的途径。然而，PD 步态数据的大小有限阻碍了模型能力和临床潜力。由于临床数据稀缺，并受到 GPT-3 等自监督大规模语言模型最新进展的启发，我们使用人体运动预测作为有效的自监督预训练任务，用于估计运动损伤严重程度。我们介绍了 GaitForeMer、步态预测和损伤估计 Transformer，它首先在公共数据集上进行预训练以预测步态运动，然后应用于临床数据以预测 MDS-UPDRS 步态损伤严重程度。我们的方法大大优于以前仅依赖临床数据的方法，实现了 0.76 的 F1 分数、0.79 的精确度和 0.75 的召回率。使用 GaitForeMer，我们展示了公共人体运动数据存储库如何通过学习通用运动表示来帮助临床用例。该代码可在 https://github.com/markendo/GaitForeMer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GaitForeMer方法，通过自监督预训练Transformer模型进行人体运动预测，以解决帕金森病步态障碍严重程度估计中的临床数据不足问题。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病步态数据稀缺限制了模型性能，受大语言模型自监督学习启发，利用公共运动数据预训练可提升临床数据下的预测效果。
AI.method: 基于Transformer架构设计GaitForeMer，首先在公共数据集上预训练人体运动预测任务，再迁移至临床数据预测MDS-UPDRS评分，实现少样本学习。
AI.result: 在临床数据上达到F1=0.76、精确率0.79、召回率0.75，显著优于仅依赖临床数据的先前方法。
AI.conclusion: 公共运动数据仓库可通过学习通用运动表征辅助临床应用，证明自监督预训练在医疗少样本场景的有效性。

tldr: 本文提出GaitForeMer方法，通过自监督预训练Transformer模型进行人体运动预测，以解决帕金森病步态障碍严重程度估计中的临床数据不足问题。
motivation: 帕金森病步态数据稀缺限制了模型性能，受大语言模型自监督学习启发，利用公共运动数据预训练可提升临床数据下的预测效果。
method: 基于Transformer架构设计GaitForeMer，首先在公共数据集上预训练人体运动预测任务，再迁移至临床数据预测MDS-UPDRS评分，实现少样本学习。
result: 在临床数据上达到F1=0.76、精确率0.79、召回率0.75，显著优于仅依赖临床数据的先前方法。
conclusion: 公共运动数据仓库可通过学习通用运动表征辅助临床应用，证明自监督预训练在医疗少样本场景的有效性。
search_text: GaitForeMer: Self-Supervised Pre-Training of Transformers via Human Motion Forecasting for Few-Shot Gait Impairment Severity Estimation GaitForeMer：通过人体运动预测对 Transformer 进行自我监督预训练，以进行少样本步态损伤严重程度估计 Parkinson's disease (PD) is a neurological disorder that has a variety of observable motor-related symptoms such as slow movement, tremor, muscular rigidity, and impaired posture. PD is typically diagnosed by evaluating the severity of motor impairments according to scoring systems such as the Movement Disorder Society Unified Parkinson's Disease Rating Scale (MDS-UPDRS). Automated severity prediction using video recordings of individuals provides a promising route for non-intrusive monitoring of motor impairments. However, the limited size of PD gait data hinders model ability and clinical potential. Because of this clinical data scarcity and inspired by the recent advances in self-supervised large-scale language models like GPT-3, we use human motion forecasting as an effective self-supervised pre-training task for the estimation of motor impairment severity. We introduce GaitForeMer, Gait Forecasting and impairment estimation transforMer, which is first pre-trained on public datasets to forecast gait movements and then applied to clinical data to predict MDS-UPDRS gait impairment severity. Our method outperforms previous approaches that rely solely on clinical data by a large margin, achieving an F1 score of 0.76, precision of 0.79, and recall of 0.75. Using GaitForeMer, we show how public human movement data repositories can assist clinical use cases through learning universal motion representations. The code is available at https://github.com/markendo/GaitForeMer . 帕金森病 (PD) 是一种神经系统疾病，具有多种可观察到的运动相关症状，例如运动缓慢、震颤、肌肉僵硬和姿势受损。 PD 通常通过根据运动障碍协会统一帕金森病评定量表 (MDS-UPDRS) 等评分系统评估运动障碍的严重程度来诊断。使用个人视频记录进行自动严重程度预测为非侵入式运动障碍监测提供了一条有前途的途径。然而，PD 步态数据的大小有限阻碍了模型能力和临床潜力。由于临床数据稀缺，并受到 GPT-3 等自监督大规模语言模型最新进展的启发，我们使用人体运动预测作为有效的自监督预训练任务，用于估计运动损伤严重程度。我们介绍了 GaitForeMer、步态预测和损伤估计 Transformer，它首先在公共数据集上进行预训练以预测步态运动，然后应用于临床数据以预测 MDS-UPDRS 步态损伤严重程度。我们的方法大大优于以前仅依赖临床数据的方法，实现了 0.76 的 F1 分数、0.79 的精确度和 0.75 的召回率。使用 GaitForeMer，我们展示了公共人体运动数据存储库如何通过学习通用运动表示来帮助临床用例。该代码可在 https://github.com/markendo/GaitForeMer 获取。 本文提出GaitForeMer方法，通过自监督预训练Transformer模型进行人体运动预测，以解决帕金森病步态障碍严重程度估计中的临床数据不足问题。 Mark Endo,Kathleen L. Poston,Edith V. Sullivan,Li Fei-Fei,Kilian M. Pohl,Ehsan Adeli cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Marvin Teichmann,Andre Aichert,Hanibal Bohnenberger,Philipp Ströbel,Tobias Heimann
title: End-to-end Learning for Image-based Detection of Molecular Alterations in Digital Pathology
title_zh: 数字病理学中基于图像的分子改变检测的端到端学习
abstract: Current approaches for classification of whole slide images (WSI) in digital pathology predominantly utilize a two-stage learning pipeline. The first stage identifies areas of interest (e.g. tumor tissue), while the second stage processes cropped tiles from these areas in a supervised fashion. During inference, a large number of tiles are combined into a unified prediction for the entire slide. A major drawback of such approaches is the requirement for task-specific auxiliary labels which are not acquired in clinical routine. We propose a novel learning pipeline for WSI classification that is trainable end-to-end and does not require any auxiliary annotations. We apply our approach to predict molecular alterations for a number of different use-cases, including detection of microsatellite instability in colorectal tumors and prediction of specific mutations for colon, lung, and breast cancer cases from The Cancer Genome Atlas. Results reach AUC scores of up to 94% and are shown to be competitive with state of the art two-stage pipelines. We believe our approach can facilitate future research in digital pathology and contribute to solve a large range of problems around the prediction of cancer phenotypes, hopefully enabling personalized therapies for more patients in future.
summary: Current approaches for classification of whole slide images (WSI) in digital pathology predominantly utilize a two-stage learning pipeline. The first stage identifies areas of interest (e.g. tumor tissue), while the second stage processes cropped tiles from these areas in a supervised fashion. During inference, a large number of tiles are combined into a unified prediction for the entire slide. A major drawback of such approaches is the requirement for task-specific auxiliary labels which are not acquired in clinical routine. We propose a novel learning pipeline for WSI classification that is trainable end-to-end and does not require any auxiliary annotations. We apply our approach to predict molecular alterations for a number of different use-cases, including detection of microsatellite instability in colorectal tumors and prediction of specific mutations for colon, lung, and breast cancer cases from The Cancer Genome Atlas. Results reach AUC scores of up to 94% and are shown to be competitive with state of the art two-stage pipelines. We believe our approach can facilitate future research in digital pathology and contribute to solve a large range of problems around the prediction of cancer phenotypes, hopefully enabling personalized therapies for more patients in future.
abstract_zh: 目前数字病理学中整个幻灯片图像 (WSI) 的分类方法主要利用两阶段学习流程。第一阶段识别感兴趣的区域（例如肿瘤组织），而第二阶段以监督方式处理这些区域的裁剪图块。在推理过程中，大量的图块被组合成整个幻灯片的统一预测。这种方法的一个主要缺点是需要特定任务的辅助标签，而这些标签在临床常规中无法获得。我们提出了一种用于 WSI 分类的新颖学习管道，该管道可进行端到端训练，并且不需要任何辅助注释。我们应用我们的方法来预测许多不同用例的分子改变，包括检测结直肠肿瘤中的微卫星不稳定性以及预测癌症基因组图谱中结肠癌、肺癌和乳腺癌病例的特定突变。结果 AUC 分数高达 94%，与最先进的两级管道相比具有竞争力。我们相信我们的方法可以促进数字病理学的未来研究，并有助于解决围绕癌症表型预测的大量问题，有望在未来为更多患者提供个性化治疗。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需辅助标注的端到端深度学习方法，用于数字病理学中分子改变的检测，如微卫星不稳定性及癌症突变预测。
AI.motivation: 传统两阶段WSI分类方法依赖临床实践中难以获取的辅助标签，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 设计端到端学习框架，直接从全切片图像中学习特征，跳过传统方法的区域筛选与切片处理步骤。
AI.result: 在多个癌症分子标志物检测任务中达到最高94%的AUC，性能与现有两阶段方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法可推动数字病理学研究，助力癌症表型预测及个性化治疗发展。

authors_text: Lionel Nganyewou Tidjon,Foutse Khomh
title: Threat Assessment in Machine Learning based Systems
title_zh: 基于机器学习的系统中的威胁评估
abstract: Machine learning is a field of artificial intelligence (AI) that is becoming essential for several critical systems, making it a good target for threat actors. Threat actors exploit different Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures (TTPs) against the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of Machine Learning (ML) systems. During the ML cycle, they exploit adversarial TTPs to poison data and fool ML-based systems. In recent years, multiple security practices have been proposed for traditional systems but they are not enough to cope with the nature of ML-based systems. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study of threats reported against ML-based systems with the aim to understand and characterize the nature of ML threats and identify common mitigation strategies. The study is based on 89 real-world ML attack scenarios from the MITRE's ATLAS database, the AI Incident Database, and the literature; 854 ML repositories from the GitHub search and the Python Packaging Advisory database, selected based on their reputation. Attacks from the AI Incident Database and the literature are used to identify vulnerabilities and new types of threats that were not documented in ATLAS. Results show that convolutional neural networks were one of the most targeted models among the attack scenarios. ML repositories with the largest vulnerability prominence include TensorFlow, OpenCV, and Notebook. In this paper, we also report the most frequent vulnerabilities in the studied ML repositories, the most targeted ML phases and models, the most used TTPs in ML phases and attack scenarios. This information is particularly important for red/blue teams to better conduct attacks/defenses, for practitioners to prevent threats during ML development, and for researchers to develop efficient defense mechanisms.
summary: Machine learning is a field of artificial intelligence (AI) that is becoming essential for several critical systems, making it a good target for threat actors. Threat actors exploit different Tactics, Techniques, and Procedures (TTPs) against the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of Machine Learning (ML) systems. During the ML cycle, they exploit adversarial TTPs to poison data and fool ML-based systems. In recent years, multiple security practices have been proposed for traditional systems but they are not enough to cope with the nature of ML-based systems. In this paper, we conduct an empirical study of threats reported against ML-based systems with the aim to understand and characterize the nature of ML threats and identify common mitigation strategies. The study is based on 89 real-world ML attack scenarios from the MITRE's ATLAS database, the AI Incident Database, and the literature; 854 ML repositories from the GitHub search and the Python Packaging Advisory database, selected based on their reputation. Attacks from the AI Incident Database and the literature are used to identify vulnerabilities and new types of threats that were not documented in ATLAS. Results show that convolutional neural networks were one of the most targeted models among the attack scenarios. ML repositories with the largest vulnerability prominence include TensorFlow, OpenCV, and Notebook. In this paper, we also report the most frequent vulnerabilities in the studied ML repositories, the most targeted ML phases and models, the most used TTPs in ML phases and attack scenarios. This information is particularly important for red/blue teams to better conduct attacks/defenses, for practitioners to prevent threats during ML development, and for researchers to develop efficient defense mechanisms.
abstract_zh: 机器学习是人工智能 (AI) 的一个领域，对于多个关键系统来说变得至关重要，使其成为威胁行为者的良好目标。威胁行为者利用不同的策略、技术和程序 (TTP) 来破坏机器学习 (ML) 系统的机密性、完整性和可用性。在机器学习周期中，他们利用对抗性 TTP 来毒害数据并愚弄基于机器学习的系统。近年来，针对传统系统提出了多种安全实践，但它们不足以应对基于机器学习的系统的性质。在本文中，我们对针对基于机器学习的系统报告的威胁进行了实证研究，旨在了解和描述机器学习威胁的性质并确定常见的缓解策略。该研究基于 MITRE 的 ATLAS 数据库、AI 事件数据库和文献中的 89 个真实的 ML 攻击场景；来自 GitHub 搜索和 Python 打包咨询数据库的 854 个 ML 存储库，根据其声誉进行选择。 AI 事件数据库和文献中的攻击用于识别 ATLAS 中未记录的漏洞和新型威胁。结果表明，卷积神经网络是攻击场景中最具针对性的模型之一。漏洞最突出的 ML 存储库包括 TensorFlow、OpenCV 和 Notebook。在本文中，我们还报告了所研究的 ML 存储库中最常见的漏洞、最具针对性的 ML 阶段和模型、ML 阶段和攻击场景中最常用的 TTP。这些信息对于红/蓝团队更好地进行攻击/防御、从业者在机器学习开发过程中预防威胁以及研究人员开发高效的防御机制尤其重要。

AI.tldr: 本文通过分析机器学习系统面临的安全威胁，旨在理解其特性并识别常见缓解策略。
AI.motivation: 传统安全措施难以应对机器学习系统的独特威胁，需针对ML生命周期中的攻击场景进行深入研究。
AI.method: 基于MITRE ATLAS数据库、AI Incident Database及文献中的89个真实攻击案例，结合GitHub和Python Packaging Advisory数据库的854个ML仓库进行实证分析。
AI.result: 卷积神经网络是主要攻击目标，TensorFlow、OpenCV等仓库漏洞突出，攻击技术多集中于数据污染和模型欺骗。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为攻防团队、开发人员及研究人员提供了针对ML威胁的实践指导和防御机制优化方向。

This information is particularly important for red/blue teams to better conduct attacks/defenses, for practitioners to prevent threats during ML development, and for researchers to develop efficient defense mechanisms. 机器学习是人工智能 (AI) 的一个领域，对于多个关键系统来说变得至关重要，使其成为威胁行为者的良好目标。威胁行为者利用不同的策略、技术和程序 (TTP) 来破坏机器学习 (ML) 系统的机密性、完整性和可用性。在机器学习周期中，他们利用对抗性 TTP 来毒害数据并愚弄基于机器学习的系统。近年来，针对传统系统提出了多种安全实践，但它们不足以应对基于机器学习的系统的性质。在本文中，我们对针对基于机器学习的系统报告的威胁进行了实证研究，旨在了解和描述机器学习威胁的性质并确定常见的缓解策略。该研究基于 MITRE 的 ATLAS 数据库、AI 事件数据库和文献中的 89 个真实的 ML 攻击场景；来自 GitHub 搜索和 Python 打包咨询数据库的 854 个 ML 存储库，根据其声誉进行选择。 AI 事件数据库和文献中的攻击用于识别 ATLAS 中未记录的漏洞和新型威胁。结果表明，卷积神经网络是攻击场景中最具针对性的模型之一。漏洞最突出的 ML 存储库包括 TensorFlow、OpenCV 和 Notebook。在本文中，我们还报告了所研究的 ML 存储库中最常见的漏洞、最具针对性的 ML 阶段和模型、ML 阶段和攻击场景中最常用的 TTP。这些信息对于红/蓝团队更好地进行攻击/防御、从业者在机器学习开发过程中预防威胁以及研究人员开发高效的防御机制尤其重要。 本文通过分析机器学习系统面临的安全威胁，旨在理解其特性并识别常见缓解策略。 Lionel Nganyewou Tidjon,Foutse Khomh cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Tairan Liu,Yuzhu Li,Hatice Ceylan Koydemir,Yijie Zhang,Ethan Yang,Merve Eryilmaz,Hongda Wang,Jingxi Li,Bijie Bai,Guangdong Ma,Aydogan Ozcan
title: Rapid and stain-free quantification of viral plaque via lens-free holography and deep learning
title_zh: 通过无透镜全息术和深度学习对病毒斑块进行快速、免染色定量
abstract: We present a rapid and stain-free quantitative viral plaque assay using lensfree holographic imaging and deep learning. This cost-effective, compact, and automated device significantly reduces the incubation time needed for traditional plaque assays while preserving their advantages over other virus quantification methods. This device captures ~0.32 Giga-pixel/hour phase information of the objects per test well, covering an area of ~30x30 mm^2, in a label-free manner, eliminating staining entirely. We demonstrated the success of this computational method using vesicular stomatitis virus (VSV), herpes simplex virus (HSV-1) and encephalomyocarditis virus (EMCV). Using a neural network, this stain-free device automatically detected the first cell lysing events due to the VSV viral replication as early as 5 hours after the incubation, and achieved >90% detection rate for the VSV plaque-forming units (PFUs) with 100% specificity in <20 hours, providing major time savings compared to the traditional plaque assays that take at least 48 hours. Similarly, this stain-free device reduced the needed incubation time by ~48 hours for HSV-1 and ~20 hours for EMCV, achieving >90% detection rate with 100% specificity. We also demonstrated that this data-driven plaque assay offers the capability of quantifying the infected area of the cell monolayer, performing automated counting and quantification of PFUs and virus-infected areas over a 10-fold larger dynamic range of virus concentration than standard viral plaque assays. This compact, low-cost, automated PFU quantification device can be broadly used in virology research, vaccine development, and clinical applications.
summary: We present a rapid and stain-free quantitative viral plaque assay using lensfree holographic imaging and deep learning. This cost-effective, compact, and automated device significantly reduces the incubation time needed for traditional plaque assays while preserving their advantages over other virus quantification methods. This device captures ~0.32 Giga-pixel/hour phase information of the objects per test well, covering an area of ~30x30 mm^2, in a label-free manner, eliminating staining entirely. We demonstrated the success of this computational method using vesicular stomatitis virus (VSV), herpes simplex virus (HSV-1) and encephalomyocarditis virus (EMCV). Using a neural network, this stain-free device automatically detected the first cell lysing events due to the VSV viral replication as early as 5 hours after the incubation, and achieved >90% detection rate for the VSV plaque-forming units (PFUs) with 100% specificity in <20 hours, providing major time savings compared to the traditional plaque assays that take at least 48 hours. Similarly, this stain-free device reduced the needed incubation time by ~48 hours for HSV-1 and ~20 hours for EMCV, achieving >90% detection rate with 100% specificity. We also demonstrated that this data-driven plaque assay offers the capability of quantifying the infected area of the cell monolayer, performing automated counting and quantification of PFUs and virus-infected areas over a 10-fold larger dynamic range of virus concentration than standard viral plaque assays. This compact, low-cost, automated PFU quantification device can be broadly used in virology research, vaccine development, and clinical applications.
abstract_zh: 我们利用无透镜全息成像和深度学习提出了一种快速、免染色的定量病毒斑块测定方法。这种经济高效、紧凑的自动化设备显着减少了传统噬菌斑测定所需的孵育时间，同时保留了其相对于其他病毒定量方法的优势。该设备以无标记的方式捕获每个测试孔的约 0.32 Giga 像素/小时的物体相位信息，覆盖约 30x30 mm^2 的区域，完全消除染色。我们使用水泡性口炎病毒（VSV）、单纯疱疹病毒（HSV-1）和脑心肌炎病毒（EMCV）证明了这种计算方法的成功。使用神经网络，这种免染色设备最早在孵育后 5 小时就自动检测到由于 VSV 病毒复制而导致的首次细胞裂解事件，并在不到 20 小时内实现了 90% 以上的 VSV 空斑形成单位 (PFU) 检测率，且具有 100% 特异性，与至少需要 48 小时的传统空斑测定相比，节省了大量时间。同样，这种免染色设备将 HSV-1 所需的孵育时间缩短了约 48 小时，将 EMCV 所需的孵育时间缩短了约 20 小时，实现了 >90% 的检测率和 100% 的特异性。我们还证明，这种数据驱动的空斑测定能够量化单层细胞的感染区域，在比标准病毒空斑测定大 10 倍的病毒浓度动态范围内对 PFU 和病毒感染区域进行自动计数和定量。这种紧凑、低成本、自动化的 PFU 定量装置可广泛应用于病毒学研究、疫苗开发和临床应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于无透镜全息成像和深度学习的快速无染色病毒斑块定量方法。
AI.motivation: 传统病毒斑块测定法耗时长（需48小时以上）且依赖染色步骤，存在成本高和操作复杂的问题。
AI.method: 采用无透镜全息成像技术捕获样品的相位信息，并结合深度学习算法自动检测病毒裂解事件及定量斑块形成单位（PFUs）。
AI.result: 该方法在VSV检测中实现5小时首次裂解事件检测，20小时内达90%检测率；对HSV-1和EMCV分别节省48小时和20小时，且检测灵敏度较传统方法提升10倍。
AI.conclusion: 该设备为病毒学研究、疫苗开发和临床诊断提供了低成本、高通量的自动化病毒定量解决方案。

authors_text: Mycal Tucker,Julie Shah,Roger Levy,Noga Zaslavsky
title: Towards Human-Agent Communication via the Information Bottleneck Principle
title_zh: 通过信息瓶颈原理实现人机通信
abstract: Emergent communication research often focuses on optimizing task-specific utility as a driver for communication. However, human languages appear to evolve under pressure to efficiently compress meanings into communication signals by optimizing the Information Bottleneck tradeoff between informativeness and complexity. In this work, we study how trading off these three factors -- utility, informativeness, and complexity -- shapes emergent communication, including compared to human communication. To this end, we propose Vector-Quantized Variational Information Bottleneck (VQ-VIB), a method for training neural agents to compress inputs into discrete signals embedded in a continuous space. We train agents via VQ-VIB and compare their performance to previously proposed neural architectures in grounded environments and in a Lewis reference game. Across all neural architectures and settings, taking into account communicative informativeness benefits communication convergence rates, and penalizing communicative complexity leads to human-like lexicon sizes while maintaining high utility. Additionally, we find that VQ-VIB outperforms other discrete communication methods. This work demonstrates how fundamental principles that are believed to characterize human language evolution may inform emergent communication in artificial agents.
summary: Emergent communication research often focuses on optimizing task-specific utility as a driver for communication. However, human languages appear to evolve under pressure to efficiently compress meanings into communication signals by optimizing the Information Bottleneck tradeoff between informativeness and complexity. In this work, we study how trading off these three factors -- utility, informativeness, and complexity -- shapes emergent communication, including compared to human communication. To this end, we propose Vector-Quantized Variational Information Bottleneck (VQ-VIB), a method for training neural agents to compress inputs into discrete signals embedded in a continuous space. We train agents via VQ-VIB and compare their performance to previously proposed neural architectures in grounded environments and in a Lewis reference game. Across all neural architectures and settings, taking into account communicative informativeness benefits communication convergence rates, and penalizing communicative complexity leads to human-like lexicon sizes while maintaining high utility. Additionally, we find that VQ-VIB outperforms other discrete communication methods. This work demonstrates how fundamental principles that are believed to characterize human language evolution may inform emergent communication in artificial agents.
abstract_zh: 新兴的沟通研究通常侧重于优化特定任务的效用作为沟通的驱动力。然而，人类语言似乎在压力下进化，通过优化信息性和复杂性之间的信息瓶颈权衡，有效地将意义压缩为通信信号。在这项工作中，我们研究如何权衡这三个因素——实用性、信息性和复杂性——塑造紧急沟通，包括与人类沟通的比较。为此，我们提出了矢量量化变分信息瓶颈（VQ-VIB），一种训练神经代理将输入压缩为嵌入连续空间中的离散信号的方法。我们通过 VQ-VIB 训练智能体，并将其性能与之前提出的接地环境和 Lewis 参考游戏中的神经架构进行比较。在所有神经架构和设置中，考虑到交流信息量有利于交流收敛速度，而惩罚交流复杂性会导致类似于人类的词典大小，同时保持高实用性。此外，我们发现 VQ-VIB 的性能优于其他离散通信方法。这项工作展示了被认为是人类语言进化特征的基本原理如何为人工智能体的紧急交流提供信息。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过平衡效用、信息量和复杂度三者关系，塑造人工智能代理的通信机制，并与人类语言进行对比。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重于优化任务特定效用驱动通信，但人类语言演化更注重在信息量与复杂度间进行压缩。本文旨在探索这一信息瓶颈原理对通信的影响。
AI.method: 提出向量量化变分信息瓶颈（VQ-VIB）方法，训练神经网络代理将输入压缩为离散信号，并在具身环境和Lewis参照游戏中进行验证。
AI.result: 通信收敛速度因信息量提升而加快，复杂度惩罚使词汇量接近人类水平且保持高效用，VQ-VIB优于其他离散通信方法。
AI.conclusion: 人类语言演化原理可为人工智能通信提供理论指导，信息瓶颈原则能有效平衡通信效率与复杂度。

This work demonstrates how fundamental principles that are believed to characterize human language evolution may inform emergent communication in artificial agents. 新兴的沟通研究通常侧重于优化特定任务的效用作为沟通的驱动力。然而，人类语言似乎在压力下进化，通过优化信息性和复杂性之间的信息瓶颈权衡，有效地将意义压缩为通信信号。在这项工作中，我们研究如何权衡这三个因素——实用性、信息性和复杂性——塑造紧急沟通，包括与人类沟通的比较。为此，我们提出了矢量量化变分信息瓶颈（VQ-VIB），一种训练神经代理将输入压缩为嵌入连续空间中的离散信号的方法。我们通过 VQ-VIB 训练智能体，并将其性能与之前提出的接地环境和 Lewis 参考游戏中的神经架构进行比较。在所有神经架构和设置中，考虑到交流信息量有利于交流收敛速度，而惩罚交流复杂性会导致类似于人类的词典大小，同时保持高实用性。此外，我们发现 VQ-VIB 的性能优于其他离散通信方法。这项工作展示了被认为是人类语言进化特征的基本原理如何为人工智能体的紧急交流提供信息。 本文研究如何通过平衡效用、信息量和复杂度三者关系，塑造人工智能代理的通信机制，并与人类语言进行对比。 Mycal Tucker,Julie Shah,Roger Levy,Noga Zaslavsky cs.AI,cs.CL

authors_text: Jung Hwan Heo,Arash Fayyazi,Amirhossein Esmaili,Massoud Pedram
title: Sparse Periodic Systolic Dataflow for Lowering Latency and Power Dissipation of Convolutional Neural Network Accelerators
title_zh: 用于降低卷积神经网络加速器延迟和功耗的稀疏周期性脉动数据流
comment: 6 pages, Published in ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Low Power Electronics and Design (ISLPED) 2022
comments: 6 pages, Published in ACM/IEEE International Symposium on Low Power Electronics and Design (ISLPED) 2022
abstract: This paper introduces the sparse periodic systolic (SPS) dataflow, which advances the state-of-the-art hardware accelerator for supporting lightweight neural networks. Specifically, the SPS dataflow enables a novel hardware design approach unlocked by an emergent pruning scheme, periodic pattern-based sparsity (PPS). By exploiting the regularity of PPS, our sparsity-aware compiler optimally reorders the weights and uses a simple indexing unit in hardware to create matches between the weights and activations. Through the compiler-hardware codesign, SPS dataflow enjoys higher degrees of parallelism while being free of the high indexing overhead and without model accuracy loss. Evaluated on popular benchmarks such as VGG and ResNet, the SPS dataflow and accompanying neural network compiler outperform prior work in convolutional neural network (CNN) accelerator designs targeting FPGA devices. Against other sparsity-supporting weight storage formats, SPS results in 4.49x energy efficiency gain while lowering storage requirements by 3.67x for total weight storage (non-pruned weights plus indexing) and 22,044x for indexing memory.
summary: This paper introduces the sparse periodic systolic (SPS) dataflow, which advances the state-of-the-art hardware accelerator for supporting lightweight neural networks. Specifically, the SPS dataflow enables a novel hardware design approach unlocked by an emergent pruning scheme, periodic pattern-based sparsity (PPS). By exploiting the regularity of PPS, our sparsity-aware compiler optimally reorders the weights and uses a simple indexing unit in hardware to create matches between the weights and activations. Through the compiler-hardware codesign, SPS dataflow enjoys higher degrees of parallelism while being free of the high indexing overhead and without model accuracy loss. Evaluated on popular benchmarks such as VGG and ResNet, the SPS dataflow and accompanying neural network compiler outperform prior work in convolutional neural network (CNN) accelerator designs targeting FPGA devices. Against other sparsity-supporting weight storage formats, SPS results in 4.49x energy efficiency gain while lowering storage requirements by 3.67x for total weight storage (non-pruned weights plus indexing) and 22,044x for indexing memory.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了稀疏周期性脉动 (SPS) 数据流，该数据流改进了支持轻量级神经网络的最先进的硬件加速器。具体来说，SPS 数据流实现了一种新颖的硬件设计方法，该方法通过紧急修剪方案、基于周期性模式的稀疏性 (PPS) 来解锁。通过利用 PPS 的规律性，我们的稀疏感知编译器可以对权重进行最佳重新排序，并使用硬件中的简单索引单元来创建权重和激活之间的匹配。通过编译器与硬件的协同设计，SPS数据流享有更高程度的并行性，同时没有高索引开销，并且没有模型精度损失。根据 VGG 和 ResNet 等流行基准进行评估，SPS 数据流和随附的神经网络编译器优于针对 FPGA 设备的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 加速器设计中的先前工作。与其他支持稀疏性的权重存储格式相比，SPS 带来了 4.49 倍的能效增益，同时将总权重存储（未修剪权重加索引）的存储要求降低了 3.67 倍，索引内存降低了 22,044 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SPS的数据流方法，通过结合周期性模式剪枝（PPS）和硬件编译器优化，降低卷积神经网络加速器的延迟和功耗。
AI.motivation: 现有CNN加速器在处理轻量级网络时面临高索引开销和存储需求的挑战，需更高效的硬件设计与编译器方案以提升能效。
AI.method: 设计SPS数据流，利用PPS剪枝的周期性规律，通过编译器优化权重排序并采用简单索引单元，实现高并行性且无需高索引开销的硬件加速。
AI.result: 在VGG和ResNet基准测试中，SPS相比其他方法能效提升4.49倍，总权重存储需求降低3.67倍，索引内存需求减少22,044倍。
AI.conclusion: SPS数据流与编译器协同设计显著提升了FPGA上CNN加速器的能效和存储效率，为轻量级神经网络加速提供了新方向。
