authors_text: Zhijie Wang,Masanori Suganuma,Takayuki Okatani
title: Rethinking Unsupervised Domain Adaptation for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 重新思考语义分割的无监督域适应
comment: Under review in Pattern Recognition Letters
comments: Under review in Pattern Recognition Letters
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) adapts a model trained on one domain (called source) to a novel domain (called target) using only unlabeled data. Due to its high annotation cost, researchers have developed many UDA methods for semantic segmentation, which assume no labeled sample is available in the target domain. We question the practicality of this assumption for two reasons. First, after training a model with a UDA method, we must somehow verify the model before deployment. Second, UDA methods have at least a few hyper-parameters that need to be determined. The surest solution to these is to evaluate the model using validation data, i.e., a certain amount of labeled target-domain samples. This question about the basic assumption of UDA leads us to rethink UDA from a data-centric point of view. Specifically, we assume we have access to a minimum level of labeled data. Then, we ask how much is necessary to find good hyper-parameters of existing UDA methods. We then consider what if we use the same data for supervised training of the same model, e.g., finetuning. We conducted experiments to answer these questions with popular scenarios, {GTA5, SYNTHIA}$\rightarrow$Cityscapes. We found that i) choosing good hyper-parameters needs only a few labeled images for some UDA methods whereas a lot more for others; and ii) simple finetuning works surprisingly well; it outperforms many UDA methods if only several dozens of labeled images are available.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) adapts a model trained on one domain (called source) to a novel domain (called target) using only unlabeled data. Due to its high annotation cost, researchers have developed many UDA methods for semantic segmentation, which assume no labeled sample is available in the target domain. We question the practicality of this assumption for two reasons. First, after training a model with a UDA method, we must somehow verify the model before deployment. Second, UDA methods have at least a few hyper-parameters that need to be determined. The surest solution to these is to evaluate the model using validation data, i.e., a certain amount of labeled target-domain samples. This question about the basic assumption of UDA leads us to rethink UDA from a data-centric point of view. Specifically, we assume we have access to a minimum level of labeled data. Then, we ask how much is necessary to find good hyper-parameters of existing UDA methods. We then consider what if we use the same data for supervised training of the same model, e.g., finetuning. We conducted experiments to answer these questions with popular scenarios, {GTA5, SYNTHIA}$\rightarrow$Cityscapes. We found that i) choosing good hyper-parameters needs only a few labeled images for some UDA methods whereas a lot more for others; and ii) simple finetuning works surprisingly well; it outperforms many UDA methods if only several dozens of labeled images are available.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应 (UDA) 仅使用未标记的数据将在一个域（称为源）上训练的模型调整到新域（称为目标）。由于注释成本较高，研究人员开发了许多用于语义分割的 UDA 方法，这些方法假设目标域中没有可用的标记样本。我们出于两个原因质疑这一假设的实用性。首先，在使用 UDA 方法训练模型后，我们必须在部署之前以某种方式验证模型。其次，UDA 方法至少有一些需要确定的超参数。最可靠的解决方案是使用验证数据（即一定量的标记目标域样本）评估模型。这个关于UDA基本假设的问题让我们从以数据为中心的角度重新思考UDA。具体来说，我们假设我们可以访问最低水平的标记数据。然后，我们问需要多少程度才能找到现有 UDA 方法的良好超参数。然后我们考虑如果我们使用相同的数据对相同模型进行监督训练（例如微调）会怎样。我们通过流行场景 {GTA5，SYNTHIA}$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 进行了实验来回答这些问题。我们发现 i) 对于某些 UDA 方法，选择好的超参数只需要一些标记图像，而对于其他方法则需要更多； ii) 简单的微调效果出奇的好；如果只有几十个标记图像可用，它的性能优于许多 UDA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文重新思考无监督域适应（UDA）在语义分割中的假设，提出在目标域中使用少量标注数据进行超参数调整和微调可能更有效。
AI.motivation: 传统UDA假设目标域无标注数据，但实际部署需验证模型和调整超参数，需一定标注数据。作者质疑这一假设的实用性，并从数据角度重新审视UDA。
AI.method: 假设存在少量标注数据，分析不同UDA方法对标注数据量的需求，并比较使用相同数据进行微调的效果。实验基于GTA5/SYNTHIA→Cityscapes场景。
AI.result: 部分UDA方法仅需少量标注图像即可调整超参数，而其他方法需要更多数据；微调在仅有数十张标注图像时表现优于许多UDA方法。
AI.conclusion: 传统UDA假设不切实际，少量标注数据用于超参数调整或微调更高效，建议重新设计更数据高效的UDA方法。

We found that i) choosing good hyper-parameters needs only a few labeled images for some UDA methods whereas a lot more for others; and ii) simple finetuning works surprisingly well; it outperforms many UDA methods if only several dozens of labeled images are available. 无监督域适应 (UDA) 仅使用未标记的数据将在一个域（称为源）上训练的模型调整到新域（称为目标）。由于注释成本较高，研究人员开发了许多用于语义分割的 UDA 方法，这些方法假设目标域中没有可用的标记样本。我们出于两个原因质疑这一假设的实用性。首先，在使用 UDA 方法训练模型后，我们必须在部署之前以某种方式验证模型。其次，UDA 方法至少有一些需要确定的超参数。最可靠的解决方案是使用验证数据（即一定量的标记目标域样本）评估模型。这个关于UDA基本假设的问题让我们从以数据为中心的角度重新思考UDA。具体来说，我们假设我们可以访问最低水平的标记数据。然后，我们问需要多少程度才能找到现有 UDA 方法的良好超参数。然后我们考虑如果我们使用相同的数据对相同模型进行监督训练（例如微调）会怎样。我们通过流行场景 {GTA5，SYNTHIA}$\rightarrow$Cityscapes 进行了实验来回答这些问题。我们发现 i) 对于某些 UDA 方法，选择好的超参数只需要一些标记图像，而对于其他方法则需要更多； ii) 简单的微调效果出奇的好；如果只有几十个标记图像可用，它的性能优于许多 UDA 方法。 本文重新思考无监督域适应（UDA）在语义分割中的假设，提出在目标域中使用少量标注数据进行超参数调整和微调可能更有效。 Zhijie Wang,Masanori Suganuma,Takayuki Okatani cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Shuja Khalid,Francisco Matos,Ayman Abunimer,Joel Bartlett,Richard Duszak,Michal Horny,Judy Gichoya,Imon Banerjee,Hari Trivedi
title: Advances in Prediction of Readmission Rates Using Long Term Short Term Memory Networks on Healthcare Insurance Data
title_zh: 使用长期短期记忆网络对医疗保险数据预测再入院率的进展
abstract: 30-day hospital readmission is a long standing medical problem that affects patients' morbidity and mortality and costs billions of dollars annually. Recently, machine learning models have been created to predict risk of inpatient readmission for patients with specific diseases, however no model exists to predict this risk across all patients. We developed a bi-directional Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) Network that is able to use readily available insurance data (inpatient visits, outpatient visits, and drug prescriptions) to predict 30 day re-admission for any admitted patient, regardless of reason. The top-performing model achieved an ROC AUC of 0.763 (0.011) when using historical, inpatient, and post-discharge data. The LSTM model significantly outperformed a baseline random forest classifier, indicating that understanding the sequence of events is important for model prediction. Incorporation of 30-days of historical data also significantly improved model performance compared to inpatient data alone, indicating that a patients clinical history prior to admission, including outpatient visits and pharmacy data is a strong contributor to readmission. Our results demonstrate that a machine learning model is able to predict risk of inpatient readmission with reasonable accuracy for all patients using structured insurance billing data. Because billing data or equivalent surrogates can be extracted from sites, such a model could be deployed to identify patients at risk for readmission before they are discharged, or to assign more robust follow up (closer follow up, home health, mailed medications) to at-risk patients after discharge.
summary: 30-day hospital readmission is a long standing medical problem that affects patients' morbidity and mortality and costs billions of dollars annually. Recently, machine learning models have been created to predict risk of inpatient readmission for patients with specific diseases, however no model exists to predict this risk across all patients. We developed a bi-directional Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) Network that is able to use readily available insurance data (inpatient visits, outpatient visits, and drug prescriptions) to predict 30 day re-admission for any admitted patient, regardless of reason. The top-performing model achieved an ROC AUC of 0.763 (0.011) when using historical, inpatient, and post-discharge data. The LSTM model significantly outperformed a baseline random forest classifier, indicating that understanding the sequence of events is important for model prediction. Incorporation of 30-days of historical data also significantly improved model performance compared to inpatient data alone, indicating that a patients clinical history prior to admission, including outpatient visits and pharmacy data is a strong contributor to readmission. Our results demonstrate that a machine learning model is able to predict risk of inpatient readmission with reasonable accuracy for all patients using structured insurance billing data. Because billing data or equivalent surrogates can be extracted from sites, such a model could be deployed to identify patients at risk for readmission before they are discharged, or to assign more robust follow up (closer follow up, home health, mailed medications) to at-risk patients after discharge.
abstract_zh: 30 天再入院是一个长期存在的医疗问题，影响患者的发病率和死亡率，每年造成数十亿美元的损失。最近，已经创建了机器学习模型来预测患有特定疾病的患者再次入院的风险，但是没有模型可以预测所有患者的这种风险。我们开发了一个双向长短期记忆 (LSTM) 网络，能够使用现成的保险数据（住院就诊、门诊就诊和药物处方）来预测任何入院患者的 30 天再次入院情况，无论其原因如何。使用历史数据、住院患者数据和出院后数据时，表现最佳的模型的 ROC AUC 为 0.763 (0.011)。 LSTM 模型的性能显着优于基线随机森林分类器，这表明了解事件序列对于模型预测非常重要。与单独的住院患者数据相比，纳入 30 天的历史数据也显着提高了模型性能，这表明患者入院前的临床病史（包括门诊就诊和药房数据）是导致再入院的重要因素。我们的结果表明，机器学习模型能够使用结构化保险计费数据以合理的准确性预测所有患者的住院再入院风险。由于可以从站点提取账单数据或等效替代数据，因此可以部署这样的模型来识别出院前有重新入院风险的患者，或者在出院后为高风险患者分配更强有力的随访（更密切的随访、家庭健康、邮寄药物）。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于双向长短期记忆网络（LSTM）的模型，利用医疗保险数据预测所有住院患者的30天再入院风险。
AI.motivation: 30天内再入院问题导致患者健康风险增加且医疗成本高昂，现有模型仅针对特定疾病，缺乏适用于所有患者的通用预测方法。
AI.method: 采用双向LSTM网络，整合患者的历史住院记录、门诊记录和处方数据，对比随机森林分类器验证模型效果。
AI.result: 模型在ROC AUC指标上达到0.763（标准差0.011），显著优于随机森林，且结合30天历史数据可提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 基于结构化保险数据的LSTM模型能有效预测全患者群体的再入院风险，可用于出院前风险预警及后续干预措施优化。

authors_text: Paul Pu Liang,Yiwei Lyu,Gunjan Chhablani,Nihal Jain,Zihao Deng,Xingbo Wang,Louis-Philippe Morency,Ruslan Salakhutdinov
title: MultiViz: Towards Visualizing and Understanding Multimodal Models
title_zh: MultiViz：走向可视化和理解多模式模型
abstract: The promise of multimodal models for real-world applications has inspired research in visualizing and understanding their internal mechanics with the end goal of empowering stakeholders to visualize model behavior, perform model debugging, and promote trust in machine learning models. However, modern multimodal models are typically black-box neural networks, which makes it challenging to understand their internal mechanics. How can we visualize the internal modeling of multimodal interactions in these models? Our paper aims to fill this gap by proposing MultiViz, a method for analyzing the behavior of multimodal models by scaffolding the problem of interpretability into 4 stages: (1) unimodal importance: how each modality contributes towards downstream modeling and prediction, (2) cross-modal interactions: how different modalities relate with each other, (3) multimodal representations: how unimodal and cross-modal interactions are represented in decision-level features, and (4) multimodal prediction: how decision-level features are composed to make a prediction. MultiViz is designed to operate on diverse modalities, models, tasks, and research areas. Through experiments on 8 trained models across 6 real-world tasks, we show that the complementary stages in MultiViz together enable users to (1) simulate model predictions, (2) assign interpretable concepts to features, (3) perform error analysis on model misclassifications, and (4) use insights from error analysis to debug models. MultiViz is publicly available, will be regularly updated with new interpretation tools and metrics, and welcomes inputs from the community.
summary: The promise of multimodal models for real-world applications has inspired research in visualizing and understanding their internal mechanics with the end goal of empowering stakeholders to visualize model behavior, perform model debugging, and promote trust in machine learning models. However, modern multimodal models are typically black-box neural networks, which makes it challenging to understand their internal mechanics. How can we visualize the internal modeling of multimodal interactions in these models? Our paper aims to fill this gap by proposing MultiViz, a method for analyzing the behavior of multimodal models by scaffolding the problem of interpretability into 4 stages: (1) unimodal importance: how each modality contributes towards downstream modeling and prediction, (2) cross-modal interactions: how different modalities relate with each other, (3) multimodal representations: how unimodal and cross-modal interactions are represented in decision-level features, and (4) multimodal prediction: how decision-level features are composed to make a prediction. MultiViz is designed to operate on diverse modalities, models, tasks, and research areas. Through experiments on 8 trained models across 6 real-world tasks, we show that the complementary stages in MultiViz together enable users to (1) simulate model predictions, (2) assign interpretable concepts to features, (3) perform error analysis on model misclassifications, and (4) use insights from error analysis to debug models. MultiViz is publicly available, will be regularly updated with new interpretation tools and metrics, and welcomes inputs from the community.
abstract_zh: 多模态模型对现实世界应用的承诺激发了人们对可视化和理解其内部机制的研究，最终目标是使利益相关者能够可视化模型行为、执行模型调试并促进对机器学习模型的信任。然而，现代多模态模型通常是黑盒神经网络，这使得理解其内部机制变得具有挑战性。我们如何可视化这些模型中多模式交互的内部建模？我们的论文旨在通过提出 MultiViz 来填补这一空白，这是一种通过将可解释性问题分为 4 个阶段来分析多模态模型行为的方法：(1) 单模态重要性：每种模态如何对下游建模和预测做出贡献，(2) 跨模态交互：不同模态如何相互关联，(3) 多模态表示：如何在决策级特征中表示单模态和跨模态交互，(4) 多模态预测：如何组合决策级特征以生成预测。 MultiViz 旨在针对不同的模式、模型、任务和研究领域进行操作。通过对 6 个现实世界任务中的 8 个经过训练的模型进行实验，我们表明 MultiViz 中的互补阶段使用户能够 (1) 模拟模型预测，(2) 将可解释的概念分配给特征，(3) 对模型错误分类进行错误分析，以及 (4) 使用错误分析的见解来调试模型。 MultiViz 是公开可用的，将定期更新新的解释工具和指标，并欢迎社区提供意见。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MultiViz方法，通过四个阶段分析多模态模型的内部机制，以提升模型可视化、调试和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 多模态模型作为黑箱难以理解，需通过可视化方法帮助用户分析其行为、调试错误并建立信任。
AI.method: 将可解释性问题分解为四个阶段：单模态重要性、跨模态交互、多模态表示及预测，适用于多种模态和任务。
AI.result: 在8个模型6个任务中验证，MultiViz能模拟预测、赋予特征概念、分析错误并指导模型调试。
AI.conclusion: MultiViz为多模态模型提供通用分析框架，未来将持续更新工具并开放社区协作。

MultiViz is designed to operate on diverse modalities, models, tasks, and research areas. Through experiments on 8 trained models across 6 real-world tasks, we show that the complementary stages in MultiViz together enable users to (1) simulate model predictions, (2) assign interpretable concepts to features, (3) perform error analysis on model misclassifications, and (4) use insights from error analysis to debug models. MultiViz is publicly available, will be regularly updated with new interpretation tools and metrics, and welcomes inputs from the community. 多模态模型对现实世界应用的承诺激发了人们对可视化和理解其内部机制的研究，最终目标是使利益相关者能够可视化模型行为、执行模型调试并促进对机器学习模型的信任。然而，现代多模态模型通常是黑盒神经网络，这使得理解其内部机制变得具有挑战性。我们如何可视化这些模型中多模式交互的内部建模？我们的论文旨在通过提出 MultiViz 来填补这一空白，这是一种通过将可解释性问题分为 4 个阶段来分析多模态模型行为的方法：(1) 单模态重要性：每种模态如何对下游建模和预测做出贡献，(2) 跨模态交互：不同模态如何相互关联，(3) 多模态表示：如何在决策级特征中表示单模态和跨模态交互，(4) 多模态预测：如何组合决策级特征以生成预测。 MultiViz 旨在针对不同的模式、模型、任务和研究领域进行操作。通过对 6 个现实世界任务中的 8 个经过训练的模型进行实验，我们表明 MultiViz 中的互补阶段使用户能够 (1) 模拟模型预测，(2) 将可解释的概念分配给特征，(3) 对模型错误分类进行错误分析，以及 (4) 使用错误分析的见解来调试模型。 MultiViz 是公开可用的，将定期更新新的解释工具和指标，并欢迎社区提供意见。 本文提出MultiViz方法，通过四个阶段分析多模态模型的内部机制，以提升模型可视化、调试和可解释性。 Paul Pu Liang,Yiwei Lyu,Gunjan Chhablani,Nihal Jain,Zihao Deng,Xingbo Wang,Louis-Philippe Morency,Ruslan Salakhutdinov cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.MM

authors_text: Yanwei Wang,Ching-Yun Ko,Pulkit Agrawal
title: Visual Pre-training for Navigation: What Can We Learn from Noise?
title_zh: 导航视觉预训练：我们可以从噪声中学到什么？
abstract: One powerful paradigm in visual navigation is to predict actions from observations directly. Training such an end-to-end system allows representations useful for downstream tasks to emerge automatically. However, the lack of inductive bias makes this system data inefficient. We hypothesize a sufficient representation of the current view and the goal view for a navigation policy can be learned by predicting the location and size of a crop of the current view that corresponds to the goal. We further show that training such random crop prediction in a self-supervised fashion purely on synthetic noise images transfers well to natural home images. The learned representation can then be bootstrapped to learn a navigation policy efficiently with little interaction data. The code is available at https://yanweiw.github.io/noise2ptz
summary: One powerful paradigm in visual navigation is to predict actions from observations directly. Training such an end-to-end system allows representations useful for downstream tasks to emerge automatically. However, the lack of inductive bias makes this system data inefficient. We hypothesize a sufficient representation of the current view and the goal view for a navigation policy can be learned by predicting the location and size of a crop of the current view that corresponds to the goal. We further show that training such random crop prediction in a self-supervised fashion purely on synthetic noise images transfers well to natural home images. The learned representation can then be bootstrapped to learn a navigation policy efficiently with little interaction data. The code is available at https://yanweiw.github.io/noise2ptz
abstract_zh: 视觉导航中的一种强大范例是直接根据观察预测动作。训练这样的端到端系统可以自动出现对下游任务有用的表示。然而，缺乏归纳偏差使得该系统数据效率低下。我们假设可以通过预测与目标相对应的当前视图的裁剪的位置和大小来学习导航策略的当前视图和目标视图的充分表示。我们进一步表明，纯粹在合成噪声图像上以自我监督的方式训练这种随机作物预测可以很好地转移到自然家庭图像。然后可以引导学习到的表示，以利用很少的交互数据有效地学习导航策略。代码可在 https://yanweiw.github.io/noise2ptz 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于噪声数据的视觉预训练方法，用于导航任务中的表示学习。
AI.motivation: 端到端视觉导航系统因缺乏归纳偏置导致数据效率低下，需探索更高效的预训练方式。
AI.method: 通过自监督学习预测当前视角与目标视角的随机裁剪区域，在合成噪声图像上训练后迁移到真实家居图像。
AI.result: 预训练表示能有效引导导航策略学习，仅需少量交互数据即可实现高效导航。
AI.conclusion: 噪声数据预训练可生成鲁棒的视觉表示，为导航任务提供有效的特征学习途径。

authors_text: Wengang Zhou,Weilun Wang,Jianmin Bao,Dongdong Chen,Dong Chen,Lu Yuan,Houqiang Li
title: Semantic Image Synthesis via Diffusion Models
title_zh: 通过扩散模型进行语义图像合成
abstract: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have achieved remarkable success in various image generation tasks compared with Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs). Recent work on semantic image synthesis mainly follows the de facto GAN-based approaches, which may lead to unsatisfactory quality or diversity of generated images. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on DDPM for semantic image synthesis. Unlike previous conditional diffusion model directly feeds the semantic layout and noisy image as input to a U-Net structure, which may not fully leverage the information in the input semantic mask, our framework processes semantic layout and noisy image differently. It feeds noisy image to the encoder of the U-Net structure while the semantic layout to the decoder by multi-layer spatially-adaptive normalization operators. To further improve the generation quality and semantic interpretability in semantic image synthesis, we introduce the classifier-free guidance sampling strategy, which acknowledge the scores of an unconditional model for sampling process. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, achieving state-of-the-art performance in terms of fidelity (FID) and diversity (LPIPS). Our code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/WeilunWang/semantic-diffusion-model.
summary: Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models (DDPMs) have achieved remarkable success in various image generation tasks compared with Generative Adversarial Nets (GANs). Recent work on semantic image synthesis mainly follows the de facto GAN-based approaches, which may lead to unsatisfactory quality or diversity of generated images. In this paper, we propose a novel framework based on DDPM for semantic image synthesis. Unlike previous conditional diffusion model directly feeds the semantic layout and noisy image as input to a U-Net structure, which may not fully leverage the information in the input semantic mask, our framework processes semantic layout and noisy image differently. It feeds noisy image to the encoder of the U-Net structure while the semantic layout to the decoder by multi-layer spatially-adaptive normalization operators. To further improve the generation quality and semantic interpretability in semantic image synthesis, we introduce the classifier-free guidance sampling strategy, which acknowledge the scores of an unconditional model for sampling process. Extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method, achieving state-of-the-art performance in terms of fidelity (FID) and diversity (LPIPS). Our code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/WeilunWang/semantic-diffusion-model.
abstract_zh: 与生成对抗网络（GAN）相比，去噪扩散概率模型（DDPM）在各种图像生成任务中取得了显着的成功。最近关于语义图像合成的工作主要遵循事实上的基于 GAN 的方法，这可能会导致生成图像的质量或多样性不令人满意。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 DDPM 的语义图像合成新框架。与之前的条件扩散模型直接将语义布局和噪声图像作为 U-Net 结构的输入不同，这可能无法充分利用输入语义掩码中的信息，我们的框架以不同的方式处理语义布局和噪声图像。它将噪声图像馈送到 U-Net 结构的编码器，同时通过多层空间自适应归一化算子将语义布局馈送到解码器。为了进一步提高语义图像合成中的生成质量和语义可解释性，我们引入了无分类器引导采样策略，该策略承认采样过程的无条件模型的分数。对四个基准数据集的广泛实验证明了我们提出的方法的有效性，在保真度（FID）和多样性（LPIPS）方面实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/WeilunWang/semantic-diffusion-model 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于扩散模型的语义图像合成框架，解决传统GAN方法在生成质量和多样性上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有语义图像合成主要依赖GAN方法，但存在生成质量或多样性不足的问题，而扩散模型在图像生成任务中表现更优。
AI.method: 设计差异化的输入处理机制，将噪声图像输入U-Net编码器，语义布局通过多层空间自适应归一化输入解码器，并引入无分类器引导采样策略提升生成效果。
AI.result: 在四个基准数据集上达到最先进水平，在保真度（FID）和多样性（LPIPS）指标上表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效提升了语义图像合成的质量与多样性，代码和预训练模型已开源。

Unlike previous conditional diffusion model directly feeds the semantic layout and noisy image as input to a U-Net structure, which may not fully leverage the information in the input semantic mask, our framework processes semantic layout and noisy image differently. It feeds noisy image to the encoder of the U-Net structure while the semantic layout to the decoder by multi-layer spatially-adaptive normalization operators. authors_text: Shuang Dai,Fanlin Meng,Qian Wang,Xizhong Chen
title: DP$^2$-NILM: A Distributed and Privacy-preserving Framework for Non-intrusive Load Monitoring
title_zh: DP$^2$-NILM：用于非侵入式负载监控的分布式隐私保护框架
abstract: Non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM), which usually utilizes machine learning methods and is effective in disaggregating smart meter readings from the household-level into appliance-level consumption, can help analyze electricity consumption behaviours of users and enable practical smart energy and smart grid applications. Recent studies have proposed many novel NILM frameworks based on federated deep learning (FL). However, there lacks comprehensive research exploring the utility optimization schemes and the privacy-preserving schemes in different FL-based NILM application scenarios. In this paper, we make the first attempt to conduct FL-based NILM focusing on both the utility optimization and the privacy-preserving by developing a distributed and privacy-preserving NILM (DP2-NILM) framework and carrying out comparative experiments on practical NILM scenarios based on real-world smart meter datasets. Specifically, two alternative federated learning strategies are examined in the utility optimization schemes, i.e., the FedAvg and the FedProx. Moreover, different levels of privacy guarantees, i.e., the local differential privacy federated learning and the global differential privacy federated learning are provided in the DP2-NILM. Extensive comparison experiments are conducted on three real-world datasets to evaluate the proposed framework.
summary: Non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM), which usually utilizes machine learning methods and is effective in disaggregating smart meter readings from the household-level into appliance-level consumption, can help analyze electricity consumption behaviours of users and enable practical smart energy and smart grid applications. Recent studies have proposed many novel NILM frameworks based on federated deep learning (FL). However, there lacks comprehensive research exploring the utility optimization schemes and the privacy-preserving schemes in different FL-based NILM application scenarios. In this paper, we make the first attempt to conduct FL-based NILM focusing on both the utility optimization and the privacy-preserving by developing a distributed and privacy-preserving NILM (DP2-NILM) framework and carrying out comparative experiments on practical NILM scenarios based on real-world smart meter datasets. Specifically, two alternative federated learning strategies are examined in the utility optimization schemes, i.e., the FedAvg and the FedProx. Moreover, different levels of privacy guarantees, i.e., the local differential privacy federated learning and the global differential privacy federated learning are provided in the DP2-NILM. Extensive comparison experiments are conducted on three real-world datasets to evaluate the proposed framework.
abstract_zh: 非侵入式负荷监测（NILM）通常利用机器学习方法，可以有效地将智能电表读数从家庭层面分解为电器层面的消耗，可以帮助分析用户的用电行为，并实现智能能源和智能电网的实际应用。最近的研究提出了许多基于联邦深度学习（FL）的新颖的 NILM 框架。然而，缺乏全面的研究来探索不同基于 FL 的 NILM 应用场景中的效用优化方案和隐私保护方案。在本文中，我们通过开发分布式和隐私保护的NILM（DP2-NILM）框架并基于真实智能电表数据集对实际NILM场景进行比较实验，首次尝试进行基于FL的NILM，注重效用优化和隐私保护。具体来说，在效用优化方案中检查了两种替代的联邦学习策略，即 FedAvg 和 FedProx。此外，DP2-NILM中提供了不同级别的隐私保证，即局部差分隐私联邦学习和全局差分隐私联邦学习。在三个现实世界数据集上进行了广泛的比较实验，以评估所提出的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DP²-NILM框架，在联邦学习基础上结合非侵入式负荷监测，同时优化实用性与隐私保护。
AI.motivation: 现有基于联邦学习的NILM研究缺乏对实用性优化与隐私保护方案的综合探索，需在实际场景中平衡二者。
AI.method: 采用FedAvg与FedProx两种联邦学习策略进行实用性优化，并引入本地与全局差分隐私机制，基于真实电表数据集进行对比实验。
AI.result: 实验表明DP²-NILM在三个真实数据集上有效提升了隐私保护水平，同时保持较高的负荷分解准确性。
AI.conclusion: DP²-NILM框架为智能电网应用提供了兼顾隐私与实用性的分布式NILM解决方案，验证了联邦学习在该领域的可行性。

search_text: DP$^2$-NILM: A Distributed and Privacy-preserving Framework for Non-intrusive Load Monitoring DP$^2$-NILM：用于非侵入式负载监控的分布式隐私保护框架 Non-intrusive load monitoring (NILM), which usually utilizes machine learning methods and is effective in disaggregating smart meter readings from the household-level into appliance-level consumption, can help analyze electricity consumption behaviours of users and enable practical smart energy and smart grid applications. Recent studies have proposed many novel NILM frameworks based on federated deep learning (FL). However, there lacks comprehensive research exploring the utility optimization schemes and the privacy-preserving schemes in different FL-based NILM application scenarios. In this paper, we make the first attempt to conduct FL-based NILM focusing on both the utility optimization and the privacy-preserving by developing a distributed and privacy-preserving NILM (DP2-NILM) framework and carrying out comparative experiments on practical NILM scenarios based on real-world smart meter datasets. Specifically, two alternative federated learning strategies are examined in the utility optimization schemes, i.e., the FedAvg and the FedProx. Moreover, different levels of privacy guarantees, i.e., the local differential privacy federated learning and the global differential privacy federated learning are provided in the DP2-NILM. Extensive comparison experiments are conducted on three real-world datasets to evaluate the proposed framework. 非侵入式负荷监测（NILM）通常利用机器学习方法，可以有效地将智能电表读数从家庭层面分解为电器层面的消耗，可以帮助分析用户的用电行为，并实现智能能源和智能电网的实际应用。最近的研究提出了许多基于联邦深度学习（FL）的新颖的 NILM 框架。然而，缺乏全面的研究来探索不同基于 FL 的 NILM 应用场景中的效用优化方案和隐私保护方案。在本文中，我们通过开发分布式和隐私保护的NILM（DP2-NILM）框架并基于真实智能电表数据集对实际NILM场景进行比较实验，首次尝试进行基于FL的NILM，注重效用优化和隐私保护。具体来说，在效用优化方案中检查了两种替代的联邦学习策略，即 FedAvg 和 FedProx。此外，DP2-NILM中提供了不同级别的隐私保证，即局部差分隐私联邦学习和全局差分隐私联邦学习。在三个现实世界数据集上进行了广泛的比较实验，以评估所提出的框架。 本文提出DP²-NILM框架，在联邦学习基础上结合非侵入式负荷监测，同时优化实用性与隐私保护。 Shuang Dai,Fanlin Meng,Qian Wang,Xizhong Chen cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Lingdong Kong,Jiawei Ren,Liang Pan,Ziwei Liu
title: LaserMix for Semi-Supervised LiDAR Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 用于半监督 LiDAR 语义分割的 LaserMix
comment: CVPR 2023 (Highlight); 27 pages, 11 figures, 12 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/LaserMix
comments: CVPR 2023 (Highlight); 27 pages, 11 figures, 12 tables; Code at https://github.com/ldkong1205/LaserMix
abstract: Densely annotating LiDAR point clouds is costly, which restrains the scalability of fully-supervised learning methods. In this work, we study the underexplored semi-supervised learning (SSL) in LiDAR segmentation. Our core idea is to leverage the strong spatial cues of LiDAR point clouds to better exploit unlabeled data. We propose LaserMix to mix laser beams from different LiDAR scans, and then encourage the model to make consistent and confident predictions before and after mixing. Our framework has three appealing properties: 1) Generic: LaserMix is agnostic to LiDAR representations (e.g., range view and voxel), and hence our SSL framework can be universally applied. 2) Statistically grounded: We provide a detailed analysis to theoretically explain the applicability of the proposed framework. 3) Effective: Comprehensive experimental analysis on popular LiDAR segmentation datasets (nuScenes, SemanticKITTI, and ScribbleKITTI) demonstrates our effectiveness and superiority. Notably, we achieve competitive results over fully-supervised counterparts with 2x to 5x fewer labels and improve the supervised-only baseline significantly by 10.8% on average. We hope this concise yet high-performing framework could facilitate future research in semi-supervised LiDAR segmentation. Code is publicly available.
summary: Densely annotating LiDAR point clouds is costly, which restrains the scalability of fully-supervised learning methods. In this work, we study the underexplored semi-supervised learning (SSL) in LiDAR segmentation. Our core idea is to leverage the strong spatial cues of LiDAR point clouds to better exploit unlabeled data. We propose LaserMix to mix laser beams from different LiDAR scans, and then encourage the model to make consistent and confident predictions before and after mixing. Our framework has three appealing properties: 1) Generic: LaserMix is agnostic to LiDAR representations (e.g., range view and voxel), and hence our SSL framework can be universally applied. 2) Statistically grounded: We provide a detailed analysis to theoretically explain the applicability of the proposed framework. 3) Effective: Comprehensive experimental analysis on popular LiDAR segmentation datasets (nuScenes, SemanticKITTI, and ScribbleKITTI) demonstrates our effectiveness and superiority. Notably, we achieve competitive results over fully-supervised counterparts with 2x to 5x fewer labels and improve the supervised-only baseline significantly by 10.8% on average. We hope this concise yet high-performing framework could facilitate future research in semi-supervised LiDAR segmentation. Code is publicly available.
abstract_zh: 密集注释激光雷达点云的成本很高，这限制了全监督学习方法的可扩展性。在这项工作中，我们研究了 LiDAR 分割中尚未探索的半监督学习（SSL）。我们的核心思想是利用激光雷达点云的强大空间线索来更好地利用未标记的数据。我们建议 LaserMix 混合来自不同 LiDAR 扫描的激光束，然后鼓励模型在混合前后做出一致且自信的预测。我们的框架具有三个吸引人的特性：1）通用：LaserMix 与 LiDAR 表示（例如范围视图和体素）无关，因此我们的 SSL 框架可以普遍应用。 2）统计依据：我们提供详细的分析，从理论上解释所提出框架的适用性。 3）有效：对流行的LiDAR分割数据集（nuScenes、SemanticKITTI和ScribbleKITTI）的综合实验分析证明了我们的有效性和优越性。值得注意的是，与完全监督的同行相比，我们取得了有竞争力的结果，标签数量减少了 2 到 5 倍，并且仅监督基线平均显着提高了 10.8%。我们希望这个简洁而高性能的框架能够促进半监督激光雷达分割的未来研究。代码是公开的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LaserMix方法，用于半监督LiDAR语义分割，通过混合激光束并利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: LiDAR点云密集标注成本高昂，限制了全监督学习方法的扩展性，需探索更高效的半监督学习框架。
AI.method: 设计LaserMix技术混合不同扫描的激光束，通过强制模型在混合前后保持预测一致性和置信度，构建通用且理论支持的半监督框架。
AI.result: 在nuScenes、SemanticKITTI和ScribbleKITTI数据集上，使用2-5倍更少标签即达到全监督效果，相较监督基线平均提升10.8%。
AI.conclusion: LaserMix是一个高效且通用的半监督LiDAR分割框架，有望推动该领域研究，代码已开源。

Notably, we achieve competitive results over fully-supervised counterparts with 2x to 5x fewer labels and improve the supervised-only baseline significantly by 10.8% on average. authors_text: Federico Matteoni,Andrea Cossu,Claudio Gallicchio,Vincenzo Lomonaco,Davide Bacciu
title: Continual Learning for Human State Monitoring
title_zh: 人类状态监测的持续学习
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, Accepted as oral at ESANN 2022
comments: 6 pages, 4 figures, 2 tables, Accepted as oral at ESANN 2022
abstract: Continual Learning (CL) on time series data represents a promising but under-studied avenue for real-world applications. We propose two new CL benchmarks for Human State Monitoring. We carefully designed the benchmarks to mirror real-world environments in which new subjects are continuously added. We conducted an empirical evaluation to assess the ability of popular CL strategies to mitigate forgetting in our benchmarks. Our results show that, possibly due to the domain-incremental properties of our benchmarks, forgetting can be easily tackled even with a simple finetuning and that existing strategies struggle in accumulating knowledge over a fixed, held-out, test subject.
summary: Continual Learning (CL) on time series data represents a promising but under-studied avenue for real-world applications. We propose two new CL benchmarks for Human State Monitoring. We carefully designed the benchmarks to mirror real-world environments in which new subjects are continuously added. We conducted an empirical evaluation to assess the ability of popular CL strategies to mitigate forgetting in our benchmarks. Our results show that, possibly due to the domain-incremental properties of our benchmarks, forgetting can be easily tackled even with a simple finetuning and that existing strategies struggle in accumulating knowledge over a fixed, held-out, test subject.
abstract_zh: 时间序列数据的持续学习（CL）代表了现实世界应用的一种有前景但尚未得到充分研究的途径。我们提出了两个新的人类状态监测 CL 基准。我们精心设计了基准来反映不断添加新主题的现实环境。我们进行了实证评估，以评估流行的 CL 策略在我们的基准测试中减轻遗忘的能力。我们的结果表明，可能由于我们的基准测试的领域增量特性，即使通过简单的微调也可以轻松解决遗忘问题，并且现有策略很难在固定的、保留的测试主题上积累知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个用于人类状态监控的持续学习基准测试，并评估现有持续学习策略在应对遗忘和知识积累方面的表现。
AI.motivation: 持续学习在时间序列数据中的应用尚未充分研究，尤其在真实环境中需处理新用户持续加入的场景，现有方法在长期知识积累上存在不足。
AI.method: 设计两个模拟真实环境的持续学习基准，通过不断添加新受试者，评估主流持续学习策略在减少遗忘和知识积累上的效果。
AI.result: 实验表明，简单微调即可有效缓解遗忘，但现有策略在固定测试受试者的长期知识积累上表现不佳。
AI.conclusion: 基准的领域增量特性使简单方法有效，但现有持续学习策略在长期知识保留方面仍需改进。

We propose two new CL benchmarks for Human State Monitoring. We carefully designed the benchmarks to mirror real-world environments in which new subjects are continuously added. We conducted an empirical evaluation to assess the ability of popular CL strategies to mitigate forgetting in our benchmarks. Our results show that, possibly due to the domain-incremental properties of our benchmarks, forgetting can be easily tackled even with a simple finetuning and that existing strategies struggle in accumulating knowledge over a fixed, held-out, test subject. 时间序列数据的持续学习（CL）代表了现实世界应用的一种有前景但尚未得到充分研究的途径。我们提出了两个新的人类状态监测 CL 基准。我们精心设计了基准来反映不断添加新主题的现实环境。我们进行了实证评估，以评估流行的 CL 策略在我们的基准测试中减轻遗忘的能力。我们的结果表明，可能由于我们的基准测试的领域增量特性，即使通过简单的微调也可以轻松解决遗忘问题，并且现有策略很难在固定的、保留的测试主题上积累知识。 本文提出两个用于人类状态监控的持续学习基准测试，并评估现有持续学习策略在应对遗忘和知识积累方面的表现。 Federico Matteoni,Andrea Cossu,Claudio Gallicchio,Vincenzo Lomonaco,Davide Bacciu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Harry Wixley
title: Smart Application for Fall Detection Using Wearable ECG & Accelerometer Sensors
title_zh: 使用可穿戴心电图和加速度计传感器进行跌倒检测的智能应用
abstract: Timely and reliable detection of falls is a large and rapidly growing field of research due to the medical and financial demand of caring for a constantly growing elderly population. Within the past 2 decades, the availability of high-quality hardware (high-quality sensors and AI microchips) and software (machine learning algorithms) technologies has served as a catalyst for this research by giving developers the capabilities to develop such systems. This study developed multiple application components in order to investigate the development challenges and choices for fall detection systems, and provide materials for future research. The smart application developed using this methodology was validated by the results from fall detection modelling experiments and model mobile deployment. The best performing model overall was the ResNet152 on a standardised, and shuffled dataset with a 2s window size which achieved 92.8% AUC, 87.28% sensitivity, and 98.33% specificity. Given these results it is evident that accelerometer and ECG sensors are beneficial for fall detection, and allow for the discrimination between falls and other activities. This study leaves a significant amount of room for improvement due to weaknesses identified in the resultant dataset. These improvements include using a labelling protocol for the critical phase of a fall, increasing the number of dataset samples, improving the test subject representation, and experimenting with frequency domain preprocessing.

Within the past 2 decades, the availability of high-quality hardware (high-quality sensors and AI microchips) and software (machine learning algorithms) technologies has served as a catalyst for this research by giving developers the capabilities to develop such systems. This study developed multiple application components in order to investigate the development challenges and choices for fall detection systems, and provide materials for future research. The smart application developed using this methodology was validated by the results from fall detection modelling experiments and model mobile deployment. The best performing model overall was the ResNet152 on a standardised, and shuffled dataset with a 2s window size which achieved 92.8% AUC, 87.28% sensitivity, and 98.33% specificity. Given these results it is evident that accelerometer and ECG sensors are beneficial for fall detection, and allow for the discrimination between falls and other activities. This study leaves a significant amount of room for improvement due to weaknesses identified in the resultant dataset. These improvements include using a labelling protocol for the critical phase of a fall, increasing the number of dataset samples, improving the test subject representation, and experimenting with frequency domain preprocessing.
abstract_zh: 由于照顾不断增长的老年人口的医疗和财务需求，及时、可靠地检测跌倒是一个庞大且快速发展的研究领域。在过去的二十年里，高质量硬件（高质量传感器和人工智能微芯片）和软件（机器学习算法）技术的出现为开发人员提供了开发此类系统的能力，从而成为这项研究的催化剂。本研究开发了多个应用组件，以调查跌倒检测系统的开发挑战和选择，并为未来的研究提供材料。使用该方法开发的智能应用程序通过跌倒检测建模实验和模型移动部署的结果进行了验证。总体表现最好的模型是 ResNet152，它在标准化、打乱数据集上运行，窗口大小为 2 秒，AUC 为 92.8%，灵敏度为 87.28%，特异性为 98.33%。鉴于这些结果，很明显，加速度计和心电图传感器有利于跌倒检测，并且可以区分跌倒和其他活动。由于结果数据集中发现的弱点，这项研究留下了很大的改进空间。这些改进包括在跌倒的关键阶段使用标记协议、增加数据集样本的数量、改进测试对象的表示以及尝试频域预处理。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于可穿戴ECG和加速度计传感器的智能应用，用于检测跌倒事件。
AI.motivation: 由于老龄化人口增加带来的医疗和经济需求，及时可靠的跌倒检测研究需求迫切。
AI.method: 利用高质量传感器和AI芯片，结合机器学习算法（如ResNet152），开发多组件智能应用并进行模型验证。
AI.result: ResNet152模型在标准化数据集上达到92.8% AUC、87.28%灵敏度和98.33%特异性，证明传感器对跌倒与活动的区分有效性。
AI.conclusion: 当前方法有效，但需改进数据集标注协议、样本数量、受试者多样性及频域预处理以进一步提升性能。

authors_text: Leilani H. Gilpin,Andrew R. Paley,Mohammed A. Alam,Sarah Spurlock,Kristian J. Hammond
title: "Explanation" is Not a Technical Term: The Problem of Ambiguity in XAI
title_zh: “解释”不是一个技术术语：XAI 中的歧义问题
abstract: There is broad agreement that Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, particularly those using Machine Learning (ML), should be able to "explain" their behavior. Unfortunately, there is little agreement as to what constitutes an "explanation." This has caused a disconnect between the explanations that systems produce in service of explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and those explanations that users and other audiences actually need, which should be defined by the full spectrum of functional roles, audiences, and capabilities for explanation. In this paper, we explore the features of explanations and how to use those features in evaluating their utility. We focus on the requirements for explanations defined by their functional role, the knowledge states of users who are trying to understand them, and the availability of the information needed to generate them. Further, we discuss the risk of XAI enabling trust in systems without establishing their trustworthiness and define a critical next step for the field of XAI to establish metrics to guide and ground the utility of system-generated explanations.
summary: There is broad agreement that Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems, particularly those using Machine Learning (ML), should be able to "explain" their behavior. Unfortunately, there is little agreement as to what constitutes an "explanation." This has caused a disconnect between the explanations that systems produce in service of explainable Artificial Intelligence (XAI) and those explanations that users and other audiences actually need, which should be defined by the full spectrum of functional roles, audiences, and capabilities for explanation. In this paper, we explore the features of explanations and how to use those features in evaluating their utility. We focus on the requirements for explanations defined by their functional role, the knowledge states of users who are trying to understand them, and the availability of the information needed to generate them. Further, we discuss the risk of XAI enabling trust in systems without establishing their trustworthiness and define a critical next step for the field of XAI to establish metrics to guide and ground the utility of system-generated explanations.
abstract_zh: 人们普遍认为人工智能（AI）系统，特别是那些使用机器学习（ML）的系统，应该能够“解释”它们的行为。不幸的是，对于什么构成“解释”几乎没有达成一致。这导致系统为可解释人工智能 (XAI) 服务而生成的解释与用户和其他受众实际需要的解释之间存在脱节，这些解释应由全方位的功能角色、受众和解释能力来定义。在本文中，我们探讨了解释的特征以及如何使用这些特征来评估其效用。我们重点关注由其功能角色定义的解释要求、试图理解它们的用户的知识状态以及生成它们所需的信息的可用性。此外，我们讨论了 XAI 在未建立系统可信度的情况下实现系统信任的风险，并定义了 XAI 领域下一步的关键步骤，即建立指标来指导和奠定系统生成解释的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了可解释人工智能（XAI）中'解释'概念的模糊性问题，探讨如何评估系统生成解释的效用并提出改进方向。
AI.motivation: 当前XAI领域对'解释'的定义缺乏统一标准，导致系统生成的解释与用户实际需求脱节，可能误增系统可信度却未确保其可靠性。
AI.method: 通过分析解释的特征，结合其功能角色、用户知识状态及信息可获得性三个维度评估解释效用，并讨论XAI的信任风险。
AI.result: 识别出影响解释效用的关键因素，指出XAI可能因过度依赖解释而忽视系统可靠性，并提出建立评估指标作为领域发展关键步骤。
AI.conclusion: 需明确'解释'的技术定义并建立量化评估体系，确保XAI系统生成的解释既满足用户需求又能真实反映系统可信度。

authors_text: Andresia Pitri,Leon Andretti Abdillah
title: Usability Testing untuk Mengukur Kepuasaan Pengguna Website Mailo Store
title_zh: 可用性测试 untuk mengukur kepuasaan pengguna Website Mailo Store
comment: 12 pages, in Indonesian language, in The Third Bina Darma Conference on Computer Science (BDCCS2021), 2021
comments: 12 pages, in Indonesian language, in The Third Bina Darma Conference on Computer Science (BDCCS2021), 2021
abstract: Technological developments in the current era of globalization cannot be avoided, with increasingly rapid progress to become technology as a medium of information that is very much needed in life. Mailo store is one of the SMEs that have used the website and the internet as a medium for storing their information to the wider community, therefore an evaluation is needed to measure the ease of website users for users using Usability Testing which has 8 variables, namely learning (learnability), Efficiency (efficiency), Easy to remember (memorability), Errors and security (errors), Easy to understand (Understandability), Easy to operate (Operability), attract user attention (Attractiveness), Satisfaction (satisfaction). This research data was collected by distributing questionnaires to 109 respondents using a random sampling technique. Furthermore, the data obtained were processed using SPSS version 25 software. The data analysis method used was a quantitative analysis method using validity and reliability tests, classical assumption tests, multiple regression tests, and hypothesis testing. The results of the assessment of the usability testing method will be useful for the sustainability and development of the mailo store website in the future to make it even better.
summary: Technological developments in the current era of globalization cannot be avoided, with increasingly rapid progress to become technology as a medium of information that is very much needed in life. Mailo store is one of the SMEs that have used the website and the internet as a medium for storing their information to the wider community, therefore an evaluation is needed to measure the ease of website users for users using Usability Testing which has 8 variables, namely learning (learnability), Efficiency (efficiency), Easy to remember (memorability), Errors and security (errors), Easy to understand (Understandability), Easy to operate (Operability), attract user attention (Attractiveness), Satisfaction (satisfaction). This research data was collected by distributing questionnaires to 109 respondents using a random sampling technique. Furthermore, the data obtained were processed using SPSS version 25 software. The data analysis method used was a quantitative analysis method using validity and reliability tests, classical assumption tests, multiple regression tests, and hypothesis testing. The results of the assessment of the usability testing method will be useful for the sustainability and development of the mailo store website in the future to make it even better.
abstract_zh: 当今全球化时代，技术的发展是不可避免的，技术的进步越来越快，成为生活中非常需要的信息媒介。 Mailo商店是使用网站和互联网作为向更广泛社区存储信息的媒介的中小企业之一，因此需要使用可用性测试来衡量网站用户的易用性，该测试有8个变量，即学习性（learnability）、效率（efficiency）、易于记住（memorability）、错误和安全性（errors）、易于理解（understandability）、易于操作（Operability）、吸引用户注意力（吸引力）、满意度（满意）。该研究数据是通过使用随机抽样技术向 109 名受访者发放问卷来收集的。此外，获得的数据使用SPSS 25版软件进行处理。所使用的数据分析方法是使用有效性和信度检验、经典假设检验、多元回归检验和假设检验的定量分析方法。可用性测试方法的评估结果将有助于mailo商店网站未来的可持续性和发展，使其变得更好。

AI.tldr: 通过可用性测试评估Mailo Store网站的用户满意度。
AI.motivation: 在全球化技术发展的背景下，中小企业需通过评估网站易用性以提升用户体验和竞争力。
AI.method: 采用问卷调查法收集109名随机样本数据，使用SPSS 25进行定量分析，包括效度检验、信度检验、经典假设检验、多元回归分析和假设检验。
AI.result: 可用性测试结果为Mailo Store网站的持续改进和未来发展提供数据支持。
AI.conclusion: 可用性测试能有效识别网站优化方向，提升用户满意度及网站性能，助力中小企业数字化转型。

search_text: Usability Testing untuk Mengukur Kepuasaan Pengguna Website Mailo Store 可用性测试 untuk mengukur kepuasaan pengguna Website Mailo Store Technological developments in the current era of globalization cannot be avoided, with increasingly rapid progress to become technology as a medium of information that is very much needed in life. Mailo store is one of the SMEs that have used the website and the internet as a medium for storing their information to the wider community, therefore an evaluation is needed to measure the ease of website users for users using Usability Testing which has 8 variables, namely learning (learnability), Efficiency (efficiency), Easy to remember (memorability), Errors and security (errors), Easy to understand (Understandability), Easy to operate (Operability), attract user attention (Attractiveness), Satisfaction (satisfaction). This research data was collected by distributing questionnaires to 109 respondents using a random sampling technique. Furthermore, the data obtained were processed using SPSS version 25 software. The data analysis method used was a quantitative analysis method using validity and reliability tests, classical assumption tests, multiple regression tests, and hypothesis testing. The results of the assessment of the usability testing method will be useful for the sustainability and development of the mailo store website in the future to make it even better. 当今全球化时代，技术的发展是不可避免的，技术的进步越来越快，成为生活中非常需要的信息媒介。 Mailo商店是使用网站和互联网作为向更广泛社区存储信息的媒介的中小企业之一，因此需要使用可用性测试来衡量网站用户的易用性，该测试有8个变量，即学习性（learnability）、效率（efficiency）、易于记住（memorability）、错误和安全性（errors）、易于理解（understandability）、易于操作（Operability）、吸引用户注意力（吸引力）、满意度（满意）。该研究数据是通过使用随机抽样技术向 109 名受访者发放问卷来收集的。此外，获得的数据使用SPSS 25版软件进行处理。所使用的数据分析方法是使用有效性和信度检验、经典假设检验、多元回归检验和假设检验的定量分析方法。可用性测试方法的评估结果将有助于mailo商店网站未来的可持续性和发展，使其变得更好。 通过可用性测试评估Mailo Store网站的用户满意度。 Andresia Pitri,Leon Andretti Abdillah cs.HC

authors_text: Sana Ayromlou,Purang Abolmaesumi,Teresa Tsang,Xiaoxiao Li
title: Class Impression for Data-free Incremental Learning
title_zh: 无数据增量学习的课堂印象
abstract: Standard deep learning-based classification approaches require collecting all samples from all classes in advance and are trained offline. This paradigm may not be practical in real-world clinical applications, where new classes are incrementally introduced through the addition of new data. Class incremental learning is a strategy allowing learning from such data. However, a major challenge is catastrophic forgetting, i.e., performance degradation on previous classes when adapting a trained model to new data. Prior methodologies to alleviate this challenge save a portion of training data require perpetual storage of such data that may introduce privacy issues. Here, we propose a novel data-free class incremental learning framework that first synthesizes data from the model trained on previous classes to generate a \ours. Subsequently, it updates the model by combining the synthesized data with new class data. Furthermore, we incorporate a cosine normalized Cross-entropy loss to mitigate the adverse effects of the imbalance, a margin loss to increase separation among previous classes and new ones, and an intra-domain contrastive loss to generalize the model trained on the synthesized data to real data. We compare our proposed framework with state-of-the-art methods in class incremental learning, where we demonstrate improvement in accuracy for the classification of 11,062 echocardiography cine series of patients.
summary: Standard deep learning-based classification approaches require collecting all samples from all classes in advance and are trained offline. This paradigm may not be practical in real-world clinical applications, where new classes are incrementally introduced through the addition of new data. Class incremental learning is a strategy allowing learning from such data. However, a major challenge is catastrophic forgetting, i.e., performance degradation on previous classes when adapting a trained model to new data. Prior methodologies to alleviate this challenge save a portion of training data require perpetual storage of such data that may introduce privacy issues. Here, we propose a novel data-free class incremental learning framework that first synthesizes data from the model trained on previous classes to generate a \ours. Subsequently, it updates the model by combining the synthesized data with new class data. Furthermore, we incorporate a cosine normalized Cross-entropy loss to mitigate the adverse effects of the imbalance, a margin loss to increase separation among previous classes and new ones, and an intra-domain contrastive loss to generalize the model trained on the synthesized data to real data. We compare our proposed framework with state-of-the-art methods in class incremental learning, where we demonstrate improvement in accuracy for the classification of 11,062 echocardiography cine series of patients.
abstract_zh: 标准的基于深度学习的分类方法需要提前收集所有类别的所有样本并进行离线训练。这种范例在现实世界的临床应用中可能并不实用，因为新的类别是通过添加新数据逐步引入的。类增量学习是一种允许从此类数据中学习的策略。然而，一个主要挑战是灾难性遗忘，即在将经过训练的模型适应新数据时，先前类别的性能下降。缓解这一挑战的现有方法需要保存一部分训练数据，需要永久存储此类数据，这可能会带来隐私问题。在这里，我们提出了一种新颖的无数据类增量学习框架，该框架首先综合先前类训练的模型中的数据，以生成\ours。随后，它通过将合成数据与新类数据相结合来更新模型。此外，我们还引入了余弦归一化交叉熵损失来减轻不平衡的不利影响，引入边际损失来增加先前类和新类之间的分离，并引入域内对比损失来将在合成数据上训练的模型推广到真实数据。我们将我们提出的框架与课堂增量学习中最先进的方法进行比较，我们证明了 11,062 名超声心动图电影系列患者的分类准确性的提高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需存储数据的增量学习框架，用于解决临床场景中新增类别时的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统增量学习方法需存储历史数据以防止遗忘，但存在隐私风险且不适用于实际临床场景。现有方法在新增类别时易导致模型性能下降。
AI.method: 通过从先前训练的模型中合成数据生成伪样本，结合余弦归一化交叉熵损失、边缘损失和域内对比损失，实现模型更新与类别分离。
AI.result: 在11,062例超声心动图数据集上验证，分类准确率优于现有最先进方法，有效缓解了灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需存储历史数据即可实现增量学习，在临床应用中具有隐私保护和实际部署优势。

authors_text: Yunqi Sun,Jianfeng Zhou
title: Correction Algorithm of Sampling Effect and Its Application
title_zh: 采样效果校正算法及其应用
abstract: The sampling effect of the imaging acquisition device is long considered to be a modulation process of the input signal, introducing additional error into the signal acquisition process. This paper proposes a correction algorithm for the modulation process that solves the sampling effect with high accuracy. We examine the algorithm with perfect continuous Gaussian images and selected digitized images, which indicate an accuracy increase of 106 for Gaussian images, 102 at 15 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images, and 105 at 101 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images. The accuracy limit of the Gaussian image comes from the truncation error, while the accuracy limit of the digitized images comes from their finite resolution, which can be improved by increasing the time of Shannon interpolation.
summary: The sampling effect of the imaging acquisition device is long considered to be a modulation process of the input signal, introducing additional error into the signal acquisition process. This paper proposes a correction algorithm for the modulation process that solves the sampling effect with high accuracy. We examine the algorithm with perfect continuous Gaussian images and selected digitized images, which indicate an accuracy increase of 106 for Gaussian images, 102 at 15 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images, and 105 at 101 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images. The accuracy limit of the Gaussian image comes from the truncation error, while the accuracy limit of the digitized images comes from their finite resolution, which can be improved by increasing the time of Shannon interpolation.
abstract_zh: 成像采集设备的采样效果长期以来被认为是输入信号的调制过程，在信号采集过程中引入了额外的误差。本文提出了一种调制过程的校正算法，能够高精度地解决采样效果。我们用完美的连续高斯图像和选定的数字化图像来检查该算法，结果表明，高斯图像的精度提高了 106，数字化图像的香农插值 15 倍时精度提高了 102，数字化图像的香农插值 101 倍时精度提高了 105。高斯图像的精度限制来自于截断误差，而数字化图像的精度限制来自于其有限的分辨率，可以通过增加香农插值的时间来提高分辨率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高精度修正成像设备采样效应的算法，并通过实验验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 成像设备的采样效应会引入信号采集误差，传统方法难以实现高精度修正。
AI.method: 设计调制过程修正算法，使用连续高斯图像和数字化图像进行测试，结合Shannon插值方法验证效果。
AI.result: 高斯图像精度提升106倍，数字化图像经15次Shannon插值提升102倍、101次插值提升105倍，精度限制分别来自截断误差和有限分辨率。
AI.conclusion: 该算法能有效修正采样效应，数字化图像精度可通过增加Shannon插值次数进一步优化。

This paper proposes a correction algorithm for the modulation process that solves the sampling effect with high accuracy. We examine the algorithm with perfect continuous Gaussian images and selected digitized images, which indicate an accuracy increase of 106 for Gaussian images, 102 at 15 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images, and 105 at 101 times of Shannon interpolation for digitized images. The accuracy limit of the Gaussian image comes from the truncation error, while the accuracy limit of the digitized images comes from their finite resolution, which can be improved by increasing the time of Shannon interpolation. 成像采集设备的采样效果长期以来被认为是输入信号的调制过程，在信号采集过程中引入了额外的误差。本文提出了一种调制过程的校正算法，能够高精度地解决采样效果。我们用完美的连续高斯图像和选定的数字化图像来检查该算法，结果表明，高斯图像的精度提高了 106，数字化图像的香农插值 15 倍时精度提高了 102，数字化图像的香农插值 101 倍时精度提高了 105。高斯图像的精度限制来自于截断误差，而数字化图像的精度限制来自于其有限的分辨率，可以通过增加香农插值的时间来提高分辨率。 本文提出一种高精度修正成像设备采样效应的算法，并通过实验验证其有效性。 Yunqi Sun,Jianfeng Zhou astro-ph.IM,cs.CV

authors_text: Jihoon Moon,Debasmit Das,C. S. George Lee
title: A Multi-stage Framework with Mean Subspace Computation and Recursive Feedback for Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 具有平均子空间计算和递归反馈的在线无监督域适应的多阶段框架
abstract: In this paper, we address the Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (OUDA) problem and propose a novel multi-stage framework to solve real-world situations when the target data are unlabeled and arriving online sequentially in batches. To project the data from the source and the target domains to a common subspace and manipulate the projected data in real-time, our proposed framework institutes a novel method, called an Incremental Computation of Mean-Subspace (ICMS) technique, which computes an approximation of mean-target subspace on a Grassmann manifold and is proven to be a close approximate to the Karcher mean. Furthermore, the transformation matrix computed from the mean-target subspace is applied to the next target data in the recursive-feedback stage, aligning the target data closer to the source domain. The computation of transformation matrix and the prediction of next-target subspace leverage the performance of the recursive-feedback stage by considering the cumulative temporal dependency among the flow of the target subspace on the Grassmann manifold. The labels of the transformed target data are predicted by the pre-trained source classifier, then the classifier is updated by the transformed data and predicted labels. Extensive experiments on six datasets were conducted to investigate in depth the effect and contribution of each stage in our proposed framework and its performance over previous approaches in terms of classification accuracy and computational speed. In addition, the experiments on traditional manifold-based learning models and neural-network-based learning models demonstrated the applicability of our proposed framework for various types of learning models.
summary: In this paper, we address the Online Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (OUDA) problem and propose a novel multi-stage framework to solve real-world situations when the target data are unlabeled and arriving online sequentially in batches. To project the data from the source and the target domains to a common subspace and manipulate the projected data in real-time, our proposed framework institutes a novel method, called an Incremental Computation of Mean-Subspace (ICMS) technique, which computes an approximation of mean-target subspace on a Grassmann manifold and is proven to be a close approximate to the Karcher mean. Furthermore, the transformation matrix computed from the mean-target subspace is applied to the next target data in the recursive-feedback stage, aligning the target data closer to the source domain. The computation of transformation matrix and the prediction of next-target subspace leverage the performance of the recursive-feedback stage by considering the cumulative temporal dependency among the flow of the target subspace on the Grassmann manifold. The labels of the transformed target data are predicted by the pre-trained source classifier, then the classifier is updated by the transformed data and predicted labels. Extensive experiments on six datasets were conducted to investigate in depth the effect and contribution of each stage in our proposed framework and its performance over previous approaches in terms of classification accuracy and computational speed. In addition, the experiments on traditional manifold-based learning models and neural-network-based learning models demonstrated the applicability of our proposed framework for various types of learning models.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们解决了在线无监督域适应（OUDA）问题，并提出了一种新颖的多阶段框架来解决目标数据未标记并按批次顺序到达在线时的现实情况。为了将源域和目标域的数据投影到公共子空间并实时操纵投影数据，我们提出的框架提出了一种称为平均子空间增量计算（ICMS）技术的新颖方法，该方法计算格拉斯曼流形上的平均目标子空间的近似值，并被证明与卡彻均值非常接近。此外，从平均目标子空间计算出的变换矩阵应用于递归反馈阶段的下一个目标数据，使目标数据更接近源域。变换矩阵的计算和下一个目标子空间的预测通过考虑目标子空间流在格拉斯曼流形上的累积时间依赖性来利用递归反馈阶段的性能。变换后的目标数据的标签由预训练的源分类器预测，然后根据变换后的数据和预测的标签更新分类器。对六个数据集进行了广泛的实验，以深入研究我们提出的框架中每个阶段的效果和贡献，以及其在分类精度和计算速度方面相对于先前方法的性能。此外，传统的基于流形的学习模型和基于神经网络的学习模型的实验证明了我们提出的框架对于各种类型的学习模型的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段框架解决在线无监督域适应问题，通过增量计算均值子空间和递归反馈机制处理未标记的在线目标数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以有效处理目标数据在线到达且无标签的场景，需提升计算效率并保持域间对齐效果。
AI.method: 提出增量均值子空间（ICMS）技术，在Grassmann流形上近似计算目标子空间均值，并通过递归反馈阶段利用变换矩阵对齐目标数据，结合预训练分类器预测标签并更新模型。
AI.result: 在六个数据集上的实验表明，该框架在分类准确率和计算速度上优于现有方法，且适用于传统流形模型和神经网络模型。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过增量计算与递归反馈有效解决了在线无监督域适应问题，具有广泛适用性和优越性能。

authors_text: Yuchuan Gou,Bo Peng,Hongchen Liu,Hang Zhou,Jui-Hsin Lai
title: MultiEarth 2022 -- The Champion Solution for Image-to-Image Translation Challenge via Generation Models
title_zh: MultiEarth 2022——通过生成模型解决图像到图像翻译挑战的冠军解决方案
abstract: The MultiEarth 2022 Image-to-Image Translation challenge provides a well-constrained test bed for generating the corresponding RGB Sentinel-2 imagery with the given Sentinel-1 VV & VH imagery. In this challenge, we designed various generation models and found the SPADE [1] and pix2pixHD [2] models could perform our best results. In our self-evaluation, the SPADE-2 model with L1-loss can achieve 0.02194 MAE score and 31.092 PSNR dB. In our final submission, the best model can achieve 0.02795 MAE score ranked No.1 on the leader board.
summary: The MultiEarth 2022 Image-to-Image Translation challenge provides a well-constrained test bed for generating the corresponding RGB Sentinel-2 imagery with the given Sentinel-1 VV & VH imagery. In this challenge, we designed various generation models and found the SPADE [1] and pix2pixHD [2] models could perform our best results. In our self-evaluation, the SPADE-2 model with L1-loss can achieve 0.02194 MAE score and 31.092 PSNR dB. In our final submission, the best model can achieve 0.02795 MAE score ranked No.1 on the leader board.
abstract_zh: MultiEarth 2022 图像到图像转换挑战提供了一个约束良好的测试台，用于使用给定的 Sentinel-1 VV 和 VH 图像生成相应的 RGB Sentinel-2 图像。在这次挑战中，我们设计了各种生成模型，发现 SPADE [1] 和 pix2pixHD [2] 模型可以取得我们最好的结果。在我们的自我评估中，具有 L1 损失的 SPADE-2 模型可以获得 0.02194 MAE 分数和 31.092 PSNR dB。在我们的最终提交中，最好的模型可以达到 0.02795 MAE 分数，在排行榜上排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了在MultiEarth 2022图像到图像翻译挑战赛中，通过生成模型实现从Sentinel-1 VV & VH图像生成对应的RGB Sentinel-2图像的任务。
AI.motivation: 该挑战赛提供了一个受限的测试环境，用于生成与给定Sentinel-1 VV & VH图像对应的RGB Sentinel-2图像，从而推动图像到图像翻译技术的发展。
AI.method: 作者设计并测试了多种生成模型，发现SPADE和pix2pixHD模型表现最佳，最终提交的SPADE-2模型使用L1-loss取得了优异结果。
AI.result: 在自评估中，SPADE-2模型的MAE得分为0.02194，PSNR得分为31.092 dB；最终提交的模型MAE得分为0.02795，在排行榜上排名第一。
AI.conclusion: 通过使用SPADE-2模型，作者在MultiEarth 2022挑战赛中取得了最佳成绩，证明了生成模型在图像到图像翻译任务中的有效性。
